<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a9c55c86/entry/src/main/ets/view/MediaModule.ets`

```text
0	import { media } from '@kit.MediaKit';
1	import { audio } from '@kit.AudioKit';
2	import { avSession } from '@kit.AVSessionKit';
3	import { common } from '@kit.AbilityKit';
4	
5	export interface Song { id: number; title: string; artist: string; cover: string; url: string; quality: string; }
6	
7	@Component
8	export struct MediaModule {
9	  @State currentSong: Song | null = null;
10	  @State isPlaying: boolean = false;
11	  @State isLoading: boolean = false;
12	  @State currentTime: number = 0;
13	  @State totalTime: number = 0;
14	  @State rotateAngle: number = 0;
15	  @Prop isPageVisible: boolean = true;
16	
17	  private avPlayer: media.AVPlayer | undefined = undefined;
18	  private session: avSession.AVSession | undefined = undefined;
19	  private timer: number = -1;
20	
21	  private songList: Song[] = [
22	    { id: 1, title: 'Midnight City', artist: 'M83 Style', cover: 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/1389429/pexels-photo-1389429.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=600', url: 'https://www.soundhelix.com/examples/mp3/SoundHelix-Song-1.mp3', quality: 'SQ' },
23	    { id: 2, title: 'Ocean Eyes', artist: 'Billie Eilish', cover: 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/167092/pexels-photo-167092.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=600', url: 'https://www.soundhelix.com/examples/mp3/SoundHelix-Song-2.mp3', quality: 'HR' },
24	    { id: 3, title: 'Shape of You', artist: 'Ed Sheeran', cover: 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/1763075/pexels-photo-1763075.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=600', url: 'https://www.soundhelix.com/examples/mp3/SoundHelix-Song-3.mp3', quality: 'HQ' }
25	  ];
26	
27	  aboutToAppear(): void { this.safeInit(); }
28	
29	  async safeInit(): Promise<void> {
30	    try {
31	      this.currentSong = this.songList[0];
32	      await this.initSession();
33	      await this.initPlayer();
34	      this.startSpectrumAnim();
35	    } catch (e) {
36	      console.error('Media Init Failed:', JSON.stringify(e));
37	    }
38	  }
39	
40	  aboutToDisappear(): void {
41	    this.releasePlayer();
42	    if(this.session) {
43	      // 销毁session也需要try-catch，防止退出时崩溃
44	      try { this.session.destroy(); } catch(e) {}
45	    }
46	    clearInterval(this.timer);
47	  }
48	
49	  // ✅ 修复：增强异常捕获，消除编译器警告
50	  async initSession(): Promise<void> {
51	    try {
52	      let context = this.getUIContext().getHostContext() as common.UIAbilityContext;
53	      this.session = await avSession.createAVSession(context, 'CarInfotainmentSession', 'audio');
54	      await this.session.activate();
55	    } catch(e) {
56	      console.error('AVSession Init Error:', JSON.stringify(e));
57	    }
58	  }
59	
60	  async updateSessionMetadata(song: Song): Promise<void> {
61	    if(!this.session) return;
62	    try{
63	      await this.session.setAVMetadata({
64	        assetId: song.id.toString(),
65	        title: song.title,
66	        artist: song.artist,
67	        mediaImage: song.cover,
68	        duration: this.totalTime
69	      });
70	    } catch(e) {
71	      console.error('Metadata Update Error:', e);
72	    }
73	  }
74	
75	  async updateSessionPlaybackState(state: avSession.PlaybackState, time: number): Promise<void> {
76	    if(!this.session) return;
77	    try{
78	      await this.session.setAVPlaybackState({
79	        state: state,
80	        position: {
81	          elapsedTime: time,
82	          updateTime: new Date().getTime()
83	        },
84	        speed: 1.0,
85	        bufferedTime: this.totalTime,
86	        loopMode: avSession.LoopMode.LOOP_MODE_LIST,
87	        isFavorite: false
88	      });
89	    } catch(e) {}
90	  }
91	
92	  async initPlayer(): Promise<void> {
93	    try {
94	      this.avPlayer = await media.createAVPlayer();
95	      this.avPlayer.audioRendererInfo = {usage: audio.StreamUsage.STREAM_USAGE_MUSIC, rendererFlags: 0};
96	      this.setAVPlayerCallback();
97	      if(this.currentSong) this.avPlayer.url = this.currentSong.url;
98	    } catch(e) {
99	      console.error('AVPlayer Init Error:', e);
100	    }
101	  }
102	
103	  releasePlayer(): void { try { if(this.avPlayer) this.avPlayer.release(); } catch(e){} }
104	
105	  setAVPlayerCallback(): void {
106	    if(!this.avPlayer) return;
107	    this.avPlayer.on('stateChange', async (state: media.AVPlayerState) => {
108	      switch(state) {
109	        case 'initialized': try{ await this.avPlayer!.prepare(); }catch(e){} break;
110	        case 'prepared':
111	          this.totalTime = this.avPlayer!.duration;
112	          if(this.currentSong) this.updateSessionMetadata(this.currentSong);
113	          if(this.isPlaying) try{this.avPlayer!.play();}catch(e){}
114	          break;
115	        case 'playing':
116	          this.isPlaying = true;
117	          this.startRotateAnim();
118	          this.updateSessionPlaybackState(avSession.PlaybackState.PLAYBACK_STATE_PLAY, this.currentTime);
119	          break;
120	        case 'paused':
121	          this.isPlaying = false;
122	          this.stopRotateAnim();
123	          this.updateSessionPlaybackState(avSession.PlaybackState.PLAYBACK_STATE_PAUSE, this.currentTime);
124	          break;
125	        case 'completed': this.playNext(); break;
126	      }
127	    });
128	    this.avPlayer.on('timeUpdate', (time) => this.currentTime = time);
129	  }
130	
131	  async playSong(song: Song): Promise<void> {
132	    if(!this.avPlayer) return;
133	    if(this.currentSong?.id === song.id) { this.togglePlay(); return; }
134	    this.currentSong = song;
135	    this.isPlaying = true;
136	    this.rotateAngle = 0;
137	    try{ await this.avPlayer.reset(); this.avPlayer.url = song.url; }catch(e){}
138	  }
139	
140	  async togglePlay(): Promise<void> {
141	    if(!this.avPlayer) return;
142	    try{ if(this.isPlaying) await this.avPlayer.pause(); else await this.avPlayer.play(); }catch(e){}
143	  }
144	
145	  playNext(): void {
146	    if(!this.currentSong) return;
147	    let idx = this.songList.findIndex(i=>i.id===this.currentSong?.id);
148	    this.playSong(this.songList[(idx+1)%this.songList.length]);
149	  }
150	
151	  playPrev(): void {
152	    if(!this.currentSong) return;
153	    let idx = this.songList.findIndex(i=>i.id===this.currentSong?.id);
154	    this.playSong(this.songList[idx===0?this.songList.length-1:idx-1]);
155	  }
156	
157	  startRotateAnim(): void { clearInterval(this.timer); this.timer = setInterval(() => { this.rotateAngle = (this.rotateAngle+0.2)%360; }, 16); }
158	  stopRotateAnim(): void { clearInterval(this.timer); }
159	  startSpectrumAnim(): void {}
160	  formatTime(ms: number): string { if(!ms||ms<0) return '00:00'; let s=Math.floor(ms/1000); return `${Math.floor(s/60).toString().padStart(2,'0')}:${(s%60).toString().padStart(2,'0')}`; }
161	
162	  build() {
163	    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.Bottom }) { // 内容底部对齐
164	
165	      // 1. 背景层
166	      if (this.currentSong) {
167	        Image(this.currentSong.cover).width('120%').height('120%').blur(100).opacity(0.4).objectFit(ImageFit.Cover)
168	        Rect().width('100%').height('100%').fill(Color.Black).opacity(0.5)
169	      } else {
170	        Rect().width('100%').height('100%').fill('#0F172A')
171	      }
172	
173	      // 2. 唱片区 (居中)
174	      Column() {
175	        Stack() {
176	          Circle({ width: 280, height: 280 }).fill('#101010').shadow({ radius: 30, color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.6)' })
177	          Image(this.currentSong?.cover).width(180).height(180).borderRadius(90).rotate({ angle: this.rotateAngle })
178	        }
179	        Text(this.currentSong?.title).fontSize(32).fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold).fontColor(Color.White).margin({ top: 30 })
180	        Text(this.currentSong?.artist).fontSize(16).fontColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.6)').margin({ top: 8 })
181	      }
182	      .width('100%')
183	      .height('100%')
184	      .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
185	      .padding({ bottom: 150 }) // 给底部控制台腾出空间
186	
187	      // 3. 底部悬浮控制岛 (避让左下角)
188	      Column() {
189	        // 进度
190	        Row() {
191	          Text(this.formatTime(this.currentTime)).fontSize(12).fontColor('#AAA')
192	          Slider({ value: this.currentTime, min: 0, max: this.totalTime })
193	            .layoutWeight(1).trackColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.1)').selectedColor('#00E5FF').margin({ left: 10, right: 10 })
194	            .onChange((v, m) => { if(m===SliderChangeMode.End) try{this.avPlayer?.seek(v)}catch(e){} })
195	          Text(this.formatTime(this.totalTime)).fontSize(12).fontColor('#AAA')
196	        }.width('90%').margin({ bottom: 20 })
197	
198	        // 按钮
199	        Row({ space: 50 }) {
200	          this.Btn("⏮", 28, () => this.playPrev())
201	          Button() { Text(this.isPlaying ? "⏸" : "▶").fontSize(32).fontColor(Color.White) }
202	          .width(72).height(72).borderRadius(36).backgroundColor('#00E5FF').shadow({ radius: 20, color: 'rgba(0,229,255,0.4)' })
203	          .onClick(() => this.togglePlay())
204	          this.Btn("⏭", 28, () => this.playNext())
205	        }
206	      }
207	      .width('85%')
208	      .padding(24)
209	      .backgroundColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.05)')
210	      .backdropBlur(30)
211	      .borderRadius(30)
212	      .border({ width: 1, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)' })
213	      // 核心避让：距离底部 100vp，使控制台浮起来，左下角按钮不被遮挡
214	      .margin({ bottom: 100 })
215	    }
216	    .width('100%').height('100%')
217	  }
218	
219	  @Builder
220	  Btn(txt: string, size: number, cb: ()=>void): void {
221	    Button(txt).type(ButtonType.Circle).width(60).height(60).fontSize(size).backgroundColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.05)').onClick(cb)
222	  }
223	}
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
0	import { AbilityConstant, ConfigurationConstant, UIAbility, Want } from '@kit.AbilityKit';
1	import { hilog } from '@kit.PerformanceAnalysisKit';
2	import { window } from '@kit.ArkUI';
3	
4	const DOMAIN = 0x0000;
5	
6	export default class EntryAbility extends UIAbility {
7	  onCreate(want: Want, launchParam: AbilityConstant.LaunchParam): void {
8	    try {
9	      this.context.getApplicationContext().setColorMode(ConfigurationConstant.ColorMode.COLOR_MODE_NOT_SET);
10	    } catch (err) {
11	      hilog.error(DOMAIN, 'testTag', 'Failed to set colorMode. Cause: %{public}s', JSON.stringify(err));
12	    }
13	    hilog.info(DOMAIN, 'testTag', '%{public}s', 'Ability onCreate');
14	  }
15	
16	  onDestroy(): void {
17	    hilog.info(DOMAIN, 'testTag', '%{public}s', 'Ability onDestroy');
18	  }
19	
20	  onWindowStageCreate(windowStage: window.WindowStage): void {
21	    // Main window is created, set main page for this ability

28	      }

30	    });
31	  }
32	
33	  onWindowStageDestroy(): void {

36	  }
37	
38	  onForeground(): void {

41	  }
42
```

```text
6	const router = express.Router();

8	// ========== 认证相关路由（无需token） ==========
9	router.post('/auth/register', authController.register);
10	router.post('/auth/login', authController.login);
```

```text
0	import express from 'express';
1	import cors from 'cors';
2	import dotenv from 'dotenv';
3	import routes from './routes';
4	import { testConnection } from './config/database';
5	
6	// 加载环境变量
7	dotenv.config();
8	
9	const app = express();
10	const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
11	
12	// 中间件
13	app.use(cors());  // 允许跨域
14	app.use(express.json());  // 解析JSON请求体
15	app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true }));  // 解析URL编码请求体
16	
17	// 请求日志
18	app.use((req, res, next) => {
19	  console.log(`${new Date().toISOString()} - ${req.method} ${req.path}`);
20	  next();
21	});
22	
23	// API路由
24	app.use('/api/v1', routes);
25	
26	// 健康检查
27	app.get('/health', (req, res) => {
28	  res.json({
29	    status: 'ok',
30	    timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
31	  });
32	});
33	
34	// 404处理
35	app.use((req, res) => {
36	  res.status(404).json({
37	    code: 404,
38	    message: '接口不存在'
39	  });
40	});
41	
42	// 错误处理
43	app.use((err: any, req: express.Request, res: express.Response, next: express.NextFunction) => {
44	  console.error('Server error:', err);
45	  res.status(500).json({
46	    code: 500,
47	    message: '服务器内部错误'
48	  });
49	});
50	
51	// 启动服务器
52	async function startServer() {
53	  try {
54	    // 测试数据库连接
55	    const dbConnected = await testConnection();
56	    
57	    if (!dbConnected) {
58	      console.error('❌ 数据库连接失败，服务器启动中止');
59	      process.exit(1);
60	    }
61	    
62	    // 启动HTTP服务
63	    app.listen(PORT, () => {
64	      console.log('');
65	      console.log('🚀 ========================================');
66	      console.log(`🚀 车载导航系统后端服务已启动`);
67	      console.log(`🚀 运行环境: ${process.env.NODE_ENV || 'development'}`);
68	      console.log(`🚀 服务地址: http://localhost:${PORT}`);
69	      console.log(`🚀 API文档: http://localhost:${PORT}/api/v1`);
70	      console.log(`🚀 健康检查: http://localhost:${PORT}/health`);
71	      console.log('🚀 ========================================');
72	      console.log('');
73	    });
74	  } catch (error) {
75	    console.error('❌ 服务器启动失败:', error);
76	    process.exit(1);
77	  }
78	}
79	
80	// 优雅关闭
81	process.on('SIGTERM', () => {
82	  console.log('收到SIGTERM信号，正在关闭服务器...');
83	  process.exit(0);
84	});
85	
86	process.on('SIGINT', () => {
87	  console.log('收到SIGINT信号，正在关闭服务器...');
88	  process.exit(0);
89	});
90	
91	// 启动
92	startServer();
93
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a9c55c86/backend/src/controllers/authController.ts`

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs';
2	import { query } from '../config/database';
3	import { generateToken } from '../middleware/auth';
4	
5	interface User {
6	  id: number;
7	  phone: string;
8	  password: string;
9	  nickname?: string;
10	  avatar?: string;
11	}
12	
13	/**
14	 * 用户注册
15	 */
16	export async function register(req: Request, res: Response) {
17	  try {
18	    const { phone, password, nickname } = req.body;
19	    
20	    // 验证参数
21	    if (!phone || !password) {
22	      return res.status(400).json({
23	        code: 400,
24	        message: '手机号和密码不能为空'
25	      });
26	    }
27	    
28	    // 检查手机号是否已注册
29	    const existingUsers = await query<User[]>(
30	      'SELECT id FROM users WHERE phone = ?',
31	      [phone]
32	    );
33	    
34	    if (existingUsers.length > 0) {
35	      return res.status(400).json({
36	        code: 400,
37	        message: '该手机号已注册'
38	      });
39	    }
40	    
41	    // 加密密码
42	    const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);
43	    
44	    // 插入用户
45	    const result: any = await query(
46	      'INSERT INTO users (phone, password, nickname) VALUES (?, ?, ?)',
47	      [phone, hashedPassword, nickname || `用户${phone.slice(-4)}`]
48	    );
49	    
50	    const userId = result.insertId;
51	    
52	    // 生成token
53	    const token = generateToken(userId);
54	    
55	    res.status(201).json({
56	      code: 200,
57	      message: '注册成功',
58	      data: {
59	        userId,
60	        phone,
61	        nickname: nickname || `用户${phone.slice(-4)}`,
62	        token
63	      }
64	    });
65	  } catch (error) {
66	    console.error('Register error:', error);
67	    res.status(500).json({
68	      code: 500,
69	      message: '服务器错误'
70	    });
71	  }
72	}
73	
74	/**
75	 * 用户登录
76	 */
77	export async function login(req: Request, res: Response) {
78	  try {
79	    const { phone, password } = req.body;
80	    
81	    // 验证参数
82	    if (!phone || !password) {
83	      return res.status(400).json({
84	        code: 400,
85	        message: '手机号和密码不能为空'
86	      });
87	    }
88	    
89	    // 查询用户
90	    const users = await query<User[]>(
91	      'SELECT id, phone, password, nickname, avatar FROM users WHERE phone = ?',
92	      [phone]
93	    );
94	    
95	    if (users.length === 0) {
96	      return res.status(401).json({
97	        code: 401,
98	        message: '手机号或密码错误'
99	      });
100	    }
101	    
102	    const user = users[0];
103	    
104	    // 验证密码
105	    const isPasswordValid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password);
106	    
107	    if (!isPasswordValid) {
108	      return res.status(401).json({
109	        code: 401,
110	        message: '手机号或密码错误'
111	      });
112	    }
113	    
114	    // 生成token
115	    const token = generateToken(user.id);
116	    
117	    res.json({
118	      code: 200,
119	      message: '登录成功',
120	      data: {
121	        userId: user.id,
122	        phone: user.phone,
123	        nickname: user.nickname,
124	        avatar: user.avatar,
125	        token
126	      }
127	    });
128	  } catch (error) {
129	    console.error('Login error:', error);
130	    res.status(500).json({
131	      code: 500,
132	      message: '服务器错误'
133	    });
134	  }
135	}
136	
137	/**
138	 * 获取用户信息
139	 */
140	export async function getProfile(req: Request, res: Response) {
141	  try {
142	    const userId = req.userId;
143	    
144	    const users = await query<User[]>(
145	      'SELECT id, phone, nickname, avatar, created_at FROM users WHERE id = ?',
146	      [userId]
147	    );
148	    
149	    if (users.length === 0) {
150	      return res.status(404).json({
151	        code: 404,
152	        message: '用户不存在'
153	      });
154	    }
155	    
156	    res.json({
157	      code: 200,
158	      message: '获取成功',
159	      data: users[0]
160	    });
161	  } catch (error) {
162	    console.error('Get profile error:', error);
163	    res.status(500).json({
164	      code: 500,
165	      message: '服务器错误'
166	    });
167	  }
168	}
169	
170	/**
171	 * 更新用户信息
172	 */
173	export async function updateProfile(req: Request, res: Response) {
174	  try {
175	    const userId = req.userId;
176	    const { nickname, avatar } = req.body;
177	    
178	    const updates: string[] = [];
179	    const params: any[] = [];
180	    
181	    if (nickname) {
182	      updates.push('nickname = ?');
183	      params.push(nickname);
184	    }
185	    
186	    if (avatar) {
187	      updates.push('avatar = ?');
188	      params.push(avatar);
189	    }
190	    
191	    if (updates.length === 0) {
192	      return res.status(400).json({
193	        code: 400,
194	        message: '没有要更新的内容'
195	      });
196	    }
197	    
198	    params.push(userId);
199	    
200	    await query(
201	      `UPDATE users SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`,
202	      params
203	    );
204	    
205	    res.json({
206	      code: 200,
207	      message: '更新成功'
208	    });
209	  } catch (error) {
210	    console.error('Update profile error:', error);
211	    res.status(500).json({
212	      code: 500,
213	      message: '服务器错误'
214	    });
215	  }
216	}
217
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a9c55c86/backend/src/controllers/favoriteController.ts`

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface Favorite {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  name: string;
7	  address: string;
8	  latitude: number;
9	  longitude: number;
10	  category: string;
11	  icon?: string;
12	  created_at: string;
13	}
14	
15	/**
16	 * 获取收藏列表
17	 */
18	export async function getFavorites(req: Request, res: Response) {
19	  try {
20	    const userId = req.userId;
21	    const { category } = req.query;
22	    
23	    let sql = 'SELECT * FROM favorites WHERE user_id = ?';
24	    const params: any[] = [userId];
25	    
26	    if (category) {
27	      sql += ' AND category = ?';
28	      params.push(category);
29	    }
30	    
31	    sql += ' ORDER BY created_at DESC';
32	    
33	    const favorites = await query<Favorite[]>(sql, params);
34	    
35	    res.json({
36	      code: 200,
37	      message: '获取成功',
38	      data: favorites
39	    });
40	  } catch (error) {
41	    console.error('Get favorites error:', error);
42	    res.status(500).json({
43	      code: 500,
44	      message: '服务器错误'
45	    });
46	  }
47	}
48	
49	/**
50	 * 添加收藏
51	 */
52	export async function addFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
53	  try {
54	    const userId = req.userId;
55	    const { name, address, latitude, longitude, category, icon } = req.body;
56	    
57	    // 验证参数
58	    if (!name || !address || !latitude || !longitude) {
59	      return res.status(400).json({
60	        code: 400,
61	        message: '缺少必要参数'
62	      });
63	    }
64	    
65	    // 检查是否已收藏
66	    const existing = await query<Favorite[]>(
67	      'SELECT id FROM favorites WHERE user_id = ? AND latitude = ? AND longitude = ?',
68	      [userId, latitude, longitude]
69	    );
70	    
71	    if (existing.length > 0) {
72	      return res.status(400).json({
73	        code: 400,
74	        message: '该地点已收藏'
75	      });
76	    }
77	    
78	    const result: any = await query(
79	      'INSERT INTO favorites (user_id, name, address, latitude, longitude, category, icon) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)',
80	      [userId, name, address, latitude, longitude, category || 'custom', icon]
81	    );
82	    
83	    res.status(201).json({
84	      code: 200,
85	      message: '收藏成功',
86	      data: {
87	        id: result.insertId
88	      }
89	    });
90	  } catch (error) {
91	    console.error('Add favorite error:', error);
92	    res.status(500).json({
93	      code: 500,
94	      message: '服务器错误'
95	    });
96	  }
97	}
98	
99	/**
100	 * 更新收藏
101	 */
102	export async function updateFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
103	  try {
104	    const userId = req.userId;
105	    const { id } = req.params;
106	    const { name, address, category, icon } = req.body;
107	    
108	    // 验证权限
109	    const favorites = await query<Favorite[]>(
110	      'SELECT id FROM favorites WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
111	      [id, userId]
112	    );
113	    
114	    if (favorites.length === 0) {
115	      return res.status(404).json({
116	        code: 404,
117	        message: '收藏不存在'
118	      });
119	    }
120	    
121	    const updates: string[] = [];
122	    const params: any[] = [];
123	    
124	    if (name) {
125	      updates.push('name = ?');
126	      params.push(name);
127	    }
128	    if (address) {
129	      updates.push('address = ?');
130	      params.push(address);
131	    }
132	    if (category) {
133	      updates.push('category = ?');
134	      params.push(category);
135	    }
136	    if (icon) {
137	      updates.push('icon = ?');
138	      params.push(icon);
139	    }
140	    
141	    if (updates.length === 0) {
142	      return res.status(400).json({
143	        code: 400,
144	        message: '没有要更新的内容'
145	      });
146	    }
147	    
148	    params.push(id, userId);
149	    
150	    await query(
151	      `UPDATE favorites SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`,
152	      params
153	    );
154	    
155	    res.json({
156	      code: 200,
157	      message: '更新成功'
158	    });
159	  } catch (error) {
160	    console.error('Update favorite error:', error);
161	    res.status(500).json({
162	      code: 500,
163	      message: '服务器错误'
164	    });
165	  }
166	}
167	
168	/**
169	 * 删除收藏
170	 */
171	export async function deleteFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
172	  try {
173	    const userId = req.userId;
174	    const { id } = req.params;
175	    
176	    const result: any = await query(
177	      'DELETE FROM favorites WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
178	      [id, userId]
179	    );
180	    
181	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
182	      return res.status(404).json({
183	        code: 404,
184	        message: '收藏不存在'
185	      });
186	    }
187	    
188	    res.json({
189	      code: 200,
190	      message: '删除成功'
191	    });
192	  } catch (error) {
193	    console.error('Delete favorite error:', error);
194	    res.status(500).json({
195	      code: 500,
196	      message: '服务器错误'
197	    });
198	  }
199	}
200
```

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface NavigationHistory {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  start_name?: string;
7	  start_address?: string;
8	  start_lat?: number;
9	  start_lng?: number;
10	  end_name: string;
11	  end_address: string;
12	  end_lat: number;
13	  end_lng: number;
14	  distance?: number;
15	  duration?: number;
16	  created_at: string;
17	}
18	
19	/**
20	 * 获取导航历史
21	 */
22	export async function getNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
23	  try {
24	    const userId = req.userId;
25	    const { page = 1, pageSize = 20 } = req.query;
26	    
27	    const offset = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(pageSize);
28	    
29	    // 获取总数
30	    const countResult = await query<any[]>(
31	      'SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ?',
32	      [userId]
33	    );
34	    const total = countResult[0].total;
35	    
36	    // 获取列表
37	    const history = await query<NavigationHistory[]>(
38	      'SELECT * FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?',
39	      [userId, Number(pageSize), offset]
40	    );
41	    
42	    res.json({
43	      code: 200,
44	      message: '获取成功',
45	      data: {
46	        list: history,
47	        total,
48	        page: Number(page),
49	        pageSize: Number(pageSize)
50	      }
51	    });
52	  } catch (error) {
53	    console.error('Get navigation history error:', error);
54	    res.status(500).json({
55	      code: 500,
56	      message: '服务器错误'
57	    });
58	  }
59	}
60	
61	/**
62	 * 保存导航记录
63	 */
64	export async function saveNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
65	  try {
66	    const userId = req.userId;
67	    const {
68	      startName,
69	      startAddress,
70	      startLat,
71	      startLng,
72	      endName,
73	      endAddress,
74	      endLat,
75	      endLng,
76	      distance,
77	      duration
78	    } = req.body;
79	    
80	    // 验证参数
81	    if (!endName || !endAddress || !endLat || !endLng) {
82	      return res.status(400).json({
83	        code: 400,
84	        message: '缺少必要参数'
85	      });
86	    }
87	    
88	    const result: any = await query(
89	      `INSERT INTO navigation_history 
90	       (user_id, start_name, start_address, start_lat, start_lng, end_name, end_address, end_lat, end_lng, distance, duration) 
91	       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
92	      [userId, startName, startAddress, startLat, startLng, endName, endAddress, endLat, endLng, distance, duration]
93	    );
94	    
95	    res.status(201).json({
96	      code: 200,
97	      message: '保存成功',
98	      data: {
99	        id: result.insertId
100	      }
101	    });
102	  } catch (error) {
103	    console.error('Save navigation history error:', error);
104	    res.status(500).json({
105	      code: 500,
106	      message: '服务器错误'
107	    });
108	  }
109	}
110
```

```text
0	-- 车载导航系统数据库初始化脚本
1	
2	-- 创建数据库
3	CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS car_navigation DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
4	
5	USE car_navigation;
6	
7	-- 用户表
8	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
9	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '用户ID',
10	    phone VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE NOT NULL COMMENT '手机号',
11	    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '密码（加密）',
12	    nickname VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '昵称',
13	    avatar VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '头像URL',
14	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
15	    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
16	    INDEX idx_phone (phone)
17	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='用户表';
18	
19	-- 收藏地点表
20	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS favorites (
21	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '收藏ID',
22	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
23	    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '地点名称',
24	    address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '详细地址',
25	    latitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '纬度',
26	    longitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '经度',
27	    category VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'custom' COMMENT '分类：home-家, work-公司, custom-自定义',
28	    icon VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '图标',
29	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
30	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
31	    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),
32	    INDEX idx_category (user_id, category)
33	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='收藏地点表';
34	
35	-- 导航历史表
36	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS navigation_history (
37	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '历史ID',
38	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
39	    start_name VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '起点名称',
40	    start_address VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '起点地址',
41	    start_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '起点纬度',
42	    start_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '起点经度',
43	    end_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点名称',
44	    end_address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点地址',
45	    end_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点纬度',
46	    end_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点经度',
47	    distance INT COMMENT '距离（米）',
48	    duration INT COMMENT '时长（秒）',
49	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
50	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
51	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC)
52	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='导航历史表';
53	
54	-- 行程记录表
55	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trip_records (
56	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '行程ID',
57	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
58	    start_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL COMMENT '开始时间',
59	    end_time TIMESTAMP COMMENT '结束时间',
60	    total_distance INT COMMENT '总距离（米）',
61	    total_duration INT COMMENT '总时长（秒）',
62	    avg_speed DECIMAL(5, 2) COMMENT '平均速度（km/h）',
63	    max_speed DECIMAL(5, 2) COMMENT '最高速度（km/h）',
64	    trajectory TEXT COMMENT '轨迹数据（JSON格式）',
65	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
66	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
67	    INDEX idx_user_start (user_id, start_time DESC)
68	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='行程记录表';
69	
70	-- 搜索历史表
71	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS search_history (
72	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '搜索ID',
73	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
74	    keyword VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '搜索关键词',
75	    result_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '结果数量',
76	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
77	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
78	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC),
79	    INDEX idx_keyword (keyword)
80	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='搜索历史表';
81
```

## 2) 前端网络请求封装与 API 调用点

## 2.1 网络底层封装（唯一 HTTP 实际发送点）

- 文件：`/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a9c55c86/entry/src/main/ets/services/HttpService.ets`
- 关键证据：
  - L4：`import http from '@ohos.net.http'`
  - L8：`BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:3000/api/v1'`
  - L71：`http.createHttp()`
  - L94：`httpRequest.request(fullUrl, options, ...)`
  - L85-L86：自动注入 `Authorization: Bearer <token>`

结论：**项目内后端 HTTP 请求统一走 `HttpService`**，未发现 axios/fetch 直调后端。

---

## 2.2 API 封装层（后端路径定义点）

- 文件：`/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a9c55c86/entry/src/main/ets/services/ApiService.ets`
- 关键路径（相对 `BASE_URL`）：

    - `POST /auth/login`（L55-L58）
    - `GET /auth/profile`（L76）
    - `PUT /auth/profile`（L89）

    - `POST /favorites`（L127）
    - `PUT /favorites/:id`（L140-L141）
    - `DELETE /favorites/:id`（L151-L152）

## 2.3 业务层“实际调用点”现状

- `ApiService` 只在其内部实例化/单例引用；**在 UI 模块中未发现导入与调用**（搜索 `import ApiService` / `ApiService.getInstance` 无业务命中）。
- 当前实际导航业务主要调用：
  - `MapService`、`NavigationService`、`VoiceGuideService`
  - 证据：`/entry/src/main/ets/view/EnhancedNavigationModule.ets` L8-L10, L42-L44

结论：**后端 API 目前更像“已封装、未接线”状态**。

这类是媒体流访问，不走后端 API 网关。

## 3) 前端接口与后端路径映射

基础拼接关系：

- 前端基址：`HttpService.ets` L8 -> `http://localhost:3000/api/v1`
- 后端挂载：`backend/src/server.ts` L24 -> `app.use('/api/v1', routes)`

### 3.1 可确认“已对齐”的接口

| `POST /auth/register` | `router.post('/auth/register')` | 已对齐 | FE: `.../ApiService.ets` L34-L37；BE: `.../backend/src/routes/index.ts` L10 |
| `POST /auth/login` | `router.post('/auth/login')` | 已对齐 | FE L55-L58；BE L11 |
| `GET /auth/profile` | `router.get('/auth/profile', authMiddleware, ...)` | 已对齐 | FE L76；BE L14 |
| `PUT /auth/profile` | `router.put('/auth/profile', authMiddleware, ...)` | 已对齐 | FE L89；BE L15 |
| `GET /favorites` | `router.get('/favorites', authMiddleware, ...)` | 已对齐 | FE L109-L115；BE L18 |
| `POST /favorites` | `router.post('/favorites', authMiddleware, ...)` | 已对齐 | FE L127；BE L19 |
| `PUT /favorites/:id` | `router.put('/favorites/:id', authMiddleware, ...)` | 已对齐 | FE L140-L141；BE L20 |

| `GET /navigation/history` | `router.get('/navigation/history', authMiddleware, ...)` | 已对齐 | FE L164-L166；BE L24 |
| `POST /navigation/history` | `router.post('/navigation/history', authMiddleware, ...)` | 已对齐 | FE L179-L180；BE L25 |
| `DELETE /navigation/history/:id` | `router.delete('/navigation/history/:id', ...)` | 已对齐 | FE L192-L193；BE L26 |

## 4) 架构/代码质量问题与改进建议

以下按你关心的 5 类（模块边界、错误处理、类型、安全、配置管理）给出。

## 4.1 模块边界

1. **API 层未接入页面业务（边界断裂）**
   - 现象：`ApiService` 封装完整，但 UI 层实际走的是地图/导航本地服务链路。
   - 证据：
     - `.../entry/src/main/ets/services/ApiService.ets`（定义完整 API）
     - `.../entry/src/main/ets/view/EnhancedNavigationModule.ets` L42-L44（仅 Map/Navigation/Voice）
   - 建议：
     - 增加 `Repository/ViewModel` 层，把 `ApiService` 接入收藏、历史、用户信息等真实场景。
     - 页面只依赖 ViewModel，不直接拼接业务服务。

2. **接口契约漂移（前端多定义 trips/search，后端无路由）**
   - 证据：见上 3.2。
   - 建议：
     - 统一 API 契约源（OpenAPI/Swagger），前后端都从契约生成类型与客户端。
     - CI 增加“前端接口清单 vs 后端路由”校验。

3. **模型重复定义，存在漂移风险**
   - 证据：
     - `.../services/MapService.ets` L7-L27 定义 `Location/RouteInfo/RouteStep`
     - `.../models/NavigationModels.ets` L7-L39 也定义类似结构
   - 建议：
     - 收敛到一个 `domain/models`，服务层与页面统一引用。

---

## 4.2 错误处理

4. **大量空 `catch {}`，错误被吞掉**
   - 证据示例：
     - `.../pages/Index.ets` L56
     - `.../view/NavigationModule.ets` L33, L45, L70
     - `.../view/EnhancedNavigationModule.ets` L60, L147
   - 建议：
     - 至少统一记录到 `hilog`，并在 UI 给出可感知提示（Toast/状态文案）。
     - 建立 `ErrorCode -> 用户提示` 映射。

5. **监听器生命周期不完整（潜在泄漏/重复回调）**
   - 证据：
     - `.../view/EnhancedNavigationModule.ets` L52 `addListener(...)`
     - `.../services/NavigationService.ets` L170 存在 `removeListener`，但页面未调用
   - 建议：
     - 在组件销毁 `aboutToDisappear` 中解除监听。
     - 使用稳定函数引用，避免匿名函数无法精准移除。

6. **`HttpService` 请求失败分支可能未释放 request 资源**
   - 证据：
     - `.../services/HttpService.ets` L94-L100 错误后 `return`
     - `destroy()` 在 L118（仅 `try/finally` 分支）
   - 建议：
     - 把 `destroy()` 放到回调最外层 `finally`，覆盖 err/parse fail/success 全路径。

---

## 4.3 类型质量

7. **`any` 使用较多，削弱类型保护**
   - 证据：
     - `.../services/HttpService.ets` L67 `data?: any`
     - L135/L142 `post/put` 参数 `data: any`
   - 建议：
     - 为每个 endpoint 建 DTO（Request/Response）。
     - `HttpService` 改成泛型约束：`post<TReq, TRes>(url, body: TReq): Promise<ApiResponse<TRes>>`。

8. **API 错误处理语义不一致（部分方法吞错误返回空数组/null）**
   - 证据：
     - `.../services/ApiService.ets` L120, L172, L224, L237, L276 返回空结构
     - 其他方法直接 `throw Error(...)`
   - 建议：
     - 统一策略：要么统一抛异常，要么统一 `Result<T, E>` 返回值；避免页面误判“空数据=成功”。

---

## 4.4 安全

9. **使用明文 HTTP + 本地硬编码地址**
   - 证据：
     - `.../services/HttpService.ets` L8 `http://localhost:3000/api/v1`
   - 建议：
     - 生产强制 HTTPS；开发/测试/生产分环境注入。
     - 增加域名白名单与证书策略（至少避免明文传输 token）。

10. **Token 持久化未实现**
   - 证据：
     - `.../services/HttpService.ets` L36, L51, L58 均为 TODO
   - 建议：
     - 使用 HarmonyOS 安全存储（Preferences + 加固策略/Keystore）并做过期处理。

11. **外部媒体 URL 直连，缺少来源治理**
   - 证据：
     - `.../view/MediaModule.ets` L22-L25, L97
   - 建议：
     - 生产改为自有 CDN/签名 URL，或至少域名 allowlist + 失败降级机制。

---

## 4.5 配置管理

12. **配置分散且硬编码（BASE_URL、client_id）**
   - 证据：
     - `.../services/HttpService.ets` L8-L9（base URL）
     - `.../src/main/module.json5` L43-L45（`client_id`）
   - 建议：
     - 统一配置中心（按 build profile 注入），禁止在业务代码硬编码环境参数。

13. **Mock/测试配置薄弱**
   - 证据：
     - `.../src/mock/mock-config.json5` 空对象
     - `.../src/test/LocalUnit.test.ets` / `.../src/ohosTest/ets/test/Ability.test.ets` 为模板级测试
   - 建议：
     - 增加 API 契约测试、`HttpService` 单元测试、关键页面联调测试。
     - mock 配置至少支持 endpoint 开关与假数据集。

---

## 5) 可直接放进汇报的结论摘要

1. `entry` 目录结构清晰：`main/ets` 放业务代码，`resources` 放资源主题，`test/ohosTest/mock` 目前多为模板/预留。  
2. 后端 HTTP 唯一发送点是 `HttpService`（`@ohos.net.http`）；`ApiService` 已封装大量接口。  
3. 已确认对齐的后端接口：`auth`、`favorites`、`navigation/history`。  
4. 明确不对齐：前端定义了 `trips` 与 `search/history`，但后端路由未实现。  
5. 主要改进优先级建议：  
   - P0：修复前后端契约漂移、接通 `ApiService` 真实调用、HTTPS+token 持久化  
   - P1：补齐错误处理与监听器释放、统一类型与错误语义  
   - P2：完善 mock 与自动化测试覆盖。  

如果你要，我可以下一步给出一份“按优先级拆分的整改任务清单（可直接进 Jira）”。

```text
0	import mysql from 'mysql2/promise';
1	import dotenv from 'dotenv';
2	
3	dotenv.config();
4	
5	// 数据库连接池配置
6	export const pool = mysql.createPool({
7	  host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost',
8	  port: parseInt(process.env.DB_PORT || '3306'),
9	  user: process.env.DB_USER || 'root',
10	  password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || '',
11	  database: process.env.DB_NAME || 'car_navigation',
12	  waitForConnections: true,
13	  connectionLimit: 10,
14	  queueLimit: 0,
15	  enableKeepAlive: true,
16	  keepAliveInitialDelay: 0
17	});
18	
19	// 测试数据库连接
20	export async function testConnection() {
21	  try {
22	    const connection = await pool.getConnection();
23	    console.log('✅ 数据库连接成功');
24	    connection.release();
25	    return true;
26	  } catch (error) {
27	    console.error('❌ 数据库连接失败:', error);
28	    return false;
29	  }
30	}
31	
32	// 执行SQL查询
33	export async function query<T = any>(sql: string, params?: any[]): Promise<T> {
34	  const [rows] = await pool.execute(sql, params);
35	  return rows as T;
36	}
37
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
0	-- 车载导航系统数据库初始化脚本
1	
2	-- 创建数据库
3	CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS car_navigation DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
4	
5	USE car_navigation;
6	
7	-- 用户表
8	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
9	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '用户ID',
10	    phone VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE NOT NULL COMMENT '手机号',
11	    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '密码（加密）',
12	    nickname VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '昵称',
13	    avatar VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '头像URL',
14	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
15	    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
16	    INDEX idx_phone (phone)
17	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='用户表';
18	
19	-- 收藏地点表
20	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS favorites (
21	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '收藏ID',
22	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
23	    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '地点名称',
24	    address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '详细地址',
25	    latitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '纬度',
26	    longitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '经度',
27	    category VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'custom' COMMENT '分类：home-家, work-公司, custom-自定义',
28	    icon VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '图标',
29	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
30	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
31	    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),
32	    INDEX idx_category (user_id, category)
33	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='收藏地点表';
34	
35	-- 导航历史表
36	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS navigation_history (
37	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '历史ID',
38	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
39	    start_name VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '起点名称',
40	    start_address VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '起点地址',
41	    start_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '起点纬度',
42	    start_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '起点经度',
43	    end_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点名称',
44	    end_address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点地址',
45	    end_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点纬度',
46	    end_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点经度',
47	    distance INT COMMENT '距离（米）',
48	    duration INT COMMENT '时长（秒）',
49	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
50	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
51	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC)
52	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='导航历史表';
53	
54	-- 行程记录表
55	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trip_records (
56	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '行程ID',
57	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
58	    start_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL COMMENT '开始时间',
59	    end_time TIMESTAMP COMMENT '结束时间',
60	    total_distance INT COMMENT '总距离（米）',
61	    total_duration INT COMMENT '总时长（秒）',
62	    avg_speed DECIMAL(5, 2) COMMENT '平均速度（km/h）',
63	    max_speed DECIMAL(5, 2) COMMENT '最高速度（km/h）',
64	    trajectory TEXT COMMENT '轨迹数据（JSON格式）',
65	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
66	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
67	    INDEX idx_user_start (user_id, start_time DESC)
68	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='行程记录表';
69	
70	-- 路线方案表（保存用户规划的路线）
71	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS route_plans (
72	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '路线ID',
73	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
74	    name VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '路线名称',
75	    start_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '起点名称',
76	    start_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '起点纬度',
77	    start_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '起点经度',
78	    end_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点名称',
79	    end_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点纬度',
80	    end_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点经度',
81	    waypoints TEXT COMMENT '途经点（JSON数组）',
82	    distance INT COMMENT '总距离（米）',
83	    duration INT COMMENT '预计时长（秒）',
84	    strategy TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '策略：0-推荐 1-避免拥堵 2-避免收费 3-高速优先',
85	    polyline TEXT COMMENT '路线坐标串',
86	    steps TEXT COMMENT '导航步骤（JSON）',
87	    is_favorite BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否收藏',
88	    use_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '使用次数',
89	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
90	    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
91	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
92	    INDEX idx_user_favorite (user_id, is_favorite),
93	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC)
94	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='路线方案表';
95	
96	-- 实时位置表（用于位置共享和协同导航）
97	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_locations (
98	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '位置ID',
99	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
100	    latitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '纬度',
101	    longitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '经度',
102	    accuracy DECIMAL(6, 2) COMMENT '精度（米）',
103	    speed DECIMAL(6, 2) COMMENT '速度（km/h）',
104	    heading DECIMAL(5, 2) COMMENT '方向（度）',
105	    location_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'ip' COMMENT '定位类型：gps, network, ip',
106	    is_sharing BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否共享位置',
107	    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
108	    UNIQUE KEY uk_user_id (user_id),
109	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
110	    INDEX idx_sharing (is_sharing, updated_at)
111	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='实时位置表';
112	
113	-- 位置共享关系表
114	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS location_shares (
115	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '共享ID',
116	    sharer_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '分享者ID',
117	    viewer_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '查看者ID',
118	    expire_time TIMESTAMP COMMENT '过期时间',
119	    is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE COMMENT '是否激活',
120	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
121	    FOREIGN KEY (sharer_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
122	    FOREIGN KEY (viewer_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
123	    UNIQUE KEY uk_share_view (sharer_id, viewer_id),
124	    INDEX idx_viewer_active (viewer_id, is_active)
125	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='位置共享关系表';
126	
127	-- 导航反馈表（用于收集用户反馈）
128	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS navigation_feedback (
129	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '反馈ID',
130	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
131	    navigation_id BIGINT COMMENT '导航历史ID',
132	    rating TINYINT COMMENT '评分（1-5）',
133	    feedback_type VARCHAR(20) COMMENT '反馈类型：route-路线 traffic-路况 poi-地点',
134	    content TEXT COMMENT '反馈内容',
135	    location_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '反馈位置纬度',
136	    location_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '反馈位置经度',
137	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
138	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
139	    FOREIGN KEY (navigation_id) REFERENCES navigation_history(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
140	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC),
141	    INDEX idx_type (feedback_type)
142	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='导航反馈表';
143	
144	-- 常用地点统计表（智能推荐）
145	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS frequent_locations (
146	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '统计ID',
147	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
148	    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '地点名称',
149	    address VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '地址',
150	    latitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '纬度',
151	    longitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '经度',
152	    visit_count INT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '访问次数',
153	    last_visit TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '最后访问时间',
154	    time_pattern VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '时间规律（如：工作日早上）',
155	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
156	    UNIQUE KEY uk_user_location (user_id, latitude, longitude),
157	    INDEX idx_user_count (user_id, visit_count DESC)
158	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='常用地点统计表';
159	
160	-- 搜索历史表
161	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS search_history (
162	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '搜索ID',
163	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
164	    keyword VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '搜索关键词',
165	    result_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '结果数量',
166	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
167	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
168	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC),
169	    INDEX idx_keyword (keyword)
170	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='搜索历史表';
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/backend/src/middleware/auth.ts`

```text
0	import { Request, Response, NextFunction } from 'express';
1	import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';
2	
3	// 扩展Request类型，添加userId
4	declare global {
5	  namespace Express {
6	    interface Request {
7	      userId?: number;
8	    }
9	  }
10	}
11	
12	const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your_jwt_secret_key';
13	
14	/**
15	 * JWT认证中间件
16	 */
17	export function authMiddleware(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) {
18	  try {
19	    // 从请求头获取token
20	    const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;
21	    
22	    if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
23	      return res.status(401).json({
24	        code: 401,
25	        message: '未提供认证令牌'
26	      });
27	    }
28	    
29	    const token = authHeader.substring(7); // 移除 "Bearer " 前缀
30	    
31	    // 验证token
32	    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, JWT_SECRET) as { userId: number };
33	    
34	    // 将用户ID添加到请求对象
35	    req.userId = decoded.userId;
36	    
37	    next();
38	  } catch (error) {
39	    if (error instanceof jwt.TokenExpiredError) {
40	      return res.status(401).json({
41	        code: 401,
42	        message: '认证令牌已过期'
43	      });
44	    }
45	    
46	    return res.status(401).json({
47	      code: 401,
48	      message: '无效的认证令牌'
49	    });
50	  }
51	}
52	
53	/**
54	 * 生成JWT token
55	 */
56	export function generateToken(userId: number): string {
57	  return jwt.sign(
58	    { userId },
59	    JWT_SECRET,
60	    { expiresIn: process.env.JWT_EXPIRES_IN || '7d' } as jwt.SignOptions
61	  );
62	}
63
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
0	import express from 'express';
1	import { authMiddleware } from '../middleware/auth';
2	import * as authController from '../controllers/authController';
3	import * as favoriteController from '../controllers/favoriteController';
4	import * as navigationController from '../controllers/navigationController';
5	import * as routePlanController from '../controllers/routePlanController';
6	import * as locationController from '../controllers/locationController';
7	import * as feedbackController from '../controllers/feedbackController';
8	import * as frequentLocationController from '../controllers/frequentLocationController';
9	
10	const router = express.Router();
11	
12	// ========== 认证相关路由（无需token） ==========
13	router.post('/auth/register', authController.register);
14	router.post('/auth/login', authController.login);
15	
16	// ========== 用户相关路由（需要token） ==========
17	router.get('/auth/profile', authMiddleware, authController.getProfile);
18	router.put('/auth/profile', authMiddleware, authController.updateProfile);
19	
20	// ========== 收藏相关路由（需要token） ==========
21	router.get('/favorites', authMiddleware, favoriteController.getFavorites);
22	router.post('/favorites', authMiddleware, favoriteController.addFavorite);
23	router.put('/favorites/:id', authMiddleware, favoriteController.updateFavorite);
24	router.delete('/favorites/:id', authMiddleware, favoriteController.deleteFavorite);
25	
26	// ========== 导航历史相关路由（需要token） ==========
27	router.get('/navigation/history', authMiddleware, navigationController.getNavigationHistory);
28	router.post('/navigation/history', authMiddleware, navigationController.saveNavigationHistory);
29	router.delete('/navigation/history/:id', authMiddleware, navigationController.deleteNavigationHistory);
30	router.delete('/navigation/history', authMiddleware, navigationController.clearNavigationHistory);
31	
32	// ========== 路线方案相关路由（需要token） ==========
33	router.get('/routes', authMiddleware, routePlanController.getRoutePlans);
34	router.get('/routes/:id', authMiddleware, routePlanController.getRoutePlanDetail);
35	router.post('/routes', authMiddleware, routePlanController.saveRoutePlan);
36	router.put('/routes/:id', authMiddleware, routePlanController.updateRoutePlan);
37	router.post('/routes/:id/use', authMiddleware, routePlanController.useRoutePlan);
38	router.delete('/routes/:id', authMiddleware, routePlanController.deleteRoutePlan);
39	
40	// ========== 位置相关路由（需要token） ==========
41	router.post('/location', authMiddleware, locationController.updateLocation);
42	router.get('/location', authMiddleware, locationController.getLocation);
43	router.get('/location/:targetUserId', authMiddleware, locationController.getLocation);
44	router.post('/location/sharing/toggle', authMiddleware, locationController.toggleLocationSharing);
45	router.post('/location/sharing', authMiddleware, locationController.createLocationShare);
46	router.get('/location/sharing', authMiddleware, locationController.getLocationShares);
47	router.delete('/location/sharing/:id', authMiddleware, locationController.cancelLocationShare);
48	router.get('/location/nearby', authMiddleware, locationController.getNearbySharedUsers);
49	
50	// ========== 反馈相关路由（需要token） ==========
51	router.post('/feedback', authMiddleware, feedbackController.submitFeedback);
52	router.get('/feedback', authMiddleware, feedbackController.getFeedbackList);
53	router.get('/feedback/stats', authMiddleware, feedbackController.getFeedbackStats);
54	router.get('/feedback/:id', authMiddleware, feedbackController.getFeedbackDetail);
55	router.delete('/feedback/:id', authMiddleware, feedbackController.deleteFeedback);
56	
57	// ========== 常去地点相关路由（需要token） ==========
58	router.post('/frequent-locations/visit', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.recordVisit);
59	router.get('/frequent-locations', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.getFrequentLocations);
60	router.get('/frequent-locations/recommended', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.getRecommendedLocations);
61	router.get('/frequent-locations/stats', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.getVisitStats);
62	router.get('/frequent-locations/:id', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.getLocationDetail);
63	router.put('/frequent-locations/:id', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.updateLocation);
64	router.delete('/frequent-locations/:id', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.deleteLocation);
65	
66	export default router;
67
```

```text
0	import express from 'express';
1	import cors from 'cors';
2	import dotenv from 'dotenv';
3	import routes from './routes';
4	import { testConnection } from './config/database';
5	
6	// 加载环境变量
7	dotenv.config();
8	
9	const app = express();
10	
11	const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
12	
13	// 中间件
14	app.use(cors());  // 允许跨域
15	app.use(express.json());  // 解析JSON请求体
16	app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true }));  // 解析URL编码请求体
17	
18	// 请求日志
19	app.use((req, res, next) => {
20	  console.log(`${new Date().toISOString()} - ${req.method} ${req.path}`);
21	  next();
22	});
23	
24	// API路由
25	app.use('/api/v1', routes);
26	
27	// 健康检查
28	app.get('/health', (req, res) => {
29	  res.json({
30	    status: 'ok',
31	    timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
32	  });
33	});
34	
35	// 404处理
36	app.use((req, res) => {
37	  res.status(404).json({
38	    code: 404,
39	    message: '接口不存在'
40	  });
41	});
42	
43	// 错误处理
44	app.use((err: any, req: express.Request, res: express.Response, next: express.NextFunction) => {
45	  console.error('Server error:', err);
46	  res.status(500).json({
47	    code: 500,
48	    message: '服务器内部错误'
49	  });
50	});
51	
52	// 启动服务器
53	async function startServer() {
54	  try {
55	    // 测试数据库连接
56	    const dbConnected = await testConnection();
57	    
58	    if (!dbConnected) {
59	      console.error('❌ 数据库连接失败，服务器启动中止');
60	      process.exit(1);
61	    }
62	    
63	    // 启动HTTP服务
64	    app.listen(PORT, () => {
65	      console.log('');
66	      console.log('🚀 ========================================');
67	      console.log(`🚀 车载导航系统后端服务已启动`);
68	      console.log(`🚀 运行环境: ${process.env.NODE_ENV || 'development'}`);
69	      console.log(`🚀 服务地址: http://localhost:${PORT}`);
70	      console.log(`🚀 API文档: http://localhost:${PORT}/api/v1`);
71	      console.log(`🚀 健康检查: http://localhost:${PORT}/health`);
72	      console.log('🚀 ========================================');
73	      console.log('');
74	    });
75	  } catch (error) {
76	    console.error('❌ 服务器启动失败:', error);
77	    process.exit(1);
78	  }
79	}
80	
81	// 优雅关闭
82	process.on('SIGTERM', () => {
83	  console.log('收到SIGTERM信号，正在关闭服务器...');
84	  process.exit(0);
85	});
86	
87	process.on('SIGINT', () => {
88	  console.log('收到SIGINT信号，正在关闭服务器...');
89	  process.exit(0);
90	});
91	
92	// 启动
93	startServer();
94
```
</details></tool-use>

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/backend/src/controllers/authController.ts`

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs';
2	import { query } from '../config/database';
3	import { generateToken } from '../middleware/auth';
4	
5	interface User {
6	  id: number;
7	  phone: string;
8	  password: string;
9	  nickname?: string;
10	  avatar?: string;
11	}
12	
13	/**
14	 * 用户注册
15	 */
16	export async function register(req: Request, res: Response) {
17	  try {
18	    const { phone, password, nickname } = req.body;
19	    
20	    // 验证参数
21	    if (!phone || !password) {
22	      return res.status(400).json({
23	        code: 400,
24	        message: '手机号和密码不能为空'
25	      });
26	    }
27	    
28	    // 检查手机号是否已注册
29	    const existingUsers = await query<User[]>(
30	      'SELECT id FROM users WHERE phone = ?',
31	      [phone]
32	    );
33	    
34	    if (existingUsers.length > 0) {
35	      return res.status(400).json({
36	        code: 400,
37	        message: '该手机号已注册'
38	      });
39	    }
40	    
41	    // 加密密码
42	    const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);
43	    
44	    // 插入用户
45	    const result: any = await query(
46	      'INSERT INTO users (phone, password, nickname) VALUES (?, ?, ?)',
47	      [phone, hashedPassword, nickname || `用户${phone.slice(-4)}`]
48	    );
49	    
50	    const userId = result.insertId;
51	    
52	    // 生成token
53	    const token = generateToken(userId);
54	    
55	    res.status(201).json({
56	      code: 200,
57	      message: '注册成功',
58	      data: {
59	        userId,
60	        phone,
61	        nickname: nickname || `用户${phone.slice(-4)}`,
62	        token
63	      }
64	    });
65	  } catch (error) {
66	    console.error('Register error:', error);
67	    res.status(500).json({
68	      code: 500,
69	      message: '服务器错误'
70	    });
71	  }
72	}
73	
74	/**
75	 * 用户登录
76	 */
77	export async function login(req: Request, res: Response) {
78	  try {
79	    const { phone, password } = req.body;
80	    
81	    // 验证参数
82	    if (!phone || !password) {
83	      return res.status(400).json({
84	        code: 400,
85	        message: '手机号和密码不能为空'
86	      });
87	    }
88	    
89	    // 查询用户
90	    const users = await query<User[]>(
91	      'SELECT id, phone, password, nickname, avatar FROM users WHERE phone = ?',
92	      [phone]
93	    );
94	    
95	    if (users.length === 0) {
96	      return res.status(401).json({
97	        code: 401,
98	        message: '手机号或密码错误'
99	      });
100	    }
101	    
102	    const user = users[0];
103	    
104	    // 验证密码
105	    const isPasswordValid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password);
106	    
107	    if (!isPasswordValid) {
108	      return res.status(401).json({
109	        code: 401,
110	        message: '手机号或密码错误'
111	      });
112	    }
113	    
114	    // 生成token
115	    const token = generateToken(user.id);
116	    
117	    res.json({
118	      code: 200,
119	      message: '登录成功',
120	      data: {
121	        userId: user.id,
122	        phone: user.phone,
123	        nickname: user.nickname,
124	        avatar: user.avatar,
125	        token
126	      }
127	    });
128	  } catch (error) {
129	    console.error('Login error:', error);
130	    res.status(500).json({
131	      code: 500,
132	      message: '服务器错误'
133	    });
134	  }
135	}
136	
137	/**
138	 * 获取用户信息
139	 */
140	export async function getProfile(req: Request, res: Response) {
141	  try {
142	    const userId = req.userId;
143	    
144	    const users = await query<User[]>(
145	      'SELECT id, phone, nickname, avatar, created_at FROM users WHERE id = ?',
146	      [userId]
147	    );
148	    
149	    if (users.length === 0) {
150	      return res.status(404).json({
151	        code: 404,
152	        message: '用户不存在'
153	      });
154	    }
155	    
156	    res.json({
157	      code: 200,
158	      message: '获取成功',
159	      data: users[0]
160	    });
161	  } catch (error) {
162	    console.error('Get profile error:', error);
163	    res.status(500).json({
164	      code: 500,
165	      message: '服务器错误'
166	    });
167	  }
168	}
169	
170	/**
171	 * 更新用户信息
172	 */
173	export async function updateProfile(req: Request, res: Response) {
174	  try {
175	    const userId = req.userId;
176	    const { nickname, avatar } = req.body;
177	    
178	    const updates: string[] = [];
179	    const params: any[] = [];
180	    
181	    if (nickname) {
182	      updates.push('nickname = ?');
183	      params.push(nickname);
184	    }
185	    
186	    if (avatar) {
187	      updates.push('avatar = ?');
188	      params.push(avatar);
189	    }
190	    
191	    if (updates.length === 0) {
192	      return res.status(400).json({
193	        code: 400,
194	        message: '没有要更新的内容'
195	      });
196	    }
197	    
198	    params.push(userId);
199	    
200	    await query(
201	      `UPDATE users SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`,
202	      params
203	    );
204	    
205	    res.json({
206	      code: 200,
207	      message: '更新成功'
208	    });
209	  } catch (error) {
210	    console.error('Update profile error:', error);
211	    res.status(500).json({
212	      code: 500,
213	      message: '服务器错误'
214	    });
215	  }
216	}
217
```

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface Favorite {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  name: string;
7	  address: string;
8	  latitude: number;
9	  longitude: number;
10	  category: string;

15	/**
16	 * 获取收藏列表
17	 */
18	export async function getFavorites(req: Request, res: Response) {
19	  try {
20	    const userId = req.userId;
21	    const { category } = req.query;
22	    
23	    let sql = 'SELECT * FROM favorites WHERE user_id = ?';
24	    const params: any[] = [userId];
25	    
26	    if (category) {
27	      sql += ' AND category = ?';
28	      params.push(category);
29	    }
30	    
31	    sql += ' ORDER BY created_at DESC';
32	    
33	    const favorites = await query<Favorite[]>(sql, params);
34	    
35	    res.json({
36	      code: 200,
37	      message: '获取成功',
38	      data: favorites
39	    });
40	  } catch (error) {
41	    console.error('Get favorites error:', error);
42	    res.status(500).json({
43	      code: 500,
44	      message: '服务器错误'
45	    });
46	  }
47	}
48	
49	/**
50	 * 添加收藏
51	 */
52	export async function addFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
53	  try {
54	    console.log('=== 收藏请求开始 ===');
55	    console.log('userId:', req.userId);
56	    console.log('请求体:', JSON.stringify(req.body));
57	    
58	    const userId = req.userId;
59	    const { name, address, latitude, longitude, category, icon } = req.body;
60	    
61	    // 验证userId
62	    if (!userId) {
63	      console.error('❌ userId未定义');
64	      return res.status(401).json({
65	        code: 401,
66	        message: '用户未认证'
67	      });
68	    }
69	    
70	    // 验证参数
71	    if (!name || !address || !latitude || !longitude) {
72	      console.error('❌ 缺少必要参数:', { name, address, latitude, longitude });
73	      return res.status(400).json({
74	        code: 400,
75	        message: '缺少必要参数'
76	      });
77	    }
78	    
79	    console.log('✅ 参数验证通过');
80	    
81	    // 检查是否已收藏
82	    console.log('检查是否已收藏...');
83	    const existing = await query<Favorite[]>(
84	      'SELECT id FROM favorites WHERE user_id = ? AND latitude = ? AND longitude = ?',
85	      [userId, latitude, longitude]
86	    );
87	    
88	    if (existing.length > 0) {
89	      console.log('⚠️ 该地点已收藏');
90	      return res.status(400).json({
91	        code: 400,
92	        message: '该地点已收藏'
93	      });
94	    }
95	    
96	    console.log('插入收藏记录...');
97	    const result: any = await query(
98	      'INSERT INTO favorites (user_id, name, address, latitude, longitude, category, icon) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)',
99	      [userId, name, address, latitude, longitude, category || 'custom', icon || null]
100	    );
101	    
102	    console.log('✅ 收藏成功, insertId:', result.insertId);
103	    console.log('=== 收藏请求结束 ===');
104	    
105	    res.status(201).json({
106	      code: 200,
107	      message: '收藏成功',
108	      data: {
109	        id: result.insertId
110	      }
111	    });
112	  } catch (error) {
113	    console.error('❌ Add favorite error:', error);
114	    console.error('错误堆栈:', error instanceof Error ? error.stack : 'No stack trace');
115	    res.status(500).json({
116	      code: 500,
117	      message: '服务器错误: ' + (error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error))
118	    });
119	  }
120	}
121	
122	/**
123	 * 更新收藏
124	 */
125	export async function updateFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
126	  try {
127	    const userId = req.userId;
128	    const { id } = req.params;
129	    const { name, address, category, icon } = req.body;
130	    
131	    // 验证权限
132	    const favorites = await query<Favorite[]>(
133	      'SELECT id FROM favorites WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
134	      [id, userId]
135	    );
136	    
137	    if (favorites.length === 0) {
138	      return res.status(404).json({
139	        code: 404,
140	        message: '收藏不存在'
141	      });
142	    }
143	    
144	    const updates: string[] = [];
145	    const params: any[] = [];
146	    
147	    if (name) {
148	      updates.push('name = ?');
149	      params.push(name);
150	    }

152	      updates.push('address = ?');
153	      params.push(address);
154	    }
155	    if (category) {
156	      updates.push('category = ?');
157	      params.push(category);
158	    }
159	    if (icon) {
160	      updates.push('icon = ?');
161	      params.push(icon);
162	    }
163	    
164	    if (updates.length === 0) {
165	      return res.status(400).json({
166	        code: 400,
167	        message: '没有要更新的内容'
168	      });
169	    }
170	    
171	    params.push(id, userId);
172	    
173	    await query(
174	      `UPDATE favorites SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`,
175	      params
176	    );
177	    
178	    res.json({
179	      code: 200,
180	      message: '更新成功'
181	    });
182	  } catch (error) {
183	    console.error('Update favorite error:', error);
184	    res.status(500).json({
185	      code: 500,
186	      message: '服务器错误'
187	    });
188	  }
189	}

217	    res.status(500).json({

222	}
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/backend/src/controllers/navigationController.ts`

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface NavigationHistory {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  start_name?: string;
7	  start_address?: string;
8	  start_lat?: number;
9	  start_lng?: number;
10	  end_name: string;
11	  end_address: string;
12	  end_lat: number;
13	  end_lng: number;
14	  distance?: number;
15	  duration?: number;
16	  created_at: string;
17	}
18	
19	/**
20	 * 获取导航历史
21	 */
22	export async function getNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
23	  try {
24	    const userId = req.userId;
25	    const { page = 1, pageSize = 20 } = req.query;
26	    
27	    const pageNum = Number(page);
28	    const pageSizeNum = Number(pageSize);
29	    const offset = (pageNum - 1) * pageSizeNum;
30	    
31	    // 获取总数
32	    const countResult = await query<any[]>(
33	      'SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ?',
34	      [userId]
35	    );
36	    const total = countResult[0].total;
37	    
38	    // 获取列表（注意：MySQL prepared statements 不支持 LIMIT/OFFSET 占位符）
39	    const history = await query<NavigationHistory[]>(
40	      `SELECT * FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ${pageSizeNum} OFFSET ${offset}`,
41	      [userId]
42	    );
43	    
44	    // 转换字段名：下划线转驼峰
45	    const formattedHistory = history.map(item => ({
46	      id: item.id,
47	      userId: item.user_id,
48	      startName: item.start_name,
49	      startAddress: item.start_address,
50	      startLat: item.start_lat,
51	      startLng: item.start_lng,
52	      endName: item.end_name,
53	      endAddress: item.end_address,
54	      endLat: item.end_lat,
55	      endLng: item.end_lng,
56	      distance: item.distance,
57	      duration: item.duration,
58	      createdAt: item.created_at
59	    }));
60	    
61	    res.json({
62	      code: 200,
63	      message: '获取成功',
64	      data: {
65	        list: formattedHistory,
66	        total,
67	        page: pageNum,
68	        pageSize: pageSizeNum
69	      }
70	    });
71	  } catch (error) {
72	    console.error('[navigationController] Get navigation history error:', error);
73	    res.status(500).json({
74	      code: 500,
75	      message: '服务器错误'
76	    });
77	  }
78	}
79	
80	/**
81	 * 保存导航记录
82	 */
83	export async function saveNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
84	  try {
85	    const userId = req.userId;
86	    const {
87	      startName,
88	      startAddress,
89	      startLat,
90	      startLng,
91	      endName,
92	      endAddress,
93	      endLat,
94	      endLng,
95	      distance,
96	      duration
97	    } = req.body;
98	    
99	    // 验证参数
100	    if (!endName || !endAddress || !endLat || !endLng) {
101	      return res.status(400).json({
102	        code: 400,
103	        message: '缺少必要参数'
104	      });
105	    }
106	    
107	    const result: any = await query(
108	      `INSERT INTO navigation_history 
109	       (user_id, start_name, start_address, start_lat, start_lng, end_name, end_address, end_lat, end_lng, distance, duration) 
110	       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
111	      [userId, startName, startAddress, startLat, startLng, endName, endAddress, endLat, endLng, distance, duration]
112	    );
113	    
114	    res.status(201).json({
115	      code: 200,
116	      message: '保存成功',
117	      data: {
118	        id: result.insertId
119	      }
120	    });
121	  } catch (error) {
122	    console.error('Save navigation history error:', error);
123	    res.status(500).json({
124	      code: 500,
125	      message: '服务器错误'
126	    });
127	  }
128	}
129	
130	/**
131	 * 删除导航历史
132	 */
133	export async function deleteNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
134	  try {
135	    const userId = req.userId;
136	    const { id } = req.params;
137	    
138	    const result: any = await query(
139	      'DELETE FROM navigation_history WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
140	      [id, userId]
141	    );
142	    
143	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
144	      return res.status(404).json({
145	        code: 404,
146	        message: '记录不存在'
147	      });
148	    }
149	    
150	    res.json({
151	      code: 200,
152	      message: '删除成功'
153	    });
154	  } catch (error) {
155	    console.error('Delete navigation history error:', error);
156	    res.status(500).json({
157	      code: 500,
158	      message: '服务器错误'
159	    });
160	  }
161	}
162	
163	/**
164	 * 清空导航历史
165	 */
166	export async function clearNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
167	  try {
168	    const userId = req.userId;
169	    
170	    await query(
171	      'DELETE FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ?',
172	      [userId]
173	    );
174	    
175	    res.json({
176	      code: 200,
177	      message: '清空成功'
178	    });
179	  } catch (error) {
180	    console.error('Clear navigation history error:', error);
181	    res.status(500).json({
182	      code: 500,
183	      message: '服务器错误'
184	    });
185	  }
186	}
187
```

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/backend/src/controllers/routePlanController.ts`

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface RoutePlan {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  name?: string;
7	  start_name: string;
8	  start_lat: number;
9	  start_lng: number;
10	  end_name: string;
11	  end_lat: number;
12	  end_lng: number;
13	  waypoints?: string;
14	  distance?: number;
15	  duration?: number;
16	  strategy: number;
17	  polyline?: string;
18	  steps?: string;
19	  is_favorite: boolean;
20	  use_count: number;
21	  created_at: string;
22	  updated_at: string;
23	}
24	
25	/**
26	 * 获取路线方案列表
27	 */
28	export async function getRoutePlans(req: Request, res: Response) {
29	  try {
30	    const userId = req.userId;
31	    const { isFavorite, page = 1, pageSize = 20 } = req.query;
32	    
33	    const offset = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(pageSize);
34	    
35	    let sql = 'SELECT * FROM route_plans WHERE user_id = ?';
36	    const params: any[] = [userId];
37	    
38	    if (isFavorite === 'true') {
39	      sql += ' AND is_favorite = TRUE';
40	    }
41	    
42	    sql += ' ORDER BY use_count DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?';
43	    params.push(Number(pageSize), offset);
44	    
45	    const plans = await query<RoutePlan[]>(sql, params);
46	    
47	    // 获取总数
48	    let countSql = 'SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM route_plans WHERE user_id = ?';
49	    const countParams: any[] = [userId];
50	    if (isFavorite === 'true') {
51	      countSql += ' AND is_favorite = TRUE';
52	    }
53	    const countResult = await query<any[]>(countSql, countParams);
54	    const total = countResult[0].total;
55	    
56	    res.json({
57	      code: 200,
58	      message: '获取成功',
59	      data: {
60	        list: plans,
61	        total,
62	        page: Number(page),
63	        pageSize: Number(pageSize)
64	      }
65	    });
66	  } catch (error) {
67	    console.error('Get route plans error:', error);
68	    res.status(500).json({
69	      code: 500,
70	      message: '服务器错误'
71	    });
72	  }
73	}
74	
75	/**
76	 * 获取路线方案详情
77	 */
78	export async function getRoutePlanDetail(req: Request, res: Response) {
79	  try {
80	    const userId = req.userId;
81	    const { id } = req.params;
82	    
83	    const plans = await query<RoutePlan[]>(
84	      'SELECT * FROM route_plans WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
85	      [id, userId]
86	    );
87	    
88	    if (plans.length === 0) {
89	      return res.status(404).json({
90	        code: 404,
91	        message: '路线方案不存在'
92	      });
93	    }
94	    
95	    res.json({
96	      code: 200,
97	      message: '获取成功',
98	      data: plans[0]
99	    });
100	  } catch (error) {
101	    console.error('Get route plan detail error:', error);
102	    res.status(500).json({
103	      code: 500,
104	      message: '服务器错误'
105	    });
106	  }
107	}
108	
109	/**
110	 * 保存路线方案
111	 */
112	export async function saveRoutePlan(req: Request, res: Response) {
113	  try {
114	    const userId = req.userId;
115	    const {
116	      name,
117	      startName,
118	      startLat,
119	      startLng,
120	      endName,
121	      endLat,
122	      endLng,
123	      waypoints,
124	      distance,
125	      duration,
126	      strategy = 0,
127	      polyline,
128	      steps,
129	      isFavorite = false
130	    } = req.body;
131	    
132	    // 验证参数
133	    if (!startName || !startLat || !startLng || !endName || !endLat || !endLng) {
134	      return res.status(400).json({
135	        code: 400,
136	        message: '缺少必要参数'
137	      });
138	    }
139	    
140	    const result: any = await query(
141	      `INSERT INTO route_plans 
142	       (user_id, name, start_name, start_lat, start_lng, end_name, end_lat, end_lng, 
143	        waypoints, distance, duration, strategy, polyline, steps, is_favorite) 
144	       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
145	      [userId, name, startName, startLat, startLng, endName, endLat, endLng,
146	       waypoints ? JSON.stringify(waypoints) : null,
147	       distance, duration, strategy, polyline,
148	       steps ? JSON.stringify(steps) : null,
149	       isFavorite]
150	    );
151	    
152	    res.status(201).json({
153	      code: 200,
154	      message: '保存成功',
155	      data: {
156	        id: result.insertId
157	      }
158	    });
159	  } catch (error) {
160	    console.error('Save route plan error:', error);
161	    res.status(500).json({
162	      code: 500,
163	      message: '服务器错误'
164	    });
165	  }
166	}
167	
168	/**
169	 * 更新路线方案
170	 */
171	export async function updateRoutePlan(req: Request, res: Response) {
172	  try {
173	    const userId = req.userId;
174	    const { id } = req.params;
175	    const { name, isFavorite } = req.body;
176	    
177	    // 验证权限
178	    const plans = await query<RoutePlan[]>(
179	      'SELECT id FROM route_plans WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
180	      [id, userId]
181	    );
182	    
183	    if (plans.length === 0) {
184	      return res.status(404).json({
185	        code: 404,
186	        message: '路线方案不存在'
187	      });
188	    }
189	    
190	    const updates: string[] = [];
191	    const params: any[] = [];
192	    
193	    if (name !== undefined) {
194	      updates.push('name = ?');
195	      params.push(name);
196	    }
197	    if (isFavorite !== undefined) {
198	      updates.push('is_favorite = ?');
199	      params.push(isFavorite);
200	    }
201	    
202	    if (updates.length === 0) {
203	      return res.status(400).json({
204	        code: 400,
205	        message: '没有要更新的内容'
206	      });
207	    }
208	    
209	    params.push(id, userId);
210	    
211	    await query(
212	      `UPDATE route_plans SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`,
213	      params
214	    );
215	    
216	    res.json({
217	      code: 200,
218	      message: '更新成功'
219	    });
220	  } catch (error) {
221	    console.error('Update route plan error:', error);
222	    res.status(500).json({
223	      code: 500,
224	      message: '服务器错误'
225	    });
226	  }
227	}
228

263	    res.status(500).json({
264	      code: 500,
265	      message: '服务器错误'
266	    });
267	  }
268	}
```
