 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-aa7ebfea/backend/src/routes/index.ts`

```text
0	import express from 'express';
1	import { authMiddleware } from '../middleware/auth';
2	import * as authController from '../controllers/authController';
3	import * as favoriteController from '../controllers/favoriteController';
4	import * as navigationController from '../controllers/navigationController';
5	import * as routePlanController from '../controllers/routePlanController';
6	import * as locationController from '../controllers/locationController';
7	import * as feedbackController from '../controllers/feedbackController';
8	import * as frequentLocationController from '../controllers/frequentLocationController';
9	
10	const router = express.Router();
11	
12	// ========== 认证相关路由（无需token） ==========
13	router.post('/auth/register', authController.register);
14	router.post('/auth/login', authController.login);
15	
16	// ========== 用户相关路由（需要token） ==========
17	router.get('/auth/profile', authMiddleware, authController.getProfile);
18	router.put('/auth/profile', authMiddleware, authController.updateProfile);
19	
20	// ========== 收藏相关路由（需要token） ==========
21	router.get('/favorites', authMiddleware, favoriteController.getFavorites);
22	router.post('/favorites', authMiddleware, favoriteController.addFavorite);
23	router.put('/favorites/:id', authMiddleware, favoriteController.updateFavorite);
24	router.delete('/favorites/:id', authMiddleware, favoriteController.deleteFavorite);
25	
26	// ========== 导航历史相关路由（需要token） ==========
27	router.get('/navigation/history', authMiddleware, navigationController.getNavigationHistory);
28	router.post('/navigation/history', authMiddleware, navigationController.saveNavigationHistory);
29	router.delete('/navigation/history/:id', authMiddleware, navigationController.deleteNavigationHistory);
30	router.delete('/navigation/history', authMiddleware, navigationController.clearNavigationHistory);
31	
32	// ========== 路线方案相关路由（需要token） ==========
33	router.get('/routes', authMiddleware, routePlanController.getRoutePlans);
34	router.get('/routes/:id', authMiddleware, routePlanController.getRoutePlanDetail);
35	router.post('/routes', authMiddleware, routePlanController.saveRoutePlan);
36	router.put('/routes/:id', authMiddleware, routePlanController.updateRoutePlan);
37	router.post('/routes/:id/use', authMiddleware, routePlanController.useRoutePlan);
38	router.delete('/routes/:id', authMiddleware, routePlanController.deleteRoutePlan);
39	
40	// ========== 位置相关路由（需要token） ==========
41	router.post('/location', authMiddleware, locationController.updateLocation);
42	router.get('/location', authMiddleware, locationController.getLocation);
43	router.get('/location/:targetUserId', authMiddleware, locationController.getLocation);
44	router.post('/location/sharing/toggle', authMiddleware, locationController.toggleLocationSharing);
45	router.post('/location/sharing', authMiddleware, locationController.createLocationShare);
46	router.get('/location/sharing', authMiddleware, locationController.getLocationShares);
47	router.delete('/location/sharing/:id', authMiddleware, locationController.cancelLocationShare);
48	router.get('/location/nearby', authMiddleware, locationController.getNearbySharedUsers);
49	
50	// ========== 反馈相关路由（需要token） ==========
51	router.post('/feedback', authMiddleware, feedbackController.submitFeedback);
52	router.get('/feedback', authMiddleware, feedbackController.getFeedbackList);
53	router.get('/feedback/stats', authMiddleware, feedbackController.getFeedbackStats);
54	router.get('/feedback/:id', authMiddleware, feedbackController.getFeedbackDetail);
55	router.delete('/feedback/:id', authMiddleware, feedbackController.deleteFeedback);
56	
57	// ========== 常去地点相关路由（需要token） ==========
58	router.post('/frequent-locations/visit', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.recordVisit);
59	router.get('/frequent-locations', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.getFrequentLocations);
60	router.get('/frequent-locations/recommended', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.getRecommendedLocations);
61	router.get('/frequent-locations/stats', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.getVisitStats);
62	router.get('/frequent-locations/:id', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.getLocationDetail);
63	router.put('/frequent-locations/:id', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.updateLocation);
64	router.delete('/frequent-locations/:id', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.deleteLocation);
65	
66	export default router;
67
```

0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface UserLocation {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  latitude: number;
7	  longitude: number;
8	  accuracy?: number;
9	  speed?: number;
10	  heading?: number;
11	  location_type: string;
12	  is_sharing: boolean;
13	  updated_at: string;
14	}
15	
16	interface LocationShare {
17	  id: number;
18	  sharer_id: number;
19	  viewer_id: number;
20	  expire_time?: string;
21	  is_active: boolean;
22	  created_at: string;
23	}
24	
25	/**
26	 * 更新用户位置
27	 */
28	export async function updateLocation(req: Request, res: Response) {
29	  try {
30	    const userId = req.userId;
31	    const {
32	      latitude,
33	      longitude,
34	      accuracy,
35	      speed,
36	      heading,
37	      locationType = 'ip',
38	      isSharing = false
39	    } = req.body;
40	    
41	    // 验证参数
42	    if (!latitude || !longitude) {
43	      return res.status(400).json({
44	        code: 400,
45	        message: '缺少必要参数'
46	      });
47	    }
48	    
49	    // 检查是否已存在
50	    const existing = await query<UserLocation[]>(
51	      'SELECT id FROM user_locations WHERE user_id = ?',
52	      [userId]
53	    );
54	    
55	    if (existing.length > 0) {
56	      // 更新
57	      await query(
58	        `UPDATE user_locations 
59	         SET latitude = ?, longitude = ?, accuracy = ?, speed = ?, heading = ?, 
60	             location_type = ?, is_sharing = ?, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP 
61	         WHERE user_id = ?`,
62	        [latitude, longitude, accuracy, speed, heading, locationType, isSharing, userId]
63	      );
64	    } else {
65	      // 插入
66	      await query(
67	        `INSERT INTO user_locations 
68	         (user_id, latitude, longitude, accuracy, speed, heading, location_type, is_sharing) 
69	         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
70	        [userId, latitude, longitude, accuracy, speed, heading, locationType, isSharing]
71	      );
72	    }
73	    
74	    res.json({
75	      code: 200,
76	      message: '位置更新成功'
77	    });
78	  } catch (error) {
79	    console.error('Update location error:', error);
80	    res.status(500).json({
81	      code: 500,
82	      message: '服务器错误'
83	    });
84	  }
85	}
86	
87	/**
88	 * 获取用户位置
89	 */
90	export async function getLocation(req: Request, res: Response) {
91	  try {
92	    const userId = req.userId;
93	    const { targetUserId } = req.params;
94	    
95	    const targetId = targetUserId || userId;
96	    
97	    // 如果查询其他用户位置，需要检查共享权限
98	    if (targetId !== userId) {
99	      const shares = await query<LocationShare[]>(
100	        'SELECT * FROM location_shares WHERE sharer_id = ? AND viewer_id = ? AND is_active = TRUE',
101	        [targetId, userId]
102	      );
103	      
104	      if (shares.length === 0) {
105	        return res.status(403).json({
106	          code: 403,
107	          message: '无权查看该用户位置'
108	        });
109	      }
110	      
111	      // 检查是否过期
112	      const share = shares[0];
113	      if (share.expire_time && new Date(share.expire_time) < new Date()) {
114	        return res.status(403).json({
115	          code: 403,
116	          message: '位置共享已过期'
117	        });
118	      }
119	    }
120	    
121	    const locations = await query<UserLocation[]>(
122	      'SELECT * FROM user_locations WHERE user_id = ?',
123	      [targetId]
124	    );
125	    
126	    if (locations.length === 0) {
127	      return res.status(404).json({
128	        code: 404,
129	        message: '位置信息不存在'
130	      });
131	    }
132	    
133	    res.json({
134	      code: 200,
135	      message: '获取成功',
136	      data: locations[0]
137	    });
138	  } catch (error) {
139	    console.error('Get location error:', error);
140	    res.status(500).json({
141	      code: 500,
142	      message: '服务器错误'
143	    });
144	  }
145	}
146	
147	/**
148	 * 开启/关闭位置共享
149	 */
150	export async function toggleLocationSharing(req: Request, res: Response) {
151	  try {
152	    const userId = req.userId;
153	    const { isSharing } = req.body;
154	    
155	    if (isSharing === undefined) {
156	      return res.status(400).json({
157	        code: 400,
158	        message: '缺少必要参数'
159	      });
160	    }
161	    
162	    await query(
163	      'UPDATE user_locations SET is_sharing = ? WHERE user_id = ?',
164	      [isSharing, userId]
165	    );
166	    
167	    res.json({
168	      code: 200,
169	      message: isSharing ? '位置共享已开启' : '位置共享已关闭'
170	    });
171	  } catch (error) {
172	    console.error('Toggle location sharing error:', error);
173	    res.status(500).json({
174	      code: 500,
175	      message: '服务器错误'
176	    });
177	  }
178	}
179	
180	/**
181	 * 创建位置共享
182	 */
183	export async function createLocationShare(req: Request, res: Response) {
184	  try {
185	    const userId = req.userId;
186	    const { viewerId, expireHours } = req.body;
187	    
188	    if (!viewerId) {
189	      return res.status(400).json({
190	        code: 400,
191	        message: '缺少必要参数'
192	      });
193	    }
194	    
195	    // 检查是否已存在
196	    const existing = await query<LocationShare[]>(
197	      'SELECT id FROM location_shares WHERE sharer_id = ? AND viewer_id = ?',
198	      [userId, viewerId]
199	    );
200	    
201	    let expireTime = null;
202	    if (expireHours) {
203	      const expire = new Date();
204	      expire.setHours(expire.getHours() + expireHours);
205	      expireTime = expire.toISOString().slice(0, 19).replace('T', ' ');
206	    }
207	    
208	    if (existing.length > 0) {
209	      // 更新
210	      await query(
211	        'UPDATE location_shares SET expire_time = ?, is_active = TRUE WHERE sharer_id = ? AND viewer_id = ?',
212	        [expireTime, userId, viewerId]
213	      );
214	    } else {
215	      // 插入
216	      await query(
217	        'INSERT INTO location_shares (sharer_id, viewer_id, expire_time, is_active) VALUES (?, ?, ?, TRUE)',
218	        [userId, viewerId, expireTime]
219	      );
220	    }
221	    
222	    res.status(201).json({
223	      code: 200,
224	      message: '位置共享创建成功'
225	    });
226	  } catch (error) {
227	    console.error('Create location share error:', error);
228	    res.status(500).json({
229	      code: 500,
230	      message: '服务器错误'
231	    });
232	  }
233	}
234	
235	/**
236	 * 获取位置共享列表
237	 */
238	export async function getLocationShares(req: Request, res: Response) {
239	  try {
240	    const userId = req.userId;
241	    const { type = 'sharing' } = req.query; // sharing: 我分享的, viewing: 我查看的
242	    
243	    let sql = '';
244	    if (type === 'sharing') {
245	      sql = `SELECT ls.*, u.nickname, u.phone 
246	             FROM location_shares ls 
247	             LEFT JOIN users u ON ls.viewer_id = u.id 
248	             WHERE ls.sharer_id = ? AND ls.is_active = TRUE 
249	             ORDER BY ls.created_at DESC`;
250	    } else {
251	      sql = `SELECT ls.*, u.nickname, u.phone 
252	             FROM location_shares ls 
253	             LEFT JOIN users u ON ls.sharer_id = u.id 
254	             WHERE ls.viewer_id = ? AND ls.is_active = TRUE 
255	             ORDER BY ls.created_at DESC`;
256	    }
257	    
258	    const shares = await query<any[]>(sql, [userId]);
259	    
260	    res.json({
261	      code: 200,
262	      message: '获取成功',
263	      data: shares
264	    });
265	  } catch (error) {
266	    console.error('Get location shares error:', error);
267	    res.status(500).json({
268	      code: 500,
269	      message: '服务器错误'
270	    });
271	  }
272	}
273	
274	/**
275	 * 取消位置共享
276	 */
277	export async function cancelLocationShare(req: Request, res: Response) {
278	  try {
279	    const userId = req.userId;
280	    const { id } = req.params;
281	    
282	    const result: any = await query(
283	      'UPDATE location_shares SET is_active = FALSE WHERE id = ? AND sharer_id = ?',
284	      [id, userId]
285	    );
286	    
287	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
288	      return res.status(404).json({
289	        code: 404,
290	        message: '共享记录不存在'
291	      });
292	    }
293	    
294	    res.json({
295	      code: 200,
296	      message: '取消成功'
297	    });
298	  } catch (error) {
299	    console.error('Cancel location share error:', error);
300	    res.status(500).json({
301	      code: 500,
302	      message: '服务器错误'
303	    });
304	  }
305	}
306	
307	/**
308	 * 获取附近共享位置的用户
309	 */
310	export async function getNearbySharedUsers(req: Request, res: Response) {
311	  try {
312	    const userId = req.userId;
313	    const { latitude, longitude, radius = 5000 } = req.query; // radius单位：米
314	    
315	    if (!latitude || !longitude) {
316	      return res.status(400).json({
317	        code: 400,
318	        message: '缺少必要参数'
319	      });
320	    }
321	    
322	    // 获取我可以查看的用户列表
323	    const shares = await query<LocationShare[]>(
324	      'SELECT sharer_id FROM location_shares WHERE viewer_id = ? AND is_active = TRUE',
325	      [userId]
326	    );
327	    
328	    if (shares.length === 0) {
329	      return res.json({
330	        code: 200,
331	        message: '获取成功',
332	        data: []
333	      });
334	    }
335	    
336	    const sharerIds = shares.map(s => s.sharer_id);
337	    
338	    // 计算距离并筛选
339	    const sql = `
340	      SELECT ul.*, u.nickname, u.avatar,
341	             (6371000 * acos(cos(radians(?)) * cos(radians(ul.latitude)) * 
342	              cos(radians(ul.longitude) - radians(?)) + 
343	              sin(radians(?)) * sin(radians(ul.latitude)))) AS distance
344	      FROM user_locations ul
345	      LEFT JOIN users u ON ul.user_id = u.id
346	      WHERE ul.user_id IN (${sharerIds.join(',')}) AND ul.is_sharing = TRUE
347	      HAVING distance <= ?
348	      ORDER BY distance ASC
349	    `;
350	    
351	    const nearbyUsers = await query<any[]>(sql, [latitude, longitude, latitude, radius]);
352	    
353	    res.json({
354	      code: 200,
355	      message: '获取成功',
356	      data: nearbyUsers
357	    });
358	  } catch (error) {
359	    console.error('Get nearby shared users error:', error);
360	    res.status(500).json({
361	      code: 500,
362	      message: '服务器错误'
363	    });
364	  }
365	}
366

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface NavigationFeedback {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  navigation_id?: number;
7	  rating?: number;
8	  feedback_type: string;
9	  content?: string;
10	  location_lat?: number;
11	  location_lng?: number;
12	  created_at: string;
13	}
14	
15	/**
16	 * 提交导航反馈
17	 */
18	export async function submitFeedback(req: Request, res: Response) {
19	  try {
20	    const userId = req.userId;
21	    const {
22	      navigationId,
23	      rating,
24	      feedbackType,
25	      content,
26	      locationLat,
27	      locationLng
28	    } = req.body;
29	    
30	    // 验证参数
31	    if (!feedbackType) {
32	      return res.status(400).json({
33	        code: 400,
34	        message: '缺少必要参数'
35	      });
36	    }
37	    
38	    // 验证反馈类型
39	    const validTypes = ['route', 'traffic', 'poi'];
40	    if (!validTypes.includes(feedbackType)) {
41	      return res.status(400).json({
42	        code: 400,
43	        message: '无效的反馈类型'
44	      });
45	    }
46	    
47	    // 验证评分
48	    if (rating && (rating < 1 || rating > 5)) {
49	      return res.status(400).json({
50	        code: 400,
51	        message: '评分必须在1-5之间'
52	      });
53	    }
54	    
55	    const result: any = await query(
56	      `INSERT INTO navigation_feedback 
57	       (user_id, navigation_id, rating, feedback_type, content, location_lat, location_lng) 
58	       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
59	      [userId, navigationId, rating, feedbackType, content, locationLat, locationLng]
60	    );
61	    
62	    res.status(201).json({
63	      code: 200,
64	      message: '反馈提交成功',
65	      data: {
66	        id: result.insertId
67	      }
68	    });
69	  } catch (error) {
70	    console.error('Submit feedback error:', error);
71	    res.status(500).json({
72	      code: 500,
73	      message: '服务器错误'
74	    });
75	  }
76	}
77	
78	/**
79	 * 获取反馈列表
80	 */
81	export async function getFeedbackList(req: Request, res: Response) {
82	  try {
83	    const userId = req.userId;
84	    const { feedbackType, page = 1, pageSize = 20 } = req.query;
85	    
86	    const offset = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(pageSize);
87	    
88	    let sql = 'SELECT * FROM navigation_feedback WHERE user_id = ?';
89	    const params: any[] = [userId];
90	    
91	    if (feedbackType) {
92	      sql += ' AND feedback_type = ?';
93	      params.push(feedbackType);
94	    }
95	    
96	    sql += ' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?';
97	    params.push(Number(pageSize), offset);
98	    
99	    const feedbacks = await query<NavigationFeedback[]>(sql, params);
100	    
101	    // 获取总数
102	    let countSql = 'SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM navigation_feedback WHERE user_id = ?';
103	    const countParams: any[] = [userId];
104	    if (feedbackType) {
105	      countSql += ' AND feedback_type = ?';
106	      countParams.push(feedbackType);
107	    }
108	    const countResult = await query<any[]>(countSql, countParams);
109	    const total = countResult[0].total;
110	    
111	    res.json({
112	      code: 200,
113	      message: '获取成功',
114	      data: {
115	        list: feedbacks,
116	        total,
117	        page: Number(page),
118	        pageSize: Number(pageSize)
119	      }
120	    });
121	  } catch (error) {
122	    console.error('Get feedback list error:', error);
123	    res.status(500).json({
124	      code: 500,
125	      message: '服务器错误'
126	    });
127	  }
128	}
129	
130	/**
131	 * 获取反馈详情
132	 */
133	export async function getFeedbackDetail(req: Request, res: Response) {

137	    
138	    const feedbacks = await query<NavigationFeedback[]>(

143	    if (feedbacks.length === 0) {
144	      return res.status(404).json({

147	      });
148	    }
149	    
150	    res.json({
151	      code: 200,
152	      message: '获取成功',
153	      data: feedbacks[0]

163	
164	/**
165	 * 删除反馈

167	export async function deleteFeedback(req: Request, res: Response) {
168	  try {
169	    const userId = req.userId;
170	    const { id } = req.params;
171	    
172	    const result: any = await query(
173	      'DELETE FROM navigation_feedback WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
174	      [id, userId]
175	    );
176	    
177	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
178	      return res.status(404).json({

181	      });
182	    }
183	    
184	    res.json({

186	      message: '删除成功'
187	    });
188	  } catch (error) {

190	    res.status(500).json({

193	    });
194	  }
195	}
196	
197	/**
198	 * 获取反馈统计
199	 */
200	export async function getFeedbackStats(req: Request, res: Response) {
201	  try {
202	    const userId = req.userId;
203	    
204	    // 按类型统计
205	    const typeStats = await query<any[]>(
206	      `SELECT feedback_type, COUNT(*) as count, AVG(rating) as avg_rating 
207	       FROM navigation_feedback 
208	       WHERE user_id = ? 
209	       GROUP BY feedback_type`,
210	      [userId]
211	    );
212	    
213	    // 总数统计
214	    const totalResult = await query<any[]>(
215	      'SELECT COUNT(*) as total, AVG(rating) as avg_rating FROM navigation_feedback WHERE user_id = ?',
216	      [userId]
217	    );
218	    
219	    res.json({
220	      code: 200,
221	      message: '获取成功',
222	      data: {
223	        total: totalResult[0].total,
224	        avgRating: totalResult[0].avg_rating,
225	        byType: typeStats
226	      }
227	    });
228	  } catch (error) {
229	    console.error('Get feedback stats error:', error);
230	    res.status(500).json({
231	      code: 500,
232	      message: '服务器错误'
233	    });
234	  }
235	}

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a15be24b/backend/src/controllers/frequentLocationController.ts`

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface FrequentLocation {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  name: string;
7	  address?: string;
8	  latitude: number;
9	  longitude: number;
10	  visit_count: number;
11	  last_visit: string;
12	  time_pattern?: string;
13	}
14	
15	/**
16	 * 记录地点访问
17	 */
18	export async function recordVisit(req: Request, res: Response) {
19	  try {
20	    const userId = req.userId;
21	    const { name, address, latitude, longitude, timePattern } = req.body;
22	    
23	    // 验证参数
24	    if (!name || !latitude || !longitude) {
25	      return res.status(400).json({
26	        code: 400,
27	        message: '缺少必要参数'
28	      });
29	    }
30	    
31	    // 检查是否已存在（使用坐标判断，允许小范围误差）
32	    const existing = await query<FrequentLocation[]>(
33	      `SELECT * FROM frequent_locations 
34	       WHERE user_id = ? 
35	       AND ABS(latitude - ?) < 0.001 
36	       AND ABS(longitude - ?) < 0.001`,
37	      [userId, latitude, longitude]
38	    );
39	    
40	    if (existing.length > 0) {
41	      // 更新访问次数和时间
42	      await query(
43	        `UPDATE frequent_locations 
44	         SET visit_count = visit_count + 1, 
45	             last_visit = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
46	             time_pattern = ?
47	         WHERE id = ?`,
48	        [timePattern, existing[0].id]
49	      );
50	      
51	      res.json({
52	        code: 200,
53	        message: '访问记录更新成功',
54	        data: {
55	          id: existing[0].id,
56	          visitCount: existing[0].visit_count + 1
57	        }
58	      });
59	    } else {
60	      // 新增记录
61	      const result: any = await query(
62	        `INSERT INTO frequent_locations 
63	         (user_id, name, address, latitude, longitude, visit_count, time_pattern) 
64	         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1, ?)`,
65	        [userId, name, address, latitude, longitude, timePattern]
66	      );
67	      
68	      res.status(201).json({
69	        code: 200,
70	        message: '访问记录创建成功',
71	        data: {
72	          id: result.insertId,
73	          visitCount: 1
74	        }
75	      });
76	    }
77	  } catch (error) {
78	    console.error('Record visit error:', error);
79	    res.status(500).json({
80	      code: 500,
81	      message: '服务器错误'
82	    });
83	  }
84	}
85	
86	/**
87	 * 获取常去地点列表
88	 */
89	export async function getFrequentLocations(req: Request, res: Response) {
90	  try {
91	    const userId = req.userId;
92	    const { limit = 10, minVisits = 2 } = req.query;
93	    
94	    const locations = await query<FrequentLocation[]>(
95	      `SELECT * FROM frequent_locations 
96	       WHERE user_id = ? AND visit_count >= ? 
97	       ORDER BY visit_count DESC, last_visit DESC 
98	       LIMIT ?`,
99	      [userId, Number(minVisits), Number(limit)]
100	    );
101	    
102	    res.json({
103	      code: 200,
104	      message: '获取成功',
105	      data: locations
106	    });
107	  } catch (error) {
108	    console.error('Get frequent locations error:', error);
109	    res.status(500).json({
110	      code: 500,
111	      message: '服务器错误'
112	    });
113	  }
114	}
115	
116	/**
117	 * 获取智能推荐地点
118	 */
119	export async function getRecommendedLocations(req: Request, res: Response) {
120	  try {
121	    const userId = req.userId;
122	    const { timePattern, limit = 5 } = req.query;
123	    
124	    let sql = `SELECT * FROM frequent_locations WHERE user_id = ?`;
125	    const params: any[] = [userId];
126	    
127	    if (timePattern) {
128	      sql += ' AND time_pattern = ?';
129	      params.push(timePattern);
130	    }
131	    
132	    sql += ' ORDER BY visit_count DESC, last_visit DESC LIMIT ?';
133	    params.push(Number(limit));
134	    
135	    const locations = await query<FrequentLocation[]>(sql, params);
136	    
137	    res.json({
138	      code: 200,
139	      message: '获取成功',
140	      data: locations
141	    });
142	  } catch (error) {
143	    console.error('Get recommended locations error:', error);
144	    res.status(500).json({
145	      code: 500,
146	      message: '服务器错误'
147	    });
148	  }
149	}
150	
151	/**
152	 * 获取地点详情
153	 */
154	export async function getLocationDetail(req: Request, res: Response) {
155	  try {
156	    const userId = req.userId;
157	    const { id } = req.params;
158	    
159	    const locations = await query<FrequentLocation[]>(
160	      'SELECT * FROM frequent_locations WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
161	      [id, userId]
162	    );
163	    
164	    if (locations.length === 0) {
165	      return res.status(404).json({
166	        code: 404,
167	        message: '地点不存在'
168	      });
169	    }
170	    
171	    res.json({
172	      code: 200,
173	      message: '获取成功',
174	      data: locations[0]
175	    });
176	  } catch (error) {
177	    console.error('Get location detail error:', error);
178	    res.status(500).json({
179	      code: 500,
180	      message: '服务器错误'
181	    });
182	  }
183	}
184	
185	/**
186	 * 更新地点信息
187	 */
188	export async function updateLocation(req: Request, res: Response) {
189	  try {
190	    const userId = req.userId;
191	    const { id } = req.params;
192	    const { name, address, timePattern } = req.body;
193	    
194	    // 验证权限
195	    const locations = await query<FrequentLocation[]>(
196	      'SELECT id FROM frequent_locations WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
197	      [id, userId]
198	    );
199	    
200	    if (locations.length === 0) {
201	      return res.status(404).json({
202	        code: 404,
203	        message: '地点不存在'
204	      });
205	    }
206	    
207	    const updates: string[] = [];
208	    const params: any[] = [];
209	    
210	    if (name) {
211	      updates.push('name = ?');
212	      params.push(name);
213	    }
214	    if (address) {
215	      updates.push('address = ?');
216	      params.push(address);
217	    }
218	    if (timePattern) {
219	      updates.push('time_pattern = ?');
220	      params.push(timePattern);
221	    }
222	    
223	    if (updates.length === 0) {
224	      return res.status(400).json({
225	        code: 400,
226	        message: '没有要更新的内容'
227	      });
228	    }
229	    
230	    params.push(id, userId);
231	    
232	    await query(
233	      `UPDATE frequent_locations SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`,
234	      params
235	    );
236	    
237	    res.json({
238	      code: 200,
239	      message: '更新成功'
240	    });
241	  } catch (error) {
242	    console.error('Update location error:', error);
243	    res.status(500).json({
244	      code: 500,
245	      message: '服务器错误'
246	    });
247	  }
248	}
249	
250	/**
251	 * 删除常去地点
252	 */
253	export async function deleteLocation(req: Request, res: Response) {
254	  try {
255	    const userId = req.userId;
256	    const { id } = req.params;
257	    
258	    const result: any = await query(
259	      'DELETE FROM frequent_locations WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
260	      [id, userId]
261	    );
262	    
263	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
264	      return res.status(404).json({
265	        code: 404,
266	        message: '地点不存在'
267	      });
268	    }
269	    
270	    res.json({
271	      code: 200,
272	      message: '删除成功'
273	    });
274	  } catch (error) {
275	    console.error('Delete location error:', error);
276	    res.status(500).json({
277	      code: 500,
278	      message: '服务器错误'
279	    });
280	  }
281	}
282	
283	/**
284	 * 获取访问统计
285	 */
286	export async function getVisitStats(req: Request, res: Response) {
287	  try {
288	    const userId = req.userId;
289	    
290	    // 总访问次数
291	    const totalResult = await query<any[]>(
292	      'SELECT SUM(visit_count) as total_visits, COUNT(*) as location_count FROM frequent_locations WHERE user_id = ?',
293	      [userId]
294	    );
295	    
296	    // 按时间规律统计
297	    const patternStats = await query<any[]>(
298	      `SELECT time_pattern, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(visit_count) as total_visits 
299	       FROM frequent_locations 
300	       WHERE user_id = ? AND time_pattern IS NOT NULL 
301	       GROUP BY time_pattern`,
302	      [userId]
303	    );
304	    
305	    res.json({
306	      code: 200,
307	      message: '获取成功',
308	      data: {
309	        totalVisits: totalResult[0].total_visits || 0,
310	        locationCount: totalResult[0].location_count || 0,
311	        byPattern: patternStats
312	      }
313	    });
314	  } catch (error) {
315	    console.error('Get visit stats error:', error);
316	    res.status(500).json({
317	      code: 500,
318	      message: '服务器错误'
319	    });
320	  }
321	}
322

```text
0	/**
1	 * 认证服务 - 管理用户认证、注册、登录和登出
2	 */
3	import preferences from '@ohos.data.preferences';
4	import { HttpService } from './HttpService';
5	import { 
6	  ApiResponse, 
7	  UserInfo, 
8	  RegisterRequest, 
9	  LoginRequest, 
10	  UpdateProfileRequest 
11	} from '../models/BackendModels';
12	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
13	
14	/**
15	 * 认证服务类
16	 */
17	export class AuthService {
18	  private static instance: AuthService;
19	  private httpService: HttpService;
20	  private currentUser: UserInfo | null = null;
21	  private preferencesInstance: preferences.Preferences | null = null;
22	  private readonly PREFERENCES_NAME = 'app_auth';
23	  
24	  private constructor() {
25	    this.httpService = HttpService.getInstance();
26	    this.initPreferences();
27	  }
28	  
29	  static getInstance(): AuthService {
30	    if (!AuthService.instance) {
31	      AuthService.instance = new AuthService();
32	    }
33	    return AuthService.instance;
34	  }
35	  
36	  /**
37	   * 初始化Preferences
38	   */
39	  private async initPreferences(): Promise<void> {
40	    try {
41	      const context = getContext();
42	      this.preferencesInstance = await preferences.getPreferences(context, this.PREFERENCES_NAME);
43	      await this.loadUserInfo();
44	      console.log('[AuthService] Preferences初始化成功');
45	    } catch (err) {
46	      console.error('[AuthService] Preferences初始化失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
47	    }
48	  }
49	
50	  /**
51	   * 用户注册
52	   */
53	  async register(phone: string, password: string, nickname?: string): Promise<ApiResponse<UserInfo>> {
54	    try {
55	      console.log('[AuthService] 注册用户:', phone);
56	      
57	      // 只包含有值的字段
58	      const requestData: RegisterRequest = { phone, password };
59	      if (nickname && nickname.trim() !== '') {
60	        requestData.nickname = nickname;
61	      }
62	      
63	      const response = await this.httpService.post<UserInfo>(
64	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_REGISTER,
65	        requestData,
66	        false  // 注册不需要认证
67	      );
68	      
69	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
70	        // 保存token和用户信息
71	        if (response.data.token) {
72	          await this.httpService.setToken(response.data.token);
73	          await this.saveUserInfo(response.data);
74	          this.currentUser = response.data;
75	        }
76	      }
77	      
78	      return response;
79	    } catch (err) {
80	      console.error('[AuthService] 注册失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
81	      return err as ApiResponse<UserInfo>;
82	    }
83	  }
84	  
85	  /**
86	   * 用户登录
87	   */
88	  async login(phone: string, password: string): Promise<ApiResponse<UserInfo>> {
89	    try {
90	      console.log('[AuthService] 用户登录:', phone);
91	      
92	      const requestData: LoginRequest = { phone, password };
93	      
94	      const response = await this.httpService.post<UserInfo>(
95	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_LOGIN,
96	        requestData,
97	        false  // 登录不需要认证
98	      );
99	      
100	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
101	        // 保存token和用户信息
102	        if (response.data.token) {
103	          await this.httpService.setToken(response.data.token);
104	          await this.saveUserInfo(response.data);
105	          this.currentUser = response.data;
106	        }
107	      }
108	      
109	      return response;
110	    } catch (err) {
111	      console.error('[AuthService] 登录失败:', err);
112	      return err as ApiResponse<UserInfo>;
113	    }
114	  }
115	  
116	  /**
117	   * 获取用户信息
118	   */
119	  async getProfile(): Promise<ApiResponse<UserInfo>> {
120	    try {
121	      console.log('[AuthService] 获取用户信息');
122	      
123	      const response = await this.httpService.get<UserInfo>(
124	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_PROFILE,
125	        true  // 需要认证
126	      );
127	      
128	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
129	        await this.saveUserInfo(response.data);
130	        this.currentUser = response.data;
131	      }
132	      
133	      return response;
134	    } catch (err) {
135	      console.error('[AuthService] 获取用户信息失败:', err);
136	      return err as ApiResponse<UserInfo>;
137	    }
138	  }
139	  
140	  /**
141	   * 更新用户信息
142	   */
143	  async updateProfile(nickname?: string, avatar?: string): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
144	    try {
145	      console.log('[AuthService] 更新用户信息');
146	      
147	      // 只包含有值的字段
148	      const requestData: UpdateProfileRequest = {};
149	      if (nickname && nickname.trim() !== '') {
150	        requestData.nickname = nickname;
151	      }
152	      if (avatar && avatar.trim() !== '') {
153	        requestData.avatar = avatar;
154	      }
155	      
156	      const response = await this.httpService.put<void>(
157	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_PROFILE,
158	        requestData,
159	        true  // 需要认证
160	      );
161	      
162	      if (response.code === 200) {
163	        // 更新本地用户信息
164	        if (this.currentUser) {
165	          if (nickname) this.currentUser.nickname = nickname;
166	          if (avatar) this.currentUser.avatar = avatar;
167	          await this.saveUserInfo(this.currentUser);
168	        }
169	      }
170	      
171	      return response;
172	    } catch (err) {
173	      console.error('[AuthService] 更新用户信息失败:', err);
174	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
175	    }
176	  }
177	  
178	  /**
179	   * 登出
180	   */
181	  async logout(): Promise<void> {
182	    try {
183	      console.log('[AuthService] 用户登出');
184	      
185	      // 清除token
186	      await this.httpService.clearToken();
187	      
188	      // 清除用户信息
189	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
190	        await this.preferencesInstance.delete(ApiConfig.USER_KEY);
191	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
192	      }
193	      
194	      this.currentUser = null;
195	      console.log('[AuthService] 登出成功');
196	    } catch (err) {
197	      console.error('[AuthService] 登出失败:', err);
198	    }
199	  }
200	  
201	  /**
202	   * 检查登录状态
203	   */
204	  async isLoggedIn(): Promise<boolean> {
205	    const token = this.httpService.getToken();
206	    return token !== '' && token !== null && token !== undefined;
207	  }
208	  
209	  /**
210	   * 获取当前用户
211	   */
212	  async getCurrentUser(): Promise<UserInfo | null> {
213	    if (this.currentUser) {
214	      return this.currentUser;
215	    }
216	    
217	    // 尝试从本地存储加载
218	    await this.loadUserInfo();
219	    return this.currentUser;
220	  }
221	  
222	  /**
223	   * 保存用户信息到Preferences
224	   */
225	  private async saveUserInfo(userInfo: UserInfo): Promise<void> {
226	    try {
227	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
228	        await this.preferencesInstance.put(ApiConfig.USER_KEY, JSON.stringify(userInfo));
229	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
230	        console.log('[AuthService] 用户信息已保存');
231	      }
232	    } catch (err) {
233	      console.error('[AuthService] 保存用户信息失败:', err);
234	    }
235	  }
236	  
237	  /**
238	   * 从Preferences加载用户信息
239	   */
240	  private async loadUserInfo(): Promise<void> {
241	    try {
242	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
243	        const userInfoStr = await this.preferencesInstance.get(ApiConfig.USER_KEY, '');
244	        if (userInfoStr && userInfoStr !== '') {
245	          this.currentUser = JSON.parse(userInfoStr as string) as UserInfo;
246	          console.log('[AuthService] 用户信息已加载');
247	        }
248	      }
249	    } catch (err) {
250	      console.error('[AuthService] 加载用户信息失败:', err);
251	    }
252	  }
253	}
254
```

0	/**
1	 * 收藏服务 - 管理用户收藏的地点
2	 */
3	import { HttpService } from './HttpService';
4	import { CacheService } from './CacheService';
5	import { ApiResponse, FavoritePlace } from '../models/BackendModels';
6	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
7	
8	/**
9	 * 收藏服务类
10	 */
11	export class FavoriteService {
12	  private static instance: FavoriteService;
13	  private httpService: HttpService;
14	  private cacheService: CacheService;
15	  private readonly CACHE_KEY = 'favorites_cache';
16	  
17	  private constructor() {
18	    this.httpService = HttpService.getInstance();
19	    this.cacheService = CacheService.getInstance();
20	  }
21	  
22	  static getInstance(): FavoriteService {
23	    if (!FavoriteService.instance) {
24	      FavoriteService.instance = new FavoriteService();
25	    }
26	    return FavoriteService.instance;
27	  }
28	  
29	  /**
30	   * 获取收藏列表
31	   */
32	  async getFavorites(category?: string): Promise<ApiResponse<FavoritePlace[]>> {
33	    try {
34	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 获取收藏列表, category:', category);
35	      
36	      // 检查是否登录
37	      const token = this.httpService.getToken();
38	      if (!token) {
39	        return {
40	          code: 401,
41	          message: '需要登录'
42	        };
43	      }
44	      
45	      // 构建URL
46	      let url = ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FAVORITES;
47	      if (category) {
48	        url += `?category=${category}`;
49	      }
50	      
51	      const response = await this.httpService.get<FavoritePlace[]>(url, true);
52	      
53	      // 成功时缓存数据
54	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
55	        await this.cacheFavorites(response.data);
56	      }
57	      
58	      return response;
59	    } catch (err) {
60	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 获取收藏列表失败:', err);
61	      
62	      // 网络失败时尝试从缓存读取
63	      const cachedData = await this.getCachedFavorites();
64	      if (cachedData && cachedData.length > 0) {
65	        console.log('[FavoriteService] 使用缓存数据');
66	        return {
67	          code: 200,
68	          message: '从缓存加载',
69	          data: cachedData
70	        };
71	      }
72	      
73	      return err as ApiResponse<FavoritePlace[]>;
74	    }
75	  }
76	  
77	  /**
78	   * 添加收藏
79	   */
80	  async addFavorite(place: Partial<FavoritePlace>): Promise<ApiResponse<FavoritePlace>> {
81	    try {
82	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 添加收藏:', place.name);
83	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 完整数据:', JSON.stringify(place));
84	      
85	      // 检查是否登录
86	      const token = this.httpService.getToken();
87	      console.log('[FavoriteService] Token存在:', !!token);
88	      if (!token) {
89	        return {
90	          code: 401,
91	          message: '需要登录'
92	        };
93	      }
94	      
95	      const response = await this.httpService.post<FavoritePlace>(
96	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FAVORITES,
97	        place,
98	        true
99	      );
100	      
101	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 响应代码:', response.code);
102	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 响应消息:', response.message);
103	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 完整响应:', JSON.stringify(response));
104	      
105	      // 成功时清除缓存，下次重新加载
106	      if (response.code === 200) {
107	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
108	      }
109	      
110	      return response;
111	    } catch (err) {
112	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 添加收藏失败 - 错误类型:', typeof err);
113	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 添加收藏失败 - 详情:', JSON.stringify(err));
114	      return err as ApiResponse<FavoritePlace>;
115	    }
116	  }
117	  
118	  /**
119	   * 更新收藏
120	   */
121	  async updateFavorite(id: number, updates: Partial<FavoritePlace>): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
122	    try {
123	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 更新收藏:', id);
124	      
125	      // 检查是否登录
126	      const token = this.httpService.getToken();
127	      if (!token) {
128	        return {
129	          code: 401,
130	          message: '需要登录'
131	        };
132	      }
133	      
134	      const response = await this.httpService.put<void>(
135	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FAVORITE_DETAIL(id),
136	        updates,
137	        true
138	      );
139	      
140	      // 成功时清除缓存
141	      if (response.code === 200) {
142	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
143	      }
144	      
145	      return response;
146	    } catch (err) {
147	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 更新收藏失败:', err);
148	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
149	    }
150	  }
151	  
152	  /**
153	   * 删除收藏
154	   */
155	  async deleteFavorite(id: number): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
156	    try {
157	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 删除收藏:', id);
158	      
159	      // 检查是否登录
160	      const token = this.httpService.getToken();
161	      if (!token) {
162	        return {
163	          code: 401,
164	          message: '需要登录'
165	        };
166	      }
167	      
168	      const response = await this.httpService.delete<void>(
169	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FAVORITE_DETAIL(id),
170	        true
171	      );
172	      
173	      // 成功时清除缓存
174	      if (response.code === 200) {
175	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
176	      }
177	      
178	      return response;
179	    } catch (err) {
180	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 删除收藏失败:', err);
181	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
182	    }
183	  }
184	  
185	  /**
186	   * 搜索收藏
187	   */
188	  async searchFavorites(keyword: string): Promise<FavoritePlace[]> {
189	    try {
190	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 搜索收藏:', keyword);
191	      
192	      // 先获取所有收藏
193	      const response = await this.getFavorites();
194	      
195	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
196	        // 按名称搜索（不区分大小写）
197	        const lowerKeyword = keyword.toLowerCase();
198	        return response.data.filter(place => 
199	          place.name.toLowerCase().includes(lowerKeyword)
200	        );
201	      }
202	      
203	      return [];
204	    } catch (err) {
205	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 搜索收藏失败:', err);
206	      return [];
207	    }
208	  }
209	  
210	  /**
211	   * 从缓存获取收藏列表
212	   */
213	  private async getCachedFavorites(): Promise<FavoritePlace[]> {
214	    try {
215	      const cached = await this.cacheService.get<FavoritePlace[]>(this.CACHE_KEY);
216	      return cached || [];
217	    } catch (err) {
218	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 读取缓存失败:', err);
219	      return [];
220	    }
221	  }
222	  
223	  /**
224	   * 缓存收藏列表
225	   */
226	  private async cacheFavorites(favorites: FavoritePlace[]): Promise<void> {
227	    try {
228	      await this.cacheService.set(
229	        this.CACHE_KEY,
230	        favorites,
231	        ApiConfig.CACHE_EXPIRE_TIME.FAVORITES
232	      );
233	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 收藏列表已缓存');
234	    } catch (err) {
235	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 缓存收藏列表失败:', err);
236	    }
237	  }
238	}
239
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
0	/**
1	 * 导航历史服务 - 管理导航历史记录
2	 */
3	import { HttpService } from './HttpService';
4	import { CacheService } from './CacheService';
5	import { ApiResponse, NavigationHistory, PageResponse } from '../models/BackendModels';
6	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
7	
8	/**
9	 * 导航历史服务类
10	 */
11	export class NavigationHistoryService {
12	  private static instance: NavigationHistoryService;
13	  private httpService: HttpService;
14	  private cacheService: CacheService;
15	  private readonly CACHE_KEY = 'history_cache';
16	  
17	  private constructor() {
18	    this.httpService = HttpService.getInstance();
19	    this.cacheService = CacheService.getInstance();
20	  }
21	  
22	  static getInstance(): NavigationHistoryService {
23	    if (!NavigationHistoryService.instance) {
24	      NavigationHistoryService.instance = new NavigationHistoryService();
25	    }
26	    return NavigationHistoryService.instance;
27	  }
28	  
29	  /**
30	   * 获取历史记录（支持分页）
31	   */
32	  async getHistory(page: number = 1, pageSize: number = 50): Promise<ApiResponse<PageResponse<NavigationHistory>>> {
33	    try {
34	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 获取历史记录, page:', page, 'pageSize:', pageSize);
35	      
36	      const url = `${ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY}?page=${page}&pageSize=${pageSize}`;
37	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 请求URL:', ApiConfig.BASE_URL + url);
38	      
39	      const response = await this.httpService.get<PageResponse<NavigationHistory>>(url, true);
40	      
41	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 响应状态码:', response.code);
42	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 响应消息:', response.message);
43	      
44	      // 成功时缓存数据（只缓存第一页的最近50条）
45	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data && page === 1) {
46	        await this.cacheHistory(response.data.list);
47	      }
48	      
49	      return response;
50	    } catch (err) {
51	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 获取历史记录失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
52	      
53	      // 网络失败时尝试从缓存读取
54	      if (page === 1) {
55	        const cachedData = await this.getCachedHistory();
56	        if (cachedData && cachedData.length > 0) {
57	          console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 使用缓存数据');
58	          return {
59	            code: 200,
60	            message: '从缓存加载',
61	            data: {
62	              list: cachedData,
63	              total: cachedData.length,
64	              page: 1,
65	              pageSize: cachedData.length
66	            }
67	          };
68	        }
69	      }
70	      
71	      return err as ApiResponse<PageResponse<NavigationHistory>>;
72	    }
73	  }
74	  
75	  /**
76	   * 保存导航记录
77	   */
78	  async saveHistory(record: Partial<NavigationHistory>): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
79	    try {
80	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 保存导航记录');
81	      
82	      // 验证必需字段
83	      if (!record.endName || !record.endAddress || 
84	          record.endLat === undefined || record.endLng === undefined) {
85	        console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 缺少必需字段');
86	        return {
87	          code: 400,
88	          message: '缺少必需字段：endName, endAddress, endLat, endLng'
89	        };
90	      }
91	      
92	      const response = await this.httpService.post<void>(
93	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY,
94	        record,
95	        true
96	      );
97	      
98	      // 成功时清除缓存
99	      if (response.code === 200) {
100	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
101	      }
102	      
103	      return response;
104	    } catch (err) {
105	      // 静默失败 - 不抛出异常，不阻塞导航功能
106	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 保存导航记录失败（静默）:', err);
107	      return {
108	        code: -1,
109	        message: '保存失败（已静默处理）'
110	      };
111	    }
112	  }
113	  
114	  /**
115	   * 删除历史记录
116	   */
117	  async deleteHistory(id: number): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
118	    try {
119	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 删除历史记录:', id);
120	      
121	      const response = await this.httpService.delete<void>(
122	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY_DETAIL(id),
123	        true
124	      );
125	      
126	      // 成功时清除缓存
127	      if (response.code === 200) {
128	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
129	      }
130	      
131	      return response;
132	    } catch (err) {
133	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 删除历史记录失败:', err);
134	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
135	    }
136	  }
137	  
138	  /**
139	   * 清空历史记录
140	   */
141	  async clearHistory(): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
142	    try {
143	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 清空历史记录');
144	      
145	      const response = await this.httpService.delete<void>(
146	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY,
147	        true
148	      );
149	      
150	      // 成功时清除缓存
151	      if (response.code === 200) {
152	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
153	      }
154	      
155	      return response;
156	    } catch (err) {
157	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 清空历史记录失败:', err);
158	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
159	    }
160	  }
161	  
162	  /**
163	   * 按日期范围筛选历史记录
164	   */
165	  async getHistoryByDateRange(startDate: string, endDate: string): Promise<ApiResponse<NavigationHistory[]>> {
166	    try {
167	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 按日期筛选:', startDate, '-', endDate);
168	      
169	      const url = `${ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY}?startDate=${startDate}&endDate=${endDate}`;
170	      const response = await this.httpService.get<NavigationHistory[]>(url, true);
171	      
172	      return response;
173	    } catch (err) {
174	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 按日期筛选失败:', err);
175	      return err as ApiResponse<NavigationHistory[]>;
176	    }
177	  }
178	  
179	  /**
180	   * 从缓存获取历史记录
181	   */
182	  private async getCachedHistory(): Promise<NavigationHistory[]> {
183	    try {
184	      const cached = await this.cacheService.get<NavigationHistory[]>(this.CACHE_KEY);
185	      return cached || [];
186	    } catch (err) {
187	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 读取缓存失败:', err);
188	      return [];
189	    }
190	  }
191	  
192	  /**
193	   * 缓存历史记录（最近50条）
194	   */
195	  private async cacheHistory(history: NavigationHistory[]): Promise<void> {
196	    try {
197	      // 只缓存最近50条
198	      const toCache = history.slice(0, 50);
199	      await this.cacheService.set(
200	        this.CACHE_KEY,
201	        toCache,
202	        ApiConfig.CACHE_EXPIRE_TIME.HISTORY
203	      );
204	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 历史记录已缓存');
205	    } catch (err) {
206	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 缓存历史记录失败:', err);
207	    }
208	  }
209	}

0	/**
1	 * 常去地点服务 - 管理和识别用户常去的地点
2	 */
3	import { HttpService } from './HttpService';
4	import { ApiResponse, FrequentLocation, FrequentLocationStats } from '../models/BackendModels';
5	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
6	
7	/**
8	 * 常去地点服务类
9	 */
10	export class FrequentLocationService {
11	  private static instance: FrequentLocationService;
12	  private httpService: HttpService;
13	  
14	  private constructor() {
15	    this.httpService = HttpService.getInstance();
16	  }
17	  
18	  static getInstance(): FrequentLocationService {
19	    if (!FrequentLocationService.instance) {
20	      FrequentLocationService.instance = new FrequentLocationService();
21	    }
22	    return FrequentLocationService.instance;
23	  }
24	  
25	  /**
26	   * 记录地点访问
27	   */
28	  async recordVisit(location: Partial<FrequentLocation>): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
29	    try {
30	      console.log('[FrequentLocationService] 记录地点访问:', location.name);
31	      
32	      const response = await this.httpService.post<void>(
33	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FREQUENT_LOCATIONS_VISIT,
34	        location,
35	        true
36	      );
37	      
38	      return response;
39	    } catch (err) {
40	      console.error('[FrequentLocationService] 记录地点访问失败:', err);
41	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
42	    }
43	  }
44	  
45	  /**
46	   * 获取常去地点列表
47	   */
48	  async getFrequentLocations(limit?: number, minVisits?: number): Promise<ApiResponse<FrequentLocation[]>> {
49	    try {
50	      console.log('[FrequentLocationService] 获取常去地点列表');
51	      
52	      // 构建URL参数
53	      let url = ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FREQUENT_LOCATIONS;
54	      const params: string[] = [];
55	      if (limit) params.push(`limit=${limit}`);
56	      if (minVisits) params.push(`minVisits=${minVisits}`);
57	      if (params.length > 0) {
58	        url += `?${params.join('&')}`;
59	      }
60	      
61	      const response = await this.httpService.get<FrequentLocation[]>(url, true);
62	      
63	      // 按visitCount降序排序
64	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
65	        response.data.sort((a, b) => b.visitCount - a.visitCount);
66	      }
67	      
68	      return response;
69	    } catch (err) {
70	      console.error('[FrequentLocationService] 获取常去地点列表失败:', err);
71	      return err as ApiResponse<FrequentLocation[]>;
72	    }
73	  }
74	  
75	  /**
76	   * 获取智能推荐
77	   */
78	  async getRecommendations(timePattern?: string, limit?: number): Promise<ApiResponse<FrequentLocation[]>> {
79	    try {
80	      console.log('[FrequentLocationService] 获取智能推荐');
81	      
82	      // 构建URL参数
83	      let url = ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FREQUENT_LOCATIONS_RECOMMENDED;
84	      const params: string[] = [];
85	      if (timePattern) params.push(`timePattern=${timePattern}`);
86	      if (limit) params.push(`limit=${limit}`);
87	      if (params.length > 0) {
88	        url += `?${params.join('&')}`;
89	      }
90	      
91	      const response = await this.httpService.get<FrequentLocation[]>(url, true);
92	      
93	      return response;
94	    } catch (err) {
95	      console.error('[FrequentLocationService] 获取智能推荐失败:', err);
96	      return err as ApiResponse<FrequentLocation[]>;
97	    }
98	  }
99	  
100	  /**
101	   * 获取访问统计
102	   */
103	  async getStats(): Promise<ApiResponse<FrequentLocationStats>> {

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-aa7ebfea/backend/src/server.ts`

```text
0	import express from 'express';
1	import cors from 'cors';
2	import dotenv from 'dotenv';
3	import routes from './routes';
4	import { testConnection } from './config/database';
5	
6	// 加载环境变量
7	dotenv.config();
8	
9	const app = express();
10	
11	const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
12	
13	// 中间件
14	app.use(cors());  // 允许跨域
15	app.use(express.json());  // 解析JSON请求体
16	app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true }));  // 解析URL编码请求体
17	
18	// 请求日志
19	app.use((req, res, next) => {
20	  console.log(`${new Date().toISOString()} - ${req.method} ${req.path}`);
21	  next();
22	});
23	
24	// API路由
25	app.use('/api/v1', routes);
26	
27	// 健康检查
28	app.get('/health', (req, res) => {
29	  res.json({
30	    status: 'ok',
31	    timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
32	  });
33	});
34	
35	// 404处理
36	app.use((req, res) => {
37	  res.status(404).json({
38	    code: 404,
39	    message: '接口不存在'
40	  });
41	});
42	
43	// 错误处理
44	app.use((err: any, req: express.Request, res: express.Response, next: express.NextFunction) => {
45	  console.error('Server error:', err);
46	  res.status(500).json({
47	    code: 500,
48	    message: '服务器内部错误'
49	  });
50	});
51	
52	// 启动服务器
53	async function startServer() {
54	  try {
55	    // 测试数据库连接
56	    const dbConnected = await testConnection();
57	    
58	    if (!dbConnected) {
59	      console.error('❌ 数据库连接失败，服务器启动中止');
60	      process.exit(1);
61	    }
62	    
63	    // 启动HTTP服务
64	    app.listen(PORT, () => {
65	      console.log('');
66	      console.log('🚀 ========================================');
67	      console.log(`🚀 车载导航系统后端服务已启动`);
68	      console.log(`🚀 运行环境: ${process.env.NODE_ENV || 'development'}`);
69	      console.log(`🚀 服务地址: http://localhost:${PORT}`);
70	      console.log(`🚀 API文档: http://localhost:${PORT}/api/v1`);
71	      console.log(`🚀 健康检查: http://localhost:${PORT}/health`);
72	      console.log('🚀 ========================================');
73	      console.log('');
74	    });
75	  } catch (error) {
76	    console.error('❌ 服务器启动失败:', error);
77	    process.exit(1);
78	  }
79	}
80	
81	// 优雅关闭
82	process.on('SIGTERM', () => {
83	  console.log('收到SIGTERM信号，正在关闭服务器...');
84	  process.exit(0);
85	});
86	
87	process.on('SIGINT', () => {
88	  console.log('收到SIGINT信号，正在关闭服务器...');
89	  process.exit(0);
90	});
91	
92	// 启动
93	startServer();
94
```
</details></tool-use>

51	  // 超时配置（毫秒）

79	    
80	    // 位置共享

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-aa7ebfea/entry/src/main/ets/services/HttpService.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * HTTP服务 - 封装网络请求
2	 * 统一处理HTTP通信、Token管理、错误处理
3	 */
4	import http from '@ohos.net.http';
5	import preferences from '@ohos.data.preferences';
6	import { ApiResponse } from '../models/BackendModels';
7	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
8	
9	/**
10	 * HTTP服务类
11	 */
12	export class HttpService {
13	  private static instance: HttpService;
14	  private token: string = '';
15	  private preferencesInstance: preferences.Preferences | null = null;
16	  private readonly PREFERENCES_NAME = 'app_auth';
17	  
18	  private constructor() {
19	    // 从本地存储加载token
20	    this.initPreferences();
21	  }
22	  
23	  static getInstance(): HttpService {
24	    if (!HttpService.instance) {
25	      HttpService.instance = new HttpService();
26	    }
27	    return HttpService.instance;
28	  }
29	  
30	  /**
31	   * 初始化Preferences
32	   */
33	  private async initPreferences(): Promise<void> {
34	    try {
35	      const context = getContext();
36	      this.preferencesInstance = await preferences.getPreferences(context, this.PREFERENCES_NAME);
37	      await this.loadToken();
38	      console.log('[HttpService] Preferences初始化成功');
39	    } catch (err) {
40	      console.error('[HttpService] Preferences初始化失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
41	    }
42	  }
43	  
44	  /**
45	   * 设置认证token
46	   */
47	  async setToken(token: string): Promise<void> {
48	    this.token = token;
49	    await this.saveToken(token);
50	  }
51	  
52	  /**
53	   * 获取token
54	   */
55	  getToken(): string {
56	    return this.token;
57	  }
58	  
59	  /**
60	   * 清除token
61	   */
62	  async clearToken(): Promise<void> {
63	    this.token = '';
64	    try {
65	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
66	        await this.preferencesInstance.delete(ApiConfig.TOKEN_KEY);
67	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
68	        console.log('[HttpService] Token已清除');
69	      }
70	    } catch (err) {
71	      console.error('[HttpService] 清除Token失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
72	    }
73	  }
74	  
75	  /**
76	   * 保存token到Preferences
77	   */
78	  private async saveToken(token: string): Promise<void> {
79	    try {
80	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
81	        await this.preferencesInstance.put(ApiConfig.TOKEN_KEY, token);
82	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
83	        console.log('[HttpService] Token已保存');
84	      }
85	    } catch (err) {
86	      console.error('[HttpService] 保存Token失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
87	    }
88	  }
89	  
90	  /**
91	   * 从Preferences加载token
92	   */
93	  private async loadToken(): Promise<void> {
94	    try {
95	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
96	        const token = await this.preferencesInstance.get(ApiConfig.TOKEN_KEY, '');
97	        if (token && token !== '') {
98	          this.token = token as string;
99	          console.log('[HttpService] Token已加载');
100	        }
101	      }
102	    } catch (err) {
103	      console.error('[HttpService] 加载Token失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
104	    }
105	  }
106	  
107	  /**
108	   * 发送HTTP请求
109	   */
110	  private async request<T>(
111	    method: http.RequestMethod,
112	    url: string,
113	    data?: Object,
114	    needAuth: boolean = true
115	  ): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
116	    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
117	      const httpRequest = http.createHttp();
118	      
119	      const fullUrl = `${ApiConfig.BASE_URL}${url}`;
120	      console.log(`[HttpService] ========== 请求详情 ==========`);
121	      console.log(`[HttpService] 方法: ${method}`);
122	      console.log(`[HttpService] BASE_URL: ${ApiConfig.BASE_URL}`);
123	      console.log(`[HttpService] 路径: ${url}`);
124	      console.log(`[HttpService] 完整URL: ${fullUrl}`);
125	      console.log(`[HttpService] ================================`);
126	      
127	      const headers: Record<string, string> = {
128	        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
129	      };
130	      
131	      // 添加认证头
132	      if (needAuth && this.token) {
133	        headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;
134	      }
135	      
136	      const options: http.HttpRequestOptions = {
137	        method,
138	        header: headers,
139	        readTimeout: ApiConfig.TIMEOUT,
140	        connectTimeout: ApiConfig.TIMEOUT
141	      };
142	      
143	      // 添加请求体
144	      if (data && (method === http.RequestMethod.POST || method === http.RequestMethod.PUT)) {
145	        options.extraData = JSON.stringify(data);
146	        console.log('[HttpService] 请求数据:', JSON.stringify(data));
147	      }
148	      
149	      console.log('[HttpService] 开始发送请求...');
150	      
151	      httpRequest.request(fullUrl, options, (err: Error, data: http.HttpResponse) => {
152	        console.log('[HttpService] 收到响应回调');
153	        
154	        if (err) {
155	          console.error('[HttpService] ========== 错误详情 ==========');
156	          console.error('[HttpService] 请求失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
157	          console.error('[HttpService] ================================');
158	          const errorMessage = this.getErrorMessage(err);
159	          reject({
160	            code: -1,
161	            message: errorMessage
162	          });
163	          httpRequest.destroy();
164	          return;
165	        }
166	        
167	        try {
168	          const responseCode = data.responseCode;
169	          const resultString = data.result as string;
170	          
171	          console.log(`[HttpService] ========== 响应详情 ==========`);
172	          console.log(`[HttpService] HTTP状态码: ${responseCode}`);
173	          console.log(`[HttpService] 响应内容: ${resultString}`);
174	          console.log(`[HttpService] 响应头: ${JSON.stringify(data.header)}`);
175	          console.log(`[HttpService] ================================`);
176	          
177	          // 尝试解析响应体
178	          let response: ApiResponse<T>;
179	          try {
180	            response = JSON.parse(resultString) as ApiResponse<T>;
181	          } catch (parseErr) {
182	            console.error('[HttpService] 响应解析失败:', JSON.stringify(parseErr));
183	            // 如果解析失败，使用HTTP状态码生成错误信息
184	            reject({
185	              code: responseCode,
186	              message: this.getHttpStatusMessage(responseCode)
187	            });
188	            httpRequest.destroy();
189	            return;
190	          }
191	          
192	          // 处理HTTP状态码
193	          if (responseCode !== 200 && responseCode !== 201) {
194	            // 返回后端的实际错误信息
195	            reject(response);
196	            httpRequest.destroy();
197	            return;
198	          }
199	          
200	          // 处理401未授权
201	          if (response.code === 401) {
202	            console.log('[HttpService] Token无效，清除本地token');
203	            this.clearToken();
204	          }
205	          
206	          console.log(`[HttpService] 请求成功: ${response.code} ${response.message}`);
207	          resolve(response);
208	        } catch (parseErr) {
209	          console.error('[HttpService] 响应解析失败:', JSON.stringify(parseErr));
210	          reject({
211	            code: -1,
212	            message: '响应解析失败'
213	          });
214	        } finally {
215	          httpRequest.destroy();
216	        }
217	      });
218	    });
219	  }
220	  
221	  /**
222	   * 获取错误信息
223	   */
224	  private getErrorMessage(err: Error): string {
225	    const errorStr = JSON.stringify(err);
226	    const errorObj = JSON.parse(errorStr) as Record<string, Object>;
227	    const errorCode = errorObj['code'] as number;
228	    
229	    // 网络错误映射
230	    const errorMap: Record<number, string> = {
231	      2300001: '协议不支持',
232	      2300003: 'URL格式错误',
233	      2300005: '无法解析远程主机名',
234	      2300006: '无法连接到服务器',
235	      2300007: '无法连接到代理服务器',
236	      2300008: '无效的服务器响应',
237	      2300009: '远程服务器拒绝访问',
238	      2300023: '写入数据失败',
239	      2300025: '上传失败',
240	      2300026: '读取数据失败',
241	      2300027: '内存不足',
242	      2300028: '操作超时',
243	      2300047: '请求数量过多',
244	      2300052: '服务器返回空数据',
245	      2300055: '发送网络数据失败',
246	      2300056: '接收网络数据失败',
247	      2300058: '本地SSL证书问题',
248	      2300059: '无法使用指定的SSL加密',
249	      2300060: '远程SSL证书无效',
250	      2300077: 'SSL CA证书无效',
251	      2300078: '远程服务器无法访问'
252	    };
253	    
254	    return errorMap[errorCode] || '网络请求失败';
255	  }
256	  
257	  /**
258	   * 获取HTTP状态码对应的错误信息
259	   */
260	  private getHttpStatusMessage(statusCode: number): string {
261	    const statusMap: Record<number, string> = {
262	      400: '请求参数错误',
263	      401: '登录已过期，请重新登录',
264	      403: '无权限访问',
265	      404: '请求的资源不存在',
266	      500: '服务器错误，请稍后重试',
267	      502: '网关错误',
268	      503: '服务暂时不可用，请稍后重试',
269	      504: '网关超时'
270	    };
271	    
272	    return statusMap[statusCode] || `请求失败 (${statusCode})`;
273	  }
274	  
275	  /**
276	   * GET请求
277	   */
278	  async get<T>(url: string, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
279	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.GET, url, undefined, needAuth);
280	  }
281	  
282	  /**
283	   * POST请求
284	   */
285	  async post<T>(url: string, data: Object, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
286	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.POST, url, data, needAuth);
287	  }
288	  
289	  /**
290	   * PUT请求
291	   */
292	  async put<T>(url: string, data: Object, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
293	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.PUT, url, data, needAuth);
294	  }
295	  
296	  /**
297	   * DELETE请求
298	   */
299	  async delete<T>(url: string, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
300	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.DELETE, url, undefined, needAuth);
301	  }
302	}
303
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
0	/**
1	 * 位置共享服务 - 管理用户之间的实时位置共享
2	 */
3	import { HttpService } from './HttpService';
4	import { ApiResponse, UserLocation, LocationShare, NearbyUser } from '../models/BackendModels';
5	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
6	
7	/**
8	 * 位置共享服务类
9	 */
10	export class LocationShareService {
11	  private static instance: LocationShareService;
12	  private httpService: HttpService;
13	  private autoUpdateTimer: number = -1;
14	  private readonly AUTO_UPDATE_INTERVAL = 30000;  // 30秒
15	  private shareStartTime: number = 0;
16	  private readonly MAX_SHARE_DURATION = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;  // 24小时
17	  
18	  private constructor() {
19	    this.httpService = HttpService.getInstance();
20	  }
21	  
22	  static getInstance(): LocationShareService {
23	    if (!LocationShareService.instance) {
24	      LocationShareService.instance = new LocationShareService();
25	    }
26	    return LocationShareService.instance;
27	  }
28	  
29	  /**
30	   * 更新用户位置
31	   */
32	  async updateLocation(location: Partial<UserLocation>): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
33	    try {
34	      console.log('[LocationShareService] 更新用户位置');
35	      
36	      const response = await this.httpService.post<void>(
37	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.LOCATION,
38	        location,
39	        true
40	      );
41	      
42	      return response;
43	    } catch (err) {
44	      console.error('[LocationShareService] 更新用户位置失败:', err);
45	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
46	    }
47	  }
48	  
49	  /**
50	   * 获取用户位置
51	   */
52	  async getLocation(userId?: number): Promise<ApiResponse<UserLocation>> {
53	    try {
54	      console.log('[LocationShareService] 获取用户位置, userId:', userId);
55	      
56	      const url = userId 
57	        ? ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.LOCATION_USER(userId)
58	        : ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.LOCATION;
59	      
60	      const response = await this.httpService.get<UserLocation>(url, true);
61	      
62	      return response;
63	    } catch (err) {
64	      console.error('[LocationShareService] 获取用户位置失败:', err);
65	      return err as ApiResponse<UserLocation>;
66	    }
67	  }
68	  
69	  /**
70	   * 开启/关闭位置共享
71	   */
72	  async toggleSharing(isSharing: boolean): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
73	    try {
74	      console.log('[LocationShareService] 切换位置共享:', isSharing);
75	      
76	      const response = await this.httpService.post<void>(
77	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.LOCATION_SHARING_TOGGLE,
78	        { isSharing },
79	        true
80	      );
81	      
82	      // 开启共享时启动自动更新
83	      if (response.code === 200 && isSharing) {
84	        this.startAutoUpdate();
85	      } else if (response.code === 200 && !isSharing) {
86	        this.stopAutoUpdate();
87	      }
88	      
89	      return response;
90	    } catch (err) {
91	      console.error('[LocationShareService] 切换位置共享失败:', err);
92	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
93	    }
94	  }
95	  
96	  /**
97	   * 创建位置共享
98	   */
99	  async createShare(viewerId: number, expireHours?: number): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
100	    try {
101	      console.log('[LocationShareService] 创建位置共享, viewerId:', viewerId);
102	      
103	      const response = await this.httpService.post<void>(
104	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.LOCATION_SHARING,
105	        { viewerId, expireHours },
106	        true
107	      );
108	      
109	      return response;
110	    } catch (err) {
111	      console.error('[LocationShareService] 创建位置共享失败:', err);
112	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
113	    }
114	  }
115	  
116	  /**
117	   * 获取共享列表
118	   */
119	  async getShares(type: 'sharing' | 'viewing'): Promise<ApiResponse<LocationShare[]>> {
120	    try {
121	      console.log('[LocationShareService] 获取共享列表, type:', type);
122	      
123	      const url = `${ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.LOCATION_SHARING}?type=${type}`;
124	      const response = await this.httpService.get<LocationShare[]>(url, true);
125	      
126	      return response;
127	    } catch (err) {
128	      console.error('[LocationShareService] 获取共享列表失败:', err);
129	      return err as ApiResponse<LocationShare[]>;
130	    }
131	  }
132	  
133	  /**
134	   * 取消位置共享
135	   */
136	  async cancelShare(shareId: number): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
137	    try {
138	      console.log('[LocationShareService] 取消位置共享, shareId:', shareId);
139	      
140	      const response = await this.httpService.delete<void>(
141	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.LOCATION_SHARING_DETAIL(shareId),
142	        true
143	      );
144	      
145	      return response;
146	    } catch (err) {
147	      console.error('[LocationShareService] 取消位置共享失败:', err);
148	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
149	    }
150	  }
151	  
152	  /**
153	   * 获取附近用户
154	   */
155	  async getNearbyUsers(latitude: number, longitude: number, radius?: number): Promise<ApiResponse<NearbyUser[]>> {
156	    try {
157	      console.log('[LocationShareService] 获取附近用户');
158	      
159	      let url = `${ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.LOCATION_NEARBY}?latitude=${latitude}&longitude=${longitude}`;
160	      if (radius) {
161	        url += `&radius=${radius}`;
162	      }
163	      
164	      const response = await this.httpService.get<NearbyUser[]>(url, true);
165	      
166	      return response;
167	    } catch (err) {
168	      console.error('[LocationShareService] 获取附近用户失败:', err);
169	      return err as ApiResponse<NearbyUser[]>;
170	    }
171	  }
172	  
173	  /**
174	   * 启动自动更新位置
175	   */
176	  startAutoUpdate(): void {
177	    // 如果已经在运行，先停止
178	    if (this.autoUpdateTimer !== -1) {
179	      this.stopAutoUpdate();
180	    }
181	    
182	    console.log('[LocationShareService] 启动自动更新位置');
183	    this.shareStartTime = Date.now();
184	    
185	    // 使用武汉默认坐标
186	    const defaultLocation: Partial<UserLocation> = {
187	      latitude: 30.486874173982763,
188	      longitude: 114.309994670642,
189	      accuracy: 100,
190	      locationType: 'ip',
191	      isSharing: true
192	    };
193	    
194	    // 立即更新一次
195	    this.updateLocation(defaultLocation);
196	    
197	    // 设置定时器，每30秒更新一次
198	    this.autoUpdateTimer = setInterval(() => {
199	      // 检查是否超过24小时
200	      const elapsed = Date.now() - this.shareStartTime;
201	      if (elapsed >= this.MAX_SHARE_DURATION) {
202	        console.log('[LocationShareService] 共享超过24小时，自动停止');
203	        this.stopAutoUpdate();
204	        this.toggleSharing(false);
205	        return;
206	      }
207	      
208	      // 更新位置
209	      this.updateLocation(defaultLocation);
210	    }, this.AUTO_UPDATE_INTERVAL);
211	  }
212	  
213	  /**
214	   * 停止自动更新位置
215	   */
216	  stopAutoUpdate(): void {
217	    if (this.autoUpdateTimer !== -1) {
218	      console.log('[LocationShareService] 停止自动更新位置');
219	      clearInterval(this.autoUpdateTimer);
220	      this.autoUpdateTimer = -1;
221	      this.shareStartTime = 0;
222	    }
223	  }
224	}
225
```
</details></tool-use>

0	/**
1	 * 反馈服务 - 管理用户对导航的反馈
2	 */
3	import { HttpService } from './HttpService';
4	import { ApiResponse, NavigationFeedback, FeedbackStats, PageResponse } from '../models/BackendModels';
5	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
6	
7	/**
8	 * 反馈服务类
9	 */
10	export class FeedbackService {
11	  private static instance: FeedbackService;
12	  private httpService: HttpService;
13	  private currentLocation: { latitude: number, longitude: number } | null = null;
14	  
15	  private constructor() {
16	    this.httpService = HttpService.getInstance();
17	    // 设置默认位置（武汉）
18	    this.currentLocation = {
19	      latitude: 30.486874173982763,
20	      longitude: 114.309994670642
21	    };
22	  }
23	  
24	  static getInstance(): FeedbackService {
25	    if (!FeedbackService.instance) {
26	      FeedbackService.instance = new FeedbackService();
27	    }
28	    return FeedbackService.instance;
29	  }
30	  
31	  /**
32	   * 设置当前位置（供外部调用）
33	   */
34	  setCurrentLocation(latitude: number, longitude: number): void {
35	    this.currentLocation = { latitude, longitude };
36	  }
37	  
38	  /**
39	   * 提交反馈
40	   */
41	  async submitFeedback(feedback: Partial<NavigationFeedback>): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
42	    try {
43	      console.log('[FeedbackService] 提交反馈');
44	      
45	      // 自动附加当前位置信息
46	      if (this.currentLocation && !feedback.locationLat && !feedback.locationLng) {
47	        feedback.locationLat = this.currentLocation.latitude;
48	        feedback.locationLng = this.currentLocation.longitude;
49	        console.log('[FeedbackService] 自动附加位置信息');
50	      }
51	      
52	      const response = await this.httpService.post<void>(
53	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FEEDBACK,
54	        feedback,
55	        true
56	      );
57	      
58	      return response;
59	    } catch (err) {
60	      console.error('[FeedbackService] 提交反馈失败:', err);
61	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
62	    }
63	  }
64	  
65	  /**
66	   * 获取反馈列表（支持分页和类型筛选）
67	   */
68	  async getFeedbacks(
69	    feedbackType?: string,
70	    page: number = 1,
71	    pageSize: number = 20
72	  ): Promise<ApiResponse<PageResponse<NavigationFeedback>>> {
73	    try {
74	      console.log('[FeedbackService] 获取反馈列表');
75	      
76	      // 构建URL参数
77	      let url = `${ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FEEDBACK}?page=${page}&pageSize=${pageSize}`;
78	      if (feedbackType) {
79	        url += `&feedbackType=${feedbackType}`;
80	      }
81	      
82	      const response = await this.httpService.get<PageResponse<NavigationFeedback>>(url, true);
83	      
84	      return response;
85	    } catch (err) {
86	      console.error('[FeedbackService] 获取反馈列表失败:', err);
87	      return err as ApiResponse<PageResponse<NavigationFeedback>>;
88	    }
89	  }
90	  
91	  /**
92	   * 获取反馈统计
93	   */
94	  async getStats(): Promise<ApiResponse<FeedbackStats>> {
95	    try {
96	      console.log('[FeedbackService] 获取反馈统计');
97	      
98	      const response = await this.httpService.get<FeedbackStats>(
99	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FEEDBACK_STATS,
100	        true
101	      );
102	      
103	      return response;
104	    } catch (err) {
105	      console.error('[FeedbackService] 获取反馈统计失败:', err);
106	      return err as ApiResponse<FeedbackStats>;
107	    }
108	  }
109	  
110	  /**
111	   * 获取反馈详情
112	   */

126	    }
127	  }
