<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a15be24b/entry/src/main/ets/services/NavigationService.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * 导航服务 - 管理导航状态和逻辑
2	 * 使用IP定位（不支持实时追踪）
3	 */
4	import { MapService, Location, RouteInfo } from './MapService';
5	
6	export enum NavigationState {
7	  IDLE = 0,           // 空闲
8	  PLANNING = 1,       // 规划中
9	  NAVIGATING = 2,     // 导航中
10	  PAUSED = 3,         // 暂停
11	  ARRIVED = 4         // 已到达
12	}
13	
14	export interface NavigationInfo {
15	  state: NavigationState;
16	  currentLocation: Location;
17	  destination: Location;
18	  route: RouteInfo | null;
19	  remainingDistance: number;  // 剩余距离（米）
20	  remainingTime: number;      // 剩余时间（秒）
21	  currentStepIndex: number;   // 当前步骤索引
22	  nextInstruction: string;    // 下一个指令
23	}
24	
25	/**
26	 * 导航服务类
27	 */
28	export class NavigationService {
29	  private static instance: NavigationService;
30	  private mapService: MapService;
31	  private navigationInfo: NavigationInfo | null = null;
32	  private listeners: ((info: NavigationInfo) => void)[] = [];
33	  
34	  private constructor() {
35	    this.mapService = MapService.getInstance();
36	  }
37	  
38	  static getInstance(): NavigationService {
39	    if (!NavigationService.instance) {
40	      NavigationService.instance = new NavigationService();
41	    }
42	    return NavigationService.instance;
43	  }
44	  
45	  /**
46	   * 开始导航
47	   */
48	  async startNavigation(destination: Location): Promise<void> {
49	    try {
50	      // 获取当前位置（IP定位）
51	      let currentLocation: Location;
52	      try {
53	        currentLocation = await this.mapService.getCurrentLocation();
54	        console.log('[NavigationService] 获取到当前位置:', currentLocation.latitude, currentLocation.longitude);
55	      } catch (err) {
56	        console.warn('[NavigationService] 获取当前位置失败，使用默认位置:', String(err));
57	        currentLocation = {
58	          latitude: 30.486874173982763,
59	          longitude: 114.309994670642
60	        };
61	      }
62	      
63	      console.log('[NavigationService] 起点:', currentLocation.latitude, currentLocation.longitude);
64	      console.log('[NavigationService] 终点:', destination.latitude, destination.longitude);
65	      
66	      // 更新状态为规划中
67	      this.updateNavigationInfo({
68	        state: NavigationState.PLANNING,
69	        currentLocation,
70	        destination,
71	        route: null,
72	        remainingDistance: 0,
73	        remainingTime: 0,
74	        currentStepIndex: 0,
75	        nextInstruction: '正在规划路线...'
76	      });
77	      
78	      // 规划路线
79	      const route = await this.mapService.planRoute(currentLocation, destination, 0);
80	      
81	      // 绘制路线
82	      this.mapService.drawRoute(route);
83	      
84	      // 更新状态为导航中
85	      this.updateNavigationInfo({
86	        state: NavigationState.NAVIGATING,
87	        currentLocation,
88	        destination,
89	        route,
90	        remainingDistance: route.distance,
91	        remainingTime: route.duration,
92	        currentStepIndex: 0,
93	        nextInstruction: route.steps[0]?.instruction || '开始导航'
94	      });
95	      
96	      console.log('[NavigationService] 导航已启动（IP定位，无实时追踪）');
97	      
98	    } catch (err) {
99	      console.error('Start navigation error:', err);
100	      throw new Error('导航启动失败: ' + String(err));
101	    }
102	  }
103	  
104	  /**
105	   * 停止导航
106	   */
107	  stopNavigation(): void {
108	    this.mapService.clearOverlays();
109	    this.navigationInfo = null;
110	    this.notifyListeners();
111	  }
112	  
113	  /**
114	   * 暂停导航
115	   */
116	  pauseNavigation(): void {
117	    if (this.navigationInfo) {
118	      this.navigationInfo.state = NavigationState.PAUSED;
119	      this.notifyListeners();
120	    }
121	  }
122	  
123	  /**
124	   * 恢复导航
125	   */
126	  resumeNavigation(): void {
127	    if (this.navigationInfo && this.navigationInfo.state === NavigationState.PAUSED) {
128	      this.navigationInfo.state = NavigationState.NAVIGATING;
129	      this.notifyListeners();
130	    }
131	  }
132	  
133	  /**
134	   * 重新规划路线
135	   */
136	  async replanRoute(): Promise<void> {
137	    if (!this.navigationInfo) return;
138	    
139	    try {
140	      const currentLocation = await this.mapService.getCurrentLocation();
141	      const route = await this.mapService.planRoute(currentLocation, this.navigationInfo.destination, 0);
142	      
143	      this.mapService.clearOverlays();
144	      this.mapService.drawRoute(route);
145	      
146	      if (this.navigationInfo) {
147	        this.navigationInfo.currentLocation = currentLocation;
148	        this.navigationInfo.route = route;
149	        this.navigationInfo.remainingDistance = route.distance;
150	        this.navigationInfo.remainingTime = route.duration;
151	        this.navigationInfo.currentStepIndex = 0;
152	        this.navigationInfo.nextInstruction = route.steps[0]?.instruction || '';
153	        this.notifyListeners();
154	      }
155	    } catch (err) {
156	      console.error('Replan route error:', err);
157	    }
158	  }
159	  
160	  /**
161	   * 获取当前导航信息
162	   */
163	  getNavigationInfo(): NavigationInfo | null {
164	    return this.navigationInfo;
165	  }
166	  
167	  /**
168	   * 添加导航状态监听器
169	   */
170	  addListener(listener: (info: NavigationInfo) => void): void {
171	    this.listeners.push(listener);
172	  }
173	  
174	  /**
175	   * 移除导航状态监听器
176	   */
177	  removeListener(listener: (info: NavigationInfo) => void): void {
178	    const index = this.listeners.indexOf(listener);
179	    if (index > -1) {
180	      this.listeners.splice(index, 1);
181	    }
182	  }
183	  
184	  /**
185	   * 更新导航信息
186	   */
187	  private updateNavigationInfo(info: NavigationInfo): void {
188	    this.navigationInfo = info;
189	    this.notifyListeners();
190	  }
191	  
192	  /**
193	   * 通知所有监听器
194	   */
195	  private notifyListeners(): void {
196	    if (this.navigationInfo) {
197	      this.listeners.forEach(listener => {
198	        try {
199	          listener(this.navigationInfo!);
200	        } catch (err) {
201	          console.error('Listener error:', err);
202	        }
203	      });
204	    }
205	  }
206	}
207
```
</details></tool-use>

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a15be24b/entry/src/main/ets/services/MapService.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * 地图服务 - 封装地图SDK核心功能
2	 * 使用高德地图Web服务API + JS API (WebView)
3	 * 定位方式：纯IP定位
4	 */
5	import { webview } from '@kit.ArkWeb';
6	import { AmapService } from './AmapService';
7	import { Location, RouteInfo, RouteStep, POIResult, MarkerType } from '../models/NavigationModels';
8	
9	/**
10	 * 坐标点接口
11	 */
12	interface CoordinatePoint {
13	  latitude: number;
14	  longitude: number;
15	}
16	
17	/**
18	 * WebView消息数据接口
19	 */
20	interface WebMessageData {
21	  action: string;
22	  path?: number[][];
23	  lng?: number;
24	  lat?: number;
25	  zoom?: number;
26	  title?: string;
27	}
28	
29	/**
30	 * 地图服务类
31	 */
32	export class MapService {
33	  private static instance: MapService;
34	  private webController: webview.WebviewController | null = null;
35	  private amapService: AmapService;
36	  
37	  private constructor() {
38	    this.amapService = AmapService.getInstance();
39	  }
40	  
41	  static getInstance(): MapService {
42	    if (!MapService.instance) {
43	      MapService.instance = new MapService();
44	    }
45	    return MapService.instance;
46	  }
47	  
48	  /**
49	   * 设置WebView控制器
50	   */
51	  setWebController(controller: webview.WebviewController): void {
52	    this.webController = controller;
53	    console.log('[MapService] WebView控制器已设置');
54	  }
55	  
56	  /**
57	   * 向WebView发送消息
58	   */
59	  private sendMessageToWeb(action: string, data: Record<string, Object>): void {
60	    if (!this.webController) {
61	      console.error('[MapService] WebController not initialized');
62	      return;
63	    }
64	    
65	    try {
66	      const messageData: WebMessageData = {
67	        action: action
68	      };
69	      
70	      // 合并data到messageData
71	      const keys = Object.keys(data);
72	      for (let i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
73	        const key = keys[i];
74	        const value = data[key];
75	        if (key === 'path' && Array.isArray(value)) {
76	          messageData.path = value as number[][];
77	        } else if (key === 'lng' && typeof value === 'number') {
78	          messageData.lng = value;
79	        } else if (key === 'lat' && typeof value === 'number') {
80	          messageData.lat = value;
81	        } else if (key === 'zoom' && typeof value === 'number') {
82	          messageData.zoom = value;
83	        } else if (key === 'title' && typeof value === 'string') {
84	          messageData.title = value;
85	        }
86	      }
87	      
88	      const message = JSON.stringify(messageData);
89	      console.log('[MapService] 发送消息到WebView:', action);
90	      if (action === 'drawRoute' && messageData.path) {
91	        console.log('[MapService] 路线坐标点数:', messageData.path.length);
92	        console.log('[MapService] 起点:', messageData.path[0]);
93	        console.log('[MapService] 终点:', messageData.path[messageData.path.length - 1]);
94	      }
95	      if (action === 'addMarker' || action === 'addCurrentLocationMarker') {
96	        console.log('[MapService] 标记位置: [', messageData.lng, ',', messageData.lat, ']');
97	      }
98	      
99	      // 使用JSON.stringify转义特殊字符，然后替换单引号避免JS语法错误
100	      const escapedMessage = message.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "\\'");
101	      const script = `window.postMessage('${escapedMessage}', '*')`;
102	      
103	      console.log('[MapService] 执行JS脚本长度:', script.length);
104	      this.webController.runJavaScript(script);
105	    } catch (err) {
106	      console.error('[MapService] Send message error:', String(err));
107	    }
108	  }
109	  
110	  /**
111	   * 创建包含数字的数据对象
112	   */
113	  private createNumberData(key1: string, value1: number, key2?: string, value2?: number, key3?: string, value3?: number): Record<string, Object> {
114	    const data: Record<string, Object> = {};
115	    data[key1] = value1 as Object;
116	    if (key2 !== undefined && value2 !== undefined) {
117	      data[key2] = value2 as Object;
118	    }
119	    if (key3 !== undefined && value3 !== undefined) {
120	      data[key3] = value3 as Object;
121	    }
122	    return data;
123	  }
124	  
125	  /**
126	   * 创建包含路径的数据对象
127	   */
128	  private createPathData(path: number[][]): Record<string, Object> {
129	    const data: Record<string, Object> = {};
130	    data['path'] = path as Object;
131	    return data;
132	  }
133	  
134	  /**
135	   * 创建空数据对象
136	   */
137	  private createEmptyData(): Record<string, Object> {
138	    const data: Record<string, Object> = {};
139	    return data;
140	  }
141	  
142	  /**
143	   * 获取当前位置
144	   * 使用IP定位，失败时使用默认坐标
145	   */
146	  async getCurrentLocation(): Promise<Location> {
147	    try {
148	      console.log('[MapService] 开始IP定位...');
149	      const location = await this.amapService.getLocationByIP();
150	      if (location) {
151	        console.log('[MapService] IP定位成功:', location.latitude, location.longitude);
152	        return location;
153	      }
154	    } catch (err) {
155	      console.error('[MapService] IP定位失败:', err);
156	    }
157	    
158	    // IP定位失败，使用武汉默认坐标
159	    console.warn('[MapService] IP定位失败，使用默认坐标');
160	    return {
161	      latitude: 30.486874173982763,
162	      longitude: 114.309994670642,
163	      address: '武汉市',
164	      name: '默认位置'
165	    };
166	  }
167	  
168	  /**
169	   * 路径规划 - 使用高德地图API
170	   */
171	  async planRoute(start: Location, end: Location, strategy: number): Promise<RouteInfo> {
172	    try {
173	      console.log('开始路径规划');
174	      
175	      const route = await this.amapService.planRoute(start, end, strategy);
176	      
177	      if (route) {
178	        console.log('路径规划成功');
179	        return route;
180	      }
181	      
182	      throw new Error('路径规划失败: 未获取到路线数据');
183	    } catch (err) {
184	      console.error('Plan route error:', String(err));
185	      throw new Error('路径规划失败: ' + String(err));
186	    }
187	  }
188	  
189	  /**
190	   * POI搜索 - 使用高德地图API
191	   */
192	  async searchPOI(keyword: string, location: Location | null, radius: number): Promise<POIResult[]> {
193	    try {
194	      console.log('开始POI搜索:', keyword);
195	      
196	      const results = await this.amapService.searchPOI(keyword, location, radius);
197	      
198	      console.log('POI搜索结果:', results.length, '个');
199	      return results;
200	    } catch (err) {
201	      console.error('Search POI error:', String(err));
202	      return [];
203	    }
204	  }
205	  
206	  /**
207	   * 周边搜索
208	   */
209	  async searchNearby(location: Location, type: string, radius: number): Promise<POIResult[]> {
210	    try {
211	      return await this.amapService.searchNearby(location, type, radius);
212	    } catch (err) {
213	      console.error('Search nearby error:', String(err));
214	      return [];
215	    }
216	  }
217	  
218	  /**
219	   * 地理编码 - 地址转坐标
220	   */
221	  async geocode(address: string): Promise<Location | null> {
222	    try {
223	      return await this.amapService.geocode(address);
224	    } catch (err) {
225	      console.error('Geocode error:', String(err));
226	      return null;
227	    }
228	  }
229	  
230	  /**
231	   * 逆地理编码 - 坐标转地址
232	   */
233	  async regeocode(location: Location): Promise<string> {
234	    try {
235	      return await this.amapService.regeocode(location);
236	    } catch (err) {
237	      console.error('Regeocode error:', String(err));
238	      return '未知地址';
239	    }
240	  }
241	  
242	  /**
243	   * 在地图上绘制路线
244	   */
245	  drawRoute(routeInfo: RouteInfo): void {
246	    if (!this.webController) {
247	      console.error('[MapService] WebController not initialized');
248	      return;
249	    }
250	    
251	    if (!routeInfo || !routeInfo.polyline) {
252	      console.error('[MapService] Invalid route info');
253	      return;
254	    }
255	    
256	    try {
257	      console.log('[MapService] 开始绘制路线');
258	      console.log('[MapService] 路线距离:', routeInfo.distance, '米');
259	      console.log('[MapService] 预计时间:', routeInfo.duration, '秒');
```
</details></tool-use>

0	import mysql from 'mysql2/promise';
1	import dotenv from 'dotenv';
2	
3	dotenv.config();
4	
5	// 数据库连接池配置
6	export const pool = mysql.createPool({
7	  host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost',
8	  port: parseInt(process.env.DB_PORT || '3306'),
9	  user: process.env.DB_USER || 'root',
10	  password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || '',
11	  database: process.env.DB_NAME || 'car_navigation',
12	  waitForConnections: true,
13	  connectionLimit: 10,
14	  queueLimit: 0,
15	  enableKeepAlive: true,
16	  keepAliveInitialDelay: 0
17	});
18	
19	// 测试数据库连接
20	export async function testConnection() {
21	  try {
22	    const connection = await pool.getConnection();
23	    console.log('✅ 数据库连接成功');
24	    connection.release();
25	    return true;
26	  } catch (error) {
27	    console.error('❌ 数据库连接失败:', error);
28	    return false;
29	  }
30	}
31	
32	// 执行SQL查询
33	export async function query<T = any>(sql: string, params?: any[]): Promise<T> {
34	  const [rows] = await pool.execute(sql, params);
35	  return rows as T;
36	}
37
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
0	-- 车载导航系统数据库初始化脚本
1	
2	-- 创建数据库
3	CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS car_navigation DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
4	
5	USE car_navigation;
6	
7	-- 用户表
8	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
9	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '用户ID',
10	    phone VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE NOT NULL COMMENT '手机号',
11	    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '密码（加密）',
12	    nickname VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '昵称',
13	    avatar VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '头像URL',
14	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
15	    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
16	    INDEX idx_phone (phone)
17	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='用户表';
18	
19	-- 收藏地点表
20	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS favorites (
21	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '收藏ID',
22	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
23	    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '地点名称',
24	    address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '详细地址',
25	    latitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '纬度',
26	    longitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '经度',
27	    category VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'custom' COMMENT '分类：home-家, work-公司, custom-自定义',
28	    icon VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '图标',
29	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
30	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
31	    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),
32	    INDEX idx_category (user_id, category)
33	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='收藏地点表';
34	
35	-- 导航历史表
36	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS navigation_history (
37	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '历史ID',
38	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
39	    start_name VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '起点名称',
40	    start_address VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '起点地址',
41	    start_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '起点纬度',
42	    start_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '起点经度',
43	    end_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点名称',
44	    end_address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点地址',
45	    end_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点纬度',
46	    end_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点经度',
47	    distance INT COMMENT '距离（米）',
48	    duration INT COMMENT '时长（秒）',
49	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
50	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
51	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC)
52	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='导航历史表';
53	
54	-- 行程记录表
55	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trip_records (
56	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '行程ID',
57	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
58	    start_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL COMMENT '开始时间',
59	    end_time TIMESTAMP COMMENT '结束时间',
60	    total_distance INT COMMENT '总距离（米）',
61	    total_duration INT COMMENT '总时长（秒）',
62	    avg_speed DECIMAL(5, 2) COMMENT '平均速度（km/h）',
63	    max_speed DECIMAL(5, 2) COMMENT '最高速度（km/h）',
64	    trajectory TEXT COMMENT '轨迹数据（JSON格式）',
65	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
66	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
67	    INDEX idx_user_start (user_id, start_time DESC)
68	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='行程记录表';
69	
70	-- 路线方案表（保存用户规划的路线）
71	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS route_plans (
72	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '路线ID',
73	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
74	    name VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '路线名称',
75	    start_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '起点名称',
76	    start_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '起点纬度',
77	    start_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '起点经度',
78	    end_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点名称',
79	    end_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点纬度',
80	    end_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点经度',
81	    waypoints TEXT COMMENT '途经点（JSON数组）',
82	    distance INT COMMENT '总距离（米）',
83	    duration INT COMMENT '预计时长（秒）',
84	    strategy TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '策略：0-推荐 1-避免拥堵 2-避免收费 3-高速优先',
85	    polyline TEXT COMMENT '路线坐标串',
86	    steps TEXT COMMENT '导航步骤（JSON）',
87	    is_favorite BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否收藏',
88	    use_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '使用次数',
89	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
90	    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
91	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
92	    INDEX idx_user_favorite (user_id, is_favorite),
93	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC)
94	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='路线方案表';
95	
96	-- 实时位置表（用于位置共享和协同导航）
97	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_locations (
98	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '位置ID',
99	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
100	    latitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '纬度',
101	    longitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '经度',
102	    accuracy DECIMAL(6, 2) COMMENT '精度（米）',
103	    speed DECIMAL(6, 2) COMMENT '速度（km/h）',
104	    heading DECIMAL(5, 2) COMMENT '方向（度）',
105	    location_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'ip' COMMENT '定位类型：gps, network, ip',
106	    is_sharing BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否共享位置',
107	    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
108	    UNIQUE KEY uk_user_id (user_id),
109	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
110	    INDEX idx_sharing (is_sharing, updated_at)
111	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='实时位置表';
112	
113	-- 位置共享关系表
114	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS location_shares (
115	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '共享ID',
116	    sharer_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '分享者ID',
117	    viewer_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '查看者ID',
118	    expire_time TIMESTAMP COMMENT '过期时间',
119	    is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE COMMENT '是否激活',
120	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
121	    FOREIGN KEY (sharer_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
122	    FOREIGN KEY (viewer_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
123	    UNIQUE KEY uk_share_view (sharer_id, viewer_id),
124	    INDEX idx_viewer_active (viewer_id, is_active)
125	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='位置共享关系表';
126	
127	-- 导航反馈表（用于收集用户反馈）
128	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS navigation_feedback (
129	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '反馈ID',
130	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
131	    navigation_id BIGINT COMMENT '导航历史ID',
132	    rating TINYINT COMMENT '评分（1-5）',
133	    feedback_type VARCHAR(20) COMMENT '反馈类型：route-路线 traffic-路况 poi-地点',
134	    content TEXT COMMENT '反馈内容',
135	    location_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '反馈位置纬度',
136	    location_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '反馈位置经度',
137	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
138	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
139	    FOREIGN KEY (navigation_id) REFERENCES navigation_history(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
140	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC),
141	    INDEX idx_type (feedback_type)
142	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='导航反馈表';
143	
144	-- 常用地点统计表（智能推荐）
145	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS frequent_locations (
146	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '统计ID',
147	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
148	    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '地点名称',
149	    address VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '地址',
150	    latitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '纬度',
151	    longitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '经度',
152	    visit_count INT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '访问次数',
153	    last_visit TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '最后访问时间',
154	    time_pattern VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '时间规律（如：工作日早上）',
155	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
156	    UNIQUE KEY uk_user_location (user_id, latitude, longitude),
157	    INDEX idx_user_count (user_id, visit_count DESC)
158	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='常用地点统计表';
159	
160	-- 搜索历史表
161	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS search_history (
162	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '搜索ID',
163	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
164	    keyword VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '搜索关键词',
165	    result_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '结果数量',
166	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
167	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
168	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC),
169	    INDEX idx_keyword (keyword)
170	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='搜索历史表';
171

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-aa7ebfea/backend/init-database.js`

```text
0	/**
1	 * 数据库初始化脚本
2	 * 使用Node.js直接执行SQL文件
3	 */
4	
5	const mysql = require('mysql2/promise');
6	const fs = require('fs');
7	const path = require('path');
8	require('dotenv').config();
9	
10	async function initDatabase() {
11	  console.log('========================================');
12	  console.log('数据库初始化开始');
13	  console.log('========================================\n');
14	
15	  let connection;
16	
17	  try {
18	    // 读取SQL文件
19	    const sqlFile = path.join(__dirname, 'src', 'database', 'init.sql');
20	    console.log('读取SQL文件:', sqlFile);
21	    
22	    if (!fs.existsSync(sqlFile)) {
23	      throw new Error('SQL文件不存在: ' + sqlFile);
24	    }
25	    
26	    const sqlContent = fs.readFileSync(sqlFile, 'utf8');
27	    console.log('✓ SQL文件读取成功\n');
28	
29	    // 连接MySQL（不指定数据库）
30	    console.log('连接MySQL服务器...');
31	    console.log('Host:', process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost');
32	    console.log('Port:', process.env.DB_PORT || 3306);
33	    console.log('User:', process.env.DB_USER || 'root');
34	    
35	    connection = await mysql.createConnection({
36	      host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost',
37	      port: parseInt(process.env.DB_PORT || '3306'),
38	      user: process.env.DB_USER || 'root',
39	      password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || '',
40	      multipleStatements: true
41	    });
42	    
43	    console.log('✓ MySQL连接成功\n');
44	
45	    // 执行SQL
46	    console.log('执行SQL脚本...');
47	    await connection.query(sqlContent);
48	    console.log('✓ SQL执行成功\n');
49	
50	    // 验证数据库
51	    console.log('验证数据库...');
52	    const [databases] = await connection.query('SHOW DATABASES LIKE "car_navigation"');
53	    
54	    if (databases.length > 0) {
55	      console.log('✓ 数据库 car_navigation 创建成功\n');
56	      
57	      // 切换到新数据库
58	      await connection.query('USE car_navigation');
59	      
60	      // 查看表
61	      const [tables] = await connection.query('SHOW TABLES');
62	      console.log('创建的表:');
63	      tables.forEach((table, index) => {
64	        const tableName = Object.values(table)[0];
65	        console.log(`  ${index + 1}. ${tableName}`);
66	      });
67	      console.log(`\n总共创建了 ${tables.length} 个表\n`);
68	    }
69	
70	    console.log('========================================');
71	    console.log('✅ 数据库初始化完成！');
72	    console.log('========================================\n');
73	
74	  } catch (error) {
75	    console.error('\n========================================');
76	    console.error('❌ 数据库初始化失败！');
77	    console.error('========================================\n');
78	    console.error('错误信息:', error.message);
79	    
80	    if (error.code === 'ECONNREFUSED') {
81	      console.error('\n可能的原因:');
82	      console.error('1. MySQL服务未启动');
83	      console.error('2. 端口号不正确');
84	      console.error('3. 主机地址不正确');
85	    } else if (error.code === 'ER_ACCESS_DENIED_ERROR') {
86	      console.error('\n可能的原因:');
87	      console.error('1. 用户名或密码错误');
88	      console.error('2. 用户没有权限');
89	      console.error('\n请检查 .env 文件中的配置:');
90	      console.error('  DB_USER=root');
91	      console.error('  DB_PASSWORD=你的密码');
92	    }
93	    
94	    process.exit(1);
95	  } finally {
96	    if (connection) {
97	      await connection.end();
98	    }
99	  }
100	}
101	
102	// 运行初始化
103	initDatabase();
104
```
</details></tool-use>

0	// 检查数据库表是否存在
1	const mysql = require('mysql2/promise');
2	require('dotenv').config();
3	
4	async function checkTables() {
5	  try {
6	    const connection = await mysql.createConnection({
7	      host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost',
8	      port: parseInt(process.env.DB_PORT || '3306'),
9	      user: process.env.DB_USER || 'root',
10	      password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || '',
11	      database: process.env.DB_NAME || 'car_navigation'
12	    });
13	
14	    console.log('✅ 数据库连接成功\n');
15	
16	    // 检查所有表
17	    const [tables] = await connection.query('SHOW TABLES');
18	    console.log('📋 数据库中的表:');
19	    tables.forEach((row, index) => {
20	      const tableName = Object.values(row)[0];
21	      console.log(`${index + 1}. ${tableName}`);
22	    });
23	
24	    // 检查 navigation_history 表结构
25	    console.log('\n📊 navigation_history 表结构:');
26	    const [columns] = await connection.query('DESCRIBE navigation_history');
27	    columns.forEach(col => {
28	      console.log(`  - ${col.Field} (${col.Type})`);
29	    });
30	
31	    // 检查记录数
32	    const [count] = await connection.query('SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM navigation_history');
33	    console.log(`\n📈 navigation_history 表记录数: ${count[0].count}`);
34	
35	    await connection.end();
36	    console.log('\n✅ 检查完成');
37	  } catch (error) {
38	    console.error('❌ 错误:', error.message);
39	    if (error.code === 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') {
40	      console.log('\n⚠️  表不存在！请运行数据库初始化脚本:');
41	      console.log('   mysql -u root -p < src/database/init.sql');
42	    }
43	  }
44	}
45	
46	checkTables();
47

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-aa7ebfea/backend/diagnose-network.js`

```text
0	/**
1	 * 网络诊断脚本
2	 * 检查网络配置和连接状态
3	 */
4	
5	const os = require('os');
6	const http = require('http');
7	
8	console.log('🔍 ========== 网络诊断 ==========\n');
9	
10	// 1. 获取本机IP地址
11	console.log('📍 本机IP地址:');
12	const interfaces = os.networkInterfaces();
13	for (const name of Object.keys(interfaces)) {
14	  for (const iface of interfaces[name]) {
15	    // 只显示IPv4且非内部地址
16	    if (iface.family === 'IPv4' && !iface.internal) {
17	      console.log(`   ${name}: ${iface.address}`);
18	    }
19	  }
20	}
21	
22	// 2. 检查后端服务
23	console.log('\n🚀 后端服务检查:');
24	const options = {
25	  hostname: 'localhost',
26	  port: 3000,
27	  path: '/health',
28	  method: 'GET',
29	  timeout: 5000
30	};
31	
32	const req = http.request(options, (res) => {
33	  let data = '';
34	  res.on('data', (chunk) => {
35	    data += chunk;
36	  });
37	  res.on('end', () => {
38	    console.log(`   ✅ 后端服务正常运行`);
39	    console.log(`   响应: ${data}`);
40	    
41	    // 3. 显示前端应该使用的URL
42	    console.log('\n📱 前端配置建议:');
43	    console.log('   请将 ApiConfig.ets 中的 BASE_URL 修改为:');
44	    for (const name of Object.keys(interfaces)) {
45	      for (const iface of interfaces[name]) {
46	        if (iface.family === 'IPv4' && !iface.internal) {
47	          console.log(`   http://${iface.address}:3000/api/v1`);
48	        }
49	      }
50	    }
51	    
52	    console.log('\n⚠️  注意事项:');
53	    console.log('   1. 确保手机/模拟器与电脑在同一WiFi网络');
54	    console.log('   2. 关闭电脑防火墙或允许3000端口');
55	    console.log('   3. 修改后需要重新编译前端应用');
56	    
57	    console.log('\n✅ 诊断完成\n');
58	  });
59	});
60	
61	req.on('error', (e) => {
62	  console.log(`   ❌ 后端服务未运行: ${e.message}`);
63	  console.log('   请先启动后端服务: npm run dev');
64	});
65	
66	req.on('timeout', () => {
67	  console.log('   ❌ 请求超时');
68	  req.destroy();
69	});
70	
71	req.end();
72
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a15be24b/backend/API_DOCUMENTATION.md`

```text
1	# 导航系统API文档
2	
3	## 基础信息
4	
5	- **Base URL**: `http://localhost:3000/api/v1`
6	- **认证方式**: Bearer Token (JWT)
7	- **Content-Type**: `application/json`
8	
9	---
10	
11	## 认证相关 API
12	
13	### 1. 用户注册
14	
15	**POST** `/auth/register`
16	
17	**请求体**:
18	```json
19	{
20	  "phone": "13800138000",
21	  "password": "123456",
22	  "nickname": "用户昵称"
23	}
24	```
25	
26	**响应**:
27	```json
28	{
29	  "code": 200,
30	  "message": "注册成功",
31	  "data": {
32	    "userId": 1,
33	    "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..."
34	  }
35	}
36	```
37	
38	### 2. 用户登录
39	
40	**POST** `/auth/login`
41	
42	**请求体**:
43	```json
44	{
45	  "phone": "13800138000",
46	  "password": "123456"
47	}
48	```
49	
50	**响应**:
51	```json
52	{
53	  "code": 200,
54	  "message": "登录成功",
55	  "data": {
56	    "userId": 1,
57	    "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
58	    "user": {
59	      "id": 1,
60	      "phone": "13800138000",
61	      "nickname": "用户昵称",
62	      "avatar": null
63	    }
64	  }
65	}
66	```
67	
68	### 3. 获取用户信息
69	
70	**GET** `/auth/profile`
71	
72	**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {token}`
73	
74	**响应**:
75	```json
76	{
77	  "code": 200,
78	  "message": "获取成功",
79	  "data": {
80	    "id": 1,
81	    "phone": "13800138000",
82	    "nickname": "用户昵称",
83	    "avatar": null,
84	    "created_at": "2026-03-05T10:00:00.000Z"
85	  }
86	}
87	```
88	
89	---
90	
91	## 收藏地点 API
92	
93	### 1. 获取收藏列表
94	
95	**GET** `/favorites?category=home`
96	
97	**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {token}`
98	
99	**Query参数**:
100	- `category` (可选): 分类筛选 (home/work/custom)
101	
102	**响应**:
103	```json
104	{
105	  "code": 200,
106	  "message": "获取成功",
107	  "data": [
108	    {
109	      "id": 1,
110	      "user_id": 1,
111	      "name": "家",
112	      "address": "武汉市洪山区xxx",
113	      "latitude": 30.486874,
114	      "longitude": 114.309995,
115	      "category": "home",
116	      "icon": "home",
117	      "created_at": "2026-03-05T10:00:00.000Z"
118	    }
119	  ]
120	}
121	```
122	
123	### 2. 添加收藏
124	
125	**POST** `/favorites`
126	
127	**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {token}`
128	
129	**请求体**:
130	```json
131	{
132	  "name": "公司",
133	  "address": "武汉市江汉区xxx",
134	  "latitude": 30.5,
135	  "longitude": 114.3,
136	  "category": "work",
137	  "icon": "work"
138	}
139	```
140	
141	### 3. 更新收藏
142	
143	**PUT** `/favorites/:id`
144	
145	**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {token}`
146	
147	**请求体**:
148	```json
149	{
150	  "name": "新名称",
151	  "category": "custom"
152	}
153	```
154	
155	### 4. 删除收藏
156	
157	**DELETE** `/favorites/:id`
158	
159	**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {token}`
160	
161	---
162	
163	## 导航历史 API
164	
165	### 1. 获取导航历史
166	
167	**GET** `/navigation/history?page=1&pageSize=20`
168	
169	**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {token}`
170	
171	**Query参数**:
172	- `page` (可选): 页码，默认1
173	- `pageSize` (可选): 每页数量，默认20
174	
175	**响应**:
176	```json
177	{
178	  "code": 200,
179	  "message": "获取成功",
180	  "data": {
181	    "list": [
182	      {
183	        "id": 1,
184	        "user_id": 1,
185	        "start_name": "家",
186	        "start_address": "武汉市洪山区xxx",
187	        "start_lat": 30.486874,
188	        "start_lng": 114.309995,
189	        "end_name": "公司",
190	        "end_address": "武汉市江汉区xxx",
191	        "end_lat": 30.5,
192	        "end_lng": 114.3,
193	        "distance": 5000,
194	        "duration": 900,
195	        "created_at": "2026-03-05T10:00:00.000Z"
196	      }
197	    ],
198	    "total": 50,
199	    "page": 1,
200	    "pageSize": 20
201	  }
202	}
203	```
204	
205	### 2. 保存导航记录
206	
207	**POST** `/navigation/history`
208	
209	**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {token}`
210	
211	**请求体**:
212	```json
213	{
214	  "startName": "家",
215	  "startAddress": "武汉市洪山区xxx",
216	  "startLat": 30.486874,
217	  "startLng": 114.309995,
218	  "endName": "公司",
219	  "endAddress": "武汉市江汉区xxx",
220	  "endLat": 30.5,
221	  "endLng": 114.3,
222	  "distance": 5000,
223	  "duration": 900
224	}
225	```
226	
227	### 3. 删除导航历史
228	
229	**DELETE** `/navigation/history/:id`
230	
231	**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {token}`
232	
233	### 4. 清空导航历史
234	
235	**DELETE** `/navigation/history`
236	
237	**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {token}`
238	
239	---
240	
241	## 路线方案 API ⭐ 新增
242	
243	### 1. 获取路线方案列表
244	
245	**GET** `/routes?isFavorite=true&page=1&pageSize=20`
246	
247	**Headers**: `Authorization: Bearer {token}`
248	
249	**Query参数**:
250	- `isFavorite` (可选): 是否只显示收藏 (true/false)
251	- `page` (可选): 页码，默认1
252	- `pageSize` (可选): 每页数量，默认20
253	
254	**响应**:
255	```json
256	{
257	  "code": 200,
258	  "message": "获取成功",
259	  "data": {
260	    "list": [
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-19 12:02:01Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a15be24b/backend/README.md`

```text
1	# 车载导航系统后端服务
2	
3	基于 Node.js + Express + MySQL 的车载导航系统后端API服务。
4	
5	## 功能特性
6	
7	### 核心功能
8	- ✅ 用户认证（注册/登录/JWT）
9	- ✅ 收藏地点管理
10	- ✅ 导航历史记录
11	- ✅ 行程记录
12	- ✅ 搜索历史
13	
14	### 新增功能 ⭐
15	- ✅ 路线方案保存和收藏
16	- ✅ 实时位置共享（家人/朋友）
17	- ✅ 导航反馈和评分
18	- ✅ 智能地点推荐
19	- ✅ 协同导航支持
20	
21	## 技术栈
22	
23	- **运行环境**: Node.js 18+
24	- **Web框架**: Express 4.x
25	- **数据库**: MySQL 8.0+
26	- **认证**: JWT (jsonwebtoken)
27	- **密码加密**: bcryptjs
28	- **语言**: TypeScript
29	
30	## 快速开始
31	
32	### 1. 安装依赖
33	
34	```bash
35	cd backend
36	npm install
37	```
38	
39	### 2. 配置环境变量
40	
41	复制 `.env.example` 为 `.env` 并修改配置：
42	
43	```bash
44	cp .env.example .env
45	```
46	
47	### 3. 初始化数据库
48	
49	```bash
50	mysql -u root -p < src/database/init.sql
51	```
52	
53	### 4. 启动服务
54	
55	```bash
56	# 开发模式
57	npm run dev
58	
59	# 生产模式
60	npm run build
61	npm start
62	```
63	
64	## API文档
65	
66	详细文档：[API_DOCUMENTATION.md](./API_DOCUMENTATION.md)
67	
68	## 数据库设计
69	
70	详细文档：[DATABASE_DESIGN.md](./DATABASE_DESIGN.md)
71	
72	---
73	
74	**版本**: v1.0.0
75	**状态**: ✅ 生产就绪
76
```
</details></tool-use>

0	@echo off
1	echo ========================================
2	echo 车载导航系统 - 数据库初始化
3	echo ========================================
4	echo.
5	
6	echo 请确保MySQL已经启动！
7	echo.
8	
9	echo 方式1: 使用MySQL命令行
10	echo ----------------------------------------
11	echo 命令: mysql -u root -p ^< src/database/init.sql
12	echo.
13	echo 执行步骤:
14	echo 1. 输入MySQL root密码
15	echo 2. 等待数据库创建完成
16	echo.
17	
18	echo 方式2: 手动执行（推荐）
19	echo ----------------------------------------
20	echo 1. 打开MySQL客户端（如Navicat、DBeaver、MySQL Workbench）
21	echo 2. 连接到MySQL服务器
22	echo 3. 打开文件: src/database/init.sql
23	echo 4. 执行SQL脚本
24	echo.
25	
26	echo ========================================
27	echo 按任意键尝试使用命令行方式...
28	pause >nul
29	
30	echo.
31	echo 正在执行数据库初始化...
32	mysql -u root -p < src\database\init.sql
33	
34	if %errorlevel% equ 0 (
35	    echo.
36	    echo ✅ 数据库初始化成功！
37	) else (
38	    echo.
39	    echo ❌ 数据库初始化失败！
40	    echo 请检查:
41	    echo 1. MySQL是否已启动
42	    echo 2. root密码是否正确
43	    echo 3. 或使用方式2手动执行
44	)
45	
46	echo.
47	pause
48
```

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-19 12:02:16Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-aa7ebfea/backend/check-mysql.bat`

```text
0	@echo off
1	chcp 65001 >nul
2	echo ========================================
3	echo MySQL Environment Check
4	echo ========================================
5	echo.
6	
7	echo [1] Checking MySQL command...
8	where mysql >nul 2>&1
9	if %errorlevel% equ 0 (
10	    echo ✓ MySQL command found in PATH
11	    echo.
12	    echo MySQL version:
13	    mysql --version
14	) else (
15	    echo ✗ MySQL command NOT found in PATH
16	    echo.
17	    echo Searching for MySQL installation...
18	    dir "C:\Program Files\MySQL" /s /b 2>nul | findstr mysql.exe
19	    if %errorlevel% neq 0 (
20	        echo ✗ MySQL not found in C:\Program Files\MySQL
21	    )
22	)
23	
24	echo.
25	echo ========================================
26	echo [2] Checking MySQL service...
27	sc query MySQL80 >nul 2>&1
28	if %errorlevel% equ 0 (
29	    echo ✓ MySQL80 service found
30	    sc query MySQL80 | findstr STATE
31	) else (
32	    echo ✗ MySQL80 service not found
33	    echo.
34	    echo Checking for other MySQL services...
35	    sc query type= service state= all | findstr /i "mysql"
36	)
37	
38	echo.
39	echo ========================================
40	echo [3] Testing MySQL connection...
41	echo Attempting to connect to MySQL...
42	mysql -u root -e "SELECT VERSION();" 2>nul
43	if %errorlevel% equ 0 (
44	    echo ✓ MySQL connection successful
45	) else (
46	    echo ✗ MySQL connection failed
47	    echo Please check:
48	    echo   - MySQL service is running
49	    echo   - Root password is correct
50	)
51	
52	echo.
53	echo ========================================
54	echo Check complete
55	echo ========================================
56	pause
57
```
</details></tool-use>

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a15be24b/backend/src/database/init.sql`

```text
0	-- 车载导航系统数据库初始化脚本
1	
2	-- 创建数据库
3	CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS car_navigation DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
4	
5	USE car_navigation;
6	
7	-- 用户表
8	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
9	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '用户ID',
10	    phone VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE NOT NULL COMMENT '手机号',
11	    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '密码（加密）',
12	    nickname VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '昵称',
13	    avatar VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '头像URL',
14	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
15	    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
16	    INDEX idx_phone (phone)
17	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='用户表';
18	
19	-- 收藏地点表
20	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS favorites (
21	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '收藏ID',
22	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
23	    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '地点名称',
24	    address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '详细地址',
25	    latitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '纬度',
26	    longitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '经度',
27	    category VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'custom' COMMENT '分类：home-家, work-公司, custom-自定义',
28	    icon VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '图标',
29	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
30	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
31	    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),
32	    INDEX idx_category (user_id, category)
33	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='收藏地点表';
34	
35	-- 导航历史表
36	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS navigation_history (
37	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '历史ID',
38	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
39	    start_name VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '起点名称',
40	    start_address VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '起点地址',
41	    start_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '起点纬度',
42	    start_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '起点经度',
43	    end_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点名称',
44	    end_address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点地址',
45	    end_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点纬度',
46	    end_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点经度',
47	    distance INT COMMENT '距离（米）',
48	    duration INT COMMENT '时长（秒）',
49	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
50	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
51	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC)
52	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='导航历史表';
53	
54	-- 行程记录表
55	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trip_records (
56	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '行程ID',
57	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
58	    start_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL COMMENT '开始时间',
59	    end_time TIMESTAMP COMMENT '结束时间',
60	    total_distance INT COMMENT '总距离（米）',
61	    total_duration INT COMMENT '总时长（秒）',
62	    avg_speed DECIMAL(5, 2) COMMENT '平均速度（km/h）',
63	    max_speed DECIMAL(5, 2) COMMENT '最高速度（km/h）',
64	    trajectory TEXT COMMENT '轨迹数据（JSON格式）',
65	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
66	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
67	    INDEX idx_user_start (user_id, start_time DESC)
68	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='行程记录表';
69	
70	-- 路线方案表（保存用户规划的路线）
71	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS route_plans (
72	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '路线ID',
73	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
74	    name VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '路线名称',
75	    start_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '起点名称',
76	    start_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '起点纬度',
77	    start_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '起点经度',
78	    end_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点名称',
79	    end_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点纬度',
80	    end_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点经度',
81	    waypoints TEXT COMMENT '途经点（JSON数组）',
82	    distance INT COMMENT '总距离（米）',
83	    duration INT COMMENT '预计时长（秒）',
84	    strategy TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '策略：0-推荐 1-避免拥堵 2-避免收费 3-高速优先',
85	    polyline TEXT COMMENT '路线坐标串',
86	    steps TEXT COMMENT '导航步骤（JSON）',
87	    is_favorite BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否收藏',
88	    use_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '使用次数',
89	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
90	    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
91	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
92	    INDEX idx_user_favorite (user_id, is_favorite),
93	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC)
94	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='路线方案表';
95	
96	-- 实时位置表（用于位置共享和协同导航）
97	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_locations (
98	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '位置ID',
99	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
100	    latitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '纬度',
101	    longitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '经度',
102	    accuracy DECIMAL(6, 2) COMMENT '精度（米）',
103	    speed DECIMAL(6, 2) COMMENT '速度（km/h）',
104	    heading DECIMAL(5, 2) COMMENT '方向（度）',
105	    location_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'ip' COMMENT '定位类型：gps, network, ip',
106	    is_sharing BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否共享位置',
107	    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
108	    UNIQUE KEY uk_user_id (user_id),
109	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
110	    INDEX idx_sharing (is_sharing, updated_at)
111	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='实时位置表';
112	
113	-- 位置共享关系表
114	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS location_shares (
115	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '共享ID',
116	    sharer_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '分享者ID',
117	    viewer_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '查看者ID',
118	    expire_time TIMESTAMP COMMENT '过期时间',
119	    is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE COMMENT '是否激活',
120	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
121	    FOREIGN KEY (sharer_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
122	    FOREIGN KEY (viewer_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
123	    UNIQUE KEY uk_share_view (sharer_id, viewer_id),
124	    INDEX idx_viewer_active (viewer_id, is_active)
125	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='位置共享关系表';
126	
127	-- 导航反馈表（用于收集用户反馈）
128	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS navigation_feedback (
129	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '反馈ID',
130	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
131	    navigation_id BIGINT COMMENT '导航历史ID',
132	    rating TINYINT COMMENT '评分（1-5）',
133	    feedback_type VARCHAR(20) COMMENT '反馈类型：route-路线 traffic-路况 poi-地点',
134	    content TEXT COMMENT '反馈内容',
135	    location_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '反馈位置纬度',
136	    location_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '反馈位置经度',
137	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
138	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
139	    FOREIGN KEY (navigation_id) REFERENCES navigation_history(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
140	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC),
141	    INDEX idx_type (feedback_type)
142	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='导航反馈表';
143	
144	-- 常用地点统计表（智能推荐）
145	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS frequent_locations (
146	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '统计ID',
147	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
148	    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '地点名称',
149	    address VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '地址',
150	    latitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '纬度',
151	    longitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '经度',
152	    visit_count INT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '访问次数',
153	    last_visit TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '最后访问时间',
154	    time_pattern VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '时间规律（如：工作日早上）',
155	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
156	    UNIQUE KEY uk_user_location (user_id, latitude, longitude),
157	    INDEX idx_user_count (user_id, visit_count DESC)
158	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='常用地点统计表';
159	
160	-- 搜索历史表
161	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS search_history (
162	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '搜索ID',
163	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
164	    keyword VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '搜索关键词',
165	    result_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '结果数量',
166	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
167	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
168	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC),
169	    INDEX idx_keyword (keyword)
170	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='搜索历史表';

0	/**
1	 * 增强版导航模块
2	 * 集成完整的导航功能：定位、路径规划、导航指引、POI搜索
3	 * 使用IP定位（简单可靠）
4	 */
5	import { webview } from '@kit.ArkWeb';
6	import { MapService, Location, POIResult } from '../services/MapService';
7	import { NavigationService, NavigationState, NavigationInfo } from '../services/NavigationService';
8	import { VoiceGuideService } from '../services/VoiceGuideService';
9	import { FavoriteService } from '../services/FavoriteService';
10	import { NavigationHistoryService } from '../services/NavigationHistoryService';
11	import { AuthService } from '../services/AuthService';
12	import { FavoritePlace } from '../models/BackendModels';
13	import promptAction from '@ohos.promptAction';
14	
15	@Component
16	export struct EnhancedNavigationModule {
17	  // 外部传入的导航目的地
18	  @Prop @Watch('onDestinationChange') externalDestination: FavoritePlace | null = null;
19	  
20	  // 地图相关
21	  @State isMapLoaded: boolean = false;
22	  @State zoomLevel: number = 15;
23	  private webController: webview.WebviewController = new webview.WebviewController();
24	  
25	  // 定位相关
26	  @State latitude: number = 30.486874173982763;
27	  @State longitude: number = 114.309994670642;
28	  @State addressText: string = "正在定位...";
29	  
30	  // 导航相关
31	  @State isNavigating: boolean = false;
32	  @State navigationInfo: NavigationInfo | null = null;
33	  @State remainingDistance: string = '';
34	  @State remainingTime: string = '';
35	  @State nextInstruction: string = '';
36	  
37	  // 搜索相关
38	  @State showSearchPanel: boolean = false;
39	  @State searchKeyword: string = '';
40	  @State searchResults: POIResult[] = [];
41	  @State isSearching: boolean = false;
42	  @State showSearchHistory: boolean = false;
43	  @State searchHistory: string[] = [];
44	  
45	  // 服务实例
46	  private mapService: MapService = MapService.getInstance();
47	  private navigationService: NavigationService = NavigationService.getInstance();
48	  private voiceService: VoiceGuideService = VoiceGuideService.getInstance();
49	  private favoriteService: FavoriteService = FavoriteService.getInstance();
50	  private historyService: NavigationHistoryService = NavigationHistoryService.getInstance();
51	  private authService: AuthService = AuthService.getInstance();
52	  
53	  aboutToAppear() {
54	    // 监听导航状态变化
55	    this.navigationService.addListener((info) => {
56	      this.onNavigationUpdate(info);
57	    });
58	    
59	    // 检查是否有外部传入的导航目的地
60	    if (this.externalDestination) {
61	      this.handleExternalDestination();
62	    }
63	  }
64	  
65	  /**
66	   * 监听外部传入的导航目的地变化
67	   */
68	  onDestinationChange() {
69	    if (this.externalDestination) {
70	      this.handleExternalDestination();
71	    }
72	  }
73	  
74	  /**
75	   * 处理外部传入的导航目的地
76	   */
77	  handleExternalDestination() {
78	    if (!this.externalDestination) {
79	      return;
80	    }
81	    
82	    console.log('[Navigation] 收到外部导航目的地:', this.externalDestination.name);
83	    console.log('[Navigation] 坐标:', this.externalDestination.latitude, this.externalDestination.longitude);
84	    
85	    const destination: Location = {
86	      latitude: this.externalDestination.latitude,
87	      longitude: this.externalDestination.longitude
88	    };
89	    
90	    // 如果地图已加载,立即启动导航;否则等待地图加载
91	    if (this.isMapLoaded) {
92	      console.log('[Navigation] 地图已加载,立即启动导航');
93	      // 延迟一下,确保WebView完全准备好
94	      setTimeout(() => {
95	        this.startNavigation(destination);
96	      }, 500);
97	    } else {
98	      console.log('[Navigation] 等待地图加载...');
99	      // 等待地图加载完成后再启动导航
100	      let retryCount = 0;
101	      const maxRetries = 100; // 10秒超时
102	      const checkInterval = setInterval(() => {
103	        retryCount++;
104	        if (this.isMapLoaded) {
105	          console.log('[Navigation] 地图加载完成(重试', retryCount, '次),启动导航');
106	          clearInterval(checkInterval);
107	          // 延迟一下,确保WebView完全准备好
108	          setTimeout(() => {
109	            this.startNavigation(destination);
110	          }, 500);
111	        } else if (retryCount >= maxRetries) {
112	          console.error('[Navigation] 等待地图加载超时');
113	          clearInterval(checkInterval);
114	        }
115	      }, 100);
116	    }
117	  }
118	  
119	  aboutToDisappear() {
120	    this.voiceService.release();
121	  }
122	  
123	  /**
124	   * IP定位
125	   */
126	  async startIPLocation() {
127	    try {
128	      console.log('[Navigation] 开始IP定位...');
129	      this.addressText = "IP定位中...";
130	      
131	      const location = await this.mapService.getCurrentLocation();
132	      
133	      this.latitude = location.latitude;
134	      this.longitude = location.longitude;
135	      this.addressText = location.address ? `IP定位 (${location.address})` : "默认位置(武汉)";
136	      
137	      console.log('[Navigation] IP定位完成:', this.latitude, this.longitude);
138	      
139	      // 更新地图标记
140	      const currentLocation: Location = {
141	        latitude: this.latitude,
142	        longitude: this.longitude
143	      };
144	      this.mapService.addCurrentLocationMarker(currentLocation);
145	      this.mapService.moveToLocation(currentLocation, this.zoomLevel);
146	      
147	    } catch (err) {
148	      console.error('[Navigation] IP定位失败:', err);
149	      this.addressText = "定位失败,使用默认位置";
150	    }
151	  }
152	  
153	  /**
154	   * 地图加载完成
155	   */
156	  onMapLoad() {
157	    this.isMapLoaded = true;
158	    this.mapService.setWebController(this.webController);
159	    
160	    // 移动地图到默认位置
161	    const defaultLocation: Location = {
162	      latitude: this.latitude,
163	      longitude: this.longitude
164	    };
165	    this.mapService.moveToLocation(defaultLocation, this.zoomLevel);
166	    
167	    // 延迟添加标记，确保WebView准备好
168	    setTimeout(() => {
169	      this.mapService.addCurrentLocationMarker(defaultLocation);
170	      console.log('[Navigation] 地图初始化完成');
171	    }, 300);
172	    
173	    // 启动IP定位
174	    setTimeout(() => {
175	      this.startIPLocation();
176	    }, 500);
177	  }
178	  
179	  /**
180	   * 缩放地图
181	   */
182	  changeZoom(delta: number): void {
183	    if (!this.webController) return;
184	    this.zoomLevel = Math.max(3, Math.min(20, this.zoomLevel + delta));
185	    try {
186	      const message = JSON.stringify({
187	        action: 'setZoom',
188	        zoom: this.zoomLevel
189	      });
190	      this.webController.runJavaScript(`window.postMessage('${message}', '*')`);
191	    } catch(e) {
192	      console.error('Change zoom error:', e);
193	    }
194	  }
195	  
196	  /**
197	   * 回到当前位置
198	   */
199	  backToCurrentLocation(): void {
200	    if (this.webController) {
201	      const currentLocation: Location = {
202	        latitude: this.latitude,
203	        longitude: this.longitude
204	      };
205	      this.mapService.moveToLocation(currentLocation, this.zoomLevel);
206	    }
207	  }
208	  
209	  /**
210	   * 开始导航
211	   */
212	  async startNavigation(destination: Location) {
213	    try {
214	      await this.navigationService.startNavigation(destination);
215	      this.isNavigating = true;
216	      this.showSearchPanel = false;
217	    } catch (err) {
218	      console.error('Start navigation error:', err);
219	    }
220	  }
221	  
222	  /**
223	   * 停止导航
224	   */
225	  stopNavigation() {
226	    this.navigationService.stopNavigation();
227	    this.isNavigating = false;
228	    this.navigationInfo = null;
229	    this.addressText = "实时定位";
230	  }
231	  
232	  /**
233	   * 导航状态更新
234	   */
235	  onNavigationUpdate(info: NavigationInfo) {
236	    this.navigationInfo = info;
237	    
238	    // 更新显示信息
239	    if (info.remainingDistance > 1000) {
240	      this.remainingDistance = `${(info.remainingDistance / 1000).toFixed(1)} 公里`;
241	    } else {
242	      this.remainingDistance = `${Math.round(info.remainingDistance)} 米`;
243	    }
244	    
245	    const hours = Math.floor(info.remainingTime / 3600);
246	    const minutes = Math.floor((info.remainingTime % 3600) / 60);
247	    if (hours > 0) {
248	      this.remainingTime = `${hours}小时${minutes}分钟`;
249	    } else {
250	      this.remainingTime = `${minutes}分钟`;
251	    }
252	    
253	    this.nextInstruction = info.nextInstruction;
254	    this.addressText = info.nextInstruction;
255	    
256	    // 到达目的地
257	    if (info.state === NavigationState.ARRIVED) {
258	      this.voiceService.speakArrival();
259	      setTimeout(() => {
260	        this.stopNavigation();
261	      }, 3000);
262	    }
263	  }
264	  
265	  /**
266	   * 搜索POI
267	   */
268	  async searchPOI() {
269	    if (!this.searchKeyword.trim()) return;
270	    
271	    this.isSearching = true;
272	    try {
273	      const currentLocation: Location = { latitude: this.latitude, longitude: this.longitude };
274	      const results = await this.mapService.searchPOI(
275	        this.searchKeyword,
276	        currentLocation,
277	        5000
278	      );
279	      this.searchResults = results;
280	    } catch (err) {
281	      console.error('Search error:', err);
282	    } finally {
283	      this.isSearching = false;
284	    }
285	  }
286	  
287	  /**
288	   * 选择POI并导航
289	   */
290	  selectPOI(poi: POIResult) {
291	    this.startNavigation(poi.location);
292	  }
293	  
294	  /**
295	   * 收藏当前位置或POI
296	   */
297	  async addToFavorites(name: string, address: string, location: Location) {
298	    try {
299	      console.log('[Navigation] 开始收藏:', name);
300	      console.log('[Navigation] 地址:', address);
301	      console.log('[Navigation] 坐标:', location.latitude, location.longitude);
302	      
303	      const isLoggedIn = await this.authService.isLoggedIn();
304	      console.log('[Navigation] 登录状态:', isLoggedIn);
305	      
306	      if (!isLoggedIn) {
307	        console.log('[Navigation] 未登录，提示用户登录');
308	        promptAction.showToast({
309	          message: '请先登录',
310	          duration: 2000
311	        });
312	        return;
313	      }
314	      
315	      const response = await this.favoriteService.addFavorite({
316	        name: name,
317	        address: address,
318	        latitude: location.latitude,
319	        longitude: location.longitude
320	      });
321	      
322	      console.log('[Navigation] 收藏响应代码:', response.code);
323	      console.log('[Navigation] 收藏响应消息:', response.message);
324	      console.log('[Navigation] 完整响应:', JSON.stringify(response));
325	      
326	      if (response.code === 200) {
327	        console.log('[Navigation] 收藏成功');
328	        promptAction.showToast({
329	          message: '收藏成功',
330	          duration: 2000
331	        });
332	      } else {
333	        console.error('[Navigation] 收藏失败:', response.message);
334	        promptAction.showToast({
335	          message: response.message || '收藏失败',
336	          duration: 2000
337	        });
338	      }
339	    } catch (err) {
340	      console.error('[Navigation] 收藏异常 - 类型:', typeof err);
341	      console.error('[Navigation] 收藏异常 - 详情:', JSON.stringify(err));
342	      promptAction.showToast({
343	        message: '收藏失败，请稍后重试',
344	        duration: 2000
345	      });
346	    }
347	  }
348	  
349	  /**
350	   * 加载搜索历史
351	   */
352	  async loadSearchHistory() {
353	    try {
354	      const response = await this.historyService.getHistory();
355	      // 提取最近5条搜索记录的目的地名称
356	      if (response.data && response.data.list) {
357	        this.searchHistory = response.data.list.slice(0, 5).map(item => item.endName);
358	      } else {
359	        this.searchHistory = [];
360	      }
361	    } catch (err) {
362	      console.error('[Navigation] 加载搜索历史失败:', err);
363	      this.searchHistory = [];
364	    }
365	  }
366	  
367	  /**
368	   * 保存导航历史
369	   */
370	  async saveNavigationHistory(destination: Location, destinationName: string) {
371	    try {
372	      const isLoggedIn = await this.authService.isLoggedIn();
373	      if (!isLoggedIn) {
374	        return;
375	      }
376	      
377	      await this.historyService.saveHistory({
378	        startLat: this.latitude,
379	        startLng: this.longitude,
380	        startName: '当前位置',
381	        startAddress: this.addressText,
382	        endLat: destination.latitude,
383	        endLng: destination.longitude,
384	        endName: destinationName,
385	        endAddress: destinationName,
386	        distance: 0, // 实际距离由后端计算
387	        duration: 0  // 实际时长由后端计算
388	      });
389	      
390	      console.log('[Navigation] 导航历史已保存');
391	    } catch (err) {
392	      console.error('[Navigation] 保存导航历史失败:', err);
393	    }
394	  }
395	  
396	  build() {
397	    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.Bottom }) {
398	      // 1. 地图层 - 使用WebView加载高德地图
399	      Stack() {
400	        Web({ src: $rawfile('amap.html'), controller: this.webController })
401	          .width('100%')
402	          .height('100%')
403	          .onPageEnd(() => {
404	            console.log('地图页面加载完成');
405	            this.onMapLoad();
406	          })
407	          .onErrorReceive((event) => {
408	            console.error('地图加载错误:', event?.error);
409	          })
410	          .onConsole((event) => {
411	            // 转发WebView的console日志到ArkTS
412	            if (event && event.message) {
413	              const msg = event.message;
414	              const message = msg.getMessage();
415	              const sourceId = msg.getSourceId();
416	              const lineNumber = msg.getLineNumber();
417	              
418	              // 输出WebView日志，包含来源信息
419	              console.log('[WebView]', message, 'at', sourceId, ':', lineNumber);
420	            }
421	            return false;
422	          })
423	      }
424	      
425	      // 2. 顶部搜索栏
426	      if (!this.isNavigating) {
427	        this.SearchBar()
428	      }
429	      
430	      // 3. 右侧控制按钮
431	      this.ControlButtons()
432	      
433	      // 4. 底部信息面板
434	      if (this.isNavigating && this.navigationInfo) {
435	        this.NavigationPanel()
436	      } else {
437	        this.LocationPanel()
438	      }
439	      
440	      // 5. 搜索结果面板
441	      if (this.showSearchPanel) {
442	        this.SearchResultPanel()
443	      }
444	    }
445	  }
446	  
447	  /**
448	   * 搜索栏
449	   */
450	  @Builder
451	  SearchBar(): void {
452	    Column() {
453	      Row() {
454	        TextInput({ placeholder: '搜索地点、地址' })
455	          .layoutWeight(1)
456	          .height(48)
457	          .backgroundColor(Color.White)
458	          .borderRadius(24)
459	          .padding({ left: 20, right: 20 })
460	          .onChange((value: string): void => {
461	            this.searchKeyword = value;
462	          })
463	          .onFocus(() => {
464	            // 获得焦点时加载搜索历史
465	            this.showSearchHistory = true;
466	            this.loadSearchHistory();
467	          })
468	          .onBlur(() => {
469	            // 延迟隐藏，以便点击历史记录
470	            setTimeout(() => {
471	              this.showSearchHistory = false;
472	            }, 200);
473	          })
474	          .onSubmit((): void => {
475	            this.showSearchPanel = true;
476	            this.showSearchHistory = false;
477	            this.searchPOI();
478	            return;
479	          })
480	        
481	        // 收藏按钮
482	        Button() {
483	          Text('⭐')
484	            .fontSize(20)
485	        }
486	        .height(48)
487	        .width(48)
488	        .backgroundColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.9)')
489	        .borderRadius(24)
490	        .margin({ left: 10 })
491	        .onClick(async () => {
492	          // 收藏当前位置
493	          await this.addToFavorites(
494	            '当前位置',
495	            this.addressText,
496	            { latitude: this.latitude, longitude: this.longitude }
497	          );
498	        })
499	        
500	        Button('搜索')
501	          .height(48)
502	          .backgroundColor('#00E5FF')
503	          .borderRadius(24)
504	          .margin({ left: 10 })
505	          .onClick((): void => {
506	            this.showSearchPanel = true;
507	            this.showSearchHistory = false;
508	            this.searchPOI();
509	          })
510	      }
511	      .width('90%')
512	      
513	      // 搜索历史面板
514	      if (this.showSearchHistory && this.searchHistory.length > 0) {
515	        Column() {
516	          Text('搜索历史')
517	            .fontSize(14)
518	            .fontColor('#666')
519	            .width('100%')
```

0	@Component
1	export struct CollaborationModule {
2	  @State messages: string[] = ["导航流转: 目的地已同步", "音乐接续: 正在播放《七里香》"];
3	
4	  build() {
5	    Column() {
6	      // 顶部标题
7	      Row() {
8	        Image($r('app.media.app_icon')).width(40).height(40).margin({ right: 15 })
9	        Text("超级终端互联").fontSize(24).fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold).fontColor(Color.White)
10	      }
11	      .width('100%')
12	      .padding({ top: 60, left: 30 })
13	
14	      // 消息列表
15	      List({ space: 15 }) {
16	        ForEach(this.messages, (msg: string) => {
17	          ListItem() {
18	            Row() {
19	              Circle().width(8).height(8).fill('#00FF00').margin({ right: 15 })
20	              Text(msg).fontSize(18).fontColor(Color.White)
21	            }
22	            .width('100%')
23	            .padding(24)
24	            .borderRadius(16)
25	            .backgroundColor('rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)')
26	            .border({ width: 1, color: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)' })
27	          }
28	        })
29	      }
30	      .width('90%')
31	      .layoutWeight(1) // 占满中间
32	      .margin({ top: 30 })
33	
34	      // 底部按钮 (居中，并抬高)
35	      Button("立即同步数据")
36	        .width('80%').height(56)
37	        .fontSize(18)
38	        .backgroundColor('#007DFF')
39	        .shadow({ radius: 20, color: 'rgba(0, 125, 255, 0.4)' })
40	        .onClick(() => {
41	          this.messages.push(`数据同步 ${new Date().toLocaleTimeString()}`);
42	        })
43	        // 核心避让：抬高 100vp，左下角安全
44	        .margin({ bottom: 100 })
45	    }
46	    .width('100%')
47	    .height('100%')
48	    .backgroundColor('#0F172A')
49	  }
50	}

0	/**
1	 * 测试菜单页面 - 用于测试后端集成功能
2	 */
3	import router from '@ohos.router'
4	import { AuthService } from '../services/AuthService'
5	
6	@Entry
7	@Component
8	struct TestMenuPage {
9	  private authService: AuthService = AuthService.getInstance()
10	  @State isLoggedIn: boolean = false
11	  @State currentUser: string = ''
12	  
13	  async aboutToAppear() {
14	    // 检查登录状态
15	    this.isLoggedIn = await this.authService.isLoggedIn()
16	    if (this.isLoggedIn) {
17	      const user = await this.authService.getCurrentUser()
18	      if (user) {
19	        this.currentUser = user.nickname || user.phone
20	      }
21	    }
22	  }
23	  
24	  build() {
25	    Column() {
26	      // 标题
27	      Text('后端集成功能测试')
28	        .fontSize(24)
29	        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
30	        .margin({ top: 40, bottom: 20 })
31	      
32	      // 登录状态
33	      if (this.isLoggedIn) {
34	        Row() {
35	          Text(`已登录：${this.currentUser}`)
36	            .fontSize(14)
37	            .fontColor('#666666')
38	          
39	          Button('登出')
40	            .fontSize(14)
41	            .height(32)
42	            .margin({ left: 10 })
43	            .onClick(async () => {
44	              await this.authService.logout()
45	              this.isLoggedIn = false
46	              this.currentUser = ''
47	            })
48	        }
49	        .margin({ bottom: 30 })
50	      } else {
51	        Text('未登录')
52	          .fontSize(14)
53	          .fontColor('#999999')
54	          .margin({ bottom: 30 })
55	      }
56	      
57	      // 测试菜单
58	      Column({ space: 15 }) {
59	        // 认证功能

0	import { EnhancedNavigationModule } from '../view/EnhancedNavigationModule'
1	import { MediaModule } from '../view/MediaModule'
2	import { CollaborationModule } from '../view/CollaborationModule'
3	import { CarStatusModule } from '../view/CarStatusModule'
4	import { FavoritePlace } from '../models/BackendModels'
5	import { common } from '@kit.AbilityKit'
6	import { display } from '@kit.ArkUI'
7	import curves from '@ohos.curves'
8	import router from '@ohos.router'
9	
10	interface ModuleConfig {
11	  title: string
12	  index: number
13	  angle: number
14	  icon: string
15	}
16	
17	@Entry
18	@Component
19	struct Index {
20	  @State currentIndex: number = 0
21	  @State isExpanded: boolean = false
22	  private controller: TabsController = new TabsController()
23	  
24	  // 导航目的地参数
25	  @State navigationDestination: FavoritePlace | null = null
26	  private checkInterval: number = -1
27	
28	  // === 坐标系统 ===
29	  @State ballX: number = 0
30	  @State ballY: number = 0
31	  @State screenWidthVp: number = 0
32	  @State screenHeightVp: number = 0
33	
34	  // === 尺寸定义 ===
35	  private readonly BALL_SIZE: number = 60
36	  private readonly EXPAND_RADIUS: number = 90
37	  private readonly ITEM_SIZE: number = 56
38	
39	  private readonly menuItems: ModuleConfig[] = [
40	    { title: "车况", index: 0, angle: -90, icon: "🚗" },
41	    { title: "导航", index: 1, angle: -45, icon: "🧭" },
42	    { title: "娱乐", index: 2, angle: 45, icon: "🎵" },
43	    { title: "协同", index: 3, angle: 135, icon: "🤝" },
44	    { title: "我的", index: 4, angle: 180, icon: "👤" }
45	  ]
46	
47	  private startX: number = 0
48	  private startY: number = 0
49	
50	  aboutToAppear() {
51	    console.log('[Index] ========== aboutToAppear 开始 ==========');
52	    try {
53	      let context = this.getUIContext().getHostContext() as common.UIAbilityContext;
54	      let windowClass = context.windowStage.getMainWindowSync();
55	      windowClass.setWindowLayoutFullScreen(true);
56	
57	      let displayClass = display.getDefaultDisplaySync();
58	      this.screenWidthVp = displayClass.width / displayClass.densityPixels;
59	      this.screenHeightVp = displayClass.height / displayClass.densityPixels;
60	
61	      this.ballX = this.screenWidthVp - this.BALL_SIZE - 30;
62	      this.ballY = this.screenHeightVp - this.BALL_SIZE - 120;
63	      
64	      console.log('[Index] 屏幕尺寸初始化完成:', this.screenWidthVp, 'x', this.screenHeightVp);
65	    } catch (err) {
66	      console.error('[Index] 初始化窗口失败:', err);
67	    }
68	    
69	    // 启动定时器检查AppStorage
70	    this.startCheckingAppStorage();
71	    
72	    // 立即检查一次导航目的地
73	    setTimeout(() => {
74	      this.checkNavigationDestination();
75	    }, 500);
76	    
77	    console.log('[Index] ========== aboutToAppear 完成 ==========');
78	  }
79	  
80	  aboutToDisappear() {
81	    console.log('[Index] aboutToDisappear - 清理定时器');
82	    // 清除定时器
83	    if (this.checkInterval !== -1) {
84	      clearInterval(this.checkInterval);
85	    }
86	  }
87	  
88	  /**
89	   * 启动定时器检查AppStorage中的导航目的地
90	   */
91	  startCheckingAppStorage() {
92	    console.log('[Index] 启动AppStorage监听 - 开始');
93	    let checkCount = 0;
94	    this.checkInterval = setInterval(() => {
95	      checkCount++;
96	      if (checkCount % 50 === 0) {
97	        console.log('[Index] AppStorage检查中... 已检查', checkCount, '次');
98	      }
99	      
100	      // 检查是否需要切换到导航Tab
101	      const shouldSwitch = AppStorage.get<boolean>('shouldSwitchToNavigation');
102	      const navDest = AppStorage.get<FavoritePlace>('navigationDestination');
103	      
104	      if (shouldSwitch && navDest) {
105	        console.log('[Index] ✅ 检测到导航请求:', navDest.name);
106	        
107	        // 清除标志
108	        AppStorage.delete('shouldSwitchToNavigation');
109	        AppStorage.delete('navigationDestination');
110	        
111	        // 先切换Tab
112	        console.log('[Index] 准备切换到导航Tab (index=1)');
113	        this.currentIndex = 1;
114	        this.controller.changeIndex(1);
115	        
116	        // 延迟设置导航目的地,确保Tab切换完成
117	        setTimeout(() => {
118	          this.navigationDestination = navDest;
119	          console.log('[Index] ✅ 已完成Tab切换和导航目的地设置');
120	        }, 300);
121	      }
122	    }, 100);
123	  }
124	  
125	  onPageShow() {
126	    // 优先从 router 参数获取导航目的地
127	    try {
128	      const params = router.getParams() as Record<string, Object>;
129	      
130	      // 方式1：从收藏页面传递的参数格式 (action + destination)
131	      if (params && params['action'] === 'navigate') {
132	        const destination = params['destination'] as FavoritePlace;
133	        
134	        // 切换到导航Tab
135	        this.currentIndex = 1;
136	        this.controller.changeIndex(1);
137	        
138	        // 延迟设置导航目的地，确保Tab切换完成
139	        setTimeout(() => {
140	          this.navigationDestination = destination;
141	        }, 300);
142	        
143	        return;
144	      }
145	      
146	      // 方式2：从历史页面传递的参数格式 (navigationDestination)
147	      if (params && params['navigationDestination']) {
148	        const destination = params['navigationDestination'] as FavoritePlace;
149	        
150	        // 切换到导航Tab
151	        this.currentIndex = 1;
152	        this.controller.changeIndex(1);
153	        
154	        // 延迟设置导航目的地，确保Tab切换完成
155	        setTimeout(() => {
156	          this.navigationDestination = destination;
157	        }, 300);
158	        
159	        return;
160	      }
161	    } catch (err) {
162	      console.error('[Index] 获取 router 参数失败:', err);
163	    }
164	    
165	    // 备用方案：检查AppStorage中的导航目的地
166	    this.checkNavigationDestination();
167	  }
168	  
169	  /**
170	   * 检查并处理导航目的地
171	   */
172	  checkNavigationDestination() {
173	    const navDest = AppStorage.get<FavoritePlace>('navigationDestination');
174	    if (navDest) {
175	      // 清除AppStorage中的参数
176	      AppStorage.delete('navigationDestination');
177	      // 切换到导航Tab
178	      this.currentIndex = 1;
179	      this.controller.changeIndex(1);
180	      // 设置导航目的地
181	      this.navigationDestination = navDest;
182	    }
183	  }
184	
185	  toggleExpand() {
186	    if (!this.isExpanded) {
187	      const safePadding = this.EXPAND_RADIUS + (this.ITEM_SIZE / 2) + 10;
188	      let cX = this.ballX + (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
189	      let cY = this.ballY + (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
190	      let nCX = Math.max(safePadding, Math.min(cX, this.screenWidthVp - safePadding));
191	      let nCY = Math.max(safePadding, Math.min(cY, this.screenHeightVp - safePadding));
192	
193	      this.getUIContext().animateTo({ curve: curves.springMotion(0.6, 0.8) }, () => {
194	        this.ballX = nCX - (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
195	        this.ballY = nCY - (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
196	      });
197	    }
198	    this.getUIContext().animateTo({ curve: curves.springMotion(0.5, 0.7) }, () => {
199	      this.isExpanded = !this.isExpanded;
200	    })
201	  }
202	
203	  build() {
204	    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.TopStart }) {
205	      // 1. 内容层
206	      Tabs({ barPosition: BarPosition.End, controller: this.controller }) {
207	        TabContent() { CarStatusModule() }.backgroundColor('#000000')
208	        TabContent() { 
209	          EnhancedNavigationModule({ 
210	            externalDestination: this.navigationDestination 
211	          }) 
212	        }.backgroundColor('#000000')
213	        TabContent() { MediaModule({ isPageVisible: this.currentIndex === 2 }) }.backgroundColor('#000000')
214	        TabContent() { CollaborationModule() }.backgroundColor('#000000')
215	      }
216	      .barHeight(0).scrollable(false).width('100%').height('100%')
217	
218	      // 2. 遮罩层 (点击此处收缩)
219	      if (this.isExpanded) {
220	        Rect().width('100%').height('100%')
221	          .fill('rgba(0,0,0,0.01)') // 几乎隐形，只为了拦截点击
222	          .onClick(() => {
223	            // 点击空白处 -> 收缩
224	            this.toggleExpand()
225	          })
226	          .zIndex(9998)
227	      }
228	
229	      // 3. 子菜单项
230	      ForEach(this.menuItems, (item: ModuleConfig) => {
231	        this.PureGlassItem(item)
232	      })
233	
234	      // 4. 主悬浮球 (点击此处也可以收缩)
235	      this.PureMainBall()
236	    }
237	    .width('100%').height('100%').backgroundColor('#000000')
238	  }
239	
240	  // === 纯净磨砂子菜单 ===
241	  @Builder
242	  PureGlassItem(item: ModuleConfig): void {
243	    Column({ space: 4 }) {
244	      Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.Center }) {
245	        Text(item.icon)
246	          .fontSize(24)
247	          .fontColor(this.currentIndex === item.index ? '#FFFFFF' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.8)')
248	          .animation({ duration: 150 })
249	      }
250	      .width(this.ITEM_SIZE).height(this.ITEM_SIZE)
251	      // 样式逻辑：选中亮一点，未选中暗一点
252	      .backgroundColor(this.currentIndex === item.index ? 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)' : 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)')
253	      .backgroundBlurStyle(this.currentIndex === item.index ? BlurStyle.Regular : BlurStyle.Thin)
254	      // 一次成型裁剪
255	      .borderRadius(this.ITEM_SIZE / 2)
256	      .clip(true)
257	      .border({ width: 0.5, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)' })
258	      .onClick(() => {
259	        // === 逻辑修正 ===
260	        if (item.index === 4) {
261	          // "我的"选项 - 跳转到个人中心页面
262	          router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/UserCenterPage' })
263	          this.toggleExpand() // 收起菜单
264	        } else {
265	          // 其他选项 - 切换 Tab
266	          this.currentIndex = item.index
267	          this.controller.changeIndex(item.index)
268	          // 这里删除了 this.toggleExpand()
269	          // 这样点击切换时，菜单不会收回去，您可以继续看其他状态
270	        }
271	      })
272	
273	      // 文字
274	      Text(item.title)
275	        .fontSize(10).fontColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.7)').fontWeight(FontWeight.Regular)
276	        .opacity(this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0)
277	        .animation({ duration: 200 })
278	    }
279	    .position({
280	      x: this.ballX + (this.BALL_SIZE - this.ITEM_SIZE) / 2 +
281	        (this.isExpanded ? this.EXPAND_RADIUS * Math.cos(item.angle * Math.PI / 180) : 0),
282	      y: this.ballY + (this.BALL_SIZE - this.ITEM_SIZE) / 2 +
283	        (this.isExpanded ? this.EXPAND_RADIUS * Math.sin(item.angle * Math.PI / 180) : 0)
284	    })
285	    .zIndex(9999)
286	    .scale({ x: this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0, y: this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0 })
287	    .opacity(this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0)
288	    .animation({ curve: curves.springMotion(0.6, 0.75) })
289	  }
290	
291	  // === 纯净主球 ===
292	  @Builder
293	  PureMainBall(): void {
294	    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.Center }) {
295	      Text("＋")
296	        .fontSize(26).fontColor('#FFFFFF').fontWeight(FontWeight.Lighter)
297	        .rotate({ angle: this.isExpanded ? 135 : 0 })
298	        .animation({ duration: 300 })
299	        .margin({ bottom: 2 })
300	    }
301	    .width(this.BALL_SIZE).height(this.BALL_SIZE)
302	    .backgroundColor('rgba(40, 40, 40, 0.5)')
303	    .backgroundBlurStyle(BlurStyle.Thick)
304	    .borderRadius(this.BALL_SIZE / 2)
305	    .clip(true)
306	    .border({ width: 0.5, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)' })
307	    .shadow({ radius: 10, color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)', offsetY: 4 })
308	    .position({ x: this.ballX, y: this.ballY })
309	    .zIndex(10000)
310	    .onClick(() => {
311	      // 主动点击球体 -> 切换收缩/展开
312	      this.toggleExpand()
313	    })
314	    .gesture(
315	      PanGesture()
316	        .onActionStart(() => {
317	          if (this.isExpanded) this.toggleExpand()
318	          this.startX = this.ballX; this.startY = this.ballY
319	        })
320	        .onActionUpdate((e) => {
321	          let rX = this.startX + e.offsetX; let rY = this.startY + e.offsetY
322	          this.ballX = Math.max(0, Math.min(rX, this.screenWidthVp - this.BALL_SIZE))
323	          this.ballY = Math.max(0, Math.min(rY, this.screenHeightVp - this.BALL_SIZE))
324	        })
325	    )
326	  }
327	}
```
