<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a1421640/backend/src/config/database.ts`

```text
0	import mysql from 'mysql2/promise';
1	import dotenv from 'dotenv';
2	
3	dotenv.config();
4	
5	// 数据库连接池配置
6	export const pool = mysql.createPool({
7	  host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost',
8	  port: parseInt(process.env.DB_PORT || '3306'),
9	  user: process.env.DB_USER || 'root',
10	  password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || '',
11	  database: process.env.DB_NAME || 'car_navigation',
12	  waitForConnections: true,
13	  connectionLimit: 10,
14	  queueLimit: 0,
15	  enableKeepAlive: true,
16	  keepAliveInitialDelay: 0
17	});
18	
19	// 测试数据库连接
20	export async function testConnection() {
21	  try {
22	    const connection = await pool.getConnection();
23	    console.log('✅ 数据库连接成功');
24	    connection.release();
25	    return true;
26	  } catch (error) {
27	    console.error('❌ 数据库连接失败:', error);
28	    return false;
29	  }
30	}
31	
32	// 执行SQL查询
33	export async function query<T = any>(sql: string, params?: any[]): Promise<T> {
34	  const [rows] = await pool.execute(sql, params);
35	  return rows as T;
36	}
37
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a1421640/backend/src/controllers/authController.ts`

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs';
2	import { query } from '../config/database';
3	import { generateToken } from '../middleware/auth';
4	
5	interface User {
6	  id: number;
7	  phone: string;
8	  password: string;
9	  nickname?: string;
10	  avatar?: string;
11	}
12	
13	/**
14	 * 用户注册
15	 */
16	export async function register(req: Request, res: Response) {
17	  try {
18	    const { phone, password, nickname } = req.body;
19	    
20	    // 验证参数
21	    if (!phone || !password) {
22	      return res.status(400).json({
23	        code: 400,
24	        message: '手机号和密码不能为空'
25	      });
26	    }
27	    
28	    // 检查手机号是否已注册
29	    const existingUsers = await query<User[]>(
30	      'SELECT id FROM users WHERE phone = ?',
31	      [phone]
32	    );
33	    
34	    if (existingUsers.length > 0) {
35	      return res.status(400).json({
36	        code: 400,
37	        message: '该手机号已注册'
38	      });
39	    }
40	    
41	    // 加密密码
42	    const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);
43	    
44	    // 插入用户
45	    const result: any = await query(
46	      'INSERT INTO users (phone, password, nickname) VALUES (?, ?, ?)',
47	      [phone, hashedPassword, nickname || `用户${phone.slice(-4)}`]
48	    );
49	    
50	    const userId = result.insertId;
51	    
52	    // 生成token
53	    const token = generateToken(userId);
54	    
55	    res.status(201).json({
56	      code: 200,
57	      message: '注册成功',
58	      data: {
59	        userId,
60	        phone,
61	        nickname: nickname || `用户${phone.slice(-4)}`,
62	        token
63	      }
64	    });
65	  } catch (error) {
66	    console.error('Register error:', error);
67	    res.status(500).json({
68	      code: 500,
69	      message: '服务器错误'
70	    });
71	  }
72	}
73	
74	/**
75	 * 用户登录
76	 */
77	export async function login(req: Request, res: Response) {
78	  try {
79	    const { phone, password } = req.body;
80	    
81	    // 验证参数
82	    if (!phone || !password) {
83	      return res.status(400).json({
84	        code: 400,
85	        message: '手机号和密码不能为空'
86	      });
87	    }
88	    
89	    // 查询用户
90	    const users = await query<User[]>(
91	      'SELECT id, phone, password, nickname, avatar FROM users WHERE phone = ?',
92	      [phone]
93	    );
94	    
95	    if (users.length === 0) {
96	      return res.status(401).json({
97	        code: 401,
98	        message: '手机号或密码错误'
99	      });
100	    }
101	    
102	    const user = users[0];
103	    
104	    // 验证密码
105	    const isPasswordValid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password);
106	    
107	    if (!isPasswordValid) {
108	      return res.status(401).json({
109	        code: 401,
110	        message: '手机号或密码错误'
111	      });
112	    }
113	    
114	    // 生成token
115	    const token = generateToken(user.id);
116	    
117	    res.json({
118	      code: 200,
119	      message: '登录成功',
120	      data: {
121	        userId: user.id,
122	        phone: user.phone,
123	        nickname: user.nickname,
124	        avatar: user.avatar,
125	        token
126	      }
127	    });
128	  } catch (error) {
129	    console.error('Login error:', error);
130	    res.status(500).json({
131	      code: 500,
132	      message: '服务器错误'
133	    });
134	  }
135	}
136	
137	/**
138	 * 获取用户信息
139	 */
140	export async function getProfile(req: Request, res: Response) {
141	  try {
142	    const userId = req.userId;
143	    
144	    const users = await query<User[]>(
145	      'SELECT id, phone, nickname, avatar, created_at FROM users WHERE id = ?',
146	      [userId]
147	    );
148	    
149	    if (users.length === 0) {
150	      return res.status(404).json({
151	        code: 404,
152	        message: '用户不存在'
153	      });
154	    }
155	    
156	    res.json({
157	      code: 200,
158	      message: '获取成功',
159	      data: users[0]
160	    });
161	  } catch (error) {
162	    console.error('Get profile error:', error);
163	    res.status(500).json({
164	      code: 500,
165	      message: '服务器错误'
166	    });
167	  }
168	}
169	
170	/**
171	 * 更新用户信息
172	 */
173	export async function updateProfile(req: Request, res: Response) {
174	  try {
175	    const userId = req.userId;
176	    const { nickname, avatar } = req.body;
177	    
178	    const updates: string[] = [];
179	    const params: any[] = [];
180	    
181	    if (nickname) {
182	      updates.push('nickname = ?');
183	      params.push(nickname);
184	    }
185	    
186	    if (avatar) {
187	      updates.push('avatar = ?');
188	      params.push(avatar);
189	    }
190	    
191	    if (updates.length === 0) {
192	      return res.status(400).json({
193	        code: 400,
194	        message: '没有要更新的内容'
195	      });
196	    }
197	    
198	    params.push(userId);
199	    
200	    await query(
201	      `UPDATE users SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`,
202	      params
203	    );
204	    
205	    res.json({
206	      code: 200,
207	      message: '更新成功'
208	    });
209	  } catch (error) {
210	    console.error('Update profile error:', error);
211	    res.status(500).json({
212	      code: 500,
213	      message: '服务器错误'
214	    });
215	  }
216	}
217
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a1421640/backend/src/database/init.sql`

```text
0	-- 车载导航系统数据库初始化脚本
1	
2	-- 创建数据库
3	CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS car_navigation DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
4	
5	USE car_navigation;
6	
7	-- 用户表
8	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
9	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '用户ID',
10	    phone VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE NOT NULL COMMENT '手机号',
11	    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '密码（加密）',
12	    nickname VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '昵称',
13	    avatar VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '头像URL',
14	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
15	    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
16	    INDEX idx_phone (phone)
17	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='用户表';
18	
19	-- 收藏地点表
20	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS favorites (
21	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '收藏ID',
22	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
23	    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '地点名称',
24	    address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '详细地址',
25	    latitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '纬度',
26	    longitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '经度',
27	    category VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'custom' COMMENT '分类：home-家, work-公司, custom-自定义',
28	    icon VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '图标',
29	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
30	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
31	    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),
32	    INDEX idx_category (user_id, category)
33	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='收藏地点表';
34	
35	-- 导航历史表
36	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS navigation_history (
37	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '历史ID',
38	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
39	    start_name VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '起点名称',
40	    start_address VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '起点地址',
41	    start_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '起点纬度',
42	    start_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '起点经度',
43	    end_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点名称',
44	    end_address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点地址',
45	    end_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点纬度',
46	    end_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点经度',
47	    distance INT COMMENT '距离（米）',
48	    duration INT COMMENT '时长（秒）',
49	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
50	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
51	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC)
52	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='导航历史表';
53	
54	-- 行程记录表
55	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trip_records (
56	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '行程ID',
57	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
58	    start_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL COMMENT '开始时间',
59	    end_time TIMESTAMP COMMENT '结束时间',
60	    total_distance INT COMMENT '总距离（米）',
61	    total_duration INT COMMENT '总时长（秒）',
62	    avg_speed DECIMAL(5, 2) COMMENT '平均速度（km/h）',
63	    max_speed DECIMAL(5, 2) COMMENT '最高速度（km/h）',
64	    trajectory TEXT COMMENT '轨迹数据（JSON格式）',
65	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
66	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
67	    INDEX idx_user_start (user_id, start_time DESC)
68	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='行程记录表';
69	
70	-- 路线方案表（保存用户规划的路线）
71	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS route_plans (
72	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '路线ID',
73	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
74	    name VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '路线名称',
75	    start_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '起点名称',
76	    start_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '起点纬度',
77	    start_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '起点经度',
78	    end_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点名称',
79	    end_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点纬度',
80	    end_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '终点经度',
81	    waypoints TEXT COMMENT '途经点（JSON数组）',
82	    distance INT COMMENT '总距离（米）',
83	    duration INT COMMENT '预计时长（秒）',
84	    strategy TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '策略：0-推荐 1-避免拥堵 2-避免收费 3-高速优先',
85	    polyline TEXT COMMENT '路线坐标串',
86	    steps TEXT COMMENT '导航步骤（JSON）',
87	    is_favorite BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否收藏',
88	    use_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '使用次数',
89	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
90	    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
91	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
92	    INDEX idx_user_favorite (user_id, is_favorite),
93	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC)
94	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='路线方案表';
95	
96	-- 实时位置表（用于位置共享和协同导航）
97	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_locations (
98	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '位置ID',
99	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
100	    latitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '纬度',
101	    longitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '经度',
102	    accuracy DECIMAL(6, 2) COMMENT '精度（米）',
103	    speed DECIMAL(6, 2) COMMENT '速度（km/h）',
104	    heading DECIMAL(5, 2) COMMENT '方向（度）',
105	    location_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'ip' COMMENT '定位类型：gps, network, ip',
106	    is_sharing BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否共享位置',
107	    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
108	    UNIQUE KEY uk_user_id (user_id),
109	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
110	    INDEX idx_sharing (is_sharing, updated_at)
111	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='实时位置表';
112	
113	-- 位置共享关系表
114	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS location_shares (
115	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '共享ID',
116	    sharer_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '分享者ID',
117	    viewer_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '查看者ID',
118	    expire_time TIMESTAMP COMMENT '过期时间',
119	    is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE COMMENT '是否激活',
120	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
121	    FOREIGN KEY (sharer_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
122	    FOREIGN KEY (viewer_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
123	    UNIQUE KEY uk_share_view (sharer_id, viewer_id),
124	    INDEX idx_viewer_active (viewer_id, is_active)
125	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='位置共享关系表';
126	
127	-- 导航反馈表（用于收集用户反馈）
128	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS navigation_feedback (
129	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '反馈ID',
130	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
131	    navigation_id BIGINT COMMENT '导航历史ID',
132	    rating TINYINT COMMENT '评分（1-5）',
133	    feedback_type VARCHAR(20) COMMENT '反馈类型：route-路线 traffic-路况 poi-地点',
134	    content TEXT COMMENT '反馈内容',
135	    location_lat DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '反馈位置纬度',
136	    location_lng DECIMAL(10, 7) COMMENT '反馈位置经度',
137	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
138	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
139	    FOREIGN KEY (navigation_id) REFERENCES navigation_history(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
140	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC),
141	    INDEX idx_type (feedback_type)
142	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='导航反馈表';
143	
144	-- 常用地点统计表（智能推荐）
145	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS frequent_locations (
146	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '统计ID',
147	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
148	    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '地点名称',
149	    address VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '地址',
150	    latitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '纬度',
151	    longitude DECIMAL(10, 7) NOT NULL COMMENT '经度',
152	    visit_count INT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '访问次数',
153	    last_visit TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '最后访问时间',
154	    time_pattern VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '时间规律（如：工作日早上）',
155	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
156	    UNIQUE KEY uk_user_location (user_id, latitude, longitude),
157	    INDEX idx_user_count (user_id, visit_count DESC)
158	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='常用地点统计表';
159	
160	-- 搜索历史表
161	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS search_history (
162	    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '搜索ID',
163	    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
164	    keyword VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '搜索关键词',
165	    result_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '结果数量',
166	    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
167	    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
168	    INDEX idx_user_created (user_id, created_at DESC),
169	    INDEX idx_keyword (keyword)
170	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='搜索历史表';
171
```

```text
0	// 测试导航历史 API
1	const http = require('http');
2	
3	// 先登录获取 token
4	function login() {
5	  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
6	    const postData = JSON.stringify({
7	      phone: '13800138000',
8	      password: '123456'
9	    });
10	
11	    const options = {
12	      hostname: 'localhost',
13	      port: 3000,
14	      path: '/api/v1/auth/login',
15	      method: 'POST',
16	      headers: {
17	        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
18	        'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(postData)
19	      }
20	    };
21	
22	    const req = http.request(options, (res) => {
23	      let data = '';
24	      res.on('data', (chunk) => { data += chunk; });
25	      res.on('end', () => {
26	        try {
27	          const response = JSON.parse(data);
28	          if (response.code === 200 && response.data && response.data.token) {
29	            console.log('✅ 登录成功');
30	            console.log('Token:', response.data.token.substring(0, 20) + '...');
31	            resolve(response.data.token);
32	          } else {
33	            reject(new Error('登录失败: ' + response.message));
34	          }
35	        } catch (err) {
36	          reject(err);
37	        }
38	      });
39	    });
40	
41	    req.on('error', reject);
42	    req.write(postData);
43	    req.end();
44	  });
45	}
46	
47	// 获取导航历史
48	function getHistory(token) {
49	  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
50	    const options = {
51	      hostname: 'localhost',
52	      port: 3000,
53	      path: '/api/v1/navigation/history?page=1&pageSize=20',
54	      method: 'GET',
55	      headers: {
56	        'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`
57	      }
58	    };
59	
60	    console.log('\n📡 请求导航历史...');
61	    console.log('URL:', `http://localhost:3000${options.path}`);
62	
63	    const req = http.request(options, (res) => {
64	      let data = '';
65	      console.log('HTTP状态码:', res.statusCode);
66	      
67	      res.on('data', (chunk) => { data += chunk; });
68	      res.on('end', () => {
69	        console.log('\n📥 响应内容:');
70	        console.log(data);
71	        
72	        try {
73	          const response = JSON.parse(data);
74	          if (response.code === 200) {
75	            console.log('\n✅ 获取成功');
76	            console.log('记录数:', response.data.list.length);
77	          } else {
78	            console.log('\n❌ 获取失败');
79	            console.log('错误码:', response.code);
80	            console.log('错误信息:', response.message);
81	          }
82	          resolve(response);
83	        } catch (err) {
84	          console.error('\n❌ 解析响应失败:', err.message);
85	          reject(err);
86	        }
87	      });
88	    });
89	
90	    req.on('error', (err) => {
91	      console.error('\n❌ 请求失败:', err.message);
92	      reject(err);
93	    });
94	
95	    req.end();
96	  });
97	}
98	
99	// 执行测试

102	    const token = await login();
103	    await getHistory(token);

106	  }
107	}
108	
109	test();
```

```text
0	/**
1	 * 认证服务 - 管理用户认证、注册、登录和登出
2	 */
3	import preferences from '@ohos.data.preferences';
4	import { HttpService } from './HttpService';
5	import { 
6	  ApiResponse, 
7	  UserInfo, 
8	  RegisterRequest, 
9	  LoginRequest, 
10	  UpdateProfileRequest 
11	} from '../models/BackendModels';
12	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
13	
14	/**
15	 * 认证服务类
16	 */
17	export class AuthService {
18	  private static instance: AuthService;
19	  private httpService: HttpService;
20	  private currentUser: UserInfo | null = null;
21	  private preferencesInstance: preferences.Preferences | null = null;
22	  private readonly PREFERENCES_NAME = 'app_auth';
23	  
24	  private constructor() {
25	    this.httpService = HttpService.getInstance();
26	    this.initPreferences();
27	  }
28	  
29	  static getInstance(): AuthService {
30	    if (!AuthService.instance) {
31	      AuthService.instance = new AuthService();
32	    }
33	    return AuthService.instance;
34	  }
35	  
36	  /**
37	   * 初始化Preferences
38	   */
39	  private async initPreferences(): Promise<void> {
40	    try {
41	      const context = getContext();
42	      this.preferencesInstance = await preferences.getPreferences(context, this.PREFERENCES_NAME);
43	      await this.loadUserInfo();
44	      console.log('[AuthService] Preferences初始化成功');
45	    } catch (err) {
46	      console.error('[AuthService] Preferences初始化失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
47	    }
48	  }
49	
50	  /**
51	   * 用户注册
52	   */
53	  async register(phone: string, password: string, nickname?: string): Promise<ApiResponse<UserInfo>> {
54	    try {
55	      console.log('[AuthService] 注册用户:', phone);
56	      
57	      // 只包含有值的字段
58	      const requestData: RegisterRequest = { phone, password };
59	      if (nickname && nickname.trim() !== '') {
60	        requestData.nickname = nickname;
61	      }
62	      
63	      const response = await this.httpService.post<UserInfo>(
64	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_REGISTER,
65	        requestData,
66	        false  // 注册不需要认证
67	      );
68	      
69	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
70	        // 保存token和用户信息
71	        if (response.data.token) {
72	          await this.httpService.setToken(response.data.token);
73	          await this.saveUserInfo(response.data);
74	          this.currentUser = response.data;
75	        }
76	      }
77	      
78	      return response;
79	    } catch (err) {
80	      console.error('[AuthService] 注册失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
81	      return err as ApiResponse<UserInfo>;
82	    }
83	  }
84	  
85	  /**
86	   * 用户登录
87	   */
88	  async login(phone: string, password: string): Promise<ApiResponse<UserInfo>> {
89	    try {
90	      console.log('[AuthService] 用户登录:', phone);
91	      
92	      const requestData: LoginRequest = { phone, password };
93	      
94	      const response = await this.httpService.post<UserInfo>(
95	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_LOGIN,
96	        requestData,
97	        false  // 登录不需要认证
98	      );
99	      
100	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
101	        // 保存token和用户信息
102	        if (response.data.token) {
103	          await this.httpService.setToken(response.data.token);
104	          await this.saveUserInfo(response.data);
105	          this.currentUser = response.data;
106	        }
107	      }
108	      
109	      return response;
110	    } catch (err) {
111	      console.error('[AuthService] 登录失败:', err);
112	      return err as ApiResponse<UserInfo>;
113	    }
114	  }
115	  
116	  /**
117	   * 获取用户信息
118	   */
119	  async getProfile(): Promise<ApiResponse<UserInfo>> {
120	    try {
121	      console.log('[AuthService] 获取用户信息');
122	      
123	      const response = await this.httpService.get<UserInfo>(
124	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_PROFILE,
125	        true  // 需要认证
126	      );
127	      
128	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
129	        await this.saveUserInfo(response.data);
130	        this.currentUser = response.data;
131	      }
132	      
133	      return response;
134	    } catch (err) {
135	      console.error('[AuthService] 获取用户信息失败:', err);
136	      return err as ApiResponse<UserInfo>;
137	    }
138	  }
139	  
140	  /**
141	   * 更新用户信息
142	   */
143	  async updateProfile(nickname?: string, avatar?: string): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
144	    try {
145	      console.log('[AuthService] 更新用户信息');
146	      
147	      // 只包含有值的字段
148	      const requestData: UpdateProfileRequest = {};
149	      if (nickname && nickname.trim() !== '') {
150	        requestData.nickname = nickname;
151	      }
152	      if (avatar && avatar.trim() !== '') {
153	        requestData.avatar = avatar;
154	      }
155	      
156	      const response = await this.httpService.put<void>(
157	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_PROFILE,
158	        requestData,
159	        true  // 需要认证
160	      );
161	      
162	      if (response.code === 200) {
163	        // 更新本地用户信息
164	        if (this.currentUser) {
165	          if (nickname) this.currentUser.nickname = nickname;
166	          if (avatar) this.currentUser.avatar = avatar;
167	          await this.saveUserInfo(this.currentUser);
168	        }
169	      }
170	      
171	      return response;
172	    } catch (err) {
173	      console.error('[AuthService] 更新用户信息失败:', err);
174	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
175	    }
176	  }
177	  
178	  /**
179	   * 登出
180	   */
181	  async logout(): Promise<void> {
182	    try {
183	      console.log('[AuthService] 用户登出');
184	      
185	      // 清除token
186	      await this.httpService.clearToken();
187	      
188	      // 清除用户信息
189	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
190	        await this.preferencesInstance.delete(ApiConfig.USER_KEY);
191	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
192	      }
193	      
194	      this.currentUser = null;
195	      console.log('[AuthService] 登出成功');
196	    } catch (err) {
197	      console.error('[AuthService] 登出失败:', err);
198	    }
199	  }
200	  
201	  /**
202	   * 检查登录状态
203	   */
204	  async isLoggedIn(): Promise<boolean> {
205	    const token = this.httpService.getToken();
206	    return token !== '' && token !== null && token !== undefined;
207	  }
208	  
209	  /**
210	   * 获取当前用户
211	   */
212	  async getCurrentUser(): Promise<UserInfo | null> {
213	    if (this.currentUser) {
214	      return this.currentUser;
215	    }
216	    
217	    // 尝试从本地存储加载
218	    await this.loadUserInfo();
219	    return this.currentUser;
220	  }
221	  
222	  /**
223	   * 保存用户信息到Preferences
224	   */
225	  private async saveUserInfo(userInfo: UserInfo): Promise<void> {
226	    try {
227	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
228	        await this.preferencesInstance.put(ApiConfig.USER_KEY, JSON.stringify(userInfo));
229	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
230	        console.log('[AuthService] 用户信息已保存');
231	      }
232	    } catch (err) {
233	      console.error('[AuthService] 保存用户信息失败:', err);
234	    }
235	  }
236	  
237	  /**
238	   * 从Preferences加载用户信息
239	   */
240	  private async loadUserInfo(): Promise<void> {
241	    try {
242	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
243	        const userInfoStr = await this.preferencesInstance.get(ApiConfig.USER_KEY, '');
244	        if (userInfoStr && userInfoStr !== '') {
245	          this.currentUser = JSON.parse(userInfoStr as string) as UserInfo;
246	          console.log('[AuthService] 用户信息已加载');
247	        }
248	      }
249	    } catch (err) {
250	      console.error('[AuthService] 加载用户信息失败:', err);
251	    }
252	  }
253	}
254
```
</details></tool-use>

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a1421640/entry/src/main/ets/services/FavoriteService.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * 收藏服务 - 管理用户收藏的地点
2	 */
3	import { HttpService } from './HttpService';
4	import { CacheService } from './CacheService';
5	import { ApiResponse, FavoritePlace } from '../models/BackendModels';
6	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
7	
8	/**
9	 * 收藏服务类
10	 */
11	export class FavoriteService {
12	  private static instance: FavoriteService;
13	  private httpService: HttpService;
14	  private cacheService: CacheService;
15	  private readonly CACHE_KEY = 'favorites_cache';
16	  
17	  private constructor() {
18	    this.httpService = HttpService.getInstance();
19	    this.cacheService = CacheService.getInstance();
20	  }
21	  
22	  static getInstance(): FavoriteService {
23	    if (!FavoriteService.instance) {
24	      FavoriteService.instance = new FavoriteService();
25	    }
26	    return FavoriteService.instance;
27	  }
28	  
29	  /**
30	   * 获取收藏列表
31	   */
32	  async getFavorites(category?: string): Promise<ApiResponse<FavoritePlace[]>> {
33	    try {
34	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 获取收藏列表, category:', category);
35	      
36	      // 检查是否登录
37	      const token = this.httpService.getToken();
38	      if (!token) {
39	        return {
40	          code: 401,
41	          message: '需要登录'
42	        };
43	      }
44	      
45	      // 构建URL
46	      let url = ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FAVORITES;
47	      if (category) {
48	        url += `?category=${category}`;
49	      }
50	      
51	      const response = await this.httpService.get<FavoritePlace[]>(url, true);
52	      
53	      // 成功时缓存数据
54	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
55	        await this.cacheFavorites(response.data);
56	      }
57	      
58	      return response;
59	    } catch (err) {
60	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 获取收藏列表失败:', err);
61	      
62	      // 网络失败时尝试从缓存读取
63	      const cachedData = await this.getCachedFavorites();
64	      if (cachedData && cachedData.length > 0) {
65	        console.log('[FavoriteService] 使用缓存数据');
66	        return {
67	          code: 200,
68	          message: '从缓存加载',
69	          data: cachedData
70	        };
71	      }
72	      
73	      return err as ApiResponse<FavoritePlace[]>;
74	    }
75	  }
76	  
77	  /**
78	   * 添加收藏
79	   */
80	  async addFavorite(place: Partial<FavoritePlace>): Promise<ApiResponse<FavoritePlace>> {
81	    try {
82	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 添加收藏:', place.name);
83	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 完整数据:', JSON.stringify(place));
84	      
85	      // 检查是否登录
86	      const token = this.httpService.getToken();
87	      console.log('[FavoriteService] Token存在:', !!token);
88	      if (!token) {
89	        return {
90	          code: 401,
91	          message: '需要登录'
92	        };
93	      }
94	      
95	      const response = await this.httpService.post<FavoritePlace>(
96	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FAVORITES,
97	        place,
98	        true
99	      );
100	      
101	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 响应代码:', response.code);
102	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 响应消息:', response.message);
103	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 完整响应:', JSON.stringify(response));
104	      
105	      // 成功时清除缓存，下次重新加载
106	      if (response.code === 200) {
107	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
108	      }
109	      
110	      return response;
111	    } catch (err) {
112	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 添加收藏失败 - 错误类型:', typeof err);
113	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 添加收藏失败 - 详情:', JSON.stringify(err));
114	      return err as ApiResponse<FavoritePlace>;
115	    }
116	  }
117	  
118	  /**
119	   * 更新收藏
120	   */
121	  async updateFavorite(id: number, updates: Partial<FavoritePlace>): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
122	    try {
123	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 更新收藏:', id);
124	      
125	      // 检查是否登录
126	      const token = this.httpService.getToken();
127	      if (!token) {
128	        return {
129	          code: 401,
130	          message: '需要登录'
131	        };
132	      }
133	      
134	      const response = await this.httpService.put<void>(
135	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FAVORITE_DETAIL(id),
136	        updates,
137	        true
138	      );
139	      
140	      // 成功时清除缓存
141	      if (response.code === 200) {
142	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
143	      }
144	      
145	      return response;
146	    } catch (err) {
147	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 更新收藏失败:', err);
148	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
149	    }
150	  }
151	  
152	  /**
153	   * 删除收藏
154	   */
155	  async deleteFavorite(id: number): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
156	    try {
157	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 删除收藏:', id);
158	      
159	      // 检查是否登录
160	      const token = this.httpService.getToken();
161	      if (!token) {
162	        return {
163	          code: 401,
164	          message: '需要登录'
165	        };
166	      }
167	      
168	      const response = await this.httpService.delete<void>(
169	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FAVORITE_DETAIL(id),
170	        true
171	      );
172	      
173	      // 成功时清除缓存
174	      if (response.code === 200) {
175	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
176	      }
177	      
178	      return response;
179	    } catch (err) {
180	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 删除收藏失败:', err);
181	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
182	    }
183	  }
184	  
185	  /**
186	   * 搜索收藏
187	   */
188	  async searchFavorites(keyword: string): Promise<FavoritePlace[]> {
189	    try {
190	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 搜索收藏:', keyword);
191	      
192	      // 先获取所有收藏
193	      const response = await this.getFavorites();
194	      
195	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
196	        // 按名称搜索（不区分大小写）
197	        const lowerKeyword = keyword.toLowerCase();
198	        return response.data.filter(place => 
199	          place.name.toLowerCase().includes(lowerKeyword)
200	        );
201	      }
202	      
203	      return [];
204	    } catch (err) {
205	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 搜索收藏失败:', err);
206	      return [];
207	    }
208	  }
209	  
210	  /**
211	   * 从缓存获取收藏列表
212	   */
213	  private async getCachedFavorites(): Promise<FavoritePlace[]> {
214	    try {
215	      const cached = await this.cacheService.get<FavoritePlace[]>(this.CACHE_KEY);
216	      return cached || [];
217	    } catch (err) {
218	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 读取缓存失败:', err);
219	      return [];
220	    }
221	  }
222	  
223	  /**
224	   * 缓存收藏列表
225	   */
226	  private async cacheFavorites(favorites: FavoritePlace[]): Promise<void> {
227	    try {
228	      await this.cacheService.set(
229	        this.CACHE_KEY,
230	        favorites,
231	        ApiConfig.CACHE_EXPIRE_TIME.FAVORITES
232	      );
233	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 收藏列表已缓存');
234	    } catch (err) {
235	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 缓存收藏列表失败:', err);
236	    }
237	  }
238	}
239
```

```text
0	/**
1	 * 导航历史服务 - 管理导航历史记录
2	 */
3	import { HttpService } from './HttpService';
4	import { CacheService } from './CacheService';
5	import { ApiResponse, NavigationHistory, PageResponse } from '../models/BackendModels';
6	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
7	
8	/**
9	 * 导航历史服务类
10	 */
11	export class NavigationHistoryService {
12	  private static instance: NavigationHistoryService;
13	  private httpService: HttpService;
14	  private cacheService: CacheService;
15	  private readonly CACHE_KEY = 'history_cache';
16	  
17	  private constructor() {
18	    this.httpService = HttpService.getInstance();
19	    this.cacheService = CacheService.getInstance();
20	  }
21	  
22	  static getInstance(): NavigationHistoryService {
23	    if (!NavigationHistoryService.instance) {
24	      NavigationHistoryService.instance = new NavigationHistoryService();
25	    }
26	    return NavigationHistoryService.instance;
27	  }
28	  
29	  /**
30	   * 获取历史记录（支持分页）
31	   */
32	  async getHistory(page: number = 1, pageSize: number = 50): Promise<ApiResponse<PageResponse<NavigationHistory>>> {
33	    try {
34	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 获取历史记录, page:', page, 'pageSize:', pageSize);
35	      
36	      const url = `${ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY}?page=${page}&pageSize=${pageSize}`;
37	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 请求URL:', ApiConfig.BASE_URL + url);
38	      
39	      const response = await this.httpService.get<PageResponse<NavigationHistory>>(url, true);
40	      
41	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 响应状态码:', response.code);
42	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 响应消息:', response.message);
43	      
44	      // 成功时缓存数据（只缓存第一页的最近50条）
45	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data && page === 1) {
46	        await this.cacheHistory(response.data.list);
47	      }
48	      
49	      return response;
50	    } catch (err) {
51	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 获取历史记录失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
52	      
53	      // 网络失败时尝试从缓存读取
54	      if (page === 1) {
55	        const cachedData = await this.getCachedHistory();
56	        if (cachedData && cachedData.length > 0) {
57	          console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 使用缓存数据');
58	          return {
59	            code: 200,
60	            message: '从缓存加载',
61	            data: {
62	              list: cachedData,
63	              total: cachedData.length,
64	              page: 1,
65	              pageSize: cachedData.length
66	            }
67	          };
68	        }
69	      }
70	      
71	      return err as ApiResponse<PageResponse<NavigationHistory>>;
72	    }
73	  }
74	  
75	  /**
76	   * 保存导航记录
77	   */
78	  async saveHistory(record: Partial<NavigationHistory>): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
79	    try {
80	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 保存导航记录');
81	      
82	      // 验证必需字段
83	      if (!record.endName || !record.endAddress || 
84	          record.endLat === undefined || record.endLng === undefined) {
85	        console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 缺少必需字段');
86	        return {
87	          code: 400,
88	          message: '缺少必需字段：endName, endAddress, endLat, endLng'
89	        };
90	      }
91	      
92	      const response = await this.httpService.post<void>(
93	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY,
94	        record,
95	        true
96	      );
97	      
98	      // 成功时清除缓存
99	      if (response.code === 200) {
100	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
101	      }
102	      
103	      return response;
104	    } catch (err) {
105	      // 静默失败 - 不抛出异常，不阻塞导航功能
106	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 保存导航记录失败（静默）:', err);
107	      return {
108	        code: -1,
109	        message: '保存失败（已静默处理）'
110	      };
111	    }
112	  }
113	  
114	  /**
115	   * 删除历史记录
116	   */
117	  async deleteHistory(id: number): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
118	    try {
119	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 删除历史记录:', id);
120	      
121	      const response = await this.httpService.delete<void>(
122	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY_DETAIL(id),
123	        true
124	      );
125	      
126	      // 成功时清除缓存
127	      if (response.code === 200) {
128	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
129	      }
130	      
131	      return response;
132	    } catch (err) {
133	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 删除历史记录失败:', err);
134	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
135	    }
136	  }
137	  
138	  /**
139	   * 清空历史记录
140	   */
141	  async clearHistory(): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
142	    try {
143	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 清空历史记录');
144	      
145	      const response = await this.httpService.delete<void>(
146	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY,
147	        true
148	      );
149	      
150	      // 成功时清除缓存
151	      if (response.code === 200) {
152	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
153	      }
154	      
155	      return response;
156	    } catch (err) {
157	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 清空历史记录失败:', err);
158	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
159	    }
160	  }
161	  
162	  /**
163	   * 按日期范围筛选历史记录
164	   */
165	  async getHistoryByDateRange(startDate: string, endDate: string): Promise<ApiResponse<NavigationHistory[]>> {
166	    try {
167	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 按日期筛选:', startDate, '-', endDate);
168	      
169	      const url = `${ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY}?startDate=${startDate}&endDate=${endDate}`;
170	      const response = await this.httpService.get<NavigationHistory[]>(url, true);
171	      
172	      return response;
173	    } catch (err) {
174	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 按日期筛选失败:', err);
175	      return err as ApiResponse<NavigationHistory[]>;
176	    }
177	  }
178	  
179	  /**
180	   * 从缓存获取历史记录
181	   */
182	  private async getCachedHistory(): Promise<NavigationHistory[]> {
183	    try {
184	      const cached = await this.cacheService.get<NavigationHistory[]>(this.CACHE_KEY);
185	      return cached || [];
186	    } catch (err) {
187	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 读取缓存失败:', err);
188	      return [];
189	    }
190	  }
191	  
192	  /**
193	   * 缓存历史记录（最近50条）
194	   */
195	  private async cacheHistory(history: NavigationHistory[]): Promise<void> {
196	    try {
197	      // 只缓存最近50条
198	      const toCache = history.slice(0, 50);
199	      await this.cacheService.set(
200	        this.CACHE_KEY,
201	        toCache,
202	        ApiConfig.CACHE_EXPIRE_TIME.HISTORY
203	      );
204	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 历史记录已缓存');
205	    } catch (err) {
206	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 缓存历史记录失败:', err);
207	    }
208	  }
209	}
210
```
</details></tool-use>

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a1421640/backend/src/controllers/navigationController.ts`

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface NavigationHistory {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  start_name?: string;
7	  start_address?: string;
8	  start_lat?: number;
9	  start_lng?: number;
10	  end_name: string;
11	  end_address: string;
12	  end_lat: number;
13	  end_lng: number;
14	  distance?: number;
15	  duration?: number;
16	  created_at: string;
17	}
18	
19	/**
20	 * 获取导航历史
21	 */
22	export async function getNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
23	  try {
24	    const userId = req.userId;
25	    const { page = 1, pageSize = 20 } = req.query;
26	    
27	    const pageNum = Number(page);
28	    const pageSizeNum = Number(pageSize);
29	    const offset = (pageNum - 1) * pageSizeNum;
30	    
31	    // 获取总数
32	    const countResult = await query<any[]>(
33	      'SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ?',
34	      [userId]
35	    );
36	    const total = countResult[0].total;
37	    
38	    // 获取列表（注意：MySQL prepared statements 不支持 LIMIT/OFFSET 占位符）
39	    const history = await query<NavigationHistory[]>(
40	      `SELECT * FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ${pageSizeNum} OFFSET ${offset}`,
41	      [userId]
42	    );
43	    
44	    // 转换字段名：下划线转驼峰
45	    const formattedHistory = history.map(item => ({
46	      id: item.id,
47	      userId: item.user_id,
48	      startName: item.start_name,
49	      startAddress: item.start_address,
50	      startLat: item.start_lat,
51	      startLng: item.start_lng,
52	      endName: item.end_name,
53	      endAddress: item.end_address,
54	      endLat: item.end_lat,
55	      endLng: item.end_lng,
56	      distance: item.distance,
57	      duration: item.duration,
58	      createdAt: item.created_at
59	    }));
60	    
61	    res.json({
62	      code: 200,
63	      message: '获取成功',
64	      data: {
65	        list: formattedHistory,
66	        total,
67	        page: pageNum,
68	        pageSize: pageSizeNum
69	      }
70	    });
71	  } catch (error) {
72	    console.error('[navigationController] Get navigation history error:', error);
73	    res.status(500).json({
74	      code: 500,
75	      message: '服务器错误'
76	    });
77	  }
78	}
79	
80	/**
81	 * 保存导航记录
82	 */
83	export async function saveNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
84	  try {
85	    const userId = req.userId;
86	    const {
87	      startName,
88	      startAddress,
89	      startLat,
90	      startLng,
91	      endName,
92	      endAddress,
93	      endLat,
94	      endLng,
95	      distance,
96	      duration
97	    } = req.body;
98	    
99	    // 验证参数
100	    if (!endName || !endAddress || !endLat || !endLng) {
101	      return res.status(400).json({
102	        code: 400,
103	        message: '缺少必要参数'
104	      });
105	    }
106	    
107	    const result: any = await query(
108	      `INSERT INTO navigation_history 
109	       (user_id, start_name, start_address, start_lat, start_lng, end_name, end_address, end_lat, end_lng, distance, duration) 
110	       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
111	      [userId, startName, startAddress, startLat, startLng, endName, endAddress, endLat, endLng, distance, duration]
112	    );
113	    
114	    res.status(201).json({
115	      code: 200,
116	      message: '保存成功',
117	      data: {
118	        id: result.insertId
119	      }
120	    });
121	  } catch (error) {
122	    console.error('Save navigation history error:', error);
123	    res.status(500).json({
124	      code: 500,
125	      message: '服务器错误'
126	    });
127	  }
128	}
129	
130	/**
131	 * 删除导航历史
132	 */
133	export async function deleteNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
134	  try {
135	    const userId = req.userId;
136	    const { id } = req.params;
137	    
138	    const result: any = await query(
139	      'DELETE FROM navigation_history WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
140	      [id, userId]
141	    );
142	    
143	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
144	      return res.status(404).json({
145	        code: 404,
146	        message: '记录不存在'
147	      });
148	    }
149	    
150	    res.json({
151	      code: 200,
152	      message: '删除成功'
153	    });
154	  } catch (error) {
155	    console.error('Delete navigation history error:', error);
156	    res.status(500).json({
157	      code: 500,
158	      message: '服务器错误'
159	    });
160	  }
161	}
162	
163	/**
164	 * 清空导航历史
165	 */
166	export async function clearNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
167	  try {
168	    const userId = req.userId;
169	    
170	    await query(
171	      'DELETE FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ?',
172	      [userId]
173	    );
174	    
175	    res.json({
176	      code: 200,
177	      message: '清空成功'
178	    });
179	  } catch (error) {
180	    console.error('Clear navigation history error:', error);
181	    res.status(500).json({
182	      code: 500,
183	      message: '服务器错误'
184	    });
185	  }
186	}
187
```

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a1421640/backend/src/controllers/favoriteController.ts`

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface Favorite {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  name: string;
7	  address: string;
8	  latitude: number;
9	  longitude: number;
10	  category: string;
11	  icon?: string;
12	  created_at: string;
13	}
14	
15	/**
16	 * 获取收藏列表
17	 */
18	export async function getFavorites(req: Request, res: Response) {
19	  try {
20	    const userId = req.userId;
21	    const { category } = req.query;
22	    
23	    let sql = 'SELECT * FROM favorites WHERE user_id = ?';
24	    const params: any[] = [userId];
25	    
26	    if (category) {
27	      sql += ' AND category = ?';
28	      params.push(category);
29	    }
30	    
31	    sql += ' ORDER BY created_at DESC';
32	    
33	    const favorites = await query<Favorite[]>(sql, params);
34	    
35	    res.json({
36	      code: 200,
37	      message: '获取成功',
38	      data: favorites
39	    });
40	  } catch (error) {
41	    console.error('Get favorites error:', error);
42	    res.status(500).json({
43	      code: 500,
44	      message: '服务器错误'
45	    });
46	  }
47	}
48	
49	/**
50	 * 添加收藏
51	 */
52	export async function addFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
53	  try {
54	    console.log('=== 收藏请求开始 ===');
55	    console.log('userId:', req.userId);
56	    console.log('请求体:', JSON.stringify(req.body));
57	    
58	    const userId = req.userId;
59	    const { name, address, latitude, longitude, category, icon } = req.body;
60	    
61	    // 验证userId
62	    if (!userId) {
63	      console.error('❌ userId未定义');
64	      return res.status(401).json({
65	        code: 401,
66	        message: '用户未认证'
67	      });
68	    }
69	    
70	    // 验证参数
71	    if (!name || !address || !latitude || !longitude) {
72	      console.error('❌ 缺少必要参数:', { name, address, latitude, longitude });
73	      return res.status(400).json({
74	        code: 400,
75	        message: '缺少必要参数'
76	      });
77	    }
78	    
79	    console.log('✅ 参数验证通过');
80	    
81	    // 检查是否已收藏
82	    console.log('检查是否已收藏...');
83	    const existing = await query<Favorite[]>(
84	      'SELECT id FROM favorites WHERE user_id = ? AND latitude = ? AND longitude = ?',
85	      [userId, latitude, longitude]
86	    );
87	    
88	    if (existing.length > 0) {
89	      console.log('⚠️ 该地点已收藏');
90	      return res.status(400).json({
91	        code: 400,
92	        message: '该地点已收藏'
93	      });
94	    }
95	    
96	    console.log('插入收藏记录...');
97	    const result: any = await query(
98	      'INSERT INTO favorites (user_id, name, address, latitude, longitude, category, icon) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)',
99	      [userId, name, address, latitude, longitude, category || 'custom', icon || null]
100	    );
101	    
102	    console.log('✅ 收藏成功, insertId:', result.insertId);
103	    console.log('=== 收藏请求结束 ===');
104	    
105	    res.status(201).json({
106	      code: 200,
107	      message: '收藏成功',
108	      data: {
109	        id: result.insertId
110	      }
111	    });
112	  } catch (error) {
113	    console.error('❌ Add favorite error:', error);
114	    console.error('错误堆栈:', error instanceof Error ? error.stack : 'No stack trace');
115	    res.status(500).json({
116	      code: 500,
117	      message: '服务器错误: ' + (error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error))
118	    });
119	  }
120	}
121	
122	/**
123	 * 更新收藏
124	 */
125	export async function updateFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
126	  try {
127	    const userId = req.userId;
128	    const { id } = req.params;
129	    const { name, address, category, icon } = req.body;
130	    
131	    // 验证权限
132	    const favorites = await query<Favorite[]>(
133	      'SELECT id FROM favorites WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
134	      [id, userId]
135	    );
136	    
137	    if (favorites.length === 0) {
138	      return res.status(404).json({
139	        code: 404,
140	        message: '收藏不存在'
141	      });
142	    }
143	    
144	    const updates: string[] = [];
145	    const params: any[] = [];
146	    
147	    if (name) {
148	      updates.push('name = ?');
149	      params.push(name);
150	    }
151	    if (address) {
152	      updates.push('address = ?');
153	      params.push(address);
154	    }
155	    if (category) {
156	      updates.push('category = ?');
157	      params.push(category);
158	    }
159	    if (icon) {
160	      updates.push('icon = ?');
161	      params.push(icon);
162	    }
163	    
164	    if (updates.length === 0) {
165	      return res.status(400).json({
166	        code: 400,
167	        message: '没有要更新的内容'
168	      });
169	    }
170	    
171	    params.push(id, userId);
172	    
173	    await query(
174	      `UPDATE favorites SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`,
175	      params
176	    );
177	    
178	    res.json({
179	      code: 200,
180	      message: '更新成功'
181	    });
182	  } catch (error) {
183	    console.error('Update favorite error:', error);
184	    res.status(500).json({
185	      code: 500,
186	      message: '服务器错误'
187	    });
188	  }
189	}
190	
191	/**
192	 * 删除收藏
193	 */
194	export async function deleteFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
195	  try {
196	    const userId = req.userId;
197	    const { id } = req.params;
198	    
199	    const result: any = await query(
200	      'DELETE FROM favorites WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
201	      [id, userId]
202	    );
203	    
204	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
205	      return res.status(404).json({
206	        code: 404,
207	        message: '收藏不存在'
208	      });
209	    }
210	    
211	    res.json({
212	      code: 200,
213	      message: '删除成功'
214	    });
215	  } catch (error) {
216	    console.error('Delete favorite error:', error);
217	    res.status(500).json({
218	      code: 500,
219	      message: '服务器错误'
220	    });
221	  }
222	}
223
```
</details></tool-use>

152	- 修改BASE_URL为电脑的实际IP地址

160	```typescript
161	static readonly BASE_URL = 'http://[你的实际IP]:3000/api/v1';
162	```
163	3. 重新编译运行

收到，以下是基于现有仓库的只读补全版“今日交付路径分析”。我未修改任何文件。

## 1) 前后端最小运行命令链

### A. 首次启动（最小闭环）
```bash
# 1) 初始化数据库（项目根目录执行）
mysql -u root -p < backend/src/database/init.sql

# 2) 启动后端（backend目录）
cp .env.example .env   # Windows 可用 copy .env.example .env
# 修改 .env 中 DB_PASSWORD / JWT_SECRET 等
npm install
npm run dev
```

前端：
- 用 DevEco Studio 打开项目根目录
- 选择模拟器/真机
- 点击 Run（或 Shift+F10）

### B. 当天重复验证（依赖已安装）
```bash
# backend目录
npm run dev
```
前端同上直接 Run。

### 关键注意
- 后端文档默认 Base URL 是 `http://localhost:3000/api/v1`
- 前端当前代码里 `ApiConfig.BASE_URL` 是 `http://192.168.6.191:3000/api/v1`，当天联调前需确认该 IP 是否是你电脑当前局域网地址（否则登录/接口会超时）。

---

## 2) 今日可执行验证清单（启动、关键功能、关键API）

## A. 启动验证
- [ ] MySQL 可连接，`car_navigation` 库和表创建成功
- [ ] 后端 `npm run dev` 成功启动
- [ ] `GET http://localhost:3000/health` 返回 `status=ok`
- [ ] DevEco 成功编译安装并打开首页

## B. 关键功能验证（前端）
- [ ] 用户注册/登录流程可走通（手机号+密码）
- [ ] “我的-收藏地点”可新增/查看/删除
- [ ] “我的-导航历史”可查看、删除、清空
- [ ] 主界面模块切换正常（车况/导航/娱乐/协同/我的）
- [ ] 导航页可进行目的地输入和导航流程触发

## C. 关键API验证（建议今日最小集）
先登录取 token，再测受保护接口：
1. `POST /api/v1/auth/login`
2. `GET /api/v1/auth/profile`（Bearer token）
3. `GET /api/v1/favorites`
4. `POST /api/v1/favorites`
5. `GET /api/v1/navigation/history`
6. `POST /api/v1/navigation/history`
7. 可选扩展：`/routes`、`/location`、`/feedback`、`/frequent-locations`

验收口径：
- 成功接口返回 `code: 200`
- 未登录访问受保护接口返回 401（符合预期）

---

## 3) 提交毕业设计源码：建议保留/排除目录

## 建议保留
- `entry/src`（前端源码）
- `backend/src`（后端源码）
- `backend/src/database/init.sql`（数据库初始化）
- `backend/package.json`、`backend/package-lock.json`、`backend/tsconfig.json`
- 根目录配置：`build-profile.json5`、`hvigorfile.ts`、`oh-package*.json5`
- 文档：`README.md`、`backend/API_DOCUMENTATION.md`、`backend/DATABASE_DESIGN.md`、`BUILD_CHECKLIST.md`

## 建议排除
- 依赖与构建产物  
  - `backend/node_modules/`
  - `backend/dist/`
  - `oh_modules/`
  - `**/build/`
  - `.hvigor/`
  - `.preview/`
  - `.test/`
- 敏感与环境文件  
  - `backend/.env`（不要提交）
- IDE/工具元数据（按需排除）

---

## 4) 今日完成定义 DoD（Definition of Done）

满足以下全部条件才算“今日完成”：

1. **可运行**
   - 后端可启动，`/health` 正常
   - 前端可在 DevEco 编译、安装、启动

2. **可联调**
   - 前端 BASE_URL 与当天后端地址一致
   - 登录后可访问受保护接口（profile/favorites/history）

3. **关键业务闭环**
   - 注册/登录闭环通过
   - 收藏增查删至少完成一轮
   - 导航历史写入+读取至少完成一轮

4. **关键API可验收**
   - 上述“最小集 API”全部有成功返回（或预期401）

5. **可提交**
   - 提交包中不含 `node_modules`、`dist`、`.env`、IDE缓存目录
   - 保留完整源码、初始化SQL、接口文档、运行文档

```text
说明：行号使用工具返回值（从 0 开始）。

## 1) 登录/注册/收藏/历史/导航/个人中心闭环判定

结论：**主链路“基本可跑通”，但不是完全闭环，存在 3 个会在演示中直接暴露的断点。**

### 已形成的主流程
- 应用启动到首页：`EntryAbility -> pages/Index`
  - `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/entryability/EntryAbility.ets:24`
- 首页进入个人中心：
  - `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/pages/Index.ets:263`
- 个人中心进入登录/注册：
  - `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/pages/UserCenterPage.ets:101`
  - `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/pages/UserCenterPage.ets:110`
- 登录/注册成功回首页：
  - `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/pages/LoginPage.ets:133`
  - `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/pages/RegisterPage.ets:192`
- 个人中心进入收藏/历史：
  - `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/pages/UserCenterPage.ets:123`
  - `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/pages/UserCenterPage.ets:130`
- 收藏/历史回传目的地到 Index，再触发导航：
  - 收藏回传：`FavoritesPage -> router.back(...destination...)`
    - `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/pages/FavoritesPage.ets:195-200`
  - 历史回传：`HistoryPage -> router.back(...navigationDestination...)`
    - `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/pages/HistoryPage.ets:269-277`
  - Index 接收并切到导航 Tab：
    - `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/pages/Index.ets:127-160`
    - `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/pages/Index.ets:209-211`

### 闭环断点（会影响“今天可演示”）
1. 未登录用户可进收藏/历史，但页面只报错重试，没有登录引导（演示会卡死在错误页体验）。  
2. 外部目的地触发导航时不写历史（“收藏->导航->历史可见”闭环缺口）。  
3. token 初始化存在竞态，冷启动可能误判未登录（演示时状态飘忽）。

---

## 2) 页面与 service 调用映射（前端）

### 页面 -> Service（直接调用）
- `LoginPage` -> `AuthService.login`
  - 证据：`.../pages/LoginPage.ets:3,15,128`
- `RegisterPage` -> `AuthService.register`
  - 证据：`.../pages/RegisterPage.ets:3,16,183`
- `UserCenterPage` -> `AuthService.isLoggedIn/getCurrentUser/logout`
  - 证据：`.../pages/UserCenterPage.ets:4,10,15,17,22`
- `FavoritesPage` -> `FavoriteService.getFavorites/deleteFavorite`
  - 证据：`.../pages/FavoritesPage.ets:3,15,170,228`
- `HistoryPage` -> `NavigationHistoryService.getHistory/clearHistory`
  - 证据：`.../pages/HistoryPage.ets:3,17,222,250,305`
- `TestMenuPage` -> `AuthService.isLoggedIn/getCurrentUser/logout`
  - 证据：`.../pages/TestMenuPage.ets:4,9,15,17,44`
- `Index` -> 无直接 service 调用；通过 `EnhancedNavigationModule` 间接调用
  - 证据：`.../pages/Index.ets:0,209-211`

### 视图模块 -> Service（间接核心调用）
- `EnhancedNavigationModule` -> `MapService`, `NavigationService`, `VoiceGuideService`, `FavoriteService`, `NavigationHistoryService`, `AuthService`
  - 证据：`.../view/EnhancedNavigationModule.ets:7-12,46-52`
  - 关键调用：`startNavigation` `addToFavorites` `getHistory` `saveHistory`
  - 证据：`.../view/EnhancedNavigationModule.ets:213,298,355,378`

### Service -> 后端接口（用于演示接口链路）
- `AuthService` -> `/auth/register`, `/auth/login`, `/auth/profile`
  - 前端端点：`.../config/ApiConfig.ets:61-64`
  - 后端路由：`/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/backend/src/routes/index.ts:13-18`
- `FavoriteService` -> `/favorites`, `/favorites/:id`
  - 前端端点：`.../config/ApiConfig.ets:66-68`
  - 后端路由：`.../backend/src/routes/index.ts:21-25`
- `NavigationHistoryService` -> `/navigation/history`, `/navigation/history/:id`
  - 前端端点：`.../config/ApiConfig.ets:70-71`
  - 后端路由：`.../backend/src/routes/index.ts:27-30`

## 3) 直接影响演示失败的 P0（最多8条）+最小修复建议

### P0-1 后端 BASE_URL 硬编码为局域网 IP
- 现象：换网络/换演示机后，登录注册收藏历史全挂。
- 证据：`.../config/ApiConfig.ets:47-49`（`http://192.168.6.191:3000/api/v1`）
- 最小修复：改成可配置（Build Profile / 环境变量 / 启动参数），至少提供 dev/prod 两套可切换地址。

### P0-2 token 初始化竞态，冷启动可能误判“未登录”
- 现象：明明有 token，个人中心和功能页偶发显示未登录/401。
- 证据：
  - `HttpService` 构造异步初始化：`.../services/HttpService.ets:18-21,33-38`
  - `isLoggedIn` 只看内存 token：`.../services/AuthService.ets:205-207`
  - 页面进入即判登录：`.../pages/UserCenterPage.ets:15-18`
- 最小修复：给 `HttpService/AuthService` 增加 `initPromise`，所有鉴权前 `await` 初始化完成；或 `getToken()` 兜底从 Preferences 同步/异步补读一次。

### P0-3 未登录进入收藏/历史后无“去登录”分流，演示易卡死
- 现象：个人中心可直接进收藏/历史；未登录只看到错误+重试，无法闭环。
- 证据：
  - 无鉴权跳转：`.../pages/UserCenterPage.ets:123,130`
  - 收藏 service 未登录直接 401：`.../services/FavoriteService.ets:37-42`
  - 收藏错误态只有重试：`.../pages/FavoritesPage.ets:61-73`
  - 历史错误态只有重试：`.../pages/HistoryPage.ets:68-80`
- 最小修复：  
  1) 入口前拦截（未登录先跳 `LoginPage`）；  
  2) 页面内 401 时提供“去登录”按钮并保留返回路径。

### P0-4 收藏/历史触发的外部导航不会写入历史，闭环断
- 现象：从收藏点“导航”后，历史不新增；“收藏->导航->历史验证”容易失败。
- 证据：
  - 外部目的地只 `startNavigation`：`.../view/EnhancedNavigationModule.ets:77-110`
  - 历史保存函数存在：`.../view/EnhancedNavigationModule.ets:370-388`
  - 仅 POI 导航按钮调用保存：`.../view/EnhancedNavigationModule.ets:763-765`
- 最小修复：在 `startNavigation` 成功后统一落历史（不要只在 POI 按钮分支写）。

### P0-5 地图 key/client_id 固化且标注需替换，地图黑屏风险高
- 现象：key 或 client_id 不匹配时地图加载失败，导航演示直接失败。
- 证据：
  - `AmapService` key 且带 TODO：`.../services/AmapService.ets:8`
  - `amap.html` 脚本 key：`.../resources/rawfile/amap.html:21`
  - `module.json5` 注释“否则地图黑屏”：`.../module.json5:38-45`
- 最小修复：统一配置中心注入 key/client_id，启动自检（缺失即弹明确错误页，不进入空白地图）。

### P0-6 坐标参数校验用“falsy”判断，合法 0 坐标会被判缺参
- 现象：某些边界点（经纬度 0）会被后端拒绝，接口表现异常。
- 证据：
  - 收藏：`.../backend/src/controllers/favoriteController.ts:71-76`
  - 历史：`.../backend/src/controllers/navigationController.ts:100-104`
- 最小修复：改为 `latitude === undefined || latitude === null` 这类显式判断。

### P0-7 导航启动失败只打日志不提示，现场看起来“点了没反应”
- 现象：路径规划失败时无 UI 反馈，演示观感是功能失效。
- 证据：`.../view/EnhancedNavigationModule.ets:213-220`
- 最小修复：`catch` 中增加 `promptAction.showToast('导航启动失败，请重试')`，并保留错误码日志。

---
```

```text
0	/**
1	 * 登录页面
2	 */
3	import { AuthService } from '../services/AuthService'
4	import router from '@ohos.router'
5	
6	@Entry
7	@Component
8	struct LoginPage {
9	  @State phone: string = ''
10	  @State password: string = ''
11	  @State errorMessage: string = ''
12	  @State isLoading: boolean = false
13	  
14	  private authService: AuthService = AuthService.getInstance()
15	  
16	  build() {
17	    Column() {
18	      // 标题
19	      Text('车载导航系统')
20	        .fontSize(32)
21	        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
22	        .margin({ top: 80, bottom: 60 })
23	      
24	      // 手机号输入框
25	      Column() {
26	        Text('手机号')
27	          .fontSize(14)
28	          .fontColor('#666666')
29	          .alignSelf(ItemAlign.Start)
30	          .margin({ bottom: 8 })
31	        
32	        TextInput({ placeholder: '请输入手机号' })
33	          .type(InputType.PhoneNumber)
34	          .maxLength(11)
35	          .onChange((value: string) => {
36	            this.phone = value
37	            this.errorMessage = ''
38	          })
39	          .width('100%')
40	          .height(48)
41	      }
42	      .width('85%')
43	      .margin({ bottom: 20 })
44	      
45	      // 密码输入框
46	      Column() {
47	        Text('密码')
48	          .fontSize(14)
49	          .fontColor('#666666')
50	          .alignSelf(ItemAlign.Start)
51	          .margin({ bottom: 8 })
52	        
53	        TextInput({ placeholder: '请输入密码' })
54	          .type(InputType.Password)
55	          .onChange((value: string) => {
56	            this.password = value
57	            this.errorMessage = ''
58	          })
59	          .width('100%')
60	          .height(48)
61	      }
62	      .width('85%')
63	      .margin({ bottom: 10 })
64	      
65	      // 错误提示
66	      if (this.errorMessage) {
67	        Text(this.errorMessage)
68	          .fontSize(14)
69	          .fontColor('#FF0000')
70	          .width('85%')
71	          .margin({ bottom: 20 })
72	      }
73	      
74	      // 登录按钮
75	      Button(this.isLoading ? '登录中...' : '登录')
76	        .width('85%')
77	        .height(48)
78	        .fontSize(16)
79	        .margin({ top: 30 })
80	        .enabled(!this.isLoading)
81	        .onClick(() => {
82	          this.handleLogin()
83	        })
84	      
85	      // 注册按钮
86	      Button('注册新账号')
87	        .width('85%')
88	        .height(48)
89	        .fontSize(16)
90	        .margin({ top: 15 })
91	        .backgroundColor('#F5F5F5')
92	        .fontColor('#333333')
93	        .enabled(!this.isLoading)
94	        .onClick(() => {
95	          router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/RegisterPage' })
96	        })
97	    }
98	    .width('100%')
99	    .height('100%')
100	    .backgroundColor('#FFFFFF')
101	  }
102	  
103	  /**
104	   * 处理登录
105	   */
106	  async handleLogin() {
107	    // 输入验证
108	    if (!this.phone || this.phone.trim() === '') {
109	      this.errorMessage = '请输入手机号'
110	      return
111	    }
112	    
113	    if (!this.password || this.password.trim() === '') {
114	      this.errorMessage = '请输入密码'
115	      return
116	    }
117	    
118	    if (this.phone.length !== 11) {
119	      this.errorMessage = '请输入11位手机号'
120	      return
121	    }
122	    
123	    // 开始登录
124	    this.isLoading = true
125	    this.errorMessage = ''
126	    
127	    try {
128	      const response = await this.authService.login(this.phone, this.password)
129	      
130	      if (response.code === 200) {
131	        // 登录成功，跳转到主页面
132	        console.log('[LoginPage] 登录成功')
133	        router.replaceUrl({ url: 'pages/Index' })
134	      } else {
135	        // 登录失败，显示错误信息
136	        this.errorMessage = response.message || '登录失败'
137	      }
138	    } catch (err) {
139	      console.error('[LoginPage] 登录异常:', err)
140	      this.errorMessage = '登录失败，请稍后重试'
141	    } finally {
142	      this.isLoading = false
143	    }
144	  }
145	}
146
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
0	/**
1	 * 注册页面
2	 */
3	import { AuthService } from '../services/AuthService'
4	import router from '@ohos.router'
5	
6	@Entry
7	@Component
8	struct RegisterPage {
9	  @State phone: string = ''
10	  @State password: string = ''
11	  @State confirmPassword: string = ''
12	  @State nickname: string = ''
13	  @State errorMessage: string = ''
14	  @State isLoading: boolean = false
15	  
16	  private authService: AuthService = AuthService.getInstance()
17

19	    Column() {
20	      // 返回按钮
21	      Row() {
22	        Button('< 返回')
23	          .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
24	          .fontColor('#333333')
25	          .onClick(() => {
26	            router.back()
27	          })
28	      }
29	      .width('100%')
30	      .padding({ left: 20, top: 20 })
31	      
32	      // 标题
33	      Text('注册新账号')
34	        .fontSize(28)
35	        .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
36	        .margin({ top: 40, bottom: 40 })
37	      
38	      // 手机号输入框
39	      Column() {
40	        Text('手机号')
41	          .fontSize(14)
42	          .fontColor('#666666')
43	          .alignSelf(ItemAlign.Start)
44	          .margin({ bottom: 8 })
45	        
46	        TextInput({ placeholder: '请输入手机号' })
47	          .type(InputType.PhoneNumber)
48	          .maxLength(11)
49	          .onChange((value: string) => {
50	            this.phone = value
51	            this.errorMessage = ''
52	          })
53	          .width('100%')
54	          .height(48)
55	      }
56	      .width('85%')
57	      .margin({ bottom: 20 })
58	      
59	      // 昵称输入框
60	      Column() {
61	        Text('昵称（可选）')
62	          .fontSize(14)
63	          .fontColor('#666666')
64	          .alignSelf(ItemAlign.Start)
65	          .margin({ bottom: 8 })
66	        
67	        TextInput({ placeholder: '请输入昵称' })
68	          .onChange((value: string) => {
69	            this.nickname = value
70	          })
71	          .width('100%')
72	          .height(48)
73	      }
74	      .width('85%')
75	      .margin({ bottom: 20 })
76	      
77	      // 密码输入框
78	      Column() {
79	        Text('密码')
80	          .fontSize(14)
81	          .fontColor('#666666')
82	          .alignSelf(ItemAlign.Start)
83	          .margin({ bottom: 8 })
84	        
85	        TextInput({ placeholder: '请输入密码（至少6位）' })
86	          .type(InputType.Password)
87	          .onChange((value: string) => {
88	            this.password = value
89	            this.errorMessage = ''
90	          })
91	          .width('100%')
92	          .height(48)
93	      }
94	      .width('85%')
95	      .margin({ bottom: 20 })
96	      
97	      // 确认密码输入框
98	      Column() {
99	        Text('确认密码')
100	          .fontSize(14)
101	          .fontColor('#666666')
102	          .alignSelf(ItemAlign.Start)
103	          .margin({ bottom: 8 })
104	        
105	        TextInput({ placeholder: '请再次输入密码' })
106	          .type(InputType.Password)
107	          .onChange((value: string) => {
108	            this.confirmPassword = value
109	            this.errorMessage = ''
110	          })
111	          .width('100%')
112	          .height(48)
113	      }
114	      .width('85%')
115	      .margin({ bottom: 10 })
116	      
117	      // 错误提示
118	      if (this.errorMessage) {
119	        Text(this.errorMessage)
120	          .fontSize(14)
121	          .fontColor('#FF0000')
122	          .width('85%')
123	          .margin({ bottom: 20 })
124	      }
125	      
126	      // 注册按钮
127	      Button(this.isLoading ? '注册中...' : '注册')
128	        .width('85%')
129	        .height(48)
130	        .fontSize(16)
131	        .margin({ top: 30 })
132	        .enabled(!this.isLoading)
133	        .onClick(() => {
134	          this.handleRegister()
135	        })
136	    }
137	    .width('100%')
138	    .height('100%')
139	    .backgroundColor('#FFFFFF')
140	  }
141	  
142	  /**
143	   * 处理注册
144	   */
145	  async handleRegister() {
146	    // 输入验证
147	    if (!this.phone || this.phone.trim() === '') {
148	      this.errorMessage = '请输入手机号'
149	      return
150	    }
151	    
152	    if (this.phone.length !== 11) {
153	      this.errorMessage = '请输入11位手机号'
154	      return
155	    }
156	    
157	    if (!this.password || this.password.trim() === '') {
158	      this.errorMessage = '请输入密码'
159	      return
160	    }
161	    
162	    if (this.password.length < 6) {
163	      this.errorMessage = '密码至少6位'
164	      return
165	    }
166	    
167	    if (!this.confirmPassword || this.confirmPassword.trim() === '') {
168	      this.errorMessage = '请确认密码'
169	      return
170	    }
171	    
172	    // 两次密码一致性验证
173	    if (this.password !== this.confirmPassword) {
174	      this.errorMessage = '两次输入的密码不一致'
175	      return
176	    }
177	    
178	    // 开始注册
179	    this.isLoading = true
180	    this.errorMessage = ''
181	    
182	    try {
183	      const response = await this.authService.register(
184	        this.phone,
185	        this.password,
186	        this.nickname || undefined
187	      )
188	      
189	      if (response.code === 200) {
190	        // 注册成功，自动登录并跳转到主页面
191	        console.log('[RegisterPage] 注册成功')
192	        router.replaceUrl({ url: 'pages/Index' })
193	      } else {
194	        // 注册失败，显示错误信息
195	        this.errorMessage = response.message || '注册失败'
196	      }
197	    } catch (err) {
198	      console.error('[RegisterPage] 注册异常:', err)
199	      this.errorMessage = '注册失败，请稍后重试'
200	    } finally {
201	      this.isLoading = false
202	    }
203	  }
204	}
205
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
0	/**
1	 * 个人中心页面
2	 */
3	import router from '@ohos.router'
4	import { AuthService } from '../services/AuthService'
5	import { UserInfo } from '../models/BackendModels'
6	
7	@Entry
8	@Component
9	struct UserCenterPage {
10	  private authService: AuthService = AuthService.getInstance()
11	  @State isLoggedIn: boolean = false
12	  @State currentUser: UserInfo | null = null
13	  
14	  async aboutToAppear() {
15	    this.isLoggedIn = await this.authService.isLoggedIn()
16	    if (this.isLoggedIn) {
17	      this.currentUser = await this.authService.getCurrentUser()
18	    }
19	  }
20	  
21	  async handleLogout() {
22	    await this.authService.logout()
23	    this.isLoggedIn = false
24	    this.currentUser = null
25	  }
26	  
27	  build() {
28	    Column() {
29	      // 顶部导航栏
30	      Row() {
31	        Button('返回')
32	          .fontSize(16)
33	          .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
34	          .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
35	          .onClick(() => {
36	            router.back()
37	          })
38	        
39	        Text('我的')
40	          .fontSize(20)
41	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
42	          .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
43	          .layoutWeight(1)
44	          .textAlign(TextAlign.Center)
45	        
46	        // 占位，保持标题居中
47	        Text('')
48	          .width(60)
49	      }
50	      .width('100%')
51	      .height(56)
52	      .padding({ left: 16, right: 16 })
53	      .backgroundColor('#1A1A1A')
54	      
55	      // 用户信息区域
56	      Column() {
57	        if (this.isLoggedIn && this.currentUser) {
58	          // 已登录
59	          Column({ space: 12 }) {
60	            // 头像
61	            Text(this.currentUser.nickname?.charAt(0) || '用')
62	              .fontSize(40)
63	              .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
64	              .width(80)
65	              .height(80)
66	              .borderRadius(40)
67	              .backgroundColor('#4A90E2')
68	              .textAlign(TextAlign.Center)
69	              .lineHeight(80)
70	            
71	            // 昵称
72	            Text(this.currentUser.nickname || '用户')
73	              .fontSize(20)
74	              .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
75	              .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
76	            
77	            // 手机号
78	            Text(this.currentUser.phone)
79	              .fontSize(14)
80	              .fontColor('#999999')
81	          }
82	          .padding({ top: 40, bottom: 40 })
83	        } else {
84	          // 未登录
85	          Column({ space: 16 }) {
86	            Text('👤')
87	              .fontSize(60)
88	            
89	            Text('未登录')
90	              .fontSize(18)
91	              .fontColor('#999999')
92	            
93	            Row({ space: 12 }) {
94	              Button('登录')
95	                .fontSize(16)
96	                .width(100)
97	                .height(40)
98	                .backgroundColor('#4A90E2')
99	                .onClick(() => {
100	                  router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/LoginPage' })
101	                })
102	              
103	              Button('注册')
104	                .fontSize(16)
105	                .width(100)
106	                .height(40)
107	                .backgroundColor('#666666')
108	                .onClick(() => {
109	                  router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/RegisterPage' })
110	                })
111	            }
112	          }
113	          .padding({ top: 40, bottom: 40 })
114	        }
115	      }
116	      .width('100%')
117	      .backgroundColor('#2A2A2A')
118	      
119	      // 功能列表
120	      Column() {
121	        // 我的收藏
122	        this.MenuItem('⭐', '我的收藏', () => {
123	          router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/FavoritesPage' })
124	        })
125	        
126	        Divider().color('#333333')
127	        
128	        // 导航历史
129	        this.MenuItem('📍', '导航历史', () => {
130	          router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/HistoryPage' })
131	        })
132	        
133	        if (this.isLoggedIn) {
134	          Divider().color('#333333')
135	          
136	          // 退出登录
137	          this.MenuItem('🚪', '退出登录', () => {
138	            this.handleLogout()
139	          })
140	        }
141	      }
142	      .width('100%')
143	      .backgroundColor('#1A1A1A')
144	      .margin({ top: 12 })
145	      .borderRadius(12)
146	      .padding({ left: 16, right: 16 })
147	    }
148	    .width('100%')
149	    .height('100%')
150	    .backgroundColor('#000000')
151	  }
152	  
153	  @Builder
154	  MenuItem(icon: string, title: string, onClick: () => void) {
155	    Row() {
156	      Text(icon)
157	        .fontSize(24)
158	        .margin({ right: 16 })
159	      
160	      Text(title)
161	        .fontSize(16)
162	        .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
163	        .layoutWeight(1)
164	      
165	      Text('›')
166	        .fontSize(24)
167	        .fontColor('#666666')
168	    }
169	    .width('100%')
170	    .height(56)
171	    .onClick(onClick)
172	  }
173	}
```
