 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/pages/Index.ets`

```text
0	import { EnhancedNavigationModule } from '../view/EnhancedNavigationModule'
1	import { MediaModule } from '../view/MediaModule'
2	import { CollaborationModule } from '../view/CollaborationModule'
3	import { CarStatusModule } from '../view/CarStatusModule'
4	import { FavoritePlace } from '../models/BackendModels'
5	import { common } from '@kit.AbilityKit'
6	import { display } from '@kit.ArkUI'
7	import curves from '@ohos.curves'
8	import router from '@ohos.router'
9	
10	interface ModuleConfig {
11	  title: string
12	  index: number
13	  angle: number
14	  icon: string
15	}
16	
17	@Entry
18	@Component
19	struct Index {
20	  @State currentIndex: number = 0
21	  @State isExpanded: boolean = false
22	  private controller: TabsController = new TabsController()
23	  
24	  // 导航目的地参数
25	  @State navigationDestination: FavoritePlace | null = null
26	  private checkInterval: number = -1
27	
28	  // === 坐标系统 ===
29	  @State ballX: number = 0
30	  @State ballY: number = 0
31	  @State screenWidthVp: number = 0
32	  @State screenHeightVp: number = 0
33	
34	  // === 尺寸定义 ===
35	  private readonly BALL_SIZE: number = 60
36	  private readonly EXPAND_RADIUS: number = 90
37	  private readonly ITEM_SIZE: number = 56
38	
39	  private readonly menuItems: ModuleConfig[] = [
40	    { title: "车况", index: 0, angle: -90, icon: "🚗" },
41	    { title: "导航", index: 1, angle: -45, icon: "🧭" },
42	    { title: "娱乐", index: 2, angle: 45, icon: "🎵" },
43	    { title: "协同", index: 3, angle: 135, icon: "🤝" },
44	    { title: "我的", index: 4, angle: 180, icon: "👤" }
45	  ]
46	
47	  private startX: number = 0
48	  private startY: number = 0
49	
50	  aboutToAppear() {
51	    console.log('[Index] ========== aboutToAppear 开始 ==========');
52	    try {
53	      let context = this.getUIContext().getHostContext() as common.UIAbilityContext;
54	      let windowClass = context.windowStage.getMainWindowSync();
55	      windowClass.setWindowLayoutFullScreen(true);
56	
57	      let displayClass = display.getDefaultDisplaySync();
58	      this.screenWidthVp = displayClass.width / displayClass.densityPixels;
59	      this.screenHeightVp = displayClass.height / displayClass.densityPixels;
60	
61	      this.ballX = this.screenWidthVp - this.BALL_SIZE - 30;
62	      this.ballY = this.screenHeightVp - this.BALL_SIZE - 120;
63	      
64	      console.log('[Index] 屏幕尺寸初始化完成:', this.screenWidthVp, 'x', this.screenHeightVp);
65	    } catch (err) {
66	      console.error('[Index] 初始化窗口失败:', err);
67	    }
68	    
69	    // 启动定时器检查AppStorage
70	    this.startCheckingAppStorage();
71	    
72	    // 立即检查一次导航目的地
73	    setTimeout(() => {
74	      this.checkNavigationDestination();
75	    }, 500);
76	    
77	    console.log('[Index] ========== aboutToAppear 完成 ==========');
78	  }
79	  
80	  aboutToDisappear() {
81	    console.log('[Index] aboutToDisappear - 清理定时器');
82	    // 清除定时器
83	    if (this.checkInterval !== -1) {
84	      clearInterval(this.checkInterval);
85	    }
86	  }
87	  
88	  /**
89	   * 启动定时器检查AppStorage中的导航目的地
90	   */
91	  startCheckingAppStorage() {
92	    console.log('[Index] 启动AppStorage监听 - 开始');
93	    let checkCount = 0;
94	    this.checkInterval = setInterval(() => {
95	      checkCount++;
96	      if (checkCount % 50 === 0) {
97	        console.log('[Index] AppStorage检查中... 已检查', checkCount, '次');
98	      }
99	      
100	      // 检查是否需要切换到导航Tab
101	      const shouldSwitch = AppStorage.get<boolean>('shouldSwitchToNavigation');
102	      const navDest = AppStorage.get<FavoritePlace>('navigationDestination');
103	      
104	      if (shouldSwitch && navDest) {
105	        console.log('[Index] ✅ 检测到导航请求:', navDest.name);
106	        
107	        // 清除标志
108	        AppStorage.delete('shouldSwitchToNavigation');
109	        AppStorage.delete('navigationDestination');
110	        
111	        // 先切换Tab
112	        console.log('[Index] 准备切换到导航Tab (index=1)');
113	        this.currentIndex = 1;
114	        this.controller.changeIndex(1);
115	        
116	        // 延迟设置导航目的地,确保Tab切换完成
117	        setTimeout(() => {
118	          this.navigationDestination = navDest;
119	          console.log('[Index] ✅ 已完成Tab切换和导航目的地设置');
120	        }, 300);
121	      }
122	    }, 100);
123	  }
124	  
125	  onPageShow() {
126	    // 优先从 router 参数获取导航目的地
127	    try {
128	      const params = router.getParams() as Record<string, Object>;
129	      
130	      // 方式1：从收藏页面传递的参数格式 (action + destination)
131	      if (params && params['action'] === 'navigate') {
132	        const destination = params['destination'] as FavoritePlace;
133	        
134	        // 切换到导航Tab
135	        this.currentIndex = 1;
136	        this.controller.changeIndex(1);
137	        
138	        // 延迟设置导航目的地，确保Tab切换完成
139	        setTimeout(() => {
140	          this.navigationDestination = destination;
141	        }, 300);
142	        
143	        return;
144	      }
145	      
146	      // 方式2：从历史页面传递的参数格式 (navigationDestination)
147	      if (params && params['navigationDestination']) {
148	        const destination = params['navigationDestination'] as FavoritePlace;
149	        
150	        // 切换到导航Tab
151	        this.currentIndex = 1;
152	        this.controller.changeIndex(1);
153	        
154	        // 延迟设置导航目的地，确保Tab切换完成
155	        setTimeout(() => {
156	          this.navigationDestination = destination;
157	        }, 300);
158	        
159	        return;
160	      }
161	    } catch (err) {
162	      console.error('[Index] 获取 router 参数失败:', err);
163	    }
164	    
165	    // 备用方案：检查AppStorage中的导航目的地
166	    this.checkNavigationDestination();
167	  }
168	  
169	  /**
170	   * 检查并处理导航目的地
171	   */
172	  checkNavigationDestination() {
173	    const navDest = AppStorage.get<FavoritePlace>('navigationDestination');
174	    if (navDest) {
175	      // 清除AppStorage中的参数
176	      AppStorage.delete('navigationDestination');
177	      // 切换到导航Tab
178	      this.currentIndex = 1;
179	      this.controller.changeIndex(1);
180	      // 设置导航目的地
181	      this.navigationDestination = navDest;
182	    }
183	  }
184	
185	  toggleExpand() {
186	    if (!this.isExpanded) {
187	      const safePadding = this.EXPAND_RADIUS + (this.ITEM_SIZE / 2) + 10;
188	      let cX = this.ballX + (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
189	      let cY = this.ballY + (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
190	      let nCX = Math.max(safePadding, Math.min(cX, this.screenWidthVp - safePadding));
191	      let nCY = Math.max(safePadding, Math.min(cY, this.screenHeightVp - safePadding));
192	
193	      this.getUIContext().animateTo({ curve: curves.springMotion(0.6, 0.8) }, () => {
194	        this.ballX = nCX - (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
195	        this.ballY = nCY - (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
196	      });
197	    }
198	    this.getUIContext().animateTo({ curve: curves.springMotion(0.5, 0.7) }, () => {
199	      this.isExpanded = !this.isExpanded;
200	    })
201	  }
202	
203	  build() {
204	    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.TopStart }) {
205	      // 1. 内容层
206	      Tabs({ barPosition: BarPosition.End, controller: this.controller }) {
207	        TabContent() { CarStatusModule() }.backgroundColor('#000000')
208	        TabContent() { 
209	          EnhancedNavigationModule({ 
210	            externalDestination: this.navigationDestination 
211	          }) 
212	        }.backgroundColor('#000000')
213	        TabContent() { MediaModule({ isPageVisible: this.currentIndex === 2 }) }.backgroundColor('#000000')
214	        TabContent() { CollaborationModule() }.backgroundColor('#000000')
215	      }
216	      .barHeight(0).scrollable(false).width('100%').height('100%')
217	
218	      // 2. 遮罩层 (点击此处收缩)
219	      if (this.isExpanded) {
220	        Rect().width('100%').height('100%')
221	          .fill('rgba(0,0,0,0.01)') // 几乎隐形，只为了拦截点击
222	          .onClick(() => {
223	            // 点击空白处 -> 收缩
224	            this.toggleExpand()
225	          })
226	          .zIndex(9998)
227	      }
228	
229	      // 3. 子菜单项
230	      ForEach(this.menuItems, (item: ModuleConfig) => {
231	        this.PureGlassItem(item)
232	      })
233	
234	      // 4. 主悬浮球 (点击此处也可以收缩)
235	      this.PureMainBall()
236	    }
237	    .width('100%').height('100%').backgroundColor('#000000')
238	  }
239	
240	  // === 纯净磨砂子菜单 ===
241	  @Builder
242	  PureGlassItem(item: ModuleConfig): void {
243	    Column({ space: 4 }) {
244	      Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.Center }) {
245	        Text(item.icon)
246	          .fontSize(24)
247	          .fontColor(this.currentIndex === item.index ? '#FFFFFF' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.8)')
248	          .animation({ duration: 150 })
249	      }
250	      .width(this.ITEM_SIZE).height(this.ITEM_SIZE)
251	      // 样式逻辑：选中亮一点，未选中暗一点
252	      .backgroundColor(this.currentIndex === item.index ? 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)' : 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)')
253	      .backgroundBlurStyle(this.currentIndex === item.index ? BlurStyle.Regular : BlurStyle.Thin)
254	      // 一次成型裁剪
255	      .borderRadius(this.ITEM_SIZE / 2)
256	      .clip(true)
257	      .border({ width: 0.5, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)' })
258	      .onClick(() => {
259	        // === 逻辑修正 ===
260	        if (item.index === 4) {
261	          // "我的"选项 - 跳转到个人中心页面
262	          router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/UserCenterPage' })
263	          this.toggleExpand() // 收起菜单
264	        } else {
265	          // 其他选项 - 切换 Tab
266	          this.currentIndex = item.index
267	          this.controller.changeIndex(item.index)
268	          // 这里删除了 this.toggleExpand()
269	          // 这样点击切换时，菜单不会收回去，您可以继续看其他状态
270	        }
271	      })
272	
273	      // 文字
274	      Text(item.title)
275	        .fontSize(10).fontColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.7)').fontWeight(FontWeight.Regular)
276	        .opacity(this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0)
277	        .animation({ duration: 200 })
278	    }
279	    .position({
280	      x: this.ballX + (this.BALL_SIZE - this.ITEM_SIZE) / 2 +
281	        (this.isExpanded ? this.EXPAND_RADIUS * Math.cos(item.angle * Math.PI / 180) : 0),
282	      y: this.ballY + (this.BALL_SIZE - this.ITEM_SIZE) / 2 +
283	        (this.isExpanded ? this.EXPAND_RADIUS * Math.sin(item.angle * Math.PI / 180) : 0)
284	    })
285	    .zIndex(9999)
286	    .scale({ x: this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0, y: this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0 })
287	    .opacity(this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0)
288	    .animation({ curve: curves.springMotion(0.6, 0.75) })
289	  }
290	
291	  // === 纯净主球 ===
292	  @Builder
293	  PureMainBall(): void {
294	    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.Center }) {
295	      Text("＋")
296	        .fontSize(26).fontColor('#FFFFFF').fontWeight(FontWeight.Lighter)
297	        .rotate({ angle: this.isExpanded ? 135 : 0 })
298	        .animation({ duration: 300 })
299	        .margin({ bottom: 2 })
300	    }
301	    .width(this.BALL_SIZE).height(this.BALL_SIZE)
302	    .backgroundColor('rgba(40, 40, 40, 0.5)')
303	    .backgroundBlurStyle(BlurStyle.Thick)
304	    .borderRadius(this.BALL_SIZE / 2)
305	    .clip(true)
306	    .border({ width: 0.5, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)' })
307	    .shadow({ radius: 10, color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)', offsetY: 4 })
308	    .position({ x: this.ballX, y: this.ballY })
309	    .zIndex(10000)
310	    .onClick(() => {
311	      // 主动点击球体 -> 切换收缩/展开
312	      this.toggleExpand()
313	    })
314	    .gesture(
315	      PanGesture()
316	        .onActionStart(() => {
317	          if (this.isExpanded) this.toggleExpand()
318	          this.startX = this.ballX; this.startY = this.ballY
319	        })
320	        .onActionUpdate((e) => {
321	          let rX = this.startX + e.offsetX; let rY = this.startY + e.offsetY
322	          this.ballX = Math.max(0, Math.min(rX, this.screenWidthVp - this.BALL_SIZE))
323	          this.ballY = Math.max(0, Math.min(rY, this.screenHeightVp - this.BALL_SIZE))
324	        })
325	    )
326	  }
327	}

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/pages/FavoritesPage.ets`

0	/**
1	 * 收藏列表页面
2	 */
3	import { FavoriteService } from '../services/FavoriteService'
4	import { FavoritePlace } from '../models/BackendModels'
5	import router from '@ohos.router'
6	import promptAction from '@ohos.promptAction'
7	
8	@Entry
9	@Component
10	struct FavoritesPage {
11	  @State favorites: FavoritePlace[] = []
12	  @State isLoading: boolean = false
13	  @State errorMessage: string = ''
14	  
15	  private favoriteService: FavoriteService = FavoriteService.getInstance()
16	  
17	  aboutToAppear() {
18	    this.loadFavorites()
19	  }
20	  
21	  build() {
22	    Column() {
23	      // 标题栏
24	      Row() {
25	        Button('< 返回')
26	          .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
27	          .fontColor('#333333')
28	          .onClick(() => {
29	            router.back()
30	          })
31	        
32	        Text('我的收藏')
33	          .fontSize(20)
34	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
35	          .layoutWeight(1)
36	          .textAlign(TextAlign.Center)
37	        
38	        // 占位，保持标题居中
39	        Text('      ')
40	      }
41	      .width('100%')
42	      .height(56)
43	      .padding({ left: 16, right: 16 })
44	      .backgroundColor('#FFFFFF')
45	      
46	      // 内容区域
47	      if (this.isLoading) {
48	        // 加载中
49	        Column() {
50	          LoadingProgress()
51	            .width(50)
52	            .height(50)
53	          Text('加载中...')
54	            .fontSize(14)
55	            .fontColor('#999999')
56	            .margin({ top: 10 })
57	        }
58	        .width('100%')
59	        .layoutWeight(1)
60	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
61	      } else if (this.errorMessage) {
62	        // 错误提示
63	        Column() {
64	          Text(this.errorMessage)
65	            .fontSize(14)
66	            .fontColor('#FF0000')
67	            .margin({ bottom: 20 })
68	          
69	          Button('重试')
70	            .onClick(() => {
71	              this.loadFavorites()
72	            })
73	        }
74	        .width('100%')
75	        .layoutWeight(1)
76	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
77	      } else if (this.favorites.length === 0) {
78	        // 空状态
79	        Column() {
80	          Text('暂无收藏')
81	            .fontSize(16)
82	            .fontColor('#999999')
83	        }
84	        .width('100%')
85	        .layoutWeight(1)
86	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
87	      } else {
88	        // 收藏列表
89	        List() {
90	          ForEach(this.favorites, (item: FavoritePlace) => {
91	            ListItem() {
92	              this.FavoriteItem(item)
93	            }
94	          })
95	        }
96	        .width('100%')
97	        .layoutWeight(1)
98	        .divider({ strokeWidth: 1, color: '#F0F0F0' })
99	      }
100	    }
101	    .width('100%')
102	    .height('100%')
103	    .backgroundColor('#F5F5F5')
104	  }
105	  
106	  /**
107	   * 收藏项组件
108	   */
109	  @Builder
110	  FavoriteItem(item: FavoritePlace) {
111	    Row() {
112	      Column() {
113	        // 名称
114	        Text(item.name)
115	          .fontSize(16)
116	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
117	          .maxLines(1)
118	          .textOverflow({ overflow: TextOverflow.Ellipsis })
119	        
120	        // 地址
121	        Text(item.address)
122	          .fontSize(14)
123	          .fontColor('#666666')
124	          .maxLines(1)
125	          .textOverflow({ overflow: TextOverflow.Ellipsis })
126	          .margin({ top: 4 })
127	        
128	        // 添加时间
129	        Text(this.formatDate(item.createdAt))
130	          .fontSize(12)
131	          .fontColor('#999999')
132	          .margin({ top: 4 })
133	      }
134	      .layoutWeight(1)
135	      .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Start)
136	      
137	      // 操作按钮
138	      Row() {
139	        Button('导航')
140	          .fontSize(14)
141	          .height(32)
142	          .backgroundColor('#007AFF')
143	          .onClick(() => {
144	            this.navigateToPlace(item)
145	          })
146	        
147	        Button('删除')
148	          .fontSize(14)
149	          .height(32)
150	          .backgroundColor('#FF3B30')
151	          .margin({ left: 10 })
152	          .onClick(() => {
153	            this.showDeleteConfirm(item)
154	          })
155	      }
156	    }
157	    .width('100%')
158	    .padding(16)
159	    .backgroundColor('#FFFFFF')
160	  }
161	  
162	  /**
163	   * 加载收藏列表
164	   */
165	  async loadFavorites() {
166	    this.isLoading = true
167	    this.errorMessage = ''
168	    
169	    try {
170	      const response = await this.favoriteService.getFavorites()
171	      
172	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
173	        this.favorites = response.data
174	      } else {
175	        this.errorMessage = response.message || '加载失败'
176	      }
177	    } catch (err) {
178	      console.error('[FavoritesPage] 加载收藏列表失败:', err)
179	      this.errorMessage = '加载失败，请稍后重试'
180	    } finally {
181	      this.isLoading = false
182	    }
183	  }
184	  
185	  /**
186	   * 导航到地点
187	   */
188	  navigateToPlace(item: FavoritePlace) {
189	    console.log('[FavoritesPage] ========== 开始导航流程 ==========');
190	    console.log('[FavoritesPage] 导航到:', item.name);
191	    console.log('[FavoritesPage] 坐标:', item.latitude, item.longitude);
192	    
193	    // 使用 router 参数传递数据（更可靠）
194	    console.log('[FavoritesPage] 通过 router 参数传递导航目的地');
195	    router.back({
196	      url: 'pages/Index',
197	      params: {
198	        action: 'navigate',
199	        destination: item
200	      }
201	    });
202	    console.log('[FavoritesPage] ========== router.back() 已调用 ==========');
203	  }
204	  
205	  /**
206	   * 显示删除确认对话框
207	   */
208	  showDeleteConfirm(item: FavoritePlace) {
209	    promptAction.showDialog({
210	      title: '确认删除',
211	      message: `确定要删除收藏"${item.name}"吗？`,
212	      buttons: [
213	        { text: '取消', color: '#666666' },
214	        { text: '删除', color: '#FF3B30' }
215	      ]
216	    }).then((result) => {
217	      if (result.index === 1) {
218	        this.deleteFavorite(item.id)
219	      }
220	    })
221	  }
222	  
223	  /**
224	   * 删除收藏
225	   */
226	  async deleteFavorite(id: number) {
227	    try {
228	      const response = await this.favoriteService.deleteFavorite(id)
229	      
230	      if (response.code === 200) {
231	        promptAction.showToast({
232	          message: '删除成功',
233	          duration: 2000
234	        })
235	        // 刷新列表
236	        this.loadFavorites()
237	      } else {
238	        promptAction.showToast({
239	          message: response.message || '删除失败',
240	          duration: 2000
241	        })
242	      }
243	    } catch (err) {
244	      console.error('[FavoritesPage] 删除收藏失败:', err)
245	      promptAction.showToast({
246	        message: '删除失败',
247	        duration: 2000
248	      })
249	    }
250	  }
251	  
252	  /**
253	   * 格式化日期
254	   */
255	  formatDate(dateStr: string): string {
256	    try {
257	      const date = new Date(dateStr)
258	      const year = date.getFullYear()
259	      const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')
260	      const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')
261	      return `${year}-${month}-${day}`
262	    } catch (err) {
263	      return dateStr
264	    }
265	  }
266	}
267
```

0	/**
1	 * 导航历史页面
2	 */
3	import { NavigationHistoryService } from '../services/NavigationHistoryService'
4	import { NavigationHistory } from '../models/BackendModels'
5	import router from '@ohos.router'
6	import promptAction from '@ohos.promptAction'
7	
8	@Entry
9	@Component
10	struct HistoryPage {
11	  @State historyList: NavigationHistory[] = []
12	  @State isLoading: boolean = false
13	  @State errorMessage: string = ''
14	  @State currentPage: number = 1
15	  @State hasMore: boolean = true
16	  
17	  private historyService: NavigationHistoryService = NavigationHistoryService.getInstance()
18	  
19	  aboutToAppear() {
20	    this.loadHistory()
21	  }
22	  
23	  build() {
24	    Column() {
25	      // 标题栏
26	      Row() {
27	        Button('< 返回')
28	          .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
29	          .fontColor('#333333')
30	          .onClick(() => {
31	            router.back()
32	          })
33	        
34	        Text('导航历史')
35	          .fontSize(20)
36	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
37	          .layoutWeight(1)
38	          .textAlign(TextAlign.Center)
39	        
40	        Button('清空')
41	          .fontSize(14)
42	          .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
43	          .fontColor('#FF3B30')
44	          .onClick(() => {
45	            this.showClearConfirm()
46	          })
47	      }
48	      .width('100%')
49	      .height(56)
50	      .padding({ left: 16, right: 16 })
51	      .backgroundColor('#FFFFFF')
52	      
53	      // 内容区域
54	      if (this.isLoading && this.historyList.length === 0) {
55	        // 首次加载中
56	        Column() {
57	          LoadingProgress()
58	            .width(50)
59	            .height(50)
60	          Text('加载中...')
61	            .fontSize(14)
62	            .fontColor('#999999')
63	            .margin({ top: 10 })
64	        }
65	        .width('100%')
66	        .layoutWeight(1)
67	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
68	      } else if (this.errorMessage && this.historyList.length === 0) {
69	        // 错误提示
70	        Column() {
71	          Text(this.errorMessage)
72	            .fontSize(14)
73	            .fontColor('#FF0000')
74	            .margin({ bottom: 20 })
75	          
76	          Button('重试')
77	            .onClick(() => {
78	              this.loadHistory()
79	            })
80	        }
81	        .width('100%')
82	        .layoutWeight(1)
83	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
84	      } else if (this.historyList.length === 0) {
85	        // 空状态
86	        Column() {
87	          Text('暂无导航历史')
88	            .fontSize(16)
89	            .fontColor('#999999')
90	        }
91	        .width('100%')
92	        .layoutWeight(1)
93	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
94	      } else {
95	        // 历史列表
96	        List() {
97	          ForEach(this.historyList, (item: NavigationHistory) => {
98	            ListItem() {
99	              this.HistoryItem(item)
100	            }
101	          })
102	          
103	          // 加载更多
104	          if (this.hasMore) {
105	            ListItem() {
106	              Row() {
107	                if (this.isLoading) {
108	                  LoadingProgress()
109	                    .width(30)
110	                    .height(30)
111	                  Text('加载中...')
112	                    .fontSize(14)
113	                    .fontColor('#999999')
114	                    .margin({ left: 10 })
115	                } else {
116	                  Button('加载更多')
117	                    .fontSize(14)
118	                    .onClick(() => {
119	                      this.loadMore()
120	                    })
121	                }
122	              }
123	              .width('100%')
124	              .height(60)
125	              .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
126	            }
127	          }
128	        }
129	        .width('100%')
130	        .layoutWeight(1)
131	        .divider({ strokeWidth: 1, color: '#F0F0F0' })
132	      }
133	    }
134	    .width('100%')
135	    .height('100%')
136	    .backgroundColor('#F5F5F5')
137	  }
138	  
139	  /**
140	   * 历史记录项组件
141	   */
142	  @Builder
143	  HistoryItem(item: NavigationHistory) {
144	    Row() {
145	      Column() {
146	        // 起点和终点
147	        Row() {
148	          Text(item.startName || '当前位置')
149	            .fontSize(14)
150	            .fontColor('#666666')
151	          
152	          Text(' → ')
153	            .fontSize(14)
154	            .fontColor('#999999')
155	            .margin({ left: 5, right: 5 })
156	          
157	          Text(item.endName)
158	            .fontSize(14)
159	            .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
160	        }
161	        
162	        // 地址
163	        Text(item.endAddress)
164	          .fontSize(12)
165	          .fontColor('#999999')
166	          .maxLines(1)
167	          .textOverflow({ overflow: TextOverflow.Ellipsis })
168	          .margin({ top: 4 })
169	        
170	        // 距离和时长
171	        Row() {
172	          Text(this.formatDistance(item.distance))
173	            .fontSize(12)
174	            .fontColor('#999999')
175	          
176	          Text(' | ')
177	            .fontSize(12)
178	            .fontColor('#999999')
179	            .margin({ left: 5, right: 5 })
180	          
181	          Text(this.formatDuration(item.duration))
182	            .fontSize(12)
183	            .fontColor('#999999')
184	          
185	          Text(' | ')
186	            .fontSize(12)
187	            .fontColor('#999999')
188	            .margin({ left: 5, right: 5 })
189	          
190	          Text(this.formatDate(item.createdAt))
191	            .fontSize(12)
192	            .fontColor('#999999')
193	        }
194	        .margin({ top: 4 })
195	      }
196	      .layoutWeight(1)
197	      .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Start)
198	      
199	      // 重新导航按钮
200	      Button('再次导航')
201	        .fontSize(14)
202	        .height(32)
203	        .backgroundColor('#007AFF')
204	        .onClick(() => {
205	          this.navigateAgain(item)
206	        })
207	    }
208	    .width('100%')
209	    .padding(16)
210	    .backgroundColor('#FFFFFF')
211	  }
212	  
213	  /**
214	   * 加载历史记录
215	   */
216	  async loadHistory() {
217	    this.isLoading = true
218	    this.errorMessage = ''
219	    this.currentPage = 1
220	    
221	    try {
222	      const response = await this.historyService.getHistory(this.currentPage, 20)
223	      
224	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
225	        this.historyList = response.data.list
226	        this.hasMore = this.historyList.length < response.data.total
227	      } else {
228	        this.errorMessage = response.message || '加载失败'
229	      }
230	    } catch (err) {
231	      console.error('[HistoryPage] 加载历史记录失败:', err)
232	      this.errorMessage = '加载失败，请稍后重试'
233	    } finally {
234	      this.isLoading = false
235	    }
236	  }
237	  
238	  /**
239	   * 加载更多
240	   */
241	  async loadMore() {
242	    if (this.isLoading || !this.hasMore) {
243	      return
244	    }
245	    
246	    this.isLoading = true
247	    this.currentPage++
248	    
249	    try {
250	      const response = await this.historyService.getHistory(this.currentPage, 20)
251	      
252	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
253	        this.historyList = this.historyList.concat(response.data.list)
254	        this.hasMore = this.historyList.length < response.data.total
255	      }
256	    } catch (err) {
257	      console.error('[HistoryPage] 加载更多失败:', err)
258	      this.currentPage--
259	    } finally {
260	      this.isLoading = false
261	    }
262	  }
263	  
264	  /**
265	   * 再次导航
266	   */
267	  navigateAgain(item: NavigationHistory) {
268	    // 使用 router 参数传递导航目的地数据
269	    router.back({
270	      url: 'pages/Index',
271	      params: {
272	        navigationDestination: {
273	          name: item.endName,
274	          address: item.endAddress,
275	          latitude: item.endLat,
276	          longitude: item.endLng
277	        }
278	      }
279	    })
280	  }
281	  
282	  /**
283	   * 显示清空确认对话框
284	   */
285	  showClearConfirm() {
286	    promptAction.showDialog({
287	      title: '确认清空',
288	      message: '确定要清空所有导航历史吗？',
289	      buttons: [
290	        { text: '取消', color: '#666666' },
291	        { text: '清空', color: '#FF3B30' }
292	      ]
293	    }).then((result) => {
294	      if (result.index === 1) {
295	        this.clearHistory()
296	      }
297	    })
298	  }
299	  
300	  /**
301	   * 清空历史记录
302	   */
303	  async clearHistory() {
304	    try {
305	      const response = await this.historyService.clearHistory()
306	      
307	      if (response.code === 200) {
308	        promptAction.showToast({
309	          message: '清空成功',
310	          duration: 2000
311	        })
312	        this.historyList = []
313	      } else {
314	        promptAction.showToast({
315	          message: response.message || '清空失败',
316	          duration: 2000
317	        })
318	      }
319	    } catch (err) {
320	      console.error('[HistoryPage] 清空历史失败:', err)
321	      promptAction.showToast({
322	        message: '清空失败',
323	        duration: 2000
324	      })
325	    }
326	  }
327	  
328	  /**
329	   * 格式化距离
330	   */
331	  formatDistance(meters: number): string {
332	    if (meters < 1000) {
333	      return `${meters}米`
334	    } else {
335	      return `${(meters / 1000).toFixed(1)}公里`
336	    }
337	  }
338	  
339	  /**
340	   * 格式化时长
341	   */
342	  formatDuration(seconds: number): string {
343	    if (seconds < 60) {
344	      return `${seconds}秒`
345	    } else if (seconds < 3600) {
346	      return `${Math.floor(seconds / 60)}分钟`
347	    } else {
348	      const hours = Math.floor(seconds / 3600)
349	      const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60)
350	      return `${hours}小时${minutes}分钟`
351	    }
352	  }
353	  
354	  /**
355	   * 格式化日期
356	   */
357	  formatDate(dateStr: string): string {
358	    try {
359	      const date = new Date(dateStr)
360	      const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')
361	      const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')
362	      const hour = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, '0')
363	      const minute = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0')
364	      return `${month}-${day} ${hour}:${minute}`
365	    } catch (err) {
366	      return dateStr
367	    }
368	  }
369	}
370

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/services/AuthService.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * 认证服务 - 管理用户认证、注册、登录和登出
2	 */
3	import preferences from '@ohos.data.preferences';
4	import { HttpService } from './HttpService';
5	import { 
6	  ApiResponse, 
7	  UserInfo, 
8	  RegisterRequest, 
9	  LoginRequest, 
10	  UpdateProfileRequest 
11	} from '../models/BackendModels';
12	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
13	
14	/**
15	 * 认证服务类
16	 */
17	export class AuthService {
18	  private static instance: AuthService;
19	  private httpService: HttpService;
20	  private currentUser: UserInfo | null = null;
21	  private preferencesInstance: preferences.Preferences | null = null;
22	  private readonly PREFERENCES_NAME = 'app_auth';
23	  
24	  private constructor() {
25	    this.httpService = HttpService.getInstance();
26	    this.initPreferences();
27	  }
28	  
29	  static getInstance(): AuthService {
30	    if (!AuthService.instance) {
31	      AuthService.instance = new AuthService();
32	    }
33	    return AuthService.instance;
34	  }
35	  
36	  /**
37	   * 初始化Preferences
38	   */
39	  private async initPreferences(): Promise<void> {
40	    try {
41	      const context = getContext();
42	      this.preferencesInstance = await preferences.getPreferences(context, this.PREFERENCES_NAME);
43	      await this.loadUserInfo();
44	      console.log('[AuthService] Preferences初始化成功');
45	    } catch (err) {
46	      console.error('[AuthService] Preferences初始化失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
47	    }
48	  }
49	
50	  /**
51	   * 用户注册
52	   */
53	  async register(phone: string, password: string, nickname?: string): Promise<ApiResponse<UserInfo>> {
54	    try {
55	      console.log('[AuthService] 注册用户:', phone);
56	      
57	      // 只包含有值的字段
58	      const requestData: RegisterRequest = { phone, password };
59	      if (nickname && nickname.trim() !== '') {
60	        requestData.nickname = nickname;
61	      }
62	      
63	      const response = await this.httpService.post<UserInfo>(
64	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_REGISTER,
65	        requestData,
66	        false  // 注册不需要认证
67	      );
68	      
69	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
70	        // 保存token和用户信息
71	        if (response.data.token) {
72	          await this.httpService.setToken(response.data.token);
73	          await this.saveUserInfo(response.data);
74	          this.currentUser = response.data;
75	        }
76	      }
77	      
78	      return response;
79	    } catch (err) {
80	      console.error('[AuthService] 注册失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
81	      return err as ApiResponse<UserInfo>;
82	    }
83	  }
84	  
85	  /**
86	   * 用户登录
87	   */
88	  async login(phone: string, password: string): Promise<ApiResponse<UserInfo>> {
89	    try {
90	      console.log('[AuthService] 用户登录:', phone);
91	      
92	      const requestData: LoginRequest = { phone, password };
93	      
94	      const response = await this.httpService.post<UserInfo>(
95	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_LOGIN,
96	        requestData,
97	        false  // 登录不需要认证
98	      );
99	      
100	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
101	        // 保存token和用户信息
102	        if (response.data.token) {
103	          await this.httpService.setToken(response.data.token);
104	          await this.saveUserInfo(response.data);
105	          this.currentUser = response.data;
106	        }
107	      }
108	      
109	      return response;
110	    } catch (err) {
111	      console.error('[AuthService] 登录失败:', err);
112	      return err as ApiResponse<UserInfo>;
113	    }
114	  }
115	  
116	  /**
117	   * 获取用户信息
118	   */
119	  async getProfile(): Promise<ApiResponse<UserInfo>> {
120	    try {
121	      console.log('[AuthService] 获取用户信息');
122	      
123	      const response = await this.httpService.get<UserInfo>(
124	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_PROFILE,
125	        true  // 需要认证
126	      );
127	      
128	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
129	        await this.saveUserInfo(response.data);
130	        this.currentUser = response.data;
131	      }
132	      
133	      return response;
134	    } catch (err) {
135	      console.error('[AuthService] 获取用户信息失败:', err);
136	      return err as ApiResponse<UserInfo>;
137	    }
138	  }
139	  
140	  /**
141	   * 更新用户信息
142	   */
143	  async updateProfile(nickname?: string, avatar?: string): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
144	    try {
145	      console.log('[AuthService] 更新用户信息');
146	      
147	      // 只包含有值的字段
148	      const requestData: UpdateProfileRequest = {};
149	      if (nickname && nickname.trim() !== '') {
150	        requestData.nickname = nickname;
151	      }
152	      if (avatar && avatar.trim() !== '') {
153	        requestData.avatar = avatar;
154	      }
155	      
156	      const response = await this.httpService.put<void>(
157	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_PROFILE,
158	        requestData,
159	        true  // 需要认证
160	      );
161	      
162	      if (response.code === 200) {
163	        // 更新本地用户信息
164	        if (this.currentUser) {
165	          if (nickname) this.currentUser.nickname = nickname;
166	          if (avatar) this.currentUser.avatar = avatar;
167	          await this.saveUserInfo(this.currentUser);
168	        }
169	      }
170	      
171	      return response;
172	    } catch (err) {
173	      console.error('[AuthService] 更新用户信息失败:', err);
174	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
175	    }
176	  }
177	  
178	  /**
179	   * 登出
180	   */
181	  async logout(): Promise<void> {
182	    try {
183	      console.log('[AuthService] 用户登出');
184	      
185	      // 清除token
186	      await this.httpService.clearToken();
187	      
188	      // 清除用户信息
189	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
190	        await this.preferencesInstance.delete(ApiConfig.USER_KEY);
191	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
192	      }
193	      
194	      this.currentUser = null;
195	      console.log('[AuthService] 登出成功');
196	    } catch (err) {
197	      console.error('[AuthService] 登出失败:', err);
198	    }
199	  }
200	  
201	  /**
202	   * 检查登录状态
203	   */
204	  async isLoggedIn(): Promise<boolean> {
205	    const token = this.httpService.getToken();
206	    return token !== '' && token !== null && token !== undefined;
207	  }
208	  
209	  /**
210	   * 获取当前用户
211	   */
212	  async getCurrentUser(): Promise<UserInfo | null> {
213	    if (this.currentUser) {
214	      return this.currentUser;
215	    }
216	    
217	    // 尝试从本地存储加载
218	    await this.loadUserInfo();
219	    return this.currentUser;
220	  }
221	  
222	  /**
223	   * 保存用户信息到Preferences
224	   */
225	  private async saveUserInfo(userInfo: UserInfo): Promise<void> {
226	    try {
227	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
228	        await this.preferencesInstance.put(ApiConfig.USER_KEY, JSON.stringify(userInfo));
229	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
230	        console.log('[AuthService] 用户信息已保存');
231	      }
232	    } catch (err) {
233	      console.error('[AuthService] 保存用户信息失败:', err);
234	    }
235	  }
236	  
237	  /**
238	   * 从Preferences加载用户信息
239	   */
240	  private async loadUserInfo(): Promise<void> {
241	    try {
242	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
243	        const userInfoStr = await this.preferencesInstance.get(ApiConfig.USER_KEY, '');
244	        if (userInfoStr && userInfoStr !== '') {
245	          this.currentUser = JSON.parse(userInfoStr as string) as UserInfo;
246	          console.log('[AuthService] 用户信息已加载');
247	        }
248	      }
249	    } catch (err) {
250	      console.error('[AuthService] 加载用户信息失败:', err);
251	    }
252	  }
253	}
254
```
</details></tool-use>

0	/**
1	 * 收藏服务 - 管理用户收藏的地点
2	 */
3	import { HttpService } from './HttpService';
4	import { CacheService } from './CacheService';
5	import { ApiResponse, FavoritePlace } from '../models/BackendModels';
6	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
7	
8	/**
9	 * 收藏服务类
10	 */
11	export class FavoriteService {
12	  private static instance: FavoriteService;
13	  private httpService: HttpService;
14	  private cacheService: CacheService;
15	  private readonly CACHE_KEY = 'favorites_cache';
16	  
17	  private constructor() {
18	    this.httpService = HttpService.getInstance();
19	    this.cacheService = CacheService.getInstance();
20	  }
21	  
22	  static getInstance(): FavoriteService {
23	    if (!FavoriteService.instance) {
24	      FavoriteService.instance = new FavoriteService();
25	    }
26	    return FavoriteService.instance;
27	  }
28	  
29	  /**
30	   * 获取收藏列表
31	   */
32	  async getFavorites(category?: string): Promise<ApiResponse<FavoritePlace[]>> {
33	    try {
34	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 获取收藏列表, category:', category);
35	      
36	      // 检查是否登录
37	      const token = this.httpService.getToken();
38	      if (!token) {
39	        return {
40	          code: 401,
41	          message: '需要登录'
42	        };
43	      }
44	      
45	      // 构建URL
46	      let url = ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FAVORITES;
47	      if (category) {
48	        url += `?category=${category}`;
49	      }
50	      
51	      const response = await this.httpService.get<FavoritePlace[]>(url, true);
52	      
53	      // 成功时缓存数据
54	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
55	        await this.cacheFavorites(response.data);
56	      }
57	      
58	      return response;
59	    } catch (err) {
60	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 获取收藏列表失败:', err);
61	      
62	      // 网络失败时尝试从缓存读取
63	      const cachedData = await this.getCachedFavorites();
64	      if (cachedData && cachedData.length > 0) {
65	        console.log('[FavoriteService] 使用缓存数据');
66	        return {
67	          code: 200,
68	          message: '从缓存加载',
69	          data: cachedData
70	        };
71	      }
72	      
73	      return err as ApiResponse<FavoritePlace[]>;
74	    }
75	  }
76	  
77	  /**
78	   * 添加收藏
79	   */
80	  async addFavorite(place: Partial<FavoritePlace>): Promise<ApiResponse<FavoritePlace>> {
81	    try {
82	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 添加收藏:', place.name);
83	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 完整数据:', JSON.stringify(place));
84	      
85	      // 检查是否登录
86	      const token = this.httpService.getToken();
87	      console.log('[FavoriteService] Token存在:', !!token);
88	      if (!token) {
89	        return {
90	          code: 401,
91	          message: '需要登录'
92	        };
93	      }
94	      
95	      const response = await this.httpService.post<FavoritePlace>(
96	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FAVORITES,
97	        place,
98	        true
99	      );
100	      
101	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 响应代码:', response.code);
102	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 响应消息:', response.message);
103	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 完整响应:', JSON.stringify(response));
104	      
105	      // 成功时清除缓存，下次重新加载
106	      if (response.code === 200) {
107	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
108	      }
109	      
110	      return response;
111	    } catch (err) {
112	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 添加收藏失败 - 错误类型:', typeof err);
113	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 添加收藏失败 - 详情:', JSON.stringify(err));
114	      return err as ApiResponse<FavoritePlace>;
115	    }
116	  }
117	  
118	  /**
119	   * 更新收藏
120	   */
121	  async updateFavorite(id: number, updates: Partial<FavoritePlace>): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
122	    try {
123	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 更新收藏:', id);
124	      
125	      // 检查是否登录
126	      const token = this.httpService.getToken();
127	      if (!token) {
128	        return {
129	          code: 401,
130	          message: '需要登录'
131	        };
132	      }
133	      
134	      const response = await this.httpService.put<void>(
135	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FAVORITE_DETAIL(id),
136	        updates,
137	        true
138	      );
139	      
140	      // 成功时清除缓存
141	      if (response.code === 200) {
142	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
143	      }
144	      
145	      return response;
146	    } catch (err) {
147	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 更新收藏失败:', err);
148	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
149	    }
150	  }
151	  
152	  /**
153	   * 删除收藏
154	   */
155	  async deleteFavorite(id: number): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
156	    try {
157	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 删除收藏:', id);
158	      
159	      // 检查是否登录
160	      const token = this.httpService.getToken();
161	      if (!token) {
162	        return {
163	          code: 401,
164	          message: '需要登录'
165	        };
166	      }
167	      
168	      const response = await this.httpService.delete<void>(
169	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FAVORITE_DETAIL(id),
170	        true
171	      );
172	      
173	      // 成功时清除缓存
174	      if (response.code === 200) {
175	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
176	      }
177	      
178	      return response;
179	    } catch (err) {
180	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 删除收藏失败:', err);
181	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
182	    }
183	  }
184	  
185	  /**
186	   * 搜索收藏
187	   */
188	  async searchFavorites(keyword: string): Promise<FavoritePlace[]> {
189	    try {
190	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 搜索收藏:', keyword);
191	      
192	      // 先获取所有收藏
193	      const response = await this.getFavorites();
194	      
195	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
196	        // 按名称搜索（不区分大小写）
197	        const lowerKeyword = keyword.toLowerCase();
198	        return response.data.filter(place => 
199	          place.name.toLowerCase().includes(lowerKeyword)
200	        );
201	      }
202	      
203	      return [];
204	    } catch (err) {
205	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 搜索收藏失败:', err);
206	      return [];
207	    }
208	  }
209	  
210	  /**
211	   * 从缓存获取收藏列表
212	   */
213	  private async getCachedFavorites(): Promise<FavoritePlace[]> {
214	    try {
215	      const cached = await this.cacheService.get<FavoritePlace[]>(this.CACHE_KEY);
216	      return cached || [];
217	    } catch (err) {
218	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 读取缓存失败:', err);
219	      return [];
220	    }
221	  }
222	  
223	  /**
224	   * 缓存收藏列表
225	   */
226	  private async cacheFavorites(favorites: FavoritePlace[]): Promise<void> {
227	    try {
228	      await this.cacheService.set(
229	        this.CACHE_KEY,
230	        favorites,
231	        ApiConfig.CACHE_EXPIRE_TIME.FAVORITES
232	      );
233	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 收藏列表已缓存');
234	    } catch (err) {
235	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 缓存收藏列表失败:', err);
236	    }
237	  }
238	}

```text
0	/**
1	 * 导航历史服务 - 管理导航历史记录
2	 */
3	import { HttpService } from './HttpService';
4	import { CacheService } from './CacheService';
5	import { ApiResponse, NavigationHistory, PageResponse } from '../models/BackendModels';
6	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
7	
8	/**
9	 * 导航历史服务类
10	 */
11	export class NavigationHistoryService {
12	  private static instance: NavigationHistoryService;
13	  private httpService: HttpService;
14	  private cacheService: CacheService;
15	  private readonly CACHE_KEY = 'history_cache';
16	  
17	  private constructor() {
18	    this.httpService = HttpService.getInstance();
19	    this.cacheService = CacheService.getInstance();
20	  }
21	  
22	  static getInstance(): NavigationHistoryService {
23	    if (!NavigationHistoryService.instance) {
24	      NavigationHistoryService.instance = new NavigationHistoryService();
25	    }
26	    return NavigationHistoryService.instance;
27	  }
28	  
29	  /**
30	   * 获取历史记录（支持分页）
31	   */
32	  async getHistory(page: number = 1, pageSize: number = 50): Promise<ApiResponse<PageResponse<NavigationHistory>>> {
33	    try {
34	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 获取历史记录, page:', page, 'pageSize:', pageSize);
35	      
36	      const url = `${ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY}?page=${page}&pageSize=${pageSize}`;
37	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 请求URL:', ApiConfig.BASE_URL + url);
38	      
39	      const response = await this.httpService.get<PageResponse<NavigationHistory>>(url, true);
40	      
41	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 响应状态码:', response.code);
42	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 响应消息:', response.message);
43	      
44	      // 成功时缓存数据（只缓存第一页的最近50条）
45	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data && page === 1) {
46	        await this.cacheHistory(response.data.list);
47	      }
48	      
49	      return response;
50	    } catch (err) {
51	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 获取历史记录失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
52	      
53	      // 网络失败时尝试从缓存读取
54	      if (page === 1) {
55	        const cachedData = await this.getCachedHistory();
56	        if (cachedData && cachedData.length > 0) {
57	          console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 使用缓存数据');
58	          return {
59	            code: 200,
60	            message: '从缓存加载',
61	            data: {
62	              list: cachedData,
63	              total: cachedData.length,
64	              page: 1,
65	              pageSize: cachedData.length
66	            }
67	          };
68	        }
69	      }
70	      
71	      return err as ApiResponse<PageResponse<NavigationHistory>>;
72	    }
73	  }
74	  
75	  /**
76	   * 保存导航记录
77	   */
78	  async saveHistory(record: Partial<NavigationHistory>): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
79	    try {
80	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 保存导航记录');
81	      
82	      // 验证必需字段
83	      if (!record.endName || !record.endAddress || 
84	          record.endLat === undefined || record.endLng === undefined) {
85	        console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 缺少必需字段');
86	        return {
87	          code: 400,
88	          message: '缺少必需字段：endName, endAddress, endLat, endLng'
89	        };
90	      }
91	      
92	      const response = await this.httpService.post<void>(
93	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY,
94	        record,
95	        true
96	      );
97	      
98	      // 成功时清除缓存
99	      if (response.code === 200) {
100	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
101	      }
102	      
103	      return response;
104	    } catch (err) {
105	      // 静默失败 - 不抛出异常，不阻塞导航功能
106	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 保存导航记录失败（静默）:', err);
107	      return {
108	        code: -1,
109	        message: '保存失败（已静默处理）'
110	      };
111	    }
112	  }
113	  
114	  /**
115	   * 删除历史记录
116	   */
117	  async deleteHistory(id: number): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
118	    try {
119	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 删除历史记录:', id);
120	      
121	      const response = await this.httpService.delete<void>(
122	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY_DETAIL(id),
123	        true
124	      );
125	      
126	      // 成功时清除缓存
127	      if (response.code === 200) {
128	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
129	      }
130	      
131	      return response;
132	    } catch (err) {
133	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 删除历史记录失败:', err);
134	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
135	    }
136	  }
137	  
138	  /**
139	   * 清空历史记录
140	   */
141	  async clearHistory(): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
142	    try {
143	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 清空历史记录');
144	      
145	      const response = await this.httpService.delete<void>(
146	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY,
147	        true
148	      );
149	      
150	      // 成功时清除缓存
151	      if (response.code === 200) {
152	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
153	      }
154	      
155	      return response;
156	    } catch (err) {
157	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 清空历史记录失败:', err);
158	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
159	    }
160	  }
161	  
162	  /**
163	   * 按日期范围筛选历史记录
164	   */
165	  async getHistoryByDateRange(startDate: string, endDate: string): Promise<ApiResponse<NavigationHistory[]>> {
166	    try {
167	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 按日期筛选:', startDate, '-', endDate);
168	      
169	      const url = `${ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY}?startDate=${startDate}&endDate=${endDate}`;
170	      const response = await this.httpService.get<NavigationHistory[]>(url, true);
171	      
172	      return response;
173	    } catch (err) {
174	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 按日期筛选失败:', err);
175	      return err as ApiResponse<NavigationHistory[]>;
176	    }
177	  }
178	  
179	  /**
180	   * 从缓存获取历史记录
181	   */
182	  private async getCachedHistory(): Promise<NavigationHistory[]> {
183	    try {
184	      const cached = await this.cacheService.get<NavigationHistory[]>(this.CACHE_KEY);
185	      return cached || [];
186	    } catch (err) {
187	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 读取缓存失败:', err);
188	      return [];
189	    }
190	  }
191	  
192	  /**
193	   * 缓存历史记录（最近50条）
194	   */
195	  private async cacheHistory(history: NavigationHistory[]): Promise<void> {
196	    try {
197	      // 只缓存最近50条
198	      const toCache = history.slice(0, 50);
199	      await this.cacheService.set(
200	        this.CACHE_KEY,
201	        toCache,
202	        ApiConfig.CACHE_EXPIRE_TIME.HISTORY
203	      );
204	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 历史记录已缓存');
205	    } catch (err) {
206	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 缓存历史记录失败:', err);
207	    }
208	  }
209	}
210
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/services/ApiService.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * API服务 - 封装所有后端API调用
2	 */
3	import { HttpService } from './HttpService';
4	import {
5	  UserInfo,
6	  FavoritePlace,
7	  NavigationHistory,
8	  TripRecord,
9	  SearchHistory,
10	  PageResponse
11	} from '../models/NavigationModels';
12	
13	export class ApiService {
14	  private static instance: ApiService;
15	  private http: HttpService;
16	  
17	  private constructor() {
18	    this.http = HttpService.getInstance();
19	  }
20	  
21	  static getInstance(): ApiService {
22	    if (!ApiService.instance) {
23	      ApiService.instance = new ApiService();
24	    }
25	    return ApiService.instance;
26	  }
27	  
28	  // ==================== 认证相关 ====================
29	  
30	  /**
31	   * 用户注册
32	   */
33	  async register(phone: string, password: string, nickname?: string): Promise<UserInfo> {
34	    const response = await this.http.post<UserInfo>(
35	      '/auth/register',
36	      { phone, password, nickname },
37	      false
38	    );
39	    
40	    if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
41	      // 保存token
42	      if (response.data.token) {
43	        this.http.setToken(response.data.token);
44	      }
45	      return response.data;
46	    }
47	    
48	    throw new Error(response.message || '注册失败');
49	  }
50	  
51	  /**
52	   * 用户登录
53	   */
54	  async login(phone: string, password: string): Promise<UserInfo> {
55	    const response = await this.http.post<UserInfo>(
56	      '/auth/login',
57	      { phone, password },
58	      false
59	    );
60	    
61	    if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
62	      // 保存token
63	      if (response.data.token) {
64	        this.http.setToken(response.data.token);
65	      }
66	      return response.data;
67	    }
68	    
69	    throw new Error(response.message || '登录失败');
70	  }
71	  
72	  /**
73	   * 获取用户信息
74	   */
75	  async getProfile(): Promise<UserInfo> {
76	    const response = await this.http.get<UserInfo>('/auth/profile');
77	    
78	    if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
79	      return response.data;
80	    }
81	    
82	    throw new Error(response.message || '获取用户信息失败');
83	  }
84	  
85	  /**
86	   * 更新用户信息
87	   */
88	  async updateProfile(nickname?: string, avatar?: string): Promise<void> {
89	    const response = await this.http.put('/auth/profile', { nickname, avatar });
90	    
91	    if (response.code !== 200) {
92	      throw new Error(response.message || '更新失败');
93	    }
94	  }
95	  
96	  /**
97	   * 登出
98	   */
99	  logout(): void {
100	    this.http.clearToken();
101	  }
102	  
103	  // ==================== 收藏相关 ====================
104	  
105	  /**
106	   * 获取收藏列表
107	   */
108	  async getFavorites(category?: string): Promise<FavoritePlace[]> {
109	    let url = '/favorites';
110	    if (category) {
111	      url += `?category=${category}`;
112	    }
113	    
114	    const response = await this.http.get<FavoritePlace[]>(url);
115	    
116	    if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
117	      return response.data;
118	    }
119	    
120	    return [];
121	  }
122	  
123	  /**
124	   * 添加收藏
125	   */
126	  async addFavorite(favorite: FavoritePlace): Promise<number> {
127	    const response = await this.http.post<{ id: number }>('/favorites', favorite);
128	    
129	    if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
130	      return response.data.id;
131	    }
132	    
133	    throw new Error(response.message || '添加收藏失败');
134	  }
135	  
136	  /**
137	   * 更新收藏
138	   */
139	  async updateFavorite(id: number, favorite: Partial<FavoritePlace>): Promise<void> {
140	    const response = await this.http.put(`/favorites/${id}`, favorite);
141	    
142	    if (response.code !== 200) {
143	      throw new Error(response.message || '更新失败');
144	    }
145	  }
146	  
147	  /**
148	   * 删除收藏
149	   */
150	  async deleteFavorite(id: number): Promise<void> {
151	    const response = await this.http.delete(`/favorites/${id}`);
152	    
153	    if (response.code !== 200) {
154	      throw new Error(response.message || '删除失败');
155	    }
156	  }
157	  
158	  // ==================== 导航历史相关 ====================
159	  
160	  /**
161	   * 获取导航历史
162	   */
163	  async getNavigationHistory(page: number = 1, pageSize: number = 20): Promise<PageResponse<NavigationHistory>> {
164	    const response = await this.http.get<PageResponse<NavigationHistory>>(
165	      `/navigation/history?page=${page}&pageSize=${pageSize}`
166	    );
167	    
168	    if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
169	      return response.data;
170	    }
171	    
172	    return { list: [], total: 0, page, pageSize };
173	  }
174	  
175	  /**
176	   * 保存导航记录
177	   */
178	  async saveNavigationHistory(history: NavigationHistory): Promise<number> {
179	    const response = await this.http.post<{ id: number }>('/navigation/history', history);
180	    
181	    if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
182	      return response.data.id;
183	    }
184	    
185	    throw new Error(response.message || '保存失败');
186	  }
187	  
188	  /**
189	   * 删除导航历史
190	   */
191	  async deleteNavigationHistory(id: number): Promise<void> {
192	    const response = await this.http.delete(`/navigation/history/${id}`);
193	    
194	    if (response.code !== 200) {
195	      throw new Error(response.message || '删除失败');
196	    }
197	  }
198	  
199	  /**
200	   * 清空导航历史
201	   */
202	  async clearNavigationHistory(): Promise<void> {
203	    const response = await this.http.delete('/navigation/history');
204	    
205	    if (response.code !== 200) {
206	      throw new Error(response.message || '清空失败');
207	    }
208	  }
209	  
210	  // ==================== 行程记录相关 ====================
211	  
212	  /**
213	   * 获取行程列表
214	   */
215	  async getTripRecords(page: number = 1, pageSize: number = 20): Promise<PageResponse<TripRecord>> {
216	    const response = await this.http.get<PageResponse<TripRecord>>(
217	      `/trips?page=${page}&pageSize=${pageSize}`
218	    );
219	    
220	    if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
221	      return response.data;
222	    }
223	    
224	    return { list: [], total: 0, page, pageSize };
225	  }
226	  
227	  /**
228	   * 获取行程详情
229	   */
230	  async getTripRecord(id: number): Promise<TripRecord | null> {
231	    const response = await this.http.get<TripRecord>(`/trips/${id}`);
232	    
233	    if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
234	      return response.data;
235	    }
236	    
237	    return null;
238	  }
239	  
240	  /**
241	   * 创建行程记录
242	   */
243	  async createTripRecord(trip: TripRecord): Promise<number> {
244	    const response = await this.http.post<{ id: number }>('/trips', trip);
245	    
246	    if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
247	      return response.data.id;
248	    }
249	    
250	    throw new Error(response.message || '创建失败');
251	  }
252	  
253	  /**
254	   * 更新行程记录
255	   */
256	  async updateTripRecord(id: number, trip: Partial<TripRecord>): Promise<void> {
257	    const response = await this.http.put(`/trips/${id}`, trip);
258	    
259	    if (response.code !== 200) {
260	      throw new Error(response.message || '更新失败');
261	    }
262	  }
263	  
264	  // ==================== 搜索历史相关 ====================
265	  
266	  /**
267	   * 获取搜索历史
268	   */
269	  async getSearchHistory(): Promise<SearchHistory[]> {
270	    const response = await this.http.get<SearchHistory[]>('/search/history');
271	    
272	    if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
273	      return response.data;
274	    }
275	    
276	    return [];
277	  }
278	  
279	  /**
280	   * 保存搜索记录
281	   */
282	  async saveSearchHistory(keyword: string, resultCount: number = 0): Promise<void> {
283	    await this.http.post('/search/history', { keyword, resultCount });
284	  }
285	  
286	  /**
287	   * 清空搜索历史
288	   */
289	  async clearSearchHistory(): Promise<void> {

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/view/EnhancedNavigationModule.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * 增强版导航模块
2	 * 集成完整的导航功能：定位、路径规划、导航指引、POI搜索
3	 * 使用IP定位（简单可靠）
4	 */
5	import { webview } from '@kit.ArkWeb';
6	import { MapService, Location, POIResult } from '../services/MapService';
7	import { NavigationService, NavigationState, NavigationInfo } from '../services/NavigationService';
8	import { VoiceGuideService } from '../services/VoiceGuideService';
9	import { FavoriteService } from '../services/FavoriteService';
10	import { NavigationHistoryService } from '../services/NavigationHistoryService';
11	import { AuthService } from '../services/AuthService';
12	import { FavoritePlace } from '../models/BackendModels';
13	import promptAction from '@ohos.promptAction';
14	
15	@Component
16	export struct EnhancedNavigationModule {
17	  // 外部传入的导航目的地
18	  @Prop @Watch('onDestinationChange') externalDestination: FavoritePlace | null = null;
19	  
20	  // 地图相关
21	  @State isMapLoaded: boolean = false;
22	  @State zoomLevel: number = 15;
23	  private webController: webview.WebviewController = new webview.WebviewController();
24	  
25	  // 定位相关
26	  @State latitude: number = 30.486874173982763;
27	  @State longitude: number = 114.309994670642;
28	  @State addressText: string = "正在定位...";
29	  
30	  // 导航相关
31	  @State isNavigating: boolean = false;
32	  @State navigationInfo: NavigationInfo | null = null;
33	  @State remainingDistance: string = '';
34	  @State remainingTime: string = '';
35	  @State nextInstruction: string = '';
36	  
37	  // 搜索相关
38	  @State showSearchPanel: boolean = false;
39	  @State searchKeyword: string = '';
40	  @State searchResults: POIResult[] = [];
41	  @State isSearching: boolean = false;
42	  @State showSearchHistory: boolean = false;
43	  @State searchHistory: string[] = [];
44	  
45	  // 服务实例
46	  private mapService: MapService = MapService.getInstance();
47	  private navigationService: NavigationService = NavigationService.getInstance();
48	  private voiceService: VoiceGuideService = VoiceGuideService.getInstance();
49	  private favoriteService: FavoriteService = FavoriteService.getInstance();
50	  private historyService: NavigationHistoryService = NavigationHistoryService.getInstance();
51	  private authService: AuthService = AuthService.getInstance();
52	  
53	  aboutToAppear() {
54	    // 监听导航状态变化
55	    this.navigationService.addListener((info) => {
56	      this.onNavigationUpdate(info);
57	    });
58	    
59	    // 检查是否有外部传入的导航目的地
60	    if (this.externalDestination) {
61	      this.handleExternalDestination();
62	    }
63	  }
64	  
65	  /**
66	   * 监听外部传入的导航目的地变化
67	   */
68	  onDestinationChange() {
69	    if (this.externalDestination) {
70	      this.handleExternalDestination();
71	    }
72	  }
73	  
74	  /**
75	   * 处理外部传入的导航目的地
76	   */
77	  handleExternalDestination() {
78	    if (!this.externalDestination) {
79	      return;
80	    }
81	    
82	    console.log('[Navigation] 收到外部导航目的地:', this.externalDestination.name);
83	    console.log('[Navigation] 坐标:', this.externalDestination.latitude, this.externalDestination.longitude);
84	    
85	    const destination: Location = {
86	      latitude: this.externalDestination.latitude,
87	      longitude: this.externalDestination.longitude
88	    };
89	    
90	    // 如果地图已加载,立即启动导航;否则等待地图加载
91	    if (this.isMapLoaded) {
92	      console.log('[Navigation] 地图已加载,立即启动导航');
93	      // 延迟一下,确保WebView完全准备好
94	      setTimeout(() => {
95	        this.startNavigation(destination);
96	      }, 500);
97	    } else {
98	      console.log('[Navigation] 等待地图加载...');
99	      // 等待地图加载完成后再启动导航
100	      let retryCount = 0;
101	      const maxRetries = 100; // 10秒超时
102	      const checkInterval = setInterval(() => {
103	        retryCount++;
104	        if (this.isMapLoaded) {
105	          console.log('[Navigation] 地图加载完成(重试', retryCount, '次),启动导航');
106	          clearInterval(checkInterval);
107	          // 延迟一下,确保WebView完全准备好
108	          setTimeout(() => {
109	            this.startNavigation(destination);
110	          }, 500);
111	        } else if (retryCount >= maxRetries) {
112	          console.error('[Navigation] 等待地图加载超时');
113	          clearInterval(checkInterval);
114	        }
115	      }, 100);
116	    }
117	  }
118	  
119	  aboutToDisappear() {
120	    this.voiceService.release();
121	  }
122	  
123	  /**
124	   * IP定位
125	   */
126	  async startIPLocation() {
127	    try {
128	      console.log('[Navigation] 开始IP定位...');
129	      this.addressText = "IP定位中...";
130	      
131	      const location = await this.mapService.getCurrentLocation();
132	      
133	      this.latitude = location.latitude;
134	      this.longitude = location.longitude;
135	      this.addressText = location.address ? `IP定位 (${location.address})` : "默认位置(武汉)";
136	      
137	      console.log('[Navigation] IP定位完成:', this.latitude, this.longitude);
138	      
139	      // 更新地图标记
140	      const currentLocation: Location = {
141	        latitude: this.latitude,
142	        longitude: this.longitude
143	      };
144	      this.mapService.addCurrentLocationMarker(currentLocation);
145	      this.mapService.moveToLocation(currentLocation, this.zoomLevel);
146	      
147	    } catch (err) {
148	      console.error('[Navigation] IP定位失败:', err);
149	      this.addressText = "定位失败,使用默认位置";
150	    }
151	  }
152	  
153	  /**
154	   * 地图加载完成
155	   */
156	  onMapLoad() {
157	    this.isMapLoaded = true;
158	    this.mapService.setWebController(this.webController);
159	    
160	    // 移动地图到默认位置
161	    const defaultLocation: Location = {
162	      latitude: this.latitude,
163	      longitude: this.longitude
164	    };
165	    this.mapService.moveToLocation(defaultLocation, this.zoomLevel);
166	    
167	    // 延迟添加标记，确保WebView准备好
168	    setTimeout(() => {
169	      this.mapService.addCurrentLocationMarker(defaultLocation);
170	      console.log('[Navigation] 地图初始化完成');
171	    }, 300);
172	    
173	    // 启动IP定位
174	    setTimeout(() => {
175	      this.startIPLocation();
176	    }, 500);
177	  }
178	  
179	  /**
180	   * 缩放地图
181	   */
182	  changeZoom(delta: number): void {
183	    if (!this.webController) return;
184	    this.zoomLevel = Math.max(3, Math.min(20, this.zoomLevel + delta));
185	    try {
186	      const message = JSON.stringify({
187	        action: 'setZoom',
188	        zoom: this.zoomLevel
189	      });
190	      this.webController.runJavaScript(`window.postMessage('${message}', '*')`);
191	    } catch(e) {
192	      console.error('Change zoom error:', e);
193	    }
194	  }
195	  
196	  /**
197	   * 回到当前位置
198	   */
199	  backToCurrentLocation(): void {
200	    if (this.webController) {
201	      const currentLocation: Location = {
202	        latitude: this.latitude,
203	        longitude: this.longitude
204	      };
205	      this.mapService.moveToLocation(currentLocation, this.zoomLevel);
206	    }
207	  }
208	  
209	  /**
210	   * 开始导航
211	   */
212	  async startNavigation(destination: Location) {
213	    try {
214	      await this.navigationService.startNavigation(destination);
215	      this.isNavigating = true;
216	      this.showSearchPanel = false;
217	    } catch (err) {
218	      console.error('Start navigation error:', err);
219	    }
220	  }
221	  
222	  /**
223	   * 停止导航
224	   */
225	  stopNavigation() {
226	    this.navigationService.stopNavigation();
227	    this.isNavigating = false;
228	    this.navigationInfo = null;
229	    this.addressText = "实时定位";
230	  }
231	  
232	  /**
233	   * 导航状态更新
234	   */
235	  onNavigationUpdate(info: NavigationInfo) {
236	    this.navigationInfo = info;
237	    
238	    // 更新显示信息
239	    if (info.remainingDistance > 1000) {
240	      this.remainingDistance = `${(info.remainingDistance / 1000).toFixed(1)} 公里`;
241	    } else {
242	      this.remainingDistance = `${Math.round(info.remainingDistance)} 米`;
243	    }
244	    
245	    const hours = Math.floor(info.remainingTime / 3600);
246	    const minutes = Math.floor((info.remainingTime % 3600) / 60);
247	    if (hours > 0) {
248	      this.remainingTime = `${hours}小时${minutes}分钟`;
249	    } else {
250	      this.remainingTime = `${minutes}分钟`;
251	    }
252	    
253	    this.nextInstruction = info.nextInstruction;
254	    this.addressText = info.nextInstruction;
255	    
256	    // 到达目的地
257	    if (info.state === NavigationState.ARRIVED) {
258	      this.voiceService.speakArrival();
259	      setTimeout(() => {
260	        this.stopNavigation();
261	      }, 3000);
262	    }
263	  }
264	  
265	  /**
266	   * 搜索POI
267	   */
268	  async searchPOI() {
269	    if (!this.searchKeyword.trim()) return;
270	    
271	    this.isSearching = true;
272	    try {
273	      const currentLocation: Location = { latitude: this.latitude, longitude: this.longitude };
274	      const results = await this.mapService.searchPOI(
275	        this.searchKeyword,
276	        currentLocation,
277	        5000
278	      );
279	      this.searchResults = results;
280	    } catch (err) {
281	      console.error('Search error:', err);
282	    } finally {
283	      this.isSearching = false;
284	    }
285	  }
286	  
287	  /**
288	   * 选择POI并导航
289	   */
290	  selectPOI(poi: POIResult) {
291	    this.startNavigation(poi.location);
292	  }
293	  
294	  /**
295	   * 收藏当前位置或POI
296	   */
297	  async addToFavorites(name: string, address: string, location: Location) {
298	    try {
299	      console.log('[Navigation] 开始收藏:', name);
300	      console.log('[Navigation] 地址:', address);
301	      console.log('[Navigation] 坐标:', location.latitude, location.longitude);
302	      
303	      const isLoggedIn = await this.authService.isLoggedIn();
304	      console.log('[Navigation] 登录状态:', isLoggedIn);
305	      
306	      if (!isLoggedIn) {
307	        console.log('[Navigation] 未登录，提示用户登录');
308	        promptAction.showToast({
309	          message: '请先登录',
310	          duration: 2000
311	        });
312	        return;
313	      }
314	      
315	      const response = await this.favoriteService.addFavorite({
316	        name: name,
317	        address: address,
318	        latitude: location.latitude,
319	        longitude: location.longitude
320	      });
321	      
322	      console.log('[Navigation] 收藏响应代码:', response.code);
323	      console.log('[Navigation] 收藏响应消息:', response.message);
324	      console.log('[Navigation] 完整响应:', JSON.stringify(response));
325	      
326	      if (response.code === 200) {
327	        console.log('[Navigation] 收藏成功');
328	        promptAction.showToast({
329	          message: '收藏成功',
330	          duration: 2000
331	        });
332	      } else {
333	        console.error('[Navigation] 收藏失败:', response.message);
334	        promptAction.showToast({
335	          message: response.message || '收藏失败',
336	          duration: 2000
337	        });
338	      }
339	    } catch (err) {
340	      console.error('[Navigation] 收藏异常 - 类型:', typeof err);
341	      console.error('[Navigation] 收藏异常 - 详情:', JSON.stringify(err));
342	      promptAction.showToast({
343	        message: '收藏失败，请稍后重试',
344	        duration: 2000
345	      });
346	    }
347	  }
348	  
349	  /**
350	   * 加载搜索历史
351	   */
352	  async loadSearchHistory() {
353	    try {
354	      const response = await this.historyService.getHistory();
355	      // 提取最近5条搜索记录的目的地名称
356	      if (response.data && response.data.list) {
357	        this.searchHistory = response.data.list.slice(0, 5).map(item => item.endName);
358	      } else {
359	        this.searchHistory = [];
360	      }
361	    } catch (err) {
362	      console.error('[Navigation] 加载搜索历史失败:', err);
363	      this.searchHistory = [];
364	    }
365	  }
366	  
367	  /**
368	   * 保存导航历史
369	   */
370	  async saveNavigationHistory(destination: Location, destinationName: string) {
371	    try {
372	      const isLoggedIn = await this.authService.isLoggedIn();
373	      if (!isLoggedIn) {
374	        return;
375	      }
376	      
377	      await this.historyService.saveHistory({
378	        startLat: this.latitude,
379	        startLng: this.longitude,
380	        startName: '当前位置',
381	        startAddress: this.addressText,
382	        endLat: destination.latitude,
383	        endLng: destination.longitude,
384	        endName: destinationName,
385	        endAddress: destinationName,
386	        distance: 0, // 实际距离由后端计算
387	        duration: 0  // 实际时长由后端计算
388	      });
389	      
390	      console.log('[Navigation] 导航历史已保存');
391	    } catch (err) {
392	      console.error('[Navigation] 保存导航历史失败:', err);
393	    }
394	  }
395	  
396	  build() {
397	    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.Bottom }) {
398	      // 1. 地图层 - 使用WebView加载高德地图
399	      Stack() {
400	        Web({ src: $rawfile('amap.html'), controller: this.webController })
401	          .width('100%')
402	          .height('100%')
403	          .onPageEnd(() => {
404	            console.log('地图页面加载完成');
405	            this.onMapLoad();
406	          })
407	          .onErrorReceive((event) => {
408	            console.error('地图加载错误:', event?.error);
409	          })
410	          .onConsole((event) => {
411	            // 转发WebView的console日志到ArkTS
412	            if (event && event.message) {
413	              const msg = event.message;
414	              const message = msg.getMessage();
415	              const sourceId = msg.getSourceId();
416	              const lineNumber = msg.getLineNumber();
417	              
418	              // 输出WebView日志，包含来源信息
419	              console.log('[WebView]', message, 'at', sourceId, ':', lineNumber);
420	            }
421	            return false;
422	          })
423	      }
424	      
425	      // 2. 顶部搜索栏
426	      if (!this.isNavigating) {
427	        this.SearchBar()
428	      }
429	      
430	      // 3. 右侧控制按钮
431	      this.ControlButtons()
432	      
433	      // 4. 底部信息面板
434	      if (this.isNavigating && this.navigationInfo) {
435	        this.NavigationPanel()
436	      } else {
437	        this.LocationPanel()
438	      }
439	      
440	      // 5. 搜索结果面板
441	      if (this.showSearchPanel) {
442	        this.SearchResultPanel()
443	      }
444	    }
445	  }
446	  
447	  /**
448	   * 搜索栏
449	   */
450	  @Builder
451	  SearchBar(): void {
452	    Column() {
453	      Row() {
454	        TextInput({ placeholder: '搜索地点、地址' })
455	          .layoutWeight(1)
456	          .height(48)
457	          .backgroundColor(Color.White)
458	          .borderRadius(24)
459	          .padding({ left: 20, right: 20 })
460	          .onChange((value: string): void => {
461	            this.searchKeyword = value;
462	          })
463	          .onFocus(() => {
464	            // 获得焦点时加载搜索历史
465	            this.showSearchHistory = true;
466	            this.loadSearchHistory();
467	          })
468	          .onBlur(() => {
469	            // 延迟隐藏，以便点击历史记录
470	            setTimeout(() => {
471	              this.showSearchHistory = false;
472	            }, 200);
473	          })
474	          .onSubmit((): void => {
475	            this.showSearchPanel = true;
476	            this.showSearchHistory = false;
477	            this.searchPOI();
478	            return;
479	          })
480	        
481	        // 收藏按钮
482	        Button() {
483	          Text('⭐')
484	            .fontSize(20)
485	        }
486	        .height(48)
487	        .width(48)
488	        .backgroundColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.9)')
489	        .borderRadius(24)
490	        .margin({ left: 10 })
491	        .onClick(async () => {
492	          // 收藏当前位置
493	          await this.addToFavorites(
494	            '当前位置',
495	            this.addressText,
496	            { latitude: this.latitude, longitude: this.longitude }
497	          );
498	        })
499	        
500	        Button('搜索')
501	          .height(48)
502	          .backgroundColor('#00E5FF')
503	          .borderRadius(24)
504	          .margin({ left: 10 })
505	          .onClick((): void => {
506	            this.showSearchPanel = true;
507	            this.showSearchHistory = false;
508	            this.searchPOI();
509	          })
510	      }
511	      .width('90%')
512	      
513	      // 搜索历史面板
514	      if (this.showSearchHistory && this.searchHistory.length > 0) {
515	        Column() {
516	          Text('搜索历史')
517	            .fontSize(14)
518	            .fontColor('#666')
519	            .width('100%')
