<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/services/HttpService.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * HTTP服务 - 封装网络请求
2	 * 统一处理HTTP通信、Token管理、错误处理
3	 */
4	import http from '@ohos.net.http';
5	import preferences from '@ohos.data.preferences';
6	import { ApiResponse } from '../models/BackendModels';
7	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
8	
9	/**
10	 * HTTP服务类
11	 */
12	export class HttpService {
13	  private static instance: HttpService;
14	  private token: string = '';
15	  private preferencesInstance: preferences.Preferences | null = null;
16	  private readonly PREFERENCES_NAME = 'app_auth';
17	  
18	  private constructor() {
19	    // 从本地存储加载token
20	    this.initPreferences();
21	  }
22	  
23	  static getInstance(): HttpService {
24	    if (!HttpService.instance) {
25	      HttpService.instance = new HttpService();
26	    }
27	    return HttpService.instance;
28	  }
29	  
30	  /**
31	   * 初始化Preferences
32	   */
33	  private async initPreferences(): Promise<void> {
34	    try {
35	      const context = getContext();
36	      this.preferencesInstance = await preferences.getPreferences(context, this.PREFERENCES_NAME);
37	      await this.loadToken();
38	      console.log('[HttpService] Preferences初始化成功');
39	    } catch (err) {
40	      console.error('[HttpService] Preferences初始化失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
41	    }
42	  }
43	  
44	  /**
45	   * 设置认证token
46	   */
47	  async setToken(token: string): Promise<void> {
48	    this.token = token;
49	    await this.saveToken(token);
50	  }
51	  
52	  /**
53	   * 获取token
54	   */
55	  getToken(): string {
56	    return this.token;
57	  }
58	  
59	  /**
60	   * 清除token
61	   */
62	  async clearToken(): Promise<void> {
63	    this.token = '';
64	    try {
65	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
66	        await this.preferencesInstance.delete(ApiConfig.TOKEN_KEY);
67	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
68	        console.log('[HttpService] Token已清除');
69	      }
70	    } catch (err) {
71	      console.error('[HttpService] 清除Token失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
72	    }
73	  }
74	  
75	  /**
76	   * 保存token到Preferences
77	   */
78	  private async saveToken(token: string): Promise<void> {
79	    try {
80	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
81	        await this.preferencesInstance.put(ApiConfig.TOKEN_KEY, token);
82	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
83	        console.log('[HttpService] Token已保存');
84	      }
85	    } catch (err) {
86	      console.error('[HttpService] 保存Token失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
87	    }
88	  }
89	  
90	  /**
91	   * 从Preferences加载token
92	   */
93	  private async loadToken(): Promise<void> {
94	    try {
95	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
96	        const token = await this.preferencesInstance.get(ApiConfig.TOKEN_KEY, '');
97	        if (token && token !== '') {
98	          this.token = token as string;
99	          console.log('[HttpService] Token已加载');
100	        }
101	      }
102	    } catch (err) {
103	      console.error('[HttpService] 加载Token失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
104	    }
105	  }
106	  
107	  /**
108	   * 发送HTTP请求
109	   */
110	  private async request<T>(
111	    method: http.RequestMethod,
112	    url: string,
113	    data?: Object,
114	    needAuth: boolean = true
115	  ): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
116	    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
117	      const httpRequest = http.createHttp();
118	      
119	      const fullUrl = `${ApiConfig.BASE_URL}${url}`;
120	      console.log(`[HttpService] ========== 请求详情 ==========`);
121	      console.log(`[HttpService] 方法: ${method}`);
122	      console.log(`[HttpService] BASE_URL: ${ApiConfig.BASE_URL}`);
123	      console.log(`[HttpService] 路径: ${url}`);
124	      console.log(`[HttpService] 完整URL: ${fullUrl}`);
125	      console.log(`[HttpService] ================================`);
126	      
127	      const headers: Record<string, string> = {
128	        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
129	      };
130	      
131	      // 添加认证头
132	      if (needAuth && this.token) {
133	        headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;
134	      }
135	      
136	      const options: http.HttpRequestOptions = {
137	        method,
138	        header: headers,
139	        readTimeout: ApiConfig.TIMEOUT,
140	        connectTimeout: ApiConfig.TIMEOUT
141	      };
142	      
143	      // 添加请求体
144	      if (data && (method === http.RequestMethod.POST || method === http.RequestMethod.PUT)) {
145	        options.extraData = JSON.stringify(data);
146	        console.log('[HttpService] 请求数据:', JSON.stringify(data));
147	      }
148	      
149	      console.log('[HttpService] 开始发送请求...');
150	      
151	      httpRequest.request(fullUrl, options, (err: Error, data: http.HttpResponse) => {
152	        console.log('[HttpService] 收到响应回调');
153	        
154	        if (err) {
155	          console.error('[HttpService] ========== 错误详情 ==========');
156	          console.error('[HttpService] 请求失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
157	          console.error('[HttpService] ================================');
158	          const errorMessage = this.getErrorMessage(err);
159	          reject({
160	            code: -1,
161	            message: errorMessage
162	          });
163	          httpRequest.destroy();
164	          return;
165	        }
166	        
167	        try {
168	          const responseCode = data.responseCode;
169	          const resultString = data.result as string;
170	          
171	          console.log(`[HttpService] ========== 响应详情 ==========`);
172	          console.log(`[HttpService] HTTP状态码: ${responseCode}`);
173	          console.log(`[HttpService] 响应内容: ${resultString}`);
174	          console.log(`[HttpService] 响应头: ${JSON.stringify(data.header)}`);
175	          console.log(`[HttpService] ================================`);
176	          
177	          // 尝试解析响应体
178	          let response: ApiResponse<T>;
179	          try {
180	            response = JSON.parse(resultString) as ApiResponse<T>;
181	          } catch (parseErr) {
182	            console.error('[HttpService] 响应解析失败:', JSON.stringify(parseErr));
183	            // 如果解析失败，使用HTTP状态码生成错误信息
184	            reject({
185	              code: responseCode,
186	              message: this.getHttpStatusMessage(responseCode)
187	            });
188	            httpRequest.destroy();
189	            return;
190	          }
191	          
192	          // 处理HTTP状态码
193	          if (responseCode !== 200 && responseCode !== 201) {
194	            // 返回后端的实际错误信息
195	            reject(response);
196	            httpRequest.destroy();
197	            return;
198	          }
199	          
200	          // 处理401未授权
201	          if (response.code === 401) {
202	            console.log('[HttpService] Token无效，清除本地token');
203	            this.clearToken();
204	          }
205	          
206	          console.log(`[HttpService] 请求成功: ${response.code} ${response.message}`);
207	          resolve(response);
208	        } catch (parseErr) {
209	          console.error('[HttpService] 响应解析失败:', JSON.stringify(parseErr));
210	          reject({
211	            code: -1,
212	            message: '响应解析失败'
213	          });
214	        } finally {
215	          httpRequest.destroy();
216	        }
217	      });
218	    });
219	  }
220	  
221	  /**
222	   * 获取错误信息
223	   */
224	  private getErrorMessage(err: Error): string {
225	    const errorStr = JSON.stringify(err);
226	    const errorObj = JSON.parse(errorStr) as Record<string, Object>;
227	    const errorCode = errorObj['code'] as number;
228	    
229	    // 网络错误映射
230	    const errorMap: Record<number, string> = {
231	      2300001: '协议不支持',
232	      2300003: 'URL格式错误',
233	      2300005: '无法解析远程主机名',
234	      2300006: '无法连接到服务器',
235	      2300007: '无法连接到代理服务器',
236	      2300008: '无效的服务器响应',
237	      2300009: '远程服务器拒绝访问',
238	      2300023: '写入数据失败',
239	      2300025: '上传失败',
240	      2300026: '读取数据失败',
241	      2300027: '内存不足',
242	      2300028: '操作超时',
243	      2300047: '请求数量过多',
244	      2300052: '服务器返回空数据',
245	      2300055: '发送网络数据失败',
246	      2300056: '接收网络数据失败',
247	      2300058: '本地SSL证书问题',
248	      2300059: '无法使用指定的SSL加密',
249	      2300060: '远程SSL证书无效',
250	      2300077: 'SSL CA证书无效',
251	      2300078: '远程服务器无法访问'
252	    };
253	    
254	    return errorMap[errorCode] || '网络请求失败';
255	  }
256	  
257	  /**
258	   * 获取HTTP状态码对应的错误信息
259	   */
260	  private getHttpStatusMessage(statusCode: number): string {
261	    const statusMap: Record<number, string> = {
262	      400: '请求参数错误',
263	      401: '登录已过期，请重新登录',
264	      403: '无权限访问',
265	      404: '请求的资源不存在',
266	      500: '服务器错误，请稍后重试',
267	      502: '网关错误',
268	      503: '服务暂时不可用，请稍后重试',
269	      504: '网关超时'
270	    };
271	    
272	    return statusMap[statusCode] || `请求失败 (${statusCode})`;
273	  }
274	  
275	  /**
276	   * GET请求
277	   */
278	  async get<T>(url: string, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
279	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.GET, url, undefined, needAuth);
280	  }
281	  
282	  /**
283	   * POST请求
284	   */
285	  async post<T>(url: string, data: Object, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
286	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.POST, url, data, needAuth);
287	  }
288	  
289	  /**
290	   * PUT请求
291	   */
292	  async put<T>(url: string, data: Object, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
293	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.PUT, url, data, needAuth);
294	  }
295	  
296	  /**
297	   * DELETE请求
298	   */
299	  async delete<T>(url: string, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
300	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.DELETE, url, undefined, needAuth);
301	  }
302	}
303
```

```text
5	/**

32	/**

35	interface CacheExpireConfig {
36	  FAVORITES: number;
37	  HISTORY: number;
38	  FREQUENT: number;
39	  USER_INFO: number;
40	}

42	export class ApiConfig {

51	  // 超时配置（毫秒）

56	  static readonly USER_KEY = 'user_info';
57	  
58	  // API端点

60	    // 认证
```

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/services/NavigationService.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * 导航服务 - 管理导航状态和逻辑
2	 * 使用IP定位（不支持实时追踪）
3	 */
4	import { MapService, Location, RouteInfo } from './MapService';
5	
6	export enum NavigationState {
7	  IDLE = 0,           // 空闲
8	  PLANNING = 1,       // 规划中
9	  NAVIGATING = 2,     // 导航中
10	  PAUSED = 3,         // 暂停
11	  ARRIVED = 4         // 已到达
12	}
13	
14	export interface NavigationInfo {
15	  state: NavigationState;
16	  currentLocation: Location;
17	  destination: Location;
18	  route: RouteInfo | null;
19	  remainingDistance: number;  // 剩余距离（米）
20	  remainingTime: number;      // 剩余时间（秒）
21	  currentStepIndex: number;   // 当前步骤索引
22	  nextInstruction: string;    // 下一个指令
23	}
24	
25	/**
26	 * 导航服务类
27	 */
28	export class NavigationService {
29	  private static instance: NavigationService;
30	  private mapService: MapService;
31	  private navigationInfo: NavigationInfo | null = null;
32	  private listeners: ((info: NavigationInfo) => void)[] = [];
33	  
34	  private constructor() {
35	    this.mapService = MapService.getInstance();
36	  }
37	  
38	  static getInstance(): NavigationService {
39	    if (!NavigationService.instance) {
40	      NavigationService.instance = new NavigationService();
41	    }
42	    return NavigationService.instance;
43	  }
44	  
45	  /**
46	   * 开始导航
47	   */
48	  async startNavigation(destination: Location): Promise<void> {
49	    try {
50	      // 获取当前位置（IP定位）
51	      let currentLocation: Location;
52	      try {
53	        currentLocation = await this.mapService.getCurrentLocation();
54	        console.log('[NavigationService] 获取到当前位置:', currentLocation.latitude, currentLocation.longitude);
55	      } catch (err) {
56	        console.warn('[NavigationService] 获取当前位置失败，使用默认位置:', String(err));
57	        currentLocation = {
58	          latitude: 30.486874173982763,
59	          longitude: 114.309994670642
60	        };
61	      }
62	      
63	      console.log('[NavigationService] 起点:', currentLocation.latitude, currentLocation.longitude);
64	      console.log('[NavigationService] 终点:', destination.latitude, destination.longitude);
65	      
66	      // 更新状态为规划中
67	      this.updateNavigationInfo({
68	        state: NavigationState.PLANNING,
69	        currentLocation,
70	        destination,
71	        route: null,
72	        remainingDistance: 0,
73	        remainingTime: 0,
74	        currentStepIndex: 0,
75	        nextInstruction: '正在规划路线...'
76	      });
77	      
78	      // 规划路线
79	      const route = await this.mapService.planRoute(currentLocation, destination, 0);
80	      
81	      // 绘制路线
82	      this.mapService.drawRoute(route);
83	      
84	      // 更新状态为导航中
85	      this.updateNavigationInfo({
86	        state: NavigationState.NAVIGATING,
87	        currentLocation,
88	        destination,
89	        route,
90	        remainingDistance: route.distance,
91	        remainingTime: route.duration,
92	        currentStepIndex: 0,
93	        nextInstruction: route.steps[0]?.instruction || '开始导航'
94	      });
95	      
96	      console.log('[NavigationService] 导航已启动（IP定位，无实时追踪）');
97	      
98	    } catch (err) {
99	      console.error('Start navigation error:', err);
100	      throw new Error('导航启动失败: ' + String(err));
101	    }
102	  }
103	  
104	  /**
105	   * 停止导航
106	   */
107	  stopNavigation(): void {
108	    this.mapService.clearOverlays();
109	    this.navigationInfo = null;
110	    this.notifyListeners();
111	  }
112	  
113	  /**
114	   * 暂停导航
115	   */
116	  pauseNavigation(): void {
117	    if (this.navigationInfo) {
118	      this.navigationInfo.state = NavigationState.PAUSED;
119	      this.notifyListeners();
120	    }
121	  }
122	  
123	  /**
124	   * 恢复导航
125	   */
126	  resumeNavigation(): void {
127	    if (this.navigationInfo && this.navigationInfo.state === NavigationState.PAUSED) {
128	      this.navigationInfo.state = NavigationState.NAVIGATING;
129	      this.notifyListeners();
130	    }
131	  }
132	  
133	  /**
134	   * 重新规划路线
135	   */
136	  async replanRoute(): Promise<void> {
137	    if (!this.navigationInfo) return;
138	    
139	    try {
140	      const currentLocation = await this.mapService.getCurrentLocation();
141	      const route = await this.mapService.planRoute(currentLocation, this.navigationInfo.destination, 0);
142	      
143	      this.mapService.clearOverlays();
144	      this.mapService.drawRoute(route);
145	      
146	      if (this.navigationInfo) {
147	        this.navigationInfo.currentLocation = currentLocation;
148	        this.navigationInfo.route = route;
149	        this.navigationInfo.remainingDistance = route.distance;
150	        this.navigationInfo.remainingTime = route.duration;
151	        this.navigationInfo.currentStepIndex = 0;
152	        this.navigationInfo.nextInstruction = route.steps[0]?.instruction || '';
153	        this.notifyListeners();
154	      }
155	    } catch (err) {
156	      console.error('Replan route error:', err);
157	    }
158	  }
159	  
160	  /**
161	   * 获取当前导航信息
162	   */
163	  getNavigationInfo(): NavigationInfo | null {
164	    return this.navigationInfo;
165	  }
166	  
167	  /**
168	   * 添加导航状态监听器
169	   */
170	  addListener(listener: (info: NavigationInfo) => void): void {
171	    this.listeners.push(listener);
172	  }
173	  
174	  /**
175	   * 移除导航状态监听器
176	   */
177	  removeListener(listener: (info: NavigationInfo) => void): void {
178	    const index = this.listeners.indexOf(listener);
179	    if (index > -1) {
180	      this.listeners.splice(index, 1);
181	    }
182	  }
183	  
184	  /**
185	   * 更新导航信息
186	   */
187	  private updateNavigationInfo(info: NavigationInfo): void {
188	    this.navigationInfo = info;
189	    this.notifyListeners();
190	  }
191	  
192	  /**
193	   * 通知所有监听器
194	   */
195	  private notifyListeners(): void {
196	    if (this.navigationInfo) {
197	      this.listeners.forEach(listener => {
198	        try {
199	          listener(this.navigationInfo!);
200	        } catch (err) {
201	          console.error('Listener error:', err);
202	        }
203	      });
204	    }
205	  }
206	}
207
```
</details></tool-use>

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-ac7f8aea/entry/src/main/ets/services/MapService.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * 地图服务 - 封装地图SDK核心功能
2	 * 使用高德地图Web服务API + JS API (WebView)
3	 * 定位方式：纯IP定位
4	 */
5	import { webview } from '@kit.ArkWeb';
6	import { AmapService } from './AmapService';
7	import { Location, RouteInfo, RouteStep, POIResult, MarkerType } from '../models/NavigationModels';
8	
9	/**
10	 * 坐标点接口
11	 */
12	interface CoordinatePoint {
13	  latitude: number;
14	  longitude: number;
15	}
16	
17	/**
18	 * WebView消息数据接口
19	 */
20	interface WebMessageData {
21	  action: string;
22	  path?: number[][];
23	  lng?: number;
24	  lat?: number;
25	  zoom?: number;
26	  title?: string;
27	}
28	
29	/**
30	 * 地图服务类
31	 */
32	export class MapService {
33	  private static instance: MapService;
34	  private webController: webview.WebviewController | null = null;
35	  private amapService: AmapService;
36	  
37	  private constructor() {
38	    this.amapService = AmapService.getInstance();
39	  }
40	  
41	  static getInstance(): MapService {
42	    if (!MapService.instance) {
43	      MapService.instance = new MapService();
44	    }
45	    return MapService.instance;
46	  }
47	  
48	  /**
49	   * 设置WebView控制器
50	   */
51	  setWebController(controller: webview.WebviewController): void {
52	    this.webController = controller;
53	    console.log('[MapService] WebView控制器已设置');
54	  }
55	  
56	  /**
57	   * 向WebView发送消息
58	   */
59	  private sendMessageToWeb(action: string, data: Record<string, Object>): void {
60	    if (!this.webController) {
61	      console.error('[MapService] WebController not initialized');
62	      return;
63	    }
64	    
65	    try {
66	      const messageData: WebMessageData = {
67	        action: action
68	      };
69	      
70	      // 合并data到messageData
71	      const keys = Object.keys(data);
72	      for (let i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
73	        const key = keys[i];
74	        const value = data[key];
75	        if (key === 'path' && Array.isArray(value)) {
76	          messageData.path = value as number[][];
77	        } else if (key === 'lng' && typeof value === 'number') {
78	          messageData.lng = value;
79	        } else if (key === 'lat' && typeof value === 'number') {
80	          messageData.lat = value;
81	        } else if (key === 'zoom' && typeof value === 'number') {
82	          messageData.zoom = value;
83	        } else if (key === 'title' && typeof value === 'string') {
84	          messageData.title = value;
85	        }
86	      }
87	      
88	      const message = JSON.stringify(messageData);
89	      console.log('[MapService] 发送消息到WebView:', action);
90	      if (action === 'drawRoute' && messageData.path) {
91	        console.log('[MapService] 路线坐标点数:', messageData.path.length);
92	        console.log('[MapService] 起点:', messageData.path[0]);
93	        console.log('[MapService] 终点:', messageData.path[messageData.path.length - 1]);
94	      }
95	      if (action === 'addMarker' || action === 'addCurrentLocationMarker') {
96	        console.log('[MapService] 标记位置: [', messageData.lng, ',', messageData.lat, ']');
97	      }
98	      
99	      // 使用JSON.stringify转义特殊字符，然后替换单引号避免JS语法错误
100	      const escapedMessage = message.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "\\'");
101	      const script = `window.postMessage('${escapedMessage}', '*')`;
102	      
103	      console.log('[MapService] 执行JS脚本长度:', script.length);
104	      this.webController.runJavaScript(script);
105	    } catch (err) {
106	      console.error('[MapService] Send message error:', String(err));
107	    }
108	  }
109	  
110	  /**
111	   * 创建包含数字的数据对象
112	   */
113	  private createNumberData(key1: string, value1: number, key2?: string, value2?: number, key3?: string, value3?: number): Record<string, Object> {
114	    const data: Record<string, Object> = {};
115	    data[key1] = value1 as Object;
116	    if (key2 !== undefined && value2 !== undefined) {
117	      data[key2] = value2 as Object;
118	    }
119	    if (key3 !== undefined && value3 !== undefined) {
120	      data[key3] = value3 as Object;
121	    }
122	    return data;
123	  }
124	  
125	  /**
126	   * 创建包含路径的数据对象
127	   */
128	  private createPathData(path: number[][]): Record<string, Object> {
129	    const data: Record<string, Object> = {};
130	    data['path'] = path as Object;
131	    return data;
132	  }
133	  
134	  /**
135	   * 创建空数据对象
136	   */
137	  private createEmptyData(): Record<string, Object> {
138	    const data: Record<string, Object> = {};
139	    return data;
140	  }
141	  
142	  /**
143	   * 获取当前位置
144	   * 使用IP定位，失败时使用默认坐标
145	   */
146	  async getCurrentLocation(): Promise<Location> {
147	    try {
148	      console.log('[MapService] 开始IP定位...');
149	      const location = await this.amapService.getLocationByIP();
150	      if (location) {
151	        console.log('[MapService] IP定位成功:', location.latitude, location.longitude);
152	        return location;
153	      }
154	    } catch (err) {
155	      console.error('[MapService] IP定位失败:', err);
156	    }
157	    
158	    // IP定位失败，使用武汉默认坐标
159	    console.warn('[MapService] IP定位失败，使用默认坐标');
160	    return {
161	      latitude: 30.486874173982763,
162	      longitude: 114.309994670642,
163	      address: '武汉市',
164	      name: '默认位置'
165	    };
166	  }
167	  
168	  /**
169	   * 路径规划 - 使用高德地图API
170	   */
171	  async planRoute(start: Location, end: Location, strategy: number): Promise<RouteInfo> {
172	    try {
173	      console.log('开始路径规划');
174	      
175	      const route = await this.amapService.planRoute(start, end, strategy);
176	      
177	      if (route) {
178	        console.log('路径规划成功');
179	        return route;
180	      }
181	      
182	      throw new Error('路径规划失败: 未获取到路线数据');
183	    } catch (err) {
184	      console.error('Plan route error:', String(err));
185	      throw new Error('路径规划失败: ' + String(err));
186	    }
187	  }
188	  
189	  /**
190	   * POI搜索 - 使用高德地图API
191	   */
192	  async searchPOI(keyword: string, location: Location | null, radius: number): Promise<POIResult[]> {
193	    try {
194	      console.log('开始POI搜索:', keyword);
195	      
196	      const results = await this.amapService.searchPOI(keyword, location, radius);
197	      
198	      console.log('POI搜索结果:', results.length, '个');
199	      return results;
200	    } catch (err) {
201	      console.error('Search POI error:', String(err));
202	      return [];
203	    }
204	  }
205	  
206	  /**
207	   * 周边搜索
208	   */
209	  async searchNearby(location: Location, type: string, radius: number): Promise<POIResult[]> {
210	    try {
211	      return await this.amapService.searchNearby(location, type, radius);
212	    } catch (err) {
213	      console.error('Search nearby error:', String(err));
214	      return [];
215	    }
216	  }
217	  
218	  /**
219	   * 地理编码 - 地址转坐标
220	   */
221	  async geocode(address: string): Promise<Location | null> {
222	    try {
223	      return await this.amapService.geocode(address);
224	    } catch (err) {
225	      console.error('Geocode error:', String(err));
226	      return null;
227	    }
228	  }
229	  
230	  /**
231	   * 逆地理编码 - 坐标转地址
232	   */
233	  async regeocode(location: Location): Promise<string> {
234	    try {
235	      return await this.amapService.regeocode(location);
236	    } catch (err) {
237	      console.error('Regeocode error:', String(err));
238	      return '未知地址';
239	    }
240	  }
241	  
242	  /**
243	   * 在地图上绘制路线
244	   */
245	  drawRoute(routeInfo: RouteInfo): void {
246	    if (!this.webController) {
247	      console.error('[MapService] WebController not initialized');
248	      return;
249	    }
250	    
251	    if (!routeInfo || !routeInfo.polyline) {
252	      console.error('[MapService] Invalid route info');
253	      return;
254	    }
255	    
256	    try {
257	      console.log('[MapService] 开始绘制路线');
258	      console.log('[MapService] 路线距离:', routeInfo.distance, '米');
259	      console.log('[MapService] 预计时间:', routeInfo.duration, '秒');
260	      console.log('[MapService] Polyline原始数据:', routeInfo.polyline.substring(0, 100) + '...');
261	      
262	      // 解析路线坐标点
263	      const points = this.parsePolyline(routeInfo.polyline);
264	      
265	      if (points.length === 0) {
266	        console.error('[MapService] No points parsed from polyline');
267	        return;
268	      }
269	      
270	      console.log('[MapService] 解析到', points.length, '个坐标点');
271	      console.log('[MapService] 第一个点(起点):', points[0].latitude, points[0].longitude);
272	      console.log('[MapService] 最后一个点(终点):', points[points.length - 1].latitude, points[points.length - 1].longitude);
273	      
274	      // 转换为高德地图JS API格式 [lng, lat]
275	      const path: number[][] = [];
276	      for (const point of points) {
277	        path.push([point.longitude, point.latitude]);
278	      }
279	      
280	      console.log('[MapService] 转换后起点 [经度,纬度]:', path[0]);
281	      console.log('[MapService] 转换后终点 [经度,纬度]:', path[path.length - 1]);
282	      
283	      // 发送绘制路线消息到WebView
284	      const routeData = this.createPathData(path);
285	      this.sendMessageToWeb('drawRoute', routeData);
286	      
287	      console.log('[MapService] 路线绘制命令已发送');
288	      
289	    } catch (err) {
290	      console.error('[MapService] Draw route error:', String(err));
291	    }
292	  }
293	  
294	  /**
295	   * 解析高德地图的 polyline 编码
296	   * 简化版本：将坐标字符串转换为坐标点数组
297	   */
298	  private parsePolyline(polyline: string): CoordinatePoint[] {
299	    const points: CoordinatePoint[] = [];
300	    
301	    if (!polyline || polyline.length === 0) {
302	      return points;
303	    }
304	    
305	    try {
306	      // 高德的 polyline 格式：经度,纬度;经度,纬度;...
307	      const coords = polyline.split(';');
308	      
309	      for (let i = 0; i < coords.length; i++) {
310	        const coord = coords[i].split(',');
311	        if (coord.length === 2) {
312	          const lng = parseFloat(coord[0]);
313	          const lat = parseFloat(coord[1]);
314	          
315	          if (!isNaN(lng) && !isNaN(lat) && 
316	              lat >= -90 && lat <= 90 && 
317	              lng >= -180 && lng <= 180) {
318	            const point: CoordinatePoint = {
319	              latitude: lat,
320	              longitude: lng
321	            };
322	            points.push(point);
323	          }
324	        }
325	      }
326	      
327	      // 优化: 如果点太多,进行抽稀处理
328	      if (points.length > 500) {
329	        console.log('[MapService] 坐标点过多(', points.length, '),进行抽稀处理');
330	        return this.simplifyPoints(points, 500);
331	      }
332	      
333	    } catch (err) {
334	      console.error('[MapService] Parse polyline error:', String(err));
335	    }
336	    
337	    return points;
338	  }
339	  
340	  /**
341	   * 点抽稀算法 (简化版)
342	   */
343	  private simplifyPoints(points: CoordinatePoint[], maxPoints: number): CoordinatePoint[] {
344	    if (points.length <= maxPoints) {
345	      return points;
346	    }
347	    
348	    const step = Math.ceil(points.length / maxPoints);
349	    const simplified: CoordinatePoint[] = [];
350	    
351	    for (let i = 0; i < points.length; i += step) {
352	      simplified.push(points[i]);
353	    }
354	    
355	    // 确保最后一个点被包含
356	    const lastPoint = points[points.length - 1];
357	    const lastSimplified = simplified[simplified.length - 1];
358	    if (lastSimplified.latitude !== lastPoint.latitude || 
359	        lastSimplified.longitude !== lastPoint.longitude) {
360	      simplified.push(lastPoint);
361	    }
362	    
363	    console.log('[MapService] 抽稀后坐标点数量:', simplified.length);
364	    return simplified;
365	  }
366	  
367	  /**
368	   * 添加地图标记
369	   */
370	  addMarker(location: Location, title: string, type: MarkerType): string {
371	    if (!this.webController) {
372	      console.error('[MapService] WebController not initialized');
373	      return '';
374	    }
375	    
376	    // 验证location有效性
377	    if (!location || 
378	        typeof location.latitude !== 'number' || 
379	        typeof location.longitude !== 'number' ||
380	        location.latitude < -90 || location.latitude > 90 ||
381	        location.longitude < -180 || location.longitude > 180) {
382	      console.error('[MapService] Invalid location:', location);
383	      return '';
384	    }
385	    
386	    try {
387	      console.log('[MapService] 添加标记:', title, 'at', location.latitude, location.longitude, 'type:', type);
388	      
389	      // 发送添加标记消息到WebView
390	      const markerData = this.createNumberData('lng', location.longitude, 'lat', location.latitude);
391	      markerData['title'] = title as Object;
392	      this.sendMessageToWeb('addMarker', markerData);
393	      
394	      return 'marker_' + Date.now();
395	      
396	    } catch (err) {
397	      console.error('[MapService] Add marker error:', String(err));
398	      return '';
399	    }
400	  }
401

404	   */

416	      this.sendMessageToWeb('clearOverlays', emptyData);
417	      
418	    } catch (err) {

420	    }
421	  }
422

425	   */
426	  removeMarker(markerId: string): void {

428	      console.error('[MapService] WebController not initialized');
429	      return;
430	    }
431	    
432	    try {

434	      // Note: 当前实现中标记由WebView管理,暂不支持单独移除
435	      // 可以通过clearOverlays清除所有标记
436	    } catch (err) {
437	      console.error('[MapService] Remove marker error:', String(err));
438	    }
439	  }
440

442	   * 移动地图到指定位置
443	   */
444	  moveToLocation(location: Location, zoom: number): void {
445	    if (!this.webController) {
446	      console.error('[MapService] WebController not initialized');
447	      return;
448	    }

452

454	      const centerData = this.createNumberData('lng', location.longitude, 'lat', location.latitude, 'zoom', zoom);
455	      this.sendMessageToWeb('setCenter', centerData);

459	    }

464	   */
465	  addCurrentLocationMarker(location: Location): void {
```

```text
0	/**
1	 * 高德地图API服务
2	 * 文档: https://lbs.amap.com/api/webservice/summary
3	 */
4	import http from '@ohos.net.http';
5	import { Location, RouteInfo, RouteStep, POIResult } from '../models/NavigationModels';
6	
7	// 高德地图API配置
8	const AMAP_KEY = '2455309b8d8bb76cfdfebccb98f20153';  // TODO: 替换为你的API Key
9	const AMAP_BASE_URL = 'https://restapi.amap.com/v3';
10	
11	/**
12	 * 高德地图服务类
13	 */
14	export class AmapService {
15	  private static instance: AmapService;
16	  
17	  private constructor() {}
18	  
19	  static getInstance(): AmapService {
20	    if (!AmapService.instance) {
21	      AmapService.instance = new AmapService();
22	    }
23	    return AmapService.instance;
24	  }
25	  
26	  /**
27	   * 发送HTTP请求
28	   */
29	  private async request(url: string): Promise<Record<string, Object>> {
30	    return new Promise<Record<string, Object>>((resolve, reject) => {
31	      const httpRequest = http.createHttp();
32	      
33	      httpRequest.request(url, {
34	        method: http.RequestMethod.GET,
35	        readTimeout: 30000,
36	        connectTimeout: 30000
37	      }, (err, data) => {
38	        if (err) {
39	          console.error('Amap request error:', err);
40	          httpRequest.destroy();
41	          reject(err);
42	          return;
43	        }
44	        
45	        try {
46	          const response = JSON.parse(data.result as string) as Record<string, Object>;
47	          const status = response['status'] as string;
48	          if (status === '1') {
49	            resolve(response);
50	          } else {
51	            const info = response['info'] as string;
52	            reject(new Error(info || '请求失败'));
53	          }
54	        } catch (parseErr) {
55	          reject(new Error('响应解析失败'));
56	        } finally {
57	          httpRequest.destroy();
58	        }
59	      });
60	    });
61	  }
62	  
63	  /**
64	   * IP定位 - 通过IP地址获取大致位置(不需要GPS)
65	   */
66	  async getLocationByIP(): Promise<Location | null> {
67	    try {
68	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/ip?key=${AMAP_KEY}`;
69	      console.log('[AmapService] IP定位请求:', url);
70	      
71	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
72	      
73	      const province = response['province'] as string;
74	      const city = response['city'] as string;
75	      const rectangle = response['rectangle'] as string;
76	      
77	      console.log('[AmapService] IP定位结果 - 省份:', province, '城市:', city);
78	      
79	      if (rectangle && rectangle.length > 0) {
80	        // rectangle格式: "经度1,纬度1;经度2,纬度2"
81	        const parts = rectangle.split(';');
82	        if (parts.length >= 1) {
83	          const coords = parts[0].split(',');
84	          const lng = parseFloat(coords[0]);
85	          const lat = parseFloat(coords[1]);
86	          
87	          console.log('[AmapService] IP定位坐标:', lat, lng);
88	          
89	          return {
90	            latitude: lat,
91	            longitude: lng,
92	            address: province + city,
93	            name: 'IP定位'
94	          };
95	        }
96	      }
97	      
98	      return null;
99	    } catch (err) {
100	      console.error('[AmapService] IP定位失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
101	      return null;
102	    }
103	  }
104	  
105	  /**
106	   * 地理编码 - 地址转坐标
107	   */
108	  async geocode(address: string): Promise<Location | null> {
109	    try {
110	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/geocode/geo?key=${AMAP_KEY}&address=${encodeURIComponent(address)}`;
111	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
112	      
113	      const geocodes = response['geocodes'] as Array<Record<string, Object>>;
114	      if (geocodes && geocodes.length > 0) {
115	        const geo: Record<string, Object> = geocodes[0];
116	        const locationStr = geo['location'] as string;
117	        const parts: string[] = locationStr.split(',');
118	        const lng: number = parseFloat(parts[0]);
119	        const lat: number = parseFloat(parts[1]);
120	        
121	        return {
122	          latitude: lat,
123	          longitude: lng,
124	          address: geo['formatted_address'] as string,
125	          name: address
126	        };
127	      }
128	      
129	      return null;
130	    } catch (err) {
131	      console.error('Geocode error:', JSON.stringify(err));
132	      return null;
133	    }
134	  }
135	  
136	  /**
137	   * 逆地理编码 - 坐标转地址
138	   */
139	  async regeocode(location: Location): Promise<string> {
140	    try {
141	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/geocode/regeo?key=${AMAP_KEY}&location=${location.longitude},${location.latitude}`;
142	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
143	      
144	      const regeocode = response['regeocode'] as Record<string, Object>;
145	      if (regeocode) {
146	        return regeocode['formatted_address'] as string;
147	      }
148	      
149	      return '未知地址';
150	    } catch (err) {
151	      console.error('Regeocode error:', JSON.stringify(err));
152	      return '未知地址';
153	    }
154	  }
155	  
156	  /**
157	   * 路径规划 - 驾车
158	   */
159	  async planRoute(origin: Location, destination: Location, strategy: number): Promise<RouteInfo | null> {
160	    try {
161	      const originStr = `${origin.longitude},${origin.latitude}`;
162	      const destStr = `${destination.longitude},${destination.latitude}`;
163	      
164	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/direction/driving?key=${AMAP_KEY}&origin=${originStr}&destination=${destStr}&strategy=${strategy}&extensions=all`;
165	      
166	      console.log('[AmapService] 请求路径规划 URL:', url);
167	      
168	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
169	      
170	      console.log('[AmapService] 路径规划响应 status:', response['status']);
171	      
172	      const route = response['route'] as Record<string, Object>;
173	      if (route) {
174	        const paths = route['paths'] as Array<Record<string, Object>>;
175	        console.log('[AmapService] paths 数量:', paths ? paths.length : 0);
176	        
177	        if (paths && paths.length > 0) {
178	          const path: Record<string, Object> = paths[0];
179	          
180	          console.log('[AmapService] path 对象 keys:', Object.keys(path).join(', '));
181	          console.log('[AmapService] polyline 值:', path['polyline']);
182	          console.log('[AmapService] polyline 类型:', typeof path['polyline']);
183	          
184	          // 解析路线步骤
185	          const steps: RouteStep[] = [];
186	          const pathSteps = path['steps'] as Array<Record<string, Object>>;
187	          if (pathSteps) {
188	            for (let i = 0; i < pathSteps.length; i++) {
189	              const step: Record<string, Object> = pathSteps[i];
190	              const roadValue = step['road'];
191	              const actionValue = step['action'];
192	              steps.push({
193	                instruction: step['instruction'] as string,
194	                distance: parseInt(step['distance'] as string),
195	                duration: parseInt(step['duration'] as string),
196	                road: (roadValue !== null && roadValue !== undefined) ? (roadValue as string) : '',
197	                action: (actionValue !== null && actionValue !== undefined) ? (actionValue as string) : ''
198	              });
199	            }
200	          }
201	          
202	          const tollDistValue = path['toll_distance'];
203	          const tollsValue = path['tolls'];
204	          const trafficValue = path['traffic_lights'];
205	          
206	          // 获取 polyline，如果不存在则从 steps 中拼接
207	          let polyline = path['polyline'] as string;
208	          
209	          if (!polyline || polyline.length === 0) {
210	            console.log('[AmapService] polyline 为空，尝试从 steps 中获取');
211	            // 从 steps 中拼接 polyline
212	            const polylines: string[] = [];
213	            if (pathSteps) {
214	              for (let i = 0; i < pathSteps.length; i++) {
215	                const step: Record<string, Object> = pathSteps[i];
216	                const stepPolyline = step['polyline'] as string;
217	                if (stepPolyline && stepPolyline.length > 0) {
218	                  polylines.push(stepPolyline);
219	                }
220	              }
221	            }
222	            polyline = polylines.join(';');
223	            console.log('[AmapService] 拼接后的 polyline 长度:', polyline.length);
224	          }
225	          
226	          console.log('[AmapService] 最终 polyline 长度:', polyline ? polyline.length : 0);
227	          
228	          return {
229	            distance: parseInt(path['distance'] as string),
230	            duration: parseInt(path['duration'] as string),
231	            polyline: polyline || '',
232	            steps: steps,
233	            strategy: strategy,
234	            tollDistance: parseInt((tollDistValue !== null && tollDistValue !== undefined) ? (tollDistValue as string) : '0'),
235	            tollCost: parseInt((tollsValue !== null && tollsValue !== undefined) ? (tollsValue as string) : '0'),
236	            trafficLights: parseInt((trafficValue !== null && trafficValue !== undefined) ? (trafficValue as string) : '0')
237	          };
238	        }
239	      }
240	      
241	      console.log('[AmapService] 路径规划失败: 没有找到有效路径');
242	      return null;
243	    } catch (err) {
244	      console.error('Plan route error:', JSON.stringify(err));
245	      return null;
246	    }
247	  }
248	  
249	  /**
250	   * POI搜索 - 关键词搜索
251	   */
252	  async searchPOI(keyword: string, location: Location | null, radius: number): Promise<POIResult[]> {
253	    try {
254	      let url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/place/text?key=${AMAP_KEY}&keywords=${encodeURIComponent(keyword)}`;
255	      
256	      if (location !== null) {
257	        url += `&location=${location.longitude},${location.latitude}&radius=${radius}&sortrule=distance`;
258	      }
259	      
260	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
261	      
262	      const results: POIResult[] = [];
263	      
264	      const pois = response['pois'] as Array<Record<string, Object>>;
265	      if (pois && pois.length > 0) {
266	        for (let i = 0; i < pois.length; i++) {
267	          const poi: Record<string, Object> = pois[i];
268	          const locationStr = poi['location'] as string;
269	          const parts: string[] = locationStr.split(',');
270	          const lng: number = parseFloat(parts[0]);
271	          const lat: number = parseFloat(parts[1]);
272	          
273	          // 计算距离
274	          let distance = 0;
275	          if (location !== null) {
276	            distance = this.calculateDistance(
277	              location.latitude,
278	              location.longitude,
279	              lat,
280	              lng
281	            );
282	          }
283	          
284	          const addressValue = poi['address'];
285	          const pnameValue = poi['pname'];
286	          const citynameValue = poi['cityname'];
287	          const adnameValue = poi['adname'];
288	          
289	          let address = '';
290	          if (addressValue !== null && addressValue !== undefined) {
291	            address = addressValue as string;
292	          } else {
293	            const pname = (pnameValue !== null && pnameValue !== undefined) ? (pnameValue as string) : '';
294	            const cityname = (citynameValue !== null && citynameValue !== undefined) ? (citynameValue as string) : '';
295	            const adname = (adnameValue !== null && adnameValue !== undefined) ? (adnameValue as string) : '';
296	            address = pname + cityname + adname;
297	          }
298	          
299	          const telValue = poi['tel'];
300	          const typecodeValue = poi['typecode'];
301	          
302	          results.push({
303	            id: poi['id'] as string,
304	            name: poi['name'] as string,
305	            address: address,
306	            location: {
307	              latitude: lat,
308	              longitude: lng
309	            },
310	            distance: distance,
311	            category: poi['type'] as string,
312	            categoryCode: (typecodeValue !== null && typecodeValue !== undefined) ? (typecodeValue as string) : undefined,
313	            phone: (telValue !== null && telValue !== undefined) ? (telValue as string) : undefined
314	          });
315	        }
316	      }
317	      
318	      return results;
319	    } catch (err) {
320	      console.error('Search POI error:', JSON.stringify(err));
321	      return [];
322	    }
323	  }
324	  
325	  /**
326	   * POI周边搜索
327	   */
328	  async searchNearby(location: Location, type: string, radius: number): Promise<POIResult[]> {
329	    try {
330	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/place/around?key=${AMAP_KEY}&location=${location.longitude},${location.latitude}&keywords=${encodeURIComponent(type)}&radius=${radius}&sortrule=distance`;
331	      
332	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
333	      
334	      const results: POIResult[] = [];

336	      const pois = response['pois'] as Array<Record<string, Object>>;
337	      if (pois && pois.length > 0) {
338	        for (let i = 0; i < pois.length; i++) {
339	          const poi: Record<string, Object> = pois[i];
340	          const locationStr = poi['location'] as string;
341	          const parts: string[] = locationStr.split(',');
342	          const lng: number = parseFloat(parts[0]);
343	          const lat: number = parseFloat(parts[1]);
344	          
345	          const distance = this.calculateDistance(
346	            location.latitude,
347	            location.longitude,
348	            lat,
349	            lng
350	          );
351	          
352	          const addressValue = poi['address'];
353	          const telValue = poi['tel'];
354	          
355	          results.push({
356	            id: poi['id'] as string,
357	            name: poi['name'] as string,
358	            address: (addressValue !== null && addressValue !== undefined) ? (addressValue as string) : '',
359	            location: {
360	              latitude: lat,
361	              longitude: lng
362	            },
363	            distance: distance,
364	            category: poi['type'] as string,
365	            phone: (telValue !== null && telValue !== undefined) ? (telValue as string) : undefined
366	          });
367	        }
368	      }
369	      
370	      return results;
371	    } catch (err) {
372	      console.error('Search nearby error:', JSON.stringify(err));
373	      return [];
374	    }
375	  }
376	  
377	  /**
378	   * 输入提示 - 搜索建议
379	   */
380	  async inputTips(keyword: string, location: Location | null): Promise<Array<Record<string, Object>>> {
381	    try {
382	      let url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/assistant/inputtips?key=${AMAP_KEY}&keywords=${encodeURIComponent(keyword)}`;
383	      
384	      if (location !== null) {
385	        url += `&location=${location.longitude},${location.latitude}`;
386	      }
387	      
388	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
389	      
390	      const tips = response['tips'] as Array<Record<string, Object>>;
391	      return tips || [];
392	    } catch (err) {
393	      console.error('Input tips error:', JSON.stringify(err));
394	      return [];
395	    }
396	  }
397	  
398	  /**
399	   * 计算两点距离（Haversine公式）
400	   */
401	  private calculateDistance(lat1: number, lng1: number, lat2: number, lng2: number): number {
402	    const R = 6371000; // 地球半径（米）
403	    const dLat = (lat2 - lat1) * Math.PI / 180;
404	    const dLng = (lng2 - lng1) * Math.PI / 180;
405	    
406	    const a = Math.sin(dLat / 2) * Math.sin(dLat / 2) +
407	              Math.cos(lat1 * Math.PI / 180) * Math.cos(lat2 * Math.PI / 180) *
408	              Math.sin(dLng / 2) * Math.sin(dLng / 2);
409	    
410	    const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));
411	    
412	    return Math.round(R * c);
413	  }
414	}
415
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
29	    <div id="container"></div>
30	    <script>
31	        let map = null;
32	        let currentPolyline = null;
33	        let markers = [];
34	        let currentLocationMarker = null;
35	        
36	        // 初始化地图 - 2D模式
37	        function initMap() {
38	            map = new AMap.Map('container', {
39	                zoom: 15,
40	                center: [114.309994670642, 30.486874173982763],
41	                mapStyle: 'amap://styles/normal',
42	                showLabel: true,
43	                features: ['bg', 'road', 'building', 'point']
44	            });
45	            
46	            console.log('地图初始化完成');
47	            
48	            if (window.mapController) {
49	                window.mapController.postMessage('mapLoaded');
50	            }
51	        }
52	        
53	        // 设置地图中心
54	        function setCenter(lng, lat, zoom) {
55	            if (map) {
56	                map.setCenter([lng, lat]);
57	                if (zoom) {
58	                    map.setZoom(zoom);
59	                }
60	            }
61	        }
62	        
63	
64	        // 绘制路线
65	        function drawRoute(path) {
66	            clearOverlays();
67	            
68	            if (!path || path.length === 0) {
69	                console.error('路线坐标为空');
70	                return;
71	            }
72	            
73	            console.log('绘制路线: 起点', path[0], '终点', path[path.length - 1]);
74	            
75	            // 创建路线
76	            currentPolyline = new AMap.Polyline({
77	                path: path,
78	                strokeColor: '#4A90E2',
79	                strokeWeight: 6,
80	                strokeOpacity: 0.8,
81	                lineJoin: 'round',
82	                lineCap: 'round',
83	                showDir: true,
84	                dirColor: '#FFFFFF',
85	                zIndex: 50
86	            });
87	            
88	            map.add(currentPolyline);
89	            
90	            // 添加起点标记
91	            if (path.length > 0) {
92	                const startMarker = new AMap.Marker({
93	                    position: path[0],
94	                    title: '起点',
95	                    icon: new AMap.Icon({
96	                        size: new AMap.Size(40, 50),
97	                        image: 'https://webapi.amap.com/theme/v1.3/markers/n/start.png',
98	                        imageSize: new AMap.Size(40, 50)
99	                    }),
100	                    offset: new AMap.Pixel(-20, -50),
101	                    zIndex: 100,
102	                    animation: 'AMAP_ANIMATION_DROP'
103	                });
104	                map.add(startMarker);
105	                markers.push(startMarker);
106	                
107	                // 添加终点标记
108	                const endMarker = new AMap.Marker({
109	                    position: path[path.length - 1],
110	                    title: '终点',
111	                    icon: new AMap.Icon({
112	                        size: new AMap.Size(40, 50),
113	                        image: 'https://webapi.amap.com/theme/v1.3/markers/n/end.png',
114	                        imageSize: new AMap.Size(40, 50)
115	                    }),
116	                    offset: new AMap.Pixel(-20, -50),
117	                    zIndex: 100,
118	                    animation: 'AMAP_ANIMATION_DROP'
119	                });
120	                map.add(endMarker);
121	                markers.push(endMarker);
122	            }
123	            
124	            // 自动调整视野
125	            map.setFitView(null, false, [100, 100, 100, 100]);
126	        }
127	        
128	        // 清除所有覆盖物
129	        function clearOverlays() {
130	            if (currentPolyline) {
131	                map.remove(currentPolyline);
132	                currentPolyline = null;
133	            }
134	            
135	            if (markers.length > 0) {
136	                map.remove(markers);
137	                markers = [];
138	            }
139	        }
140	        
141	        // 添加标记
142	        function addMarker(lng, lat, title) {
143	            const marker = new AMap.Marker({
144	                position: [lng, lat],
145	                title: title
146	            });
147	            map.add(marker);
148	            markers.push(marker);
149	            return markers.length - 1;
150	        }
151	        
152	        // 添加当前位置标记
153	        function addCurrentLocationMarker(lng, lat) {
154	            if (currentLocationMarker) {
155	                map.remove(currentLocationMarker);
156	            }
157	            
158	            currentLocationMarker = new AMap.Marker({
159	                position: [lng, lat],
160	                title: '当前位置',
161	                icon: new AMap.Icon({
162	                    size: new AMap.Size(20, 20),
163	                    image: 'data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMjAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjAiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+PGNpcmNsZSBjeD0iMTAiIGN5PSIxMCIgcj0iOCIgZmlsbD0iIzAwN0FGRiIgc3Ryb2tlPSIjRkZGRkZGIiBzdHJva2Utd2lkdGg9IjIiLz48L3N2Zz4=',
164	                    imageSize: new AMap.Size(20, 20)
165	                }),
166	                offset: new AMap.Pixel(-10, -10),
167	                zIndex: 200
168	            });
169	            
170	            map.add(currentLocationMarker);
171	        }
172	        
173	        // 缩放地图
174	        function setZoom(zoom) {
175	            if (map) {
176	                map.setZoom(zoom);
177	            }
178	        }
179	        
180	        // 获取当前缩放级别
181	        function getZoom() {
182	            return map ? map.getZoom() : 15;
183	        }
184	        
185	        // 接收来自ArkTS的消息
186	        window.addEventListener('message', function(event) {
187	            try {
188	                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
189	                
190	                switch(data.action) {
191	                    case 'setCenter':
192	                        setCenter(data.lng, data.lat, data.zoom);
193	                        break;
194	                    case 'drawRoute':
195	                        console.log('执行drawRoute, 坐标点数:', data.path ? data.path.length : 0);
196	                        drawRoute(data.path);
197	                        break;
198	                    case 'clearOverlays':
199	                        clearOverlays();
200	                        break;
201	                    case 'addMarker':
202	                        addMarker(data.lng, data.lat, data.title);
203	                        break;
204	                    case 'addCurrentLocationMarker':
205	                        addCurrentLocationMarker(data.lng, data.lat);
206	                        break;
207	                    case 'setZoom':
208	                        setZoom(data.zoom);
209	                        break;
210	                    default:
211	                        console.warn('未知的action:', data.action);
212	                }
213	            } catch (e) {
214	                console.error('WebView消息处理错误:', e);
215	            }
216	        });
217	        
218	        // 页面加载完成后初始化地图
219	        window.onload = function() {
220	            initMap();
221	        };
222	    </script>
223	</body>
```

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/backend/src/controllers/authController.ts`

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs';
2	import { query } from '../config/database';
3	import { generateToken } from '../middleware/auth';
4	
5	interface User {
6	  id: number;
7	  phone: string;
8	  password: string;
9	  nickname?: string;
10	  avatar?: string;
11	}
12	
13	/**
14	 * 用户注册
15	 */
16	export async function register(req: Request, res: Response) {
17	  try {
18	    const { phone, password, nickname } = req.body;
19	    
20	    // 验证参数
21	    if (!phone || !password) {
22	      return res.status(400).json({
23	        code: 400,
24	        message: '手机号和密码不能为空'
25	      });
26	    }
27	    
28	    // 检查手机号是否已注册
29	    const existingUsers = await query<User[]>(
30	      'SELECT id FROM users WHERE phone = ?',
31	      [phone]
32	    );
33	    
34	    if (existingUsers.length > 0) {
35	      return res.status(400).json({
36	        code: 400,
37	        message: '该手机号已注册'
38	      });
39	    }
40	    
41	    // 加密密码
42	    const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);
43	    
44	    // 插入用户
45	    const result: any = await query(
46	      'INSERT INTO users (phone, password, nickname) VALUES (?, ?, ?)',
47	      [phone, hashedPassword, nickname || `用户${phone.slice(-4)}`]
48	    );
49	    
50	    const userId = result.insertId;
51	    
52	    // 生成token
53	    const token = generateToken(userId);
54	    
55	    res.status(201).json({
56	      code: 200,
57	      message: '注册成功',
58	      data: {
59	        userId,
60	        phone,
61	        nickname: nickname || `用户${phone.slice(-4)}`,
62	        token
63	      }
64	    });
65	  } catch (error) {
66	    console.error('Register error:', error);
67	    res.status(500).json({
68	      code: 500,
69	      message: '服务器错误'
70	    });
71	  }
72	}
73	
74	/**
75	 * 用户登录
76	 */
77	export async function login(req: Request, res: Response) {
78	  try {
79	    const { phone, password } = req.body;
80	    
81	    // 验证参数
82	    if (!phone || !password) {
83	      return res.status(400).json({
84	        code: 400,
85	        message: '手机号和密码不能为空'
86	      });
87	    }
88	    
89	    // 查询用户
90	    const users = await query<User[]>(
91	      'SELECT id, phone, password, nickname, avatar FROM users WHERE phone = ?',
92	      [phone]
93	    );
94	    
95	    if (users.length === 0) {
96	      return res.status(401).json({
97	        code: 401,
98	        message: '手机号或密码错误'
99	      });
100	    }
101	    
102	    const user = users[0];
103	    
104	    // 验证密码
105	    const isPasswordValid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password);
106	    
107	    if (!isPasswordValid) {
108	      return res.status(401).json({
109	        code: 401,
110	        message: '手机号或密码错误'
111	      });
112	    }
113	    
114	    // 生成token
115	    const token = generateToken(user.id);
116	    
117	    res.json({
118	      code: 200,
119	      message: '登录成功',
120	      data: {
121	        userId: user.id,
122	        phone: user.phone,
123	        nickname: user.nickname,
124	        avatar: user.avatar,
125	        token
126	      }
127	    });
128	  } catch (error) {
129	    console.error('Login error:', error);
130	    res.status(500).json({
131	      code: 500,
132	      message: '服务器错误'
133	    });
134	  }
135	}
136	
137	/**
138	 * 获取用户信息
139	 */
140	export async function getProfile(req: Request, res: Response) {
141	  try {
142	    const userId = req.userId;
143	    
144	    const users = await query<User[]>(
145	      'SELECT id, phone, nickname, avatar, created_at FROM users WHERE id = ?',
146	      [userId]
147	    );
148	    
149	    if (users.length === 0) {
150	      return res.status(404).json({
151	        code: 404,
152	        message: '用户不存在'
153	      });
154	    }
155	    
156	    res.json({
157	      code: 200,
158	      message: '获取成功',
159	      data: users[0]
160	    });
161	  } catch (error) {
162	    console.error('Get profile error:', error);
163	    res.status(500).json({
164	      code: 500,
165	      message: '服务器错误'
166	    });
167	  }
168	}
169	
170	/**
171	 * 更新用户信息
172	 */
173	export async function updateProfile(req: Request, res: Response) {
174	  try {
175	    const userId = req.userId;
176	    const { nickname, avatar } = req.body;
177	    
178	    const updates: string[] = [];
179	    const params: any[] = [];
180	    
181	    if (nickname) {
182	      updates.push('nickname = ?');
183	      params.push(nickname);
184	    }
185	    
186	    if (avatar) {
187	      updates.push('avatar = ?');
188	      params.push(avatar);
189	    }
190	    
191	    if (updates.length === 0) {
192	      return res.status(400).json({
193	        code: 400,
194	        message: '没有要更新的内容'
195	      });
196	    }
197	    
198	    params.push(userId);
199	    
200	    await query(
201	      `UPDATE users SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`,
202	      params
203	    );
204	    
205	    res.json({
206	      code: 200,
207	      message: '更新成功'
208	    });
209	  } catch (error) {
210	    console.error('Update profile error:', error);
211	    res.status(500).json({
212	      code: 500,
213	      message: '服务器错误'
214	    });
215	  }
216	}
217
```

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface Favorite {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  name: string;
7	  address: string;
8	  latitude: number;
9	  longitude: number;
10	  category: string;
11	  icon?: string;
12	  created_at: string;
13	}
14	
15	/**
16	 * 获取收藏列表
17	 */
18	export async function getFavorites(req: Request, res: Response) {
19	  try {
20	    const userId = req.userId;
21	    const { category } = req.query;
22	    
23	    let sql = 'SELECT * FROM favorites WHERE user_id = ?';
24	    const params: any[] = [userId];
25	    
26	    if (category) {
27	      sql += ' AND category = ?';
28	      params.push(category);
29	    }
30	    
31	    sql += ' ORDER BY created_at DESC';
32	    
33	    const favorites = await query<Favorite[]>(sql, params);
34	    
35	    res.json({
36	      code: 200,
37	      message: '获取成功',
38	      data: favorites
39	    });
40	  } catch (error) {
41	    console.error('Get favorites error:', error);
42	    res.status(500).json({
43	      code: 500,
44	      message: '服务器错误'
45	    });
46	  }
47	}
48	
49	/**
50	 * 添加收藏
51	 */
52	export async function addFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
53	  try {
54	    console.log('=== 收藏请求开始 ===');
55	    console.log('userId:', req.userId);
56	    console.log('请求体:', JSON.stringify(req.body));
57	    
58	    const userId = req.userId;
59	    const { name, address, latitude, longitude, category, icon } = req.body;
60	    
61	    // 验证userId
62	    if (!userId) {
63	      console.error('❌ userId未定义');
64	      return res.status(401).json({
65	        code: 401,
66	        message: '用户未认证'
67	      });
68	    }
69	    
70	    // 验证参数
71	    if (!name || !address || !latitude || !longitude) {
72	      console.error('❌ 缺少必要参数:', { name, address, latitude, longitude });
73	      return res.status(400).json({
74	        code: 400,
75	        message: '缺少必要参数'
76	      });
77	    }
78	    
79	    console.log('✅ 参数验证通过');
80	    
81	    // 检查是否已收藏
82	    console.log('检查是否已收藏...');
83	    const existing = await query<Favorite[]>(
84	      'SELECT id FROM favorites WHERE user_id = ? AND latitude = ? AND longitude = ?',
85	      [userId, latitude, longitude]
86	    );
87	    
88	    if (existing.length > 0) {
89	      console.log('⚠️ 该地点已收藏');
90	      return res.status(400).json({
91	        code: 400,
92	        message: '该地点已收藏'
93	      });
94	    }
95	    
96	    console.log('插入收藏记录...');
97	    const result: any = await query(
98	      'INSERT INTO favorites (user_id, name, address, latitude, longitude, category, icon) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)',
99	      [userId, name, address, latitude, longitude, category || 'custom', icon || null]
100	    );
101	    
102	    console.log('✅ 收藏成功, insertId:', result.insertId);
103	    console.log('=== 收藏请求结束 ===');
104	    
105	    res.status(201).json({
106	      code: 200,
107	      message: '收藏成功',
108	      data: {
109	        id: result.insertId
110	      }
111	    });
112	  } catch (error) {
113	    console.error('❌ Add favorite error:', error);
114	    console.error('错误堆栈:', error instanceof Error ? error.stack : 'No stack trace');
115	    res.status(500).json({
116	      code: 500,
117	      message: '服务器错误: ' + (error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error))
118	    });
119	  }
120	}
121	
122	/**
123	 * 更新收藏
124	 */
125	export async function updateFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
126	  try {
127	    const userId = req.userId;
128	    const { id } = req.params;
129	    const { name, address, category, icon } = req.body;
130	    
131	    // 验证权限
132	    const favorites = await query<Favorite[]>(
133	      'SELECT id FROM favorites WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
134	      [id, userId]
135	    );
136	    
137	    if (favorites.length === 0) {
138	      return res.status(404).json({
139	        code: 404,
140	        message: '收藏不存在'
141	      });
142	    }
143	    
144	    const updates: string[] = [];
145	    const params: any[] = [];
146	    
147	    if (name) {
148	      updates.push('name = ?');
149	      params.push(name);
150	    }
151	    if (address) {
152	      updates.push('address = ?');
153	      params.push(address);
154	    }
155	    if (category) {
156	      updates.push('category = ?');
157	      params.push(category);
158	    }
159	    if (icon) {
160	      updates.push('icon = ?');
161	      params.push(icon);
162	    }
163	    
164	    if (updates.length === 0) {
165	      return res.status(400).json({
166	        code: 400,
167	        message: '没有要更新的内容'
168	      });
169	    }
170	    
171	    params.push(id, userId);
172	    
173	    await query(
174	      `UPDATE favorites SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`,
175	      params
176	    );
177	    
178	    res.json({
179	      code: 200,
180	      message: '更新成功'
181	    });
182	  } catch (error) {
183	    console.error('Update favorite error:', error);
184	    res.status(500).json({
185	      code: 500,
186	      message: '服务器错误'
187	    });
188	  }
189	}
190	
191	/**
192	 * 删除收藏
193	 */
194	export async function deleteFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
195	  try {
196	    const userId = req.userId;
197	    const { id } = req.params;
198	    
199	    const result: any = await query(
200	      'DELETE FROM favorites WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
201	      [id, userId]
202	    );
203	    
204	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
205	      return res.status(404).json({
206	        code: 404,
207	        message: '收藏不存在'
208	      });
209	    }
210	    
211	    res.json({
212	      code: 200,
213	      message: '删除成功'
214	    });
215	  } catch (error) {
216	    console.error('Delete favorite error:', error);
217	    res.status(500).json({
218	      code: 500,
219	      message: '服务器错误'
220	    });
221	  }
222	}
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/backend/src/controllers/navigationController.ts`

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface NavigationHistory {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  start_name?: string;
7	  start_address?: string;
8	  start_lat?: number;
9	  start_lng?: number;
10	  end_name: string;
11	  end_address: string;
12	  end_lat: number;
13	  end_lng: number;
14	  distance?: number;
15	  duration?: number;
16	  created_at: string;
17	}
18	
19	/**
20	 * 获取导航历史
21	 */
22	export async function getNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
23	  try {
24	    const userId = req.userId;
25	    const { page = 1, pageSize = 20 } = req.query;
26	    
27	    const pageNum = Number(page);
28	    const pageSizeNum = Number(pageSize);
29	    const offset = (pageNum - 1) * pageSizeNum;
30	    
31	    // 获取总数
32	    const countResult = await query<any[]>(
33	      'SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ?',
34	      [userId]
35	    );
36	    const total = countResult[0].total;
37	    
38	    // 获取列表（注意：MySQL prepared statements 不支持 LIMIT/OFFSET 占位符）
39	    const history = await query<NavigationHistory[]>(
40	      `SELECT * FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ${pageSizeNum} OFFSET ${offset}`,
41	      [userId]
42	    );
43	    
44	    // 转换字段名：下划线转驼峰
45	    const formattedHistory = history.map(item => ({
46	      id: item.id,
47	      userId: item.user_id,
48	      startName: item.start_name,
49	      startAddress: item.start_address,
50	      startLat: item.start_lat,
51	      startLng: item.start_lng,
52	      endName: item.end_name,
53	      endAddress: item.end_address,
54	      endLat: item.end_lat,
55	      endLng: item.end_lng,
56	      distance: item.distance,
57	      duration: item.duration,
58	      createdAt: item.created_at
59	    }));
60	    
61	    res.json({
62	      code: 200,
63	      message: '获取成功',
64	      data: {
65	        list: formattedHistory,
66	        total,
67	        page: pageNum,
68	        pageSize: pageSizeNum
69	      }
70	    });
71	  } catch (error) {
72	    console.error('[navigationController] Get navigation history error:', error);
73	    res.status(500).json({
74	      code: 500,
75	      message: '服务器错误'
76	    });
77	  }
78	}
79	
80	/**
81	 * 保存导航记录
82	 */
83	export async function saveNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
84	  try {
85	    const userId = req.userId;
86	    const {
87	      startName,
88	      startAddress,
89	      startLat,
90	      startLng,
91	      endName,
92	      endAddress,
93	      endLat,
94	      endLng,
95	      distance,
96	      duration
97	    } = req.body;
98	    
99	    // 验证参数
100	    if (!endName || !endAddress || !endLat || !endLng) {
101	      return res.status(400).json({
102	        code: 400,
103	        message: '缺少必要参数'
104	      });
105	    }
106	    
107	    const result: any = await query(
108	      `INSERT INTO navigation_history 
109	       (user_id, start_name, start_address, start_lat, start_lng, end_name, end_address, end_lat, end_lng, distance, duration) 
110	       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
111	      [userId, startName, startAddress, startLat, startLng, endName, endAddress, endLat, endLng, distance, duration]
112	    );
113	    
114	    res.status(201).json({
115	      code: 200,
116	      message: '保存成功',
117	      data: {
118	        id: result.insertId
119	      }
120	    });
121	  } catch (error) {
122	    console.error('Save navigation history error:', error);
123	    res.status(500).json({
124	      code: 500,
125	      message: '服务器错误'
126	    });
127	  }
128	}
129	
130	/**
131	 * 删除导航历史
132	 */
133	export async function deleteNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
134	  try {
135	    const userId = req.userId;
136	    const { id } = req.params;
137	    
138	    const result: any = await query(
139	      'DELETE FROM navigation_history WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
140	      [id, userId]
141	    );
142	    
143	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
144	      return res.status(404).json({
145	        code: 404,
146	        message: '记录不存在'
147	      });
148	    }
149	    
150	    res.json({
151	      code: 200,
152	      message: '删除成功'
153	    });
154	  } catch (error) {
155	    console.error('Delete navigation history error:', error);
156	    res.status(500).json({
157	      code: 500,
158	      message: '服务器错误'
159	    });
160	  }
161	}
162	
163	/**
164	 * 清空导航历史
165	 */
166	export async function clearNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
167	  try {
168	    const userId = req.userId;
169	    
170	    await query(
171	      'DELETE FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ?',
172	      [userId]
173	    );
174	    
175	    res.json({
176	      code: 200,
177	      message: '清空成功'
178	    });
179	  } catch (error) {
180	    console.error('Clear navigation history error:', error);
181	    res.status(500).json({
182	      code: 500,
183	      message: '服务器错误'
184	    });
185	  }
186	}
187
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
0	import express from 'express';
1	import { authMiddleware } from '../middleware/auth';
2	import * as authController from '../controllers/authController';
3	import * as favoriteController from '../controllers/favoriteController';
4	import * as navigationController from '../controllers/navigationController';
5	import * as routePlanController from '../controllers/routePlanController';
6	import * as locationController from '../controllers/locationController';
7	import * as feedbackController from '../controllers/feedbackController';
8	import * as frequentLocationController from '../controllers/frequentLocationController';
9	
10	const router = express.Router();
11	
12	// ========== 认证相关路由（无需token） ==========
13	router.post('/auth/register', authController.register);
14	router.post('/auth/login', authController.login);
15	
16	// ========== 用户相关路由（需要token） ==========
17	router.get('/auth/profile', authMiddleware, authController.getProfile);
18	router.put('/auth/profile', authMiddleware, authController.updateProfile);
19	
20	// ========== 收藏相关路由（需要token） ==========
21	router.get('/favorites', authMiddleware, favoriteController.getFavorites);
22	router.post('/favorites', authMiddleware, favoriteController.addFavorite);
23	router.put('/favorites/:id', authMiddleware, favoriteController.updateFavorite);
24	router.delete('/favorites/:id', authMiddleware, favoriteController.deleteFavorite);
25	
26	// ========== 导航历史相关路由（需要token） ==========
27	router.get('/navigation/history', authMiddleware, navigationController.getNavigationHistory);
28	router.post('/navigation/history', authMiddleware, navigationController.saveNavigationHistory);
29	router.delete('/navigation/history/:id', authMiddleware, navigationController.deleteNavigationHistory);
30	router.delete('/navigation/history', authMiddleware, navigationController.clearNavigationHistory);
31	
32	// ========== 路线方案相关路由（需要token） ==========
33	router.get('/routes', authMiddleware, routePlanController.getRoutePlans);
34	router.get('/routes/:id', authMiddleware, routePlanController.getRoutePlanDetail);
35	router.post('/routes', authMiddleware, routePlanController.saveRoutePlan);
36	router.put('/routes/:id', authMiddleware, routePlanController.updateRoutePlan);
37	router.post('/routes/:id/use', authMiddleware, routePlanController.useRoutePlan);
38	router.delete('/routes/:id', authMiddleware, routePlanController.deleteRoutePlan);
39	
40	// ========== 位置相关路由（需要token） ==========
41	router.post('/location', authMiddleware, locationController.updateLocation);
42	router.get('/location', authMiddleware, locationController.getLocation);
43	router.get('/location/:targetUserId', authMiddleware, locationController.getLocation);
44	router.post('/location/sharing/toggle', authMiddleware, locationController.toggleLocationSharing);
45	router.post('/location/sharing', authMiddleware, locationController.createLocationShare);
46	router.get('/location/sharing', authMiddleware, locationController.getLocationShares);
47	router.delete('/location/sharing/:id', authMiddleware, locationController.cancelLocationShare);
48	router.get('/location/nearby', authMiddleware, locationController.getNearbySharedUsers);
49	
50	// ========== 反馈相关路由（需要token） ==========
51	router.post('/feedback', authMiddleware, feedbackController.submitFeedback);
52	router.get('/feedback', authMiddleware, feedbackController.getFeedbackList);
53	router.get('/feedback/stats', authMiddleware, feedbackController.getFeedbackStats);
54	router.get('/feedback/:id', authMiddleware, feedbackController.getFeedbackDetail);
55	router.delete('/feedback/:id', authMiddleware, feedbackController.deleteFeedback);
56	
57	// ========== 常去地点相关路由（需要token） ==========
58	router.post('/frequent-locations/visit', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.recordVisit);
59	router.get('/frequent-locations', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.getFrequentLocations);
60	router.get('/frequent-locations/recommended', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.getRecommendedLocations);
61	router.get('/frequent-locations/stats', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.getVisitStats);
62	router.get('/frequent-locations/:id', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.getLocationDetail);
63	router.put('/frequent-locations/:id', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.updateLocation);
64	router.delete('/frequent-locations/:id', authMiddleware, frequentLocationController.deleteLocation);
65	
66	export default router;
67
```

```text
0	import { AbilityConstant, ConfigurationConstant, UIAbility, Want } from '@kit.AbilityKit';
1	import { hilog } from '@kit.PerformanceAnalysisKit';
2	import { window } from '@kit.ArkUI';
3	
4	const DOMAIN = 0x0000;
5	
6	export default class EntryAbility extends UIAbility {
7	  onCreate(want: Want, launchParam: AbilityConstant.LaunchParam): void {
8	    try {
9	      this.context.getApplicationContext().setColorMode(ConfigurationConstant.ColorMode.COLOR_MODE_NOT_SET);
10	    } catch (err) {
11	      hilog.error(DOMAIN, 'testTag', 'Failed to set colorMode. Cause: %{public}s', JSON.stringify(err));
12	    }
13	    hilog.info(DOMAIN, 'testTag', '%{public}s', 'Ability onCreate');
14	  }
15	
16	  onDestroy(): void {
17	    hilog.info(DOMAIN, 'testTag', '%{public}s', 'Ability onDestroy');
18	  }
19	
20	  onWindowStageCreate(windowStage: window.WindowStage): void {
21	    // Main window is created, set main page for this ability
22	    hilog.info(DOMAIN, 'testTag', '%{public}s', 'Ability onWindowStageCreate');
23	
24	    windowStage.loadContent('pages/Index', (err) => {
25	      if (err.code) {
26	        hilog.error(DOMAIN, 'testTag', 'Failed to load the content. Cause: %{public}s', JSON.stringify(err));
27	        return;
28	      }
29	      hilog.info(DOMAIN, 'testTag', 'Succeeded in loading the content.');
30	    });
31	  }
32	
33	  onWindowStageDestroy(): void {
34	    // Main window is destroyed, release UI related resources
35	    hilog.info(DOMAIN, 'testTag', '%{public}s', 'Ability onWindowStageDestroy');
36	  }
37	
38	  onForeground(): void {
39	    // Ability has brought to foreground
40	    hilog.info(DOMAIN, 'testTag', '%{public}s', 'Ability onForeground');
41	  }
42	
43	  onBackground(): void {
44	    // Ability has back to background
45	    hilog.info(DOMAIN, 'testTag', '%{public}s', 'Ability onBackground');
46	  }
47	}
```

```text
0	import express from 'express';
1	import cors from 'cors';
2	import dotenv from 'dotenv';
3	import routes from './routes';
4	import { testConnection } from './config/database';
5	
6	// 加载环境变量
7	dotenv.config();
8	
9	const app = express();
10	
11	const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
12	
13	// 中间件
14	app.use(cors());  // 允许跨域
15	app.use(express.json());  // 解析JSON请求体
16	app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true }));  // 解析URL编码请求体
17	
18	// 请求日志
19	app.use((req, res, next) => {
20	  console.log(`${new Date().toISOString()} - ${req.method} ${req.path}`);
21	  next();
22	});
23	
24	// API路由
25	app.use('/api/v1', routes);
26	
27	// 健康检查
28	app.get('/health', (req, res) => {
29	  res.json({
30	    status: 'ok',
31	    timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
32	  });
33	});
34	
35	// 404处理
36	app.use((req, res) => {
37	  res.status(404).json({
38	    code: 404,
39	    message: '接口不存在'
40	  });
41	});
42	
43	// 错误处理
44	app.use((err: any, req: express.Request, res: express.Response, next: express.NextFunction) => {
45	  console.error('Server error:', err);
46	  res.status(500).json({
47	    code: 500,
48	    message: '服务器内部错误'
49	  });
50	});
51	
52	// 启动服务器
53	async function startServer() {
54	  try {
55	    // 测试数据库连接
56	    const dbConnected = await testConnection();
57	    
58	    if (!dbConnected) {
59	      console.error('❌ 数据库连接失败，服务器启动中止');
60	      process.exit(1);
61	    }
62	    
63	    // 启动HTTP服务
64	    app.listen(PORT, () => {
65	      console.log('');
66	      console.log('🚀 ========================================');
67	      console.log(`🚀 车载导航系统后端服务已启动`);
68	      console.log(`🚀 运行环境: ${process.env.NODE_ENV || 'development'}`);
69	      console.log(`🚀 服务地址: http://localhost:${PORT}`);
70	      console.log(`🚀 API文档: http://localhost:${PORT}/api/v1`);
71	      console.log(`🚀 健康检查: http://localhost:${PORT}/health`);
72	      console.log('🚀 ========================================');
73	      console.log('');
74	    });
75	  } catch (error) {
76	    console.error('❌ 服务器启动失败:', error);
77	    process.exit(1);
78	  }
79	}
80	
81	// 优雅关闭
82	process.on('SIGTERM', () => {
83	  console.log('收到SIGTERM信号，正在关闭服务器...');
84	  process.exit(0);
85	});
86	
87	process.on('SIGINT', () => {
88	  console.log('收到SIGINT信号，正在关闭服务器...');
89	  process.exit(0);
90	});
91	
92	// 启动
93	startServer();
94
```
