 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a73a3f6a/entry/src/main/ets/services/AmapService.ets`

```text
1	/**
2	 * 高德地图API服务
3	 * 文档: https://lbs.amap.com/api/webservice/summary
4	 */
5	import http from '@ohos.net.http';
6	import { Location, RouteInfo, RouteStep, POIResult } from '../models/NavigationModels';
7	
8	// 高德地图API配置
9	const AMAP_KEY = '2455309b8d8bb76cfdfebccb98f20153';  // TODO: 替换为你的API Key
10	const AMAP_BASE_URL = 'https://restapi.amap.com/v3';
11	
12	/**
13	 * 高德地图服务类
14	 */
15	export class AmapService {
16	  private static instance: AmapService;
17	  
18	  private constructor() {}
19	  
20	  static getInstance(): AmapService {
21	    if (!AmapService.instance) {
22	      AmapService.instance = new AmapService();
23	    }
24	    return AmapService.instance;
25	  }
26	  
27	  /**
28	   * 发送HTTP请求
29	   */
30	  private async request(url: string): Promise<Record<string, Object>> {
31	    return new Promise<Record<string, Object>>((resolve, reject) => {
32	      const httpRequest = http.createHttp();
33	      
34	      httpRequest.request(url, {
35	        method: http.RequestMethod.GET,
36	        readTimeout: 30000,
37	        connectTimeout: 30000
38	      }, (err, data) => {
39	        if (err) {
40	          console.error('Amap request error:', err);
41	          httpRequest.destroy();
42	          reject(err);
43	          return;
44	        }
45	        
46	        try {
47	          const response = JSON.parse(data.result as string) as Record<string, Object>;
48	          const status = response['status'] as string;
49	          if (status === '1') {
50	            resolve(response);
51	          } else {
52	            const info = response['info'] as string;
53	            reject(new Error(info || '请求失败'));
54	          }
55	        } catch (parseErr) {
56	          reject(new Error('响应解析失败'));
57	        } finally {
58	          httpRequest.destroy();
59	        }
60	      });
61	    });
62	  }
63	  
64	  /**
65	   * IP定位 - 通过IP地址获取大致位置(不需要GPS)
66	   */
67	  async getLocationByIP(): Promise<Location | null> {
68	    try {
69	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/ip?key=${AMAP_KEY}`;
70	      console.log('[AmapService] IP定位请求:', url);
71	      
72	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
73	      
74	      const province = response['province'] as string;
75	      const city = response['city'] as string;
76	      const rectangle = response['rectangle'] as string;
77	      
78	      console.log('[AmapService] IP定位结果 - 省份:', province, '城市:', city);
79	      
80	      if (rectangle && rectangle.length > 0) {
81	        // rectangle格式: "经度1,纬度1;经度2,纬度2"
82	        const parts = rectangle.split(';');
83	        if (parts.length >= 1) {
84	          const coords = parts[0].split(',');
85	          const lng = parseFloat(coords[0]);
86	          const lat = parseFloat(coords[1]);
87	          
88	          console.log('[AmapService] IP定位坐标:', lat, lng);
89	          
90	          return {
91	            latitude: lat,
92	            longitude: lng,
93	            address: province + city,
94	            name: 'IP定位'
95	          };
96	        }
97	      }
98	      
99	      return null;
100	    } catch (err) {
101	      console.error('[AmapService] IP定位失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
102	      return null;
103	    }
104	  }
105	  
106	  /**
107	   * 地理编码 - 地址转坐标
108	   */
109	  async geocode(address: string): Promise<Location | null> {
110	    try {
111	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/geocode/geo?key=${AMAP_KEY}&address=${encodeURIComponent(address)}`;
112	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
113	      
114	      const geocodes = response['geocodes'] as Array<Record<string, Object>>;
115	      if (geocodes && geocodes.length > 0) {
116	        const geo: Record<string, Object> = geocodes[0];
117	        const locationStr = geo['location'] as string;
118	        const parts: string[] = locationStr.split(',');
119	        const lng: number = parseFloat(parts[0]);
120	        const lat: number = parseFloat(parts[1]);
121	        
122	        return {
123	          latitude: lat,
124	          longitude: lng,
125	          address: geo['formatted_address'] as string,
126	          name: address
127	        };
128	      }
129	      
130	      return null;
131	    } catch (err) {
132	      console.error('Geocode error:', JSON.stringify(err));
133	      return null;
134	    }
135	  }
136	  
137	  /**
138	   * 逆地理编码 - 坐标转地址
139	   */
140	  async regeocode(location: Location): Promise<string> {
141	    try {
142	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/geocode/regeo?key=${AMAP_KEY}&location=${location.longitude},${location.latitude}`;
143	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
144	      
145	      const regeocode = response['regeocode'] as Record<string, Object>;
146	      if (regeocode) {
147	        return regeocode['formatted_address'] as string;
148	      }
149	      
150	      return '未知地址';
151	    } catch (err) {
152	      console.error('Regeocode error:', JSON.stringify(err));
153	      return '未知地址';
154	    }
155	  }
156	  
157	  /**
158	   * 路径规划 - 驾车
159	   */
160	  async planRoute(origin: Location, destination: Location, strategy: number): Promise<RouteInfo | null> {
161	    try {
162	      const originStr = `${origin.longitude},${origin.latitude}`;
163	      const destStr = `${destination.longitude},${destination.latitude}`;
164	      
165	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/direction/driving?key=${AMAP_KEY}&origin=${originStr}&destination=${destStr}&strategy=${strategy}&extensions=all`;
166	      
167	      console.log('[AmapService] 请求路径规划 URL:', url);
168	      
169	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
170	      
171	      console.log('[AmapService] 路径规划响应 status:', response['status']);
172	      
173	      const route = response['route'] as Record<string, Object>;
174	      if (route) {
175	        const paths = route['paths'] as Array<Record<string, Object>>;
176	        console.log('[AmapService] paths 数量:', paths ? paths.length : 0);
177	        
178	        if (paths && paths.length > 0) {
179	          const path: Record<string, Object> = paths[0];
180	          
181	          console.log('[AmapService] path 对象 keys:', Object.keys(path).join(', '));
182	          console.log('[AmapService] polyline 值:', path['polyline']);
183	          console.log('[AmapService] polyline 类型:', typeof path['polyline']);
184	          
185	          // 解析路线步骤
186	          const steps: RouteStep[] = [];
187	          const pathSteps = path['steps'] as Array<Record<string, Object>>;
188	          if (pathSteps) {
189	            for (let i = 0; i < pathSteps.length; i++) {
190	              const step: Record<string, Object> = pathSteps[i];
191	              const roadValue = step['road'];
192	              const actionValue = step['action'];
193	              steps.push({
194	                instruction: step['instruction'] as string,
195	                distance: parseInt(step['distance'] as string),
196	                duration: parseInt(step['duration'] as string),
197	                road: (roadValue !== null && roadValue !== undefined) ? (roadValue as string) : '',
198	                action: (actionValue !== null && actionValue !== undefined) ? (actionValue as string) : ''
199	              });
200	            }
201	          }
202	          
203	          const tollDistValue = path['toll_distance'];
204	          const tollsValue = path['tolls'];
205	          const trafficValue = path['traffic_lights'];
206	          
207	          // 获取 polyline，如果不存在则从 steps 中拼接
208	          let polyline = path['polyline'] as string;
209	          
210	          if (!polyline || polyline.length === 0) {
211	            console.log('[AmapService] polyline 为空，尝试从 steps 中获取');
212	            // 从 steps 中拼接 polyline
213	            const polylines: string[] = [];
214	            if (pathSteps) {
215	              for (let i = 0; i < pathSteps.length; i++) {
216	                const step: Record<string, Object> = pathSteps[i];
217	                const stepPolyline = step['polyline'] as string;
218	                if (stepPolyline && stepPolyline.length > 0) {
219	                  polylines.push(stepPolyline);
220	                }
221	              }
222	            }
223	            polyline = polylines.join(';');
224	            console.log('[AmapService] 拼接后的 polyline 长度:', polyline.length);
225	          }
226	          
227	          console.log('[AmapService] 最终 polyline 长度:', polyline ? polyline.length : 0);
228	          
229	          return {
230	            distance: parseInt(path['distance'] as string),
231	            duration: parseInt(path['duration'] as string),
232	            polyline: polyline || '',
233	            steps: steps,
234	            strategy: strategy,
235	            tollDistance: parseInt((tollDistValue !== null && tollDistValue !== undefined) ? (tollDistValue as string) : '0'),
236	            tollCost: parseInt((tollsValue !== null && tollsValue !== undefined) ? (tollsValue as string) : '0'),
237	            trafficLights: parseInt((trafficValue !== null && trafficValue !== undefined) ? (trafficValue as string) : '0')
238	          };
239	        }
240	      }
241	      
242	      console.log('[AmapService] 路径规划失败: 没有找到有效路径');
243	      return null;
244	    } catch (err) {
245	      console.error('Plan route error:', JSON.stringify(err));
246	      return null;
247	    }
248	  }
249	  
250	  /**
251	   * POI搜索 - 关键词搜索
252	   */
253	  async searchPOI(keyword: string, location: Location | null, radius: number): Promise<POIResult[]> {
254	    try {
255	      let url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/place/text?key=${AMAP_KEY}&keywords=${encodeURIComponent(keyword)}`;
256	      
257	      if (location !== null) {
258	        url += `&location=${location.longitude},${location.latitude}&radius=${radius}&sortrule=distance`;
259	      }
260	      
261	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
262	      
263	      const results: POIResult[] = [];
264	      
265	      const pois = response['pois'] as Array<Record<string, Object>>;
266	      if (pois && pois.length > 0) {
267	        for (let i = 0; i < pois.length; i++) {
268	          const poi: Record<string, Object> = pois[i];
269	          const locationStr = poi['location'] as string;
270	          const parts: string[] = locationStr.split(',');
271	          const lng: number = parseFloat(parts[0]);
272	          const lat: number = parseFloat(parts[1]);
273	          
274	          // 计算距离
275	          let distance = 0;
276	          if (location !== null) {
277	            distance = this.calculateDistance(
278	              location.latitude,
279	              location.longitude,
280	              lat,
281	              lng
282	            );
283	          }
284	          
285	          const addressValue = poi['address'];
286	          const pnameValue = poi['pname'];
287	          const citynameValue = poi['cityname'];
288	          const adnameValue = poi['adname'];
289	          
290	          let address = '';
291	          if (addressValue !== null && addressValue !== undefined) {
292	            address = addressValue as string;
293	          } else {
294	            const pname = (pnameValue !== null && pnameValue !== undefined) ? (pnameValue as string) : '';
295	            const cityname = (citynameValue !== null && citynameValue !== undefined) ? (citynameValue as string) : '';
296	            const adname = (adnameValue !== null && adnameValue !== undefined) ? (adnameValue as string) : '';
297	            address = pname + cityname + adname;
298	          }
299	          
300	          const telValue = poi['tel'];
301	          const typecodeValue = poi['typecode'];
302	          
303	          results.push({
304	            id: poi['id'] as string,
305	            name: poi['name'] as string,
306	            address: address,
307	            location: {
308	              latitude: lat,
309	              longitude: lng
310	            },
311	            distance: distance,
312	            category: poi['type'] as string,
313	            categoryCode: (typecodeValue !== null && typecodeValue !== undefined) ? (typecodeValue as string) : undefined,
314	            phone: (telValue !== null && telValue !== undefined) ? (telValue as string) : undefined
315	          });
316	        }
317	      }
318	      
319	      return results;
320	    } catch (err) {
```

```text
1	<!DOCTYPE html>
2	<html>
3	<head>
4	    <meta charset="utf-8">
5	    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
6	    <title>高德地图</title>
7	    <style>
8	        * {
9	            margin: 0;
10	            padding: 0;
11	        }
12	        html, body {
13	            width: 100%;
14	            height: 100%;
15	            overflow: hidden;
16	        }
17	        #container {
18	            width: 100%;
19	            height: 100%;
20	        }
21	    </style>
22	    <script src="https://webapi.amap.com/maps?v=2.0&key=2455309b8d8bb76cfdfebccb98f20153"></script>
23	    <style>
24	        .amap-logo, .amap-copyright {
25	            display: none !important;
26	        }
27	    </style>
28	</head>
29	<body>
30	    <div id="container"></div>
31	    <script>
32	        let map = null;
33	        let currentPolyline = null;
34	        let markers = [];
35	        let currentLocationMarker = null;
36	        
37	        // 初始化地图 - 2D模式
38	        function initMap() {
39	            map = new AMap.Map('container', {
40	                zoom: 15,
41	                center: [114.309994670642, 30.486874173982763],
42	                mapStyle: 'amap://styles/normal',
43	                showLabel: true,
44	                features: ['bg', 'road', 'building', 'point']
45	            });
46	            
47	            console.log('地图初始化完成');
48	            
49	            if (window.mapController) {
50	                window.mapController.postMessage('mapLoaded');
51	            }
52	        }
53	        
54	        // 设置地图中心
55	        function setCenter(lng, lat, zoom) {
56	            if (map) {
57	                map.setCenter([lng, lat]);
58	                if (zoom) {
59	                    map.setZoom(zoom);
60	                }
61	            }
62	        }
63	        
64	
65	        // 绘制路线
66	        function drawRoute(path) {
67	            clearOverlays();
68	            
69	            if (!path || path.length === 0) {
70	                console.error('路线坐标为空');
71	                return;
72	            }
73	            
74	            console.log('绘制路线: 起点', path[0], '终点', path[path.length - 1]);
75	            
76	            // 创建路线
77	            currentPolyline = new AMap.Polyline({
78	                path: path,
79	                strokeColor: '#4A90E2',
80	                strokeWeight: 6,
81	                strokeOpacity: 0.8,
82	                lineJoin: 'round',
83	                lineCap: 'round',
84	                showDir: true,
85	                dirColor: '#FFFFFF',
86	                zIndex: 50
87	            });
88	            
89	            map.add(currentPolyline);
90	            
91	            // 添加起点标记
92	            if (path.length > 0) {
93	                const startMarker = new AMap.Marker({
94	                    position: path[0],
95	                    title: '起点',
96	                    icon: new AMap.Icon({
97	                        size: new AMap.Size(40, 50),
98	                        image: 'https://webapi.amap.com/theme/v1.3/markers/n/start.png',
99	                        imageSize: new AMap.Size(40, 50)
100	                    }),
101	                    offset: new AMap.Pixel(-20, -50),
102	                    zIndex: 100,
103	                    animation: 'AMAP_ANIMATION_DROP'
104	                });
105	                map.add(startMarker);
106	                markers.push(startMarker);
107	                
108	                // 添加终点标记
109	                const endMarker = new AMap.Marker({
110	                    position: path[path.length - 1],
111	                    title: '终点',
112	                    icon: new AMap.Icon({
113	                        size: new AMap.Size(40, 50),
114	                        image: 'https://webapi.amap.com/theme/v1.3/markers/n/end.png',
115	                        imageSize: new AMap.Size(40, 50)
116	                    }),
117	                    offset: new AMap.Pixel(-20, -50),
118	                    zIndex: 100,
119	                    animation: 'AMAP_ANIMATION_DROP'
120	                });
121	                map.add(endMarker);
122	                markers.push(endMarker);
123	            }
124	            
125	            // 自动调整视野
126	            map.setFitView(null, false, [100, 100, 100, 100]);
127	        }
128	        
129	        // 清除所有覆盖物
130	        function clearOverlays() {
131	            if (currentPolyline) {
132	                map.remove(currentPolyline);
133	                currentPolyline = null;
134	            }
135	            
136	            if (markers.length > 0) {
137	                map.remove(markers);
138	                markers = [];
139	            }
140	        }
141	        
142	        // 添加标记
143	        function addMarker(lng, lat, title) {
144	            const marker = new AMap.Marker({
145	                position: [lng, lat],
146	                title: title
147	            });
148	            map.add(marker);
149	            markers.push(marker);
150	            return markers.length - 1;
151	        }
152	        
153	        // 添加当前位置标记
154	        function addCurrentLocationMarker(lng, lat) {
155	            if (currentLocationMarker) {
156	                map.remove(currentLocationMarker);
157	            }
158	            
159	            currentLocationMarker = new AMap.Marker({
160	                position: [lng, lat],
161	                title: '当前位置',
162	                icon: new AMap.Icon({
163	                    size: new AMap.Size(20, 20),
164	                    image: 'data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMjAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjAiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+PGNpcmNsZSBjeD0iMTAiIGN5PSIxMCIgcj0iOCIgZmlsbD0iIzAwN0FGRiIgc3Ryb2tlPSIjRkZGRkZGIiBzdHJva2Utd2lkdGg9IjIiLz48L3N2Zz4=',
165	                    imageSize: new AMap.Size(20, 20)
166	                }),
167	                offset: new AMap.Pixel(-10, -10),
168	                zIndex: 200
169	            });
170	            
171	            map.add(currentLocationMarker);
172	        }
173	        
174	        // 缩放地图
175	        function setZoom(zoom) {
176	            if (map) {
177	                map.setZoom(zoom);
178	            }
179	        }
180	        
181	        // 获取当前缩放级别
182	        function getZoom() {
183	            return map ? map.getZoom() : 15;
184	        }
185	        
186	        // 接收来自ArkTS的消息
187	        window.addEventListener('message', function(event) {
188	            try {
189	                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
190	                
191	                switch(data.action) {
192	                    case 'setCenter':
193	                        setCenter(data.lng, data.lat, data.zoom);
194	                        break;
195	                    case 'drawRoute':
196	                        console.log('执行drawRoute, 坐标点数:', data.path ? data.path.length : 0);
197	                        drawRoute(data.path);
198	                        break;
199	                    case 'clearOverlays':
200	                        clearOverlays();
201	                        break;
202	                    case 'addMarker':
203	                        addMarker(data.lng, data.lat, data.title);
204	                        break;
205	                    case 'addCurrentLocationMarker':
206	                        addCurrentLocationMarker(data.lng, data.lat);
207	                        break;
208	                    case 'setZoom':
209	                        setZoom(data.zoom);
210	                        break;
211	                    default:
212	                        console.warn('未知的action:', data.action);
213	                }
214	            } catch (e) {
215	                console.error('WebView消息处理错误:', e);
216	            }
217	        });
218	        
219	        // 页面加载完成后初始化地图
220	        window.onload = function() {
221	            initMap();
222	        };
223	    </script>
224	</body>
225	</html>
```

```text
1	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
2	import { query } from '../config/database';
3	
4	interface Favorite {
5	  id: number;
6	  user_id: number;
7	  name: string;
8	  address: string;
9	  latitude: number;
10	  longitude: number;
11	  category: string;
12	  icon?: string;
13	  created_at: string;
14	}
15	
16	/**
17	 * 获取收藏列表
18	 */
19	export async function getFavorites(req: Request, res: Response) {
20	  try {
21	    const userId = req.userId;
22	    const { category } = req.query;
23	    
24	    let sql = 'SELECT * FROM favorites WHERE user_id = ?';
25	    const params: any[] = [userId];
26	    
27	    if (category) {
28	      sql += ' AND category = ?';
29	      params.push(category);
30	    }
31	    
32	    sql += ' ORDER BY created_at DESC';
33	    
34	    const favorites = await query<Favorite[]>(sql, params);
35	    
36	    res.json({
37	      code: 200,
38	      message: '获取成功',
39	      data: favorites
40	    });
41	  } catch (error) {
42	    console.error('Get favorites error:', error);
43	    res.status(500).json({
44	      code: 500,
45	      message: '服务器错误'
46	    });
47	  }
48	}
49	
50	/**
51	 * 添加收藏
52	 */
53	export async function addFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
54	  try {
55	    console.log('=== 收藏请求开始 ===');
56	    console.log('userId:', req.userId);
57	    console.log('请求体:', JSON.stringify(req.body));
58	    
59	    const userId = req.userId;
60	    const { name, address, latitude, longitude, category, icon } = req.body;
61	    
62	    // 验证userId
63	    if (!userId) {
64	      console.error('❌ userId未定义');
65	      return res.status(401).json({
66	        code: 401,
67	        message: '用户未认证'
68	      });
69	    }
70	    
71	    // 验证参数
72	    if (!name || !address || !latitude || !longitude) {
73	      console.error('❌ 缺少必要参数:', { name, address, latitude, longitude });
74	      return res.status(400).json({
75	        code: 400,
76	        message: '缺少必要参数'
77	      });
78	    }
79	    
80	    console.log('✅ 参数验证通过');
81	    
82	    // 检查是否已收藏
83	    console.log('检查是否已收藏...');
84	    const existing = await query<Favorite[]>(
85	      'SELECT id FROM favorites WHERE user_id = ? AND latitude = ? AND longitude = ?',
86	      [userId, latitude, longitude]
87	    );
88	    
89	    if (existing.length > 0) {
90	      console.log('⚠️ 该地点已收藏');
91	      return res.status(400).json({
92	        code: 400,
93	        message: '该地点已收藏'
94	      });
95	    }
96	    
97	    console.log('插入收藏记录...');
98	    const result: any = await query(
99	      'INSERT INTO favorites (user_id, name, address, latitude, longitude, category, icon) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)',
100	      [userId, name, address, latitude, longitude, category || 'custom', icon || null]
101	    );
102	    
103	    console.log('✅ 收藏成功, insertId:', result.insertId);
104	    console.log('=== 收藏请求结束 ===');
105	    
106	    res.status(201).json({
107	      code: 200,
108	      message: '收藏成功',
109	      data: {
110	        id: result.insertId
111	      }
112	    });
113	  } catch (error) {
114	    console.error('❌ Add favorite error:', error);
115	    console.error('错误堆栈:', error instanceof Error ? error.stack : 'No stack trace');
116	    res.status(500).json({
117	      code: 500,
118	      message: '服务器错误: ' + (error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error))
119	    });
120	  }
121	}
122	
123	/**
124	 * 更新收藏
125	 */
126	export async function updateFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
127	  try {
128	    const userId = req.userId;
129	    const { id } = req.params;
130	    const { name, address, category, icon } = req.body;
131	    
132	    // 验证权限
133	    const favorites = await query<Favorite[]>(
134	      'SELECT id FROM favorites WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
135	      [id, userId]
136	    );
137	    
138	    if (favorites.length === 0) {
139	      return res.status(404).json({
140	        code: 404,
141	        message: '收藏不存在'
142	      });
143	    }
144	    
145	    const updates: string[] = [];
146	    const params: any[] = [];
147	    
148	    if (name) {
149	      updates.push('name = ?');
150	      params.push(name);
151	    }
152	    if (address) {
153	      updates.push('address = ?');
154	      params.push(address);
155	    }
156	    if (category) {
157	      updates.push('category = ?');
158	      params.push(category);
159	    }
160	    if (icon) {
161	      updates.push('icon = ?');
162	      params.push(icon);
163	    }
164	    
165	    if (updates.length === 0) {
166	      return res.status(400).json({
167	        code: 400,
168	        message: '没有要更新的内容'
169	      });
170	    }
171	    
172	    params.push(id, userId);
173	    
174	    await query(
175	      `UPDATE favorites SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`,
176	      params
177	    );
178	    
179	    res.json({
180	      code: 200,
181	      message: '更新成功'
182	    });
183	  } catch (error) {
184	    console.error('Update favorite error:', error);
185	    res.status(500).json({
186	      code: 500,
187	      message: '服务器错误'
188	    });
189	  }
190	}
191	
192	/**
193	 * 删除收藏
194	 */
195	export async function deleteFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
196	  try {
197	    const userId = req.userId;
198	    const { id } = req.params;
199	    
200	    const result: any = await query(
201	      'DELETE FROM favorites WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
202	      [id, userId]
203	    );
204	    
205	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
206	      return res.status(404).json({
207	        code: 404,
208	        message: '收藏不存在'
209	      });
210	    }
211	    
212	    res.json({
213	      code: 200,
214	      message: '删除成功'
215	    });
216	  } catch (error) {
217	    console.error('Delete favorite error:', error);
218	    res.status(500).json({
219	      code: 500,
220	      message: '服务器错误'
221	    });
222	  }
223	}
224
```

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a73a3f6a/backend/src/controllers/navigationController.ts`

```text
1	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
2	import { query } from '../config/database';
3	
4	interface NavigationHistory {
5	  id: number;
6	  user_id: number;
7	  start_name?: string;
8	  start_address?: string;
9	  start_lat?: number;
10	  start_lng?: number;
11	  end_name: string;
12	  end_address: string;
13	  end_lat: number;
14	  end_lng: number;
15	  distance?: number;
16	  duration?: number;
17	  created_at: string;
18	}
19	
20	/**
21	 * 获取导航历史
22	 */
23	export async function getNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
24	  try {
25	    const userId = req.userId;
26	    const { page = 1, pageSize = 20 } = req.query;
27	    
28	    const pageNum = Number(page);
29	    const pageSizeNum = Number(pageSize);
30	    const offset = (pageNum - 1) * pageSizeNum;
31	    
32	    // 获取总数
33	    const countResult = await query<any[]>(
34	      'SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ?',
35	      [userId]
36	    );
37	    const total = countResult[0].total;
38	    
39	    // 获取列表（注意：MySQL prepared statements 不支持 LIMIT/OFFSET 占位符）
40	    const history = await query<NavigationHistory[]>(
41	      `SELECT * FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ${pageSizeNum} OFFSET ${offset}`,
42	      [userId]
43	    );
44	    
45	    // 转换字段名：下划线转驼峰
46	    const formattedHistory = history.map(item => ({
47	      id: item.id,
48	      userId: item.user_id,
49	      startName: item.start_name,
50	      startAddress: item.start_address,
51	      startLat: item.start_lat,
52	      startLng: item.start_lng,
53	      endName: item.end_name,
54	      endAddress: item.end_address,
55	      endLat: item.end_lat,
56	      endLng: item.end_lng,
57	      distance: item.distance,
58	      duration: item.duration,
59	      createdAt: item.created_at
60	    }));
61	    
62	    res.json({
63	      code: 200,
64	      message: '获取成功',
65	      data: {
66	        list: formattedHistory,
67	        total,
68	        page: pageNum,
69	        pageSize: pageSizeNum
70	      }
71	    });
72	  } catch (error) {
73	    console.error('[navigationController] Get navigation history error:', error);
74	    res.status(500).json({
75	      code: 500,
76	      message: '服务器错误'
77	    });
78	  }
79	}
80	
81	/**
82	 * 保存导航记录
83	 */
84	export async function saveNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
85	  try {
86	    const userId = req.userId;
87	    const {
88	      startName,
89	      startAddress,
90	      startLat,
91	      startLng,
92	      endName,
93	      endAddress,
94	      endLat,
95	      endLng,
96	      distance,
97	      duration
98	    } = req.body;
99	    
100	    // 验证参数
101	    if (!endName || !endAddress || !endLat || !endLng) {
102	      return res.status(400).json({
103	        code: 400,
104	        message: '缺少必要参数'
105	      });
106	    }
107	    
108	    const result: any = await query(
109	      `INSERT INTO navigation_history 
110	       (user_id, start_name, start_address, start_lat, start_lng, end_name, end_address, end_lat, end_lng, distance, duration) 
111	       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
112	      [userId, startName, startAddress, startLat, startLng, endName, endAddress, endLat, endLng, distance, duration]
113	    );
114	    
115	    res.status(201).json({
116	      code: 200,
117	      message: '保存成功',
118	      data: {
119	        id: result.insertId
120	      }
121	    });
122	  } catch (error) {
123	    console.error('Save navigation history error:', error);
124	    res.status(500).json({
125	      code: 500,
126	      message: '服务器错误'
127	    });
128	  }
129	}
130	
131	/**
132	 * 删除导航历史
133	 */
134	export async function deleteNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
135	  try {
136	    const userId = req.userId;
137	    const { id } = req.params;
138	    
139	    const result: any = await query(
140	      'DELETE FROM navigation_history WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
141	      [id, userId]
142	    );
143	    
144	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
145	      return res.status(404).json({
146	        code: 404,
147	        message: '记录不存在'
148	      });
149	    }
150	    
151	    res.json({
152	      code: 200,
153	      message: '删除成功'
154	    });
155	  } catch (error) {
156	    console.error('Delete navigation history error:', error);
157	    res.status(500).json({
158	      code: 500,
159	      message: '服务器错误'
160	    });
161	  }
162	}
163	
164	/**
165	 * 清空导航历史
166	 */
167	export async function clearNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
168	  try {
169	    const userId = req.userId;
170	    
171	    await query(
172	      'DELETE FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ?',
173	      [userId]
174	    );
175	    
176	    res.json({
177	      code: 200,
178	      message: '清空成功'
179	    });
180	  } catch (error) {
181	    console.error('Clear navigation history error:', error);
182	    res.status(500).json({
183	      code: 500,
184	      message: '服务器错误'
185	    });
186	  }
187	}
```

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a73a3f6a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/Index.ets`

```text
1	import { EnhancedNavigationModule } from '../view/EnhancedNavigationModule'
2	import { MediaModule } from '../view/MediaModule'
3	import { CollaborationModule } from '../view/CollaborationModule'
4	import { CarStatusModule } from '../view/CarStatusModule'
5	import { FavoritePlace } from '../models/BackendModels'
6	import { common } from '@kit.AbilityKit'
7	import { display } from '@kit.ArkUI'
8	import curves from '@ohos.curves'
9	import router from '@ohos.router'
10	
11	interface ModuleConfig {
12	  title: string
13	  index: number
14	  angle: number
15	  icon: string
16	}
17	
18	@Entry
19	@Component
20	struct Index {
21	  @State currentIndex: number = 0
22	  @State isExpanded: boolean = false
23	  private controller: TabsController = new TabsController()
24	  
25	  // 导航目的地参数
26	  @State navigationDestination: FavoritePlace | null = null
27	  private checkInterval: number = -1
28	
29	  // === 坐标系统 ===
30	  @State ballX: number = 0
31	  @State ballY: number = 0
32	  @State screenWidthVp: number = 0
33	  @State screenHeightVp: number = 0
34	
35	  // === 尺寸定义 ===
36	  private readonly BALL_SIZE: number = 60
37	  private readonly EXPAND_RADIUS: number = 90
38	  private readonly ITEM_SIZE: number = 56
39	
40	  private readonly menuItems: ModuleConfig[] = [
41	    { title: "车况", index: 0, angle: -90, icon: "🚗" },
42	    { title: "导航", index: 1, angle: -45, icon: "🧭" },
43	    { title: "娱乐", index: 2, angle: 45, icon: "🎵" },
44	    { title: "协同", index: 3, angle: 135, icon: "🤝" },
45	    { title: "我的", index: 4, angle: 180, icon: "👤" }
46	  ]
47	
48	  private startX: number = 0
49	  private startY: number = 0
50	
51	  aboutToAppear() {
52	    console.log('[Index] ========== aboutToAppear 开始 ==========');
53	    try {
54	      let context = this.getUIContext().getHostContext() as common.UIAbilityContext;
55	      let windowClass = context.windowStage.getMainWindowSync();
56	      windowClass.setWindowLayoutFullScreen(true);
57	
58	      let displayClass = display.getDefaultDisplaySync();
59	      this.screenWidthVp = displayClass.width / displayClass.densityPixels;
60	      this.screenHeightVp = displayClass.height / displayClass.densityPixels;
61	
62	      this.ballX = this.screenWidthVp - this.BALL_SIZE - 30;
63	      this.ballY = this.screenHeightVp - this.BALL_SIZE - 120;
64	      
65	      console.log('[Index] 屏幕尺寸初始化完成:', this.screenWidthVp, 'x', this.screenHeightVp);
66	    } catch (err) {
67	      console.error('[Index] 初始化窗口失败:', err);
68	    }
69	    
70	    // 启动定时器检查AppStorage
71	    this.startCheckingAppStorage();
72	    
73	    // 立即检查一次导航目的地
74	    setTimeout(() => {
75	      this.checkNavigationDestination();
76	    }, 500);
77	    
78	    console.log('[Index] ========== aboutToAppear 完成 ==========');
79	  }
80	  
81	  aboutToDisappear() {
82	    console.log('[Index] aboutToDisappear - 清理定时器');
83	    // 清除定时器
84	    if (this.checkInterval !== -1) {
85	      clearInterval(this.checkInterval);
86	    }
87	  }
88	  
89	  /**
90	   * 启动定时器检查AppStorage中的导航目的地
91	   */
92	  startCheckingAppStorage() {
93	    console.log('[Index] 启动AppStorage监听 - 开始');
94	    let checkCount = 0;
95	    this.checkInterval = setInterval(() => {
96	      checkCount++;
97	      if (checkCount % 50 === 0) {
98	        console.log('[Index] AppStorage检查中... 已检查', checkCount, '次');
99	      }
100	      
101	      // 检查是否需要切换到导航Tab
102	      const shouldSwitch = AppStorage.get<boolean>('shouldSwitchToNavigation');
103	      const navDest = AppStorage.get<FavoritePlace>('navigationDestination');
104	      
105	      if (shouldSwitch && navDest) {
106	        console.log('[Index] ✅ 检测到导航请求:', navDest.name);
107	        
108	        // 清除标志
109	        AppStorage.delete('shouldSwitchToNavigation');
110	        AppStorage.delete('navigationDestination');
111	        
112	        // 先切换Tab
113	        console.log('[Index] 准备切换到导航Tab (index=1)');
114	        this.currentIndex = 1;
115	        this.controller.changeIndex(1);
116	        
117	        // 延迟设置导航目的地,确保Tab切换完成
118	        setTimeout(() => {
119	          this.navigationDestination = navDest;
120	          console.log('[Index] ✅ 已完成Tab切换和导航目的地设置');
121	        }, 300);
122	      }
123	    }, 100);
124	  }
125	  
126	  onPageShow() {
127	    // 优先从 router 参数获取导航目的地
128	    try {
129	      const params = router.getParams() as Record<string, Object>;
130	      
131	      // 方式1：从收藏页面传递的参数格式 (action + destination)
132	      if (params && params['action'] === 'navigate') {
133	        const destination = params['destination'] as FavoritePlace;
134	        
135	        // 切换到导航Tab
136	        this.currentIndex = 1;
137	        this.controller.changeIndex(1);
138	        
139	        // 延迟设置导航目的地，确保Tab切换完成
140	        setTimeout(() => {
141	          this.navigationDestination = destination;
142	        }, 300);
143	        
144	        return;
145	      }
146	      
147	      // 方式2：从历史页面传递的参数格式 (navigationDestination)
148	      if (params && params['navigationDestination']) {
149	        const destination = params['navigationDestination'] as FavoritePlace;
150	        
151	        // 切换到导航Tab
152	        this.currentIndex = 1;
153	        this.controller.changeIndex(1);
154	        
155	        // 延迟设置导航目的地，确保Tab切换完成
156	        setTimeout(() => {
157	          this.navigationDestination = destination;
158	        }, 300);
159	        
160	        return;
161	      }
162	    } catch (err) {
163	      console.error('[Index] 获取 router 参数失败:', err);
164	    }
165	    
166	    // 备用方案：检查AppStorage中的导航目的地
167	    this.checkNavigationDestination();
168	  }
169	  
170	  /**
171	   * 检查并处理导航目的地
172	   */
173	  checkNavigationDestination() {
174	    const navDest = AppStorage.get<FavoritePlace>('navigationDestination');
175	    if (navDest) {
176	      // 清除AppStorage中的参数
177	      AppStorage.delete('navigationDestination');
178	      // 切换到导航Tab
179	      this.currentIndex = 1;
180	      this.controller.changeIndex(1);
181	      // 设置导航目的地
182	      this.navigationDestination = navDest;
183	    }
184	  }
185	
186	  toggleExpand() {
187	    if (!this.isExpanded) {
188	      const safePadding = this.EXPAND_RADIUS + (this.ITEM_SIZE / 2) + 10;
189	      let cX = this.ballX + (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
190	      let cY = this.ballY + (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
191	      let nCX = Math.max(safePadding, Math.min(cX, this.screenWidthVp - safePadding));
192	      let nCY = Math.max(safePadding, Math.min(cY, this.screenHeightVp - safePadding));
193	
194	      this.getUIContext().animateTo({ curve: curves.springMotion(0.6, 0.8) }, () => {
195	        this.ballX = nCX - (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
196	        this.ballY = nCY - (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
197	      });
198	    }
199	    this.getUIContext().animateTo({ curve: curves.springMotion(0.5, 0.7) }, () => {
200	      this.isExpanded = !this.isExpanded;
201	    })
202	  }
203	
204	  build() {
205	    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.TopStart }) {
206	      // 1. 内容层
207	      Tabs({ barPosition: BarPosition.End, controller: this.controller }) {
208	        TabContent() { CarStatusModule() }.backgroundColor('#000000')
209	        TabContent() { 
210	          EnhancedNavigationModule({ 
211	            externalDestination: this.navigationDestination 
212	          }) 
213	        }.backgroundColor('#000000')
214	        TabContent() { MediaModule({ isPageVisible: this.currentIndex === 2 }) }.backgroundColor('#000000')
215	        TabContent() { CollaborationModule() }.backgroundColor('#000000')
216	      }
217	      .barHeight(0).scrollable(false).width('100%').height('100%')
218	
219	      // 2. 遮罩层 (点击此处收缩)
220	      if (this.isExpanded) {
221	        Rect().width('100%').height('100%')
222	          .fill('rgba(0,0,0,0.01)') // 几乎隐形，只为了拦截点击
223	          .onClick(() => {
224	            // 点击空白处 -> 收缩
225	            this.toggleExpand()
226	          })
227	          .zIndex(9998)
228	      }
229	
230	      // 3. 子菜单项
231	      ForEach(this.menuItems, (item: ModuleConfig) => {
232	        this.PureGlassItem(item)
233	      })
234	
235	      // 4. 主悬浮球 (点击此处也可以收缩)
236	      this.PureMainBall()
237	    }
238	    .width('100%').height('100%').backgroundColor('#000000')
239	  }
240	
241	  // === 纯净磨砂子菜单 ===
242	  @Builder
243	  PureGlassItem(item: ModuleConfig): void {
244	    Column({ space: 4 }) {
245	      Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.Center }) {
246	        Text(item.icon)
247	          .fontSize(24)
248	          .fontColor(this.currentIndex === item.index ? '#FFFFFF' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.8)')
249	          .animation({ duration: 150 })
250	      }
251	      .width(this.ITEM_SIZE).height(this.ITEM_SIZE)
252	      // 样式逻辑：选中亮一点，未选中暗一点
253	      .backgroundColor(this.currentIndex === item.index ? 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)' : 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)')
254	      .backgroundBlurStyle(this.currentIndex === item.index ? BlurStyle.Regular : BlurStyle.Thin)
255	      // 一次成型裁剪
256	      .borderRadius(this.ITEM_SIZE / 2)
257	      .clip(true)
258	      .border({ width: 0.5, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)' })
259	      .onClick(() => {
260	        // === 逻辑修正 ===
261	        if (item.index === 4) {
262	          // "我的"选项 - 跳转到个人中心页面
263	          router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/UserCenterPage' })
264	          this.toggleExpand() // 收起菜单
265	        } else {
266	          // 其他选项 - 切换 Tab
267	          this.currentIndex = item.index
268	          this.controller.changeIndex(item.index)
269	          // 这里删除了 this.toggleExpand()
270	          // 这样点击切换时，菜单不会收回去，您可以继续看其他状态
271	        }
272	      })
273	
274	      // 文字
275	      Text(item.title)
276	        .fontSize(10).fontColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.7)').fontWeight(FontWeight.Regular)
277	        .opacity(this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0)
278	        .animation({ duration: 200 })
279	    }
280	    .position({
281	      x: this.ballX + (this.BALL_SIZE - this.ITEM_SIZE) / 2 +
282	        (this.isExpanded ? this.EXPAND_RADIUS * Math.cos(item.angle * Math.PI / 180) : 0),
283	      y: this.ballY + (this.BALL_SIZE - this.ITEM_SIZE) / 2 +
284	        (this.isExpanded ? this.EXPAND_RADIUS * Math.sin(item.angle * Math.PI / 180) : 0)
285	    })
286	    .zIndex(9999)
287	    .scale({ x: this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0, y: this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0 })
288	    .opacity(this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0)
289	    .animation({ curve: curves.springMotion(0.6, 0.75) })
290	  }
291	
292	  // === 纯净主球 ===
293	  @Builder
294	  PureMainBall(): void {
295	    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.Center }) {
296	      Text("＋")
297	        .fontSize(26).fontColor('#FFFFFF').fontWeight(FontWeight.Lighter)
298	        .rotate({ angle: this.isExpanded ? 135 : 0 })
299	        .animation({ duration: 300 })
300	        .margin({ bottom: 2 })
301	    }
302	    .width(this.BALL_SIZE).height(this.BALL_SIZE)
303	    .backgroundColor('rgba(40, 40, 40, 0.5)')
304	    .backgroundBlurStyle(BlurStyle.Thick)
305	    .borderRadius(this.BALL_SIZE / 2)
306	    .clip(true)
307	    .border({ width: 0.5, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)' })
308	    .shadow({ radius: 10, color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)', offsetY: 4 })
309	    .position({ x: this.ballX, y: this.ballY })
310	    .zIndex(10000)
311	    .onClick(() => {
312	      // 主动点击球体 -> 切换收缩/展开
313	      this.toggleExpand()
314	    })
315	    .gesture(
316	      PanGesture()
317	        .onActionStart(() => {
318	          if (this.isExpanded) this.toggleExpand()
319	          this.startX = this.ballX; this.startY = this.ballY
320	        })
```
</details></tool-use>

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-a73a3f6a/entry/src/main/ets/services/MapService.ets`

```text
1	/**
2	 * 地图服务 - 封装地图SDK核心功能
3	 * 使用高德地图Web服务API + JS API (WebView)
4	 * 定位方式：纯IP定位
5	 */
6	import { webview } from '@kit.ArkWeb';
7	import { AmapService } from './AmapService';
8	import { Location, RouteInfo, RouteStep, POIResult, MarkerType } from '../models/NavigationModels';
9	
10	/**
11	 * 坐标点接口
12	 */
13	interface CoordinatePoint {
14	  latitude: number;
15	  longitude: number;
16	}
17	
18	/**
19	 * WebView消息数据接口
20	 */
21	interface WebMessageData {
22	  action: string;
23	  path?: number[][];
24	  lng?: number;
25	  lat?: number;
26	  zoom?: number;
27	  title?: string;
28	}
29	
30	/**
31	 * 地图服务类
32	 */
33	export class MapService {
34	  private static instance: MapService;
35	  private webController: webview.WebviewController | null = null;
36	  private amapService: AmapService;
37	  
38	  private constructor() {
39	    this.amapService = AmapService.getInstance();
40	  }
41	  
42	  static getInstance(): MapService {
43	    if (!MapService.instance) {
44	      MapService.instance = new MapService();
45	    }
46	    return MapService.instance;
47	  }
48	  
49	  /**
50	   * 设置WebView控制器
51	   */
52	  setWebController(controller: webview.WebviewController): void {
53	    this.webController = controller;
54	    console.log('[MapService] WebView控制器已设置');
55	  }
56	  
57	  /**
58	   * 向WebView发送消息
59	   */
60	  private sendMessageToWeb(action: string, data: Record<string, Object>): void {
61	    if (!this.webController) {
62	      console.error('[MapService] WebController not initialized');
63	      return;
64	    }
65	    
66	    try {
67	      const messageData: WebMessageData = {
68	        action: action
69	      };
70	      
71	      // 合并data到messageData
72	      const keys = Object.keys(data);
73	      for (let i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
74	        const key = keys[i];
75	        const value = data[key];
76	        if (key === 'path' && Array.isArray(value)) {
77	          messageData.path = value as number[][];
78	        } else if (key === 'lng' && typeof value === 'number') {
79	          messageData.lng = value;
80	        } else if (key === 'lat' && typeof value === 'number') {
81	          messageData.lat = value;
82	        } else if (key === 'zoom' && typeof value === 'number') {
83	          messageData.zoom = value;
84	        } else if (key === 'title' && typeof value === 'string') {
85	          messageData.title = value;
86	        }
87	      }
88	      
89	      const message = JSON.stringify(messageData);
90	      console.log('[MapService] 发送消息到WebView:', action);
91	      if (action === 'drawRoute' && messageData.path) {
92	        console.log('[MapService] 路线坐标点数:', messageData.path.length);
93	        console.log('[MapService] 起点:', messageData.path[0]);
94	        console.log('[MapService] 终点:', messageData.path[messageData.path.length - 1]);
95	      }
96	      if (action === 'addMarker' || action === 'addCurrentLocationMarker') {
97	        console.log('[MapService] 标记位置: [', messageData.lng, ',', messageData.lat, ']');
98	      }
99	      
100	      // 使用JSON.stringify转义特殊字符，然后替换单引号避免JS语法错误
101	      const escapedMessage = message.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "\\'");
102	      const script = `window.postMessage('${escapedMessage}', '*')`;
103	      
104	      console.log('[MapService] 执行JS脚本长度:', script.length);
105	      this.webController.runJavaScript(script);
106	    } catch (err) {
107	      console.error('[MapService] Send message error:', String(err));
108	    }
109	  }
110	  
111	  /**
112	   * 创建包含数字的数据对象
113	   */
114	  private createNumberData(key1: string, value1: number, key2?: string, value2?: number, key3?: string, value3?: number): Record<string, Object> {
115	    const data: Record<string, Object> = {};
116	    data[key1] = value1 as Object;
117	    if (key2 !== undefined && value2 !== undefined) {
118	      data[key2] = value2 as Object;
119	    }
120	    if (key3 !== undefined && value3 !== undefined) {
121	      data[key3] = value3 as Object;
122	    }
123	    return data;
124	  }
125	  
126	  /**
127	   * 创建包含路径的数据对象
128	   */
129	  private createPathData(path: number[][]): Record<string, Object> {
130	    const data: Record<string, Object> = {};
131	    data['path'] = path as Object;
132	    return data;
133	  }
134	  
135	  /**
136	   * 创建空数据对象
137	   */
138	  private createEmptyData(): Record<string, Object> {
139	    const data: Record<string, Object> = {};
140	    return data;
141	  }
142	  
143	  /**
144	   * 获取当前位置
145	   * 使用IP定位，失败时使用默认坐标
146	   */
147	  async getCurrentLocation(): Promise<Location> {
148	    try {
149	      console.log('[MapService] 开始IP定位...');
150	      const location = await this.amapService.getLocationByIP();
151	      if (location) {
152	        console.log('[MapService] IP定位成功:', location.latitude, location.longitude);
153	        return location;
154	      }
155	    } catch (err) {
156	      console.error('[MapService] IP定位失败:', err);
157	    }
158	    
159	    // IP定位失败，使用武汉默认坐标
160	    console.warn('[MapService] IP定位失败，使用默认坐标');
161	    return {
162	      latitude: 30.486874173982763,
163	      longitude: 114.309994670642,
164	      address: '武汉市',
165	      name: '默认位置'
166	    };
167	  }
168	  
169	  /**
170	   * 路径规划 - 使用高德地图API
171	   */
172	  async planRoute(start: Location, end: Location, strategy: number): Promise<RouteInfo> {
173	    try {
174	      console.log('开始路径规划');
175	      
176	      const route = await this.amapService.planRoute(start, end, strategy);
177	      
178	      if (route) {
179	        console.log('路径规划成功');
180	        return route;
181	      }
182	      
183	      throw new Error('路径规划失败: 未获取到路线数据');
184	    } catch (err) {
185	      console.error('Plan route error:', String(err));
186	      throw new Error('路径规划失败: ' + String(err));
187	    }
188	  }
189	  
190	  /**
191	   * POI搜索 - 使用高德地图API
192	   */
193	  async searchPOI(keyword: string, location: Location | null, radius: number): Promise<POIResult[]> {
194	    try {
195	      console.log('开始POI搜索:', keyword);
196	      
197	      const results = await this.amapService.searchPOI(keyword, location, radius);
198	      
199	      console.log('POI搜索结果:', results.length, '个');
200	      return results;
201	    } catch (err) {
202	      console.error('Search POI error:', String(err));
203	      return [];
204	    }
205	  }
206	  
207	  /**
208	   * 周边搜索
209	   */
210	  async searchNearby(location: Location, type: string, radius: number): Promise<POIResult[]> {
211	    try {
212	      return await this.amapService.searchNearby(location, type, radius);
213	    } catch (err) {
214	      console.error('Search nearby error:', String(err));
215	      return [];
216	    }
217	  }
218	  
219	  /**
220	   * 地理编码 - 地址转坐标
221	   */
222	  async geocode(address: string): Promise<Location | null> {
223	    try {
224	      return await this.amapService.geocode(address);
225	    } catch (err) {
226	      console.error('Geocode error:', String(err));
227	      return null;
228	    }
229	  }
230	  
231	  /**
232	   * 逆地理编码 - 坐标转地址
233	   */
234	  async regeocode(location: Location): Promise<string> {
235	    try {
236	      return await this.amapService.regeocode(location);
237	    } catch (err) {
238	      console.error('Regeocode error:', String(err));
239	      return '未知地址';
240	    }
241	  }
242	  
243	  /**
244	   * 在地图上绘制路线
245	   */
246	  drawRoute(routeInfo: RouteInfo): void {
247	    if (!this.webController) {
248	      console.error('[MapService] WebController not initialized');
249	      return;
250	    }
251	    
252	    if (!routeInfo || !routeInfo.polyline) {
253	      console.error('[MapService] Invalid route info');
254	      return;
255	    }
256	    
257	    try {
258	      console.log('[MapService] 开始绘制路线');
259	      console.log('[MapService] 路线距离:', routeInfo.distance, '米');
260	      console.log('[MapService] 预计时间:', routeInfo.duration, '秒');
261	      console.log('[MapService] Polyline原始数据:', routeInfo.polyline.substring(0, 100) + '...');
262	      
263	      // 解析路线坐标点
264	      const points = this.parsePolyline(routeInfo.polyline);
265	      
266	      if (points.length === 0) {
267	        console.error('[MapService] No points parsed from polyline');
268	        return;
269	      }
270	      
271	      console.log('[MapService] 解析到', points.length, '个坐标点');
272	      console.log('[MapService] 第一个点(起点):', points[0].latitude, points[0].longitude);
273	      console.log('[MapService] 最后一个点(终点):', points[points.length - 1].latitude, points[points.length - 1].longitude);
274	      
275	      // 转换为高德地图JS API格式 [lng, lat]
276	      const path: number[][] = [];
277	      for (const point of points) {
278	        path.push([point.longitude, point.latitude]);
279	      }
280	      
281	      console.log('[MapService] 转换后起点 [经度,纬度]:', path[0]);
282	      console.log('[MapService] 转换后终点 [经度,纬度]:', path[path.length - 1]);
283	      
284	      // 发送绘制路线消息到WebView
285	      const routeData = this.createPathData(path);
286	      this.sendMessageToWeb('drawRoute', routeData);
287	      
288	      console.log('[MapService] 路线绘制命令已发送');
289	      
290	    } catch (err) {
291	      console.error('[MapService] Draw route error:', String(err));
292	    }
293	  }
294	  
295	  /**
296	   * 解析高德地图的 polyline 编码
297	   * 简化版本：将坐标字符串转换为坐标点数组
298	   */
299	  private parsePolyline(polyline: string): CoordinatePoint[] {
300	    const points: CoordinatePoint[] = [];
301	    
302	    if (!polyline || polyline.length === 0) {
303	      return points;
304	    }
305	    
306	    try {
307	      // 高德的 polyline 格式：经度,纬度;经度,纬度;...
308	      const coords = polyline.split(';');
309	      
310	      for (let i = 0; i < coords.length; i++) {
311	        const coord = coords[i].split(',');
312	        if (coord.length === 2) {
313	          const lng = parseFloat(coord[0]);
314	          const lat = parseFloat(coord[1]);
315	          
316	          if (!isNaN(lng) && !isNaN(lat) && 
317	              lat >= -90 && lat <= 90 && 
318	              lng >= -180 && lng <= 180) {
319	            const point: CoordinatePoint = {
320	              latitude: lat,
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
3	import preferences from '@ohos.data.preferences';

15	 * 认证服务类

17	export class AuthService {
18	  private static instance: AuthService;
19	  private httpService: HttpService;
20	  private currentUser: UserInfo | null = null;
21	  private preferencesInstance: preferences.Preferences | null = null;

24	  private constructor() {
25	    this.httpService = HttpService.getInstance();
26	    this.initPreferences();

36	  /**
37	   * 初始化Preferences
38	   */
39	  private async initPreferences(): Promise<void> {
40	    try {
41	      const context = getContext();
42	      this.preferencesInstance = await preferences.getPreferences(context, this.PREFERENCES_NAME);
43	      await this.loadUserInfo();
44	      console.log('[AuthService] Preferences初始化成功');
45	    } catch (err) {
46	      console.error('[AuthService] Preferences初始化失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
47	    }
48	  }
49	
50	  /**
51	   * 用户注册
52	   */
53	  async register(phone: string, password: string, nickname?: string): Promise<ApiResponse<UserInfo>> {
54	    try {
55	      console.log('[AuthService] 注册用户:', phone);
56	      
57	      // 只包含有值的字段
58	      const requestData: RegisterRequest = { phone, password };
59	      if (nickname && nickname.trim() !== '') {
60	        requestData.nickname = nickname;
61	      }
62	      
63	      const response = await this.httpService.post<UserInfo>(
64	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_REGISTER,
65	        requestData,
66	        false  // 注册不需要认证
67	      );
68	      
69	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
70	        // 保存token和用户信息
71	        if (response.data.token) {
72	          await this.httpService.setToken(response.data.token);
73	          await this.saveUserInfo(response.data);
74	          this.currentUser = response.data;
75	        }
76	      }
77	      
78	      return response;
79	    } catch (err) {
80	      console.error('[AuthService] 注册失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
81	      return err as ApiResponse<UserInfo>;
82	    }
83	  }
84	  
85	  /**
86	   * 用户登录
87	   */
88	  async login(phone: string, password: string): Promise<ApiResponse<UserInfo>> {
89	    try {
90	      console.log('[AuthService] 用户登录:', phone);
91	      
92	      const requestData: LoginRequest = { phone, password };
93	      
94	      const response = await this.httpService.post<UserInfo>(
95	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_LOGIN,
96	        requestData,
97	        false  // 登录不需要认证
98	      );
99	      
100	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
101	        // 保存token和用户信息
102	        if (response.data.token) {
103	          await this.httpService.setToken(response.data.token);
104	          await this.saveUserInfo(response.data);
105	          this.currentUser = response.data;
106	        }
107	      }
108	      
109	      return response;
110	    } catch (err) {
111	      console.error('[AuthService] 登录失败:', err);
112	      return err as ApiResponse<UserInfo>;
113	    }
114	  }
115	  
116	  /**
117	   * 获取用户信息
118	   */
119	  async getProfile(): Promise<ApiResponse<UserInfo>> {
120	    try {
121	      console.log('[AuthService] 获取用户信息');
122	      
123	      const response = await this.httpService.get<UserInfo>(
124	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_PROFILE,
125	        true  // 需要认证
126	      );
127	      
128	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
129	        await this.saveUserInfo(response.data);
130	        this.currentUser = response.data;
131	      }
132	      
133	      return response;
134	    } catch (err) {
135	      console.error('[AuthService] 获取用户信息失败:', err);
136	      return err as ApiResponse<UserInfo>;
137	    }
138	  }
139	  
140	  /**
141	   * 更新用户信息
142	   */
143	  async updateProfile(nickname?: string, avatar?: string): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
144	    try {
145	      console.log('[AuthService] 更新用户信息');
146	      
147	      // 只包含有值的字段
148	      const requestData: UpdateProfileRequest = {};
149	      if (nickname && nickname.trim() !== '') {
150	        requestData.nickname = nickname;
151	      }
152	      if (avatar && avatar.trim() !== '') {
153	        requestData.avatar = avatar;
154	      }
155	      
156	      const response = await this.httpService.put<void>(
157	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_PROFILE,
158	        requestData,
159	        true  // 需要认证
160	      );
161	      
162	      if (response.code === 200) {
163	        // 更新本地用户信息
164	        if (this.currentUser) {
165	          if (nickname) this.currentUser.nickname = nickname;
166	          if (avatar) this.currentUser.avatar = avatar;
167	          await this.saveUserInfo(this.currentUser);
168	        }
169	      }
170	      
171	      return response;
172	    } catch (err) {
173	      console.error('[AuthService] 更新用户信息失败:', err);
174	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
175	    }
176	  }
177	  
178	  /**
179	   * 登出
180	   */
181	  async logout(): Promise<void> {
182	    try {
183	      console.log('[AuthService] 用户登出');
184	      
185	      // 清除token
186	      await this.httpService.clearToken();
187	      
188	      // 清除用户信息
189	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
190	        await this.preferencesInstance.delete(ApiConfig.USER_KEY);
191	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
192	      }
193	      
194	      this.currentUser = null;
195	      console.log('[AuthService] 登出成功');
196	    } catch (err) {
197	      console.error('[AuthService] 登出失败:', err);
198	    }
199	  }
200	  
201	  /**
202	   * 检查登录状态
203	   */
204	  async isLoggedIn(): Promise<boolean> {
205	    const token = this.httpService.getToken();
206	    return token !== '' && token !== null && token !== undefined;
207	  }
208	  
209	  /**
210	   * 获取当前用户
211	   */
212	  async getCurrentUser(): Promise<UserInfo | null> {
213	    if (this.currentUser) {
214	      return this.currentUser;
215	    }
216	    
217	    // 尝试从本地存储加载
218	    await this.loadUserInfo();
219	    return this.currentUser;
220	  }
221	  
222	  /**
223	   * 保存用户信息到Preferences
224	   */
225	  private async saveUserInfo(userInfo: UserInfo): Promise<void> {
226	    try {
227	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
228	        await this.preferencesInstance.put(ApiConfig.USER_KEY, JSON.stringify(userInfo));
229	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
230	        console.log('[AuthService] 用户信息已保存');
231	      }
232	    } catch (err) {
233	      console.error('[AuthService] 保存用户信息失败:', err);
234	    }
235	  }
236	  
237	  /**
238	   * 从Preferences加载用户信息
239	   */
240	  private async loadUserInfo(): Promise<void> {
241	    try {
242	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
243	        const userInfoStr = await this.preferencesInstance.get(ApiConfig.USER_KEY, '');
244	        if (userInfoStr && userInfoStr !== '') {
245	          this.currentUser = JSON.parse(userInfoStr as string) as UserInfo;
246	          console.log('[AuthService] 用户信息已加载');
247	        }
248	      }
249	    } catch (err) {
250	      console.error('[AuthService] 加载用户信息失败:', err);
251	    }
252	  }
253	}
254
```

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-abc39d5b/entry/src/main/ets/services/HttpService.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * HTTP服务 - 封装网络请求
2	 * 统一处理HTTP通信、Token管理、错误处理
3	 */
4	import http from '@ohos.net.http';
5	import preferences from '@ohos.data.preferences';
6	import { ApiResponse } from '../models/BackendModels';
7	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
8	
9	/**
10	 * HTTP服务类
11	 */
12	export class HttpService {
13	  private static instance: HttpService;
14	  private token: string = '';
15	  private preferencesInstance: preferences.Preferences | null = null;
16	  private readonly PREFERENCES_NAME = 'app_auth';
17	  
18	  private constructor() {
19	    // 从本地存储加载token
20	    this.initPreferences();
21	  }
22	  
23	  static getInstance(): HttpService {
24	    if (!HttpService.instance) {
25	      HttpService.instance = new HttpService();
26	    }
27	    return HttpService.instance;
28	  }
29	  
30	  /**
31	   * 初始化Preferences
32	   */
33	  private async initPreferences(): Promise<void> {
34	    try {
35	      const context = getContext();
36	      this.preferencesInstance = await preferences.getPreferences(context, this.PREFERENCES_NAME);
37	      await this.loadToken();
38	      console.log('[HttpService] Preferences初始化成功');
39	    } catch (err) {
40	      console.error('[HttpService] Preferences初始化失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
41	    }
42	  }
43	  
44	  /**
45	   * 设置认证token
46	   */
47	  async setToken(token: string): Promise<void> {
48	    this.token = token;
49	    await this.saveToken(token);
50	  }
51	  
52	  /**
53	   * 获取token
54	   */
55	  getToken(): string {
56	    return this.token;
57	  }
58	  
59	  /**
60	   * 清除token
61	   */
62	  async clearToken(): Promise<void> {
63	    this.token = '';
64	    try {
65	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
66	        await this.preferencesInstance.delete(ApiConfig.TOKEN_KEY);
67	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
68	        console.log('[HttpService] Token已清除');
69	      }
70	    } catch (err) {
71	      console.error('[HttpService] 清除Token失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
72	    }
73	  }
74	  
75	  /**
76	   * 保存token到Preferences
77	   */
78	  private async saveToken(token: string): Promise<void> {
79	    try {
80	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
81	        await this.preferencesInstance.put(ApiConfig.TOKEN_KEY, token);
82	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
83	        console.log('[HttpService] Token已保存');
84	      }
85	    } catch (err) {
86	      console.error('[HttpService] 保存Token失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
87	    }
88	  }
89	  
90	  /**
91	   * 从Preferences加载token
92	   */
93	  private async loadToken(): Promise<void> {
94	    try {
95	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
96	        const token = await this.preferencesInstance.get(ApiConfig.TOKEN_KEY, '');
97	        if (token && token !== '') {
98	          this.token = token as string;
99	          console.log('[HttpService] Token已加载');
100	        }
101	      }
102	    } catch (err) {
103	      console.error('[HttpService] 加载Token失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
104	    }
105	  }
106	  
107	  /**
108	   * 发送HTTP请求
109	   */
110	  private async request<T>(
111	    method: http.RequestMethod,
112	    url: string,
113	    data?: Object,
114	    needAuth: boolean = true
115	  ): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
116	    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
117	      const httpRequest = http.createHttp();
118	      
119	      const fullUrl = `${ApiConfig.BASE_URL}${url}`;
120	      console.log(`[HttpService] ========== 请求详情 ==========`);
121	      console.log(`[HttpService] 方法: ${method}`);
122	      console.log(`[HttpService] BASE_URL: ${ApiConfig.BASE_URL}`);
123	      console.log(`[HttpService] 路径: ${url}`);
124	      console.log(`[HttpService] 完整URL: ${fullUrl}`);
125	      console.log(`[HttpService] ================================`);
126	      
127	      const headers: Record<string, string> = {
128	        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
129	      };
130	      
131	      // 添加认证头
132	      if (needAuth && this.token) {
133	        headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;
134	      }
135	      
136	      const options: http.HttpRequestOptions = {
137	        method,
138	        header: headers,
139	        readTimeout: ApiConfig.TIMEOUT,
140	        connectTimeout: ApiConfig.TIMEOUT
141	      };
142	      
143	      // 添加请求体
144	      if (data && (method === http.RequestMethod.POST || method === http.RequestMethod.PUT)) {
145	        options.extraData = JSON.stringify(data);
146	        console.log('[HttpService] 请求数据:', JSON.stringify(data));
147	      }
148	      
149	      console.log('[HttpService] 开始发送请求...');
150	      
151	      httpRequest.request(fullUrl, options, (err: Error, data: http.HttpResponse) => {
152	        console.log('[HttpService] 收到响应回调');
153	        
154	        if (err) {
155	          console.error('[HttpService] ========== 错误详情 ==========');
156	          console.error('[HttpService] 请求失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
157	          console.error('[HttpService] ================================');
158	          const errorMessage = this.getErrorMessage(err);
159	          reject({
160	            code: -1,
161	            message: errorMessage
162	          });
163	          httpRequest.destroy();
164	          return;
165	        }
166	        
167	        try {
168	          const responseCode = data.responseCode;
169	          const resultString = data.result as string;
170	          
171	          console.log(`[HttpService] ========== 响应详情 ==========`);
172	          console.log(`[HttpService] HTTP状态码: ${responseCode}`);
173	          console.log(`[HttpService] 响应内容: ${resultString}`);
174	          console.log(`[HttpService] 响应头: ${JSON.stringify(data.header)}`);
175	          console.log(`[HttpService] ================================`);
176	          
177	          // 尝试解析响应体
178	          let response: ApiResponse<T>;
179	          try {
180	            response = JSON.parse(resultString) as ApiResponse<T>;
181	          } catch (parseErr) {
182	            console.error('[HttpService] 响应解析失败:', JSON.stringify(parseErr));
183	            // 如果解析失败，使用HTTP状态码生成错误信息
184	            reject({
185	              code: responseCode,
186	              message: this.getHttpStatusMessage(responseCode)
187	            });
188	            httpRequest.destroy();
189	            return;
190	          }
191	          
192	          // 处理HTTP状态码
193	          if (responseCode !== 200 && responseCode !== 201) {
194	            // 返回后端的实际错误信息
195	            reject(response);
196	            httpRequest.destroy();
197	            return;
198	          }
199	          
200	          // 处理401未授权
201	          if (response.code === 401) {
202	            console.log('[HttpService] Token无效，清除本地token');
203	            this.clearToken();
204	          }
205	          
206	          console.log(`[HttpService] 请求成功: ${response.code} ${response.message}`);
207	          resolve(response);
208	        } catch (parseErr) {
209	          console.error('[HttpService] 响应解析失败:', JSON.stringify(parseErr));
210	          reject({
211	            code: -1,
212	            message: '响应解析失败'
213	          });
214	        } finally {
215	          httpRequest.destroy();
216	        }
217	      });
218	    });
219	  }
220	  
221	  /**
222	   * 获取错误信息
223	   */
224	  private getErrorMessage(err: Error): string {
225	    const errorStr = JSON.stringify(err);
226	    const errorObj = JSON.parse(errorStr) as Record<string, Object>;
227	    const errorCode = errorObj['code'] as number;
228	    
229	    // 网络错误映射
230	    const errorMap: Record<number, string> = {
231	      2300001: '协议不支持',
232	      2300003: 'URL格式错误',
233	      2300005: '无法解析远程主机名',
234	      2300006: '无法连接到服务器',
235	      2300007: '无法连接到代理服务器',
236	      2300008: '无效的服务器响应',
237	      2300009: '远程服务器拒绝访问',
238	      2300023: '写入数据失败',
239	      2300025: '上传失败',
240	      2300026: '读取数据失败',
241	      2300027: '内存不足',
242	      2300028: '操作超时',
243	      2300047: '请求数量过多',
244	      2300052: '服务器返回空数据',
245	      2300055: '发送网络数据失败',
246	      2300056: '接收网络数据失败',
247	      2300058: '本地SSL证书问题',
248	      2300059: '无法使用指定的SSL加密',
249	      2300060: '远程SSL证书无效',
250	      2300077: 'SSL CA证书无效',
251	      2300078: '远程服务器无法访问'
252	    };
253	    
254	    return errorMap[errorCode] || '网络请求失败';
255	  }
256	  
257	  /**
258	   * 获取HTTP状态码对应的错误信息
259	   */
```

```text
0	/**
1	 * 收藏列表页面
2	 */
3	import { FavoriteService } from '../services/FavoriteService'
4	import { FavoritePlace } from '../models/BackendModels'
5	import router from '@ohos.router'
6	import promptAction from '@ohos.promptAction'
7	
8	@Entry
9	@Component
10	struct FavoritesPage {
11	  @State favorites: FavoritePlace[] = []
12	  @State isLoading: boolean = false
13	  @State errorMessage: string = ''
14	  
15	  private favoriteService: FavoriteService = FavoriteService.getInstance()
16	  
17	  aboutToAppear() {
18	    this.loadFavorites()
19	  }
20	  
21	  build() {
22	    Column() {
23	      // 标题栏
24	      Row() {
25	        Button('< 返回')
26	          .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
27	          .fontColor('#333333')
28	          .onClick(() => {
29	            router.back()
30	          })
31	        
32	        Text('我的收藏')
33	          .fontSize(20)
34	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
35	          .layoutWeight(1)
36	          .textAlign(TextAlign.Center)
37	        
38	        // 占位，保持标题居中
39	        Text('      ')
40	      }
41	      .width('100%')
42	      .height(56)
43	      .padding({ left: 16, right: 16 })
44	      .backgroundColor('#FFFFFF')
45	      
46	      // 内容区域
47	      if (this.isLoading) {
48	        // 加载中
49	        Column() {
50	          LoadingProgress()
51	            .width(50)
52	            .height(50)
53	          Text('加载中...')
54	            .fontSize(14)
55	            .fontColor('#999999')
56	            .margin({ top: 10 })
57	        }
58	        .width('100%')
59	        .layoutWeight(1)
60	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
61	      } else if (this.errorMessage) {
62	        // 错误提示
63	        Column() {
64	          Text(this.errorMessage)
65	            .fontSize(14)
66	            .fontColor('#FF0000')
67	            .margin({ bottom: 20 })
68	          
69	          Button('重试')
70	            .onClick(() => {
71	              this.loadFavorites()
72	            })
73	        }
74	        .width('100%')
75	        .layoutWeight(1)
76	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
77	      } else if (this.favorites.length === 0) {
78	        // 空状态
79	        Column() {
80	          Text('暂无收藏')
81	            .fontSize(16)
82	            .fontColor('#999999')
83	        }
84	        .width('100%')
85	        .layoutWeight(1)
86	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
87	      } else {
88	        // 收藏列表
89	        List() {
90	          ForEach(this.favorites, (item: FavoritePlace) => {
91	            ListItem() {
92	              this.FavoriteItem(item)
93	            }
94	          })
95	        }
96	        .width('100%')
97	        .layoutWeight(1)
98	        .divider({ strokeWidth: 1, color: '#F0F0F0' })
99	      }
100	    }
101	    .width('100%')
102	    .height('100%')
103	    .backgroundColor('#F5F5F5')
104	  }
105	  
106	  /**
107	   * 收藏项组件
108	   */
109	  @Builder
110	  FavoriteItem(item: FavoritePlace) {
111	    Row() {
112	      Column() {
113	        // 名称
114	        Text(item.name)
115	          .fontSize(16)
116	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
117	          .maxLines(1)
118	          .textOverflow({ overflow: TextOverflow.Ellipsis })
119	        
120	        // 地址
121	        Text(item.address)
122	          .fontSize(14)
123	          .fontColor('#666666')
124	          .maxLines(1)
125	          .textOverflow({ overflow: TextOverflow.Ellipsis })
126	          .margin({ top: 4 })
127	        
128	        // 添加时间
129	        Text(this.formatDate(item.createdAt))
130	          .fontSize(12)
131	          .fontColor('#999999')
132	          .margin({ top: 4 })
133	      }
134	      .layoutWeight(1)
135	      .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Start)
136	      
137	      // 操作按钮
138	      Row() {
139	        Button('导航')
140	          .fontSize(14)
141	          .height(32)
142	          .backgroundColor('#007AFF')
143	          .onClick(() => {
144	            this.navigateToPlace(item)
145	          })
146	        
147	        Button('删除')
148	          .fontSize(14)
149	          .height(32)
150	          .backgroundColor('#FF3B30')
151	          .margin({ left: 10 })
152	          .onClick(() => {
153	            this.showDeleteConfirm(item)
154	          })
155	      }
156	    }
157	    .width('100%')
158	    .padding(16)
159	    .backgroundColor('#FFFFFF')
160	  }
161	  
162	  /**
163	   * 加载收藏列表
164	   */
165	  async loadFavorites() {
166	    this.isLoading = true
167	    this.errorMessage = ''
168	    
169	    try {
170	      const response = await this.favoriteService.getFavorites()
171	      
172	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
173	        this.favorites = response.data
174	      } else {
175	        this.errorMessage = response.message || '加载失败'
176	      }
177	    } catch (err) {
178	      console.error('[FavoritesPage] 加载收藏列表失败:', err)
179	      this.errorMessage = '加载失败，请稍后重试'
180	    } finally {
181	      this.isLoading = false
182	    }
183	  }
184	  
185	  /**
186	   * 导航到地点
187	   */
188	  navigateToPlace(item: FavoritePlace) {
189	    console.log('[FavoritesPage] ========== 开始导航流程 ==========');
190	    console.log('[FavoritesPage] 导航到:', item.name);
191	    console.log('[FavoritesPage] 坐标:', item.latitude, item.longitude);
192	    
193	    // 使用 router 参数传递数据（更可靠）
194	    console.log('[FavoritesPage] 通过 router 参数传递导航目的地');
195	    router.back({
196	      url: 'pages/Index',
197	      params: {
198	        action: 'navigate',
199	        destination: item
200	      }
201	    });
202	    console.log('[FavoritesPage] ========== router.back() 已调用 ==========');
203	  }
204	  
205	  /**
206	   * 显示删除确认对话框
207	   */
208	  showDeleteConfirm(item: FavoritePlace) {
209	    promptAction.showDialog({
210	      title: '确认删除',
211	      message: `确定要删除收藏"${item.name}"吗？`,
212	      buttons: [
213	        { text: '取消', color: '#666666' },
214	        { text: '删除', color: '#FF3B30' }
215	      ]
216	    }).then((result) => {
217	      if (result.index === 1) {
218	        this.deleteFavorite(item.id)
219	      }
220	    })
221	  }
222	  
223	  /**
224	   * 删除收藏
225	   */
226	  async deleteFavorite(id: number) {
227	    try {
228	      const response = await this.favoriteService.deleteFavorite(id)
229	      
230	      if (response.code === 200) {
231	        promptAction.showToast({
232	          message: '删除成功',
233	          duration: 2000
234	        })
235	        // 刷新列表
236	        this.loadFavorites()
237	      } else {
238	        promptAction.showToast({
239	          message: response.message || '删除失败',
240	          duration: 2000
241	        })
242	      }
243	    } catch (err) {
244	      console.error('[FavoritesPage] 删除收藏失败:', err)
245	      promptAction.showToast({
246	        message: '删除失败',
247	        duration: 2000
248	      })
249	    }
250	  }
251	  
252	  /**
253	   * 格式化日期
254	   */
255	  formatDate(dateStr: string): string {
256	    try {
257	      const date = new Date(dateStr)
258	      const year = date.getFullYear()
259	      const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')
```
