0	/**
1	 * 导航历史页面
2	 */
3	import { NavigationHistoryService } from '../services/NavigationHistoryService'
4	import { NavigationHistory } from '../models/BackendModels'
5	import router from '@ohos.router'
6	import promptAction from '@ohos.promptAction'
7	
8	@Entry
9	@Component
10	struct HistoryPage {
11	  @State historyList: NavigationHistory[] = []
12	  @State isLoading: boolean = false
13	  @State errorMessage: string = ''
14	  @State currentPage: number = 1
15	  @State hasMore: boolean = true
16	  
17	  private historyService: NavigationHistoryService = NavigationHistoryService.getInstance()
18	  
19	  aboutToAppear() {
20	    this.loadHistory()
21	  }
22	  
23	  build() {
24	    Column() {
25	      // 标题栏
26	      Row() {
27	        Button('< 返回')
28	          .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
29	          .fontColor('#333333')
30	          .onClick(() => {
31	            router.back()
32	          })
33	        
34	        Text('导航历史')
35	          .fontSize(20)
36	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
37	          .layoutWeight(1)
38	          .textAlign(TextAlign.Center)
39	        
40	        Button('清空')
41	          .fontSize(14)
42	          .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
43	          .fontColor('#FF3B30')
44	          .onClick(() => {
45	            this.showClearConfirm()
46	          })
47	      }
48	      .width('100%')
49	      .height(56)
50	      .padding({ left: 16, right: 16 })
51	      .backgroundColor('#FFFFFF')
52	      
53	      // 内容区域
54	      if (this.isLoading && this.historyList.length === 0) {
55	        // 首次加载中
56	        Column() {
57	          LoadingProgress()
58	            .width(50)
59	            .height(50)
60	          Text('加载中...')
61	            .fontSize(14)
62	            .fontColor('#999999')
63	            .margin({ top: 10 })
64	        }
65	        .width('100%')
66	        .layoutWeight(1)
67	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
68	      } else if (this.errorMessage && this.historyList.length === 0) {
69	        // 错误提示
70	        Column() {
71	          Text(this.errorMessage)
72	            .fontSize(14)
73	            .fontColor('#FF0000')
74	            .margin({ bottom: 20 })
75	          
76	          Button('重试')
77	            .onClick(() => {
78	              this.loadHistory()
79	            })
80	        }
81	        .width('100%')
82	        .layoutWeight(1)
83	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
84	      } else if (this.historyList.length === 0) {
85	        // 空状态
86	        Column() {
87	          Text('暂无导航历史')
88	            .fontSize(16)
89	            .fontColor('#999999')
90	        }
91	        .width('100%')
92	        .layoutWeight(1)
93	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
94	      } else {
95	        // 历史列表
96	        List() {
97	          ForEach(this.historyList, (item: NavigationHistory) => {
98	            ListItem() {
99	              this.HistoryItem(item)
100	            }
101	          })
102	          
103	          // 加载更多
104	          if (this.hasMore) {
105	            ListItem() {
106	              Row() {
107	                if (this.isLoading) {
108	                  LoadingProgress()
109	                    .width(30)
110	                    .height(30)
111	                  Text('加载中...')
112	                    .fontSize(14)
113	                    .fontColor('#999999')
114	                    .margin({ left: 10 })
115	                } else {
116	                  Button('加载更多')
117	                    .fontSize(14)
118	                    .onClick(() => {
119	                      this.loadMore()
120	                    })
121	                }
122	              }
123	              .width('100%')
124	              .height(60)
125	              .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
126	            }
127	          }
128	        }
129	        .width('100%')
130	        .layoutWeight(1)
131	        .divider({ strokeWidth: 1, color: '#F0F0F0' })
132	      }
133	    }
134	    .width('100%')
135	    .height('100%')
136	    .backgroundColor('#F5F5F5')
137	  }
138	  
139	  /**
140	   * 历史记录项组件
141	   */
142	  @Builder
143	  HistoryItem(item: NavigationHistory) {
144	    Row() {
145	      Column() {
146	        // 起点和终点
147	        Row() {
148	          Text(item.startName || '当前位置')
149	            .fontSize(14)
150	            .fontColor('#666666')
151	          
152	          Text(' → ')
153	            .fontSize(14)
154	            .fontColor('#999999')
155	            .margin({ left: 5, right: 5 })
156	          
157	          Text(item.endName)
158	            .fontSize(14)
159	            .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
160	        }
161	        
162	        // 地址
163	        Text(item.endAddress)
164	          .fontSize(12)
165	          .fontColor('#999999')
166	          .maxLines(1)
167	          .textOverflow({ overflow: TextOverflow.Ellipsis })
168	          .margin({ top: 4 })
169	        
170	        // 距离和时长
171	        Row() {
172	          Text(this.formatDistance(item.distance))
173	            .fontSize(12)
174	            .fontColor('#999999')
175	          
176	          Text(' | ')
177	            .fontSize(12)
178	            .fontColor('#999999')
179	            .margin({ left: 5, right: 5 })
180	          
181	          Text(this.formatDuration(item.duration))
182	            .fontSize(12)
183	            .fontColor('#999999')
184	          
185	          Text(' | ')
186	            .fontSize(12)
187	            .fontColor('#999999')
188	            .margin({ left: 5, right: 5 })
189	          
190	          Text(this.formatDate(item.createdAt))
191	            .fontSize(12)
192	            .fontColor('#999999')
193	        }
194	        .margin({ top: 4 })
195	      }
196	      .layoutWeight(1)
197	      .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Start)
198	      
199	      // 重新导航按钮
200	      Button('再次导航')
201	        .fontSize(14)
202	        .height(32)
203	        .backgroundColor('#007AFF')
204	        .onClick(() => {
205	          this.navigateAgain(item)
206	        })
207	    }
208	    .width('100%')
209	    .padding(16)
210	    .backgroundColor('#FFFFFF')
211	  }
212	  
213	  /**
214	   * 加载历史记录
215	   */
216	  async loadHistory() {
217	    this.isLoading = true
218	    this.errorMessage = ''
219	    this.currentPage = 1
220	    
221	    try {
222	      const response = await this.historyService.getHistory(this.currentPage, 20)
223	      
224	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
225	        this.historyList = response.data.list
226	        this.hasMore = this.historyList.length < response.data.total
227	      } else {
228	        this.errorMessage = response.message || '加载失败'
229	      }
230	    } catch (err) {
231	      console.error('[HistoryPage] 加载历史记录失败:', err)
232	      this.errorMessage = '加载失败，请稍后重试'
233	    } finally {
234	      this.isLoading = false
235	    }
236	  }
237	  
238	  /**
239	   * 加载更多
240	   */
241	  async loadMore() {
242	    if (this.isLoading || !this.hasMore) {
243	      return
244	    }
245	    
246	    this.isLoading = true
247	    this.currentPage++
248	    
249	    try {
250	      const response = await this.historyService.getHistory(this.currentPage, 20)
251	      
252	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
253	        this.historyList = this.historyList.concat(response.data.list)
254	        this.hasMore = this.historyList.length < response.data.total
255	      }
256	    } catch (err) {
257	      console.error('[HistoryPage] 加载更多失败:', err)
258	      this.currentPage--
259	    } finally {
260	      this.isLoading = false
261	    }
262	  }
263	  
264	  /**
265	   * 再次导航
266	   */
267	  navigateAgain(item: NavigationHistory) {
268	    // 使用 router 参数传递导航目的地数据
269	    router.back({
270	      url: 'pages/Index',
271	      params: {
272	        navigationDestination: {
273	          name: item.endName,
274	          address: item.endAddress,
275	          latitude: item.endLat,
276	          longitude: item.endLng
277	        }
278	      }
279	    })
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-abc39d5b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/Index.ets`

```text
0	import { EnhancedNavigationModule } from '../view/EnhancedNavigationModule'
1	import { MediaModule } from '../view/MediaModule'
2	import { CollaborationModule } from '../view/CollaborationModule'
3	import { CarStatusModule } from '../view/CarStatusModule'
4	import { FavoritePlace } from '../models/BackendModels'
5	import { common } from '@kit.AbilityKit'
6	import { display } from '@kit.ArkUI'
7	import curves from '@ohos.curves'
8	import router from '@ohos.router'
9	
10	interface ModuleConfig {
11	  title: string
12	  index: number
13	  angle: number
14	  icon: string
15	}
16	
17	@Entry
18	@Component
19	struct Index {
20	  @State currentIndex: number = 0
21	  @State isExpanded: boolean = false
22	  private controller: TabsController = new TabsController()
23	  
24	  // 导航目的地参数
25	  @State navigationDestination: FavoritePlace | null = null
26	  private checkInterval: number = -1
27	
28	  // === 坐标系统 ===
29	  @State ballX: number = 0
30	  @State ballY: number = 0
31	  @State screenWidthVp: number = 0
32	  @State screenHeightVp: number = 0
33	
34	  // === 尺寸定义 ===
35	  private readonly BALL_SIZE: number = 60
36	  private readonly EXPAND_RADIUS: number = 90
37	  private readonly ITEM_SIZE: number = 56
38	
39	  private readonly menuItems: ModuleConfig[] = [
40	    { title: "车况", index: 0, angle: -90, icon: "🚗" },
41	    { title: "导航", index: 1, angle: -45, icon: "🧭" },
42	    { title: "娱乐", index: 2, angle: 45, icon: "🎵" },
43	    { title: "协同", index: 3, angle: 135, icon: "🤝" },
44	    { title: "我的", index: 4, angle: 180, icon: "👤" }
45	  ]
46	
47	  private startX: number = 0
48	  private startY: number = 0
49	
50	  aboutToAppear() {
51	    console.log('[Index] ========== aboutToAppear 开始 ==========');
52	    try {
53	      let context = this.getUIContext().getHostContext() as common.UIAbilityContext;
54	      let windowClass = context.windowStage.getMainWindowSync();
55	      windowClass.setWindowLayoutFullScreen(true);
56	
57	      let displayClass = display.getDefaultDisplaySync();
58	      this.screenWidthVp = displayClass.width / displayClass.densityPixels;
59	      this.screenHeightVp = displayClass.height / displayClass.densityPixels;
60	
61	      this.ballX = this.screenWidthVp - this.BALL_SIZE - 30;
62	      this.ballY = this.screenHeightVp - this.BALL_SIZE - 120;
63	      
64	      console.log('[Index] 屏幕尺寸初始化完成:', this.screenWidthVp, 'x', this.screenHeightVp);
65	    } catch (err) {
66	      console.error('[Index] 初始化窗口失败:', err);
67	    }
68	    
69	    // 启动定时器检查AppStorage
70	    this.startCheckingAppStorage();
71	    
72	    // 立即检查一次导航目的地
73	    setTimeout(() => {
74	      this.checkNavigationDestination();
75	    }, 500);
76	    
77	    console.log('[Index] ========== aboutToAppear 完成 ==========');
78	  }
79	  
80	  aboutToDisappear() {
81	    console.log('[Index] aboutToDisappear - 清理定时器');
82	    // 清除定时器
83	    if (this.checkInterval !== -1) {
84	      clearInterval(this.checkInterval);
85	    }
86	  }
87	  
88	  /**
89	   * 启动定时器检查AppStorage中的导航目的地
90	   */
91	  startCheckingAppStorage() {
92	    console.log('[Index] 启动AppStorage监听 - 开始');
93	    let checkCount = 0;
94	    this.checkInterval = setInterval(() => {
95	      checkCount++;
96	      if (checkCount % 50 === 0) {
97	        console.log('[Index] AppStorage检查中... 已检查', checkCount, '次');
98	      }
99	      
100	      // 检查是否需要切换到导航Tab
101	      const shouldSwitch = AppStorage.get<boolean>('shouldSwitchToNavigation');
102	      const navDest = AppStorage.get<FavoritePlace>('navigationDestination');
103	      
104	      if (shouldSwitch && navDest) {
105	        console.log('[Index] ✅ 检测到导航请求:', navDest.name);
106	        
107	        // 清除标志
108	        AppStorage.delete('shouldSwitchToNavigation');
109	        AppStorage.delete('navigationDestination');
110	        
111	        // 先切换Tab
112	        console.log('[Index] 准备切换到导航Tab (index=1)');
113	        this.currentIndex = 1;
114	        this.controller.changeIndex(1);
115	        
116	        // 延迟设置导航目的地,确保Tab切换完成
117	        setTimeout(() => {
118	          this.navigationDestination = navDest;
119	          console.log('[Index] ✅ 已完成Tab切换和导航目的地设置');
120	        }, 300);
121	      }
122	    }, 100);
123	  }
124	  
125	  onPageShow() {
126	    // 优先从 router 参数获取导航目的地
127	    try {
128	      const params = router.getParams() as Record<string, Object>;
129	      
130	      // 方式1：从收藏页面传递的参数格式 (action + destination)
131	      if (params && params['action'] === 'navigate') {
132	        const destination = params['destination'] as FavoritePlace;
133	        
134	        // 切换到导航Tab
135	        this.currentIndex = 1;
136	        this.controller.changeIndex(1);
137	        
138	        // 延迟设置导航目的地，确保Tab切换完成
139	        setTimeout(() => {
140	          this.navigationDestination = destination;
141	        }, 300);
142	        
143	        return;
144	      }
145	      
146	      // 方式2：从历史页面传递的参数格式 (navigationDestination)
147	      if (params && params['navigationDestination']) {
148	        const destination = params['navigationDestination'] as FavoritePlace;
149	        
150	        // 切换到导航Tab
151	        this.currentIndex = 1;
152	        this.controller.changeIndex(1);
153	        
154	        // 延迟设置导航目的地，确保Tab切换完成
155	        setTimeout(() => {
156	          this.navigationDestination = destination;
157	        }, 300);
158	        
159	        return;
160	      }
161	    } catch (err) {
162	      console.error('[Index] 获取 router 参数失败:', err);
163	    }
164	    
165	    // 备用方案：检查AppStorage中的导航目的地
166	    this.checkNavigationDestination();
167	  }
168	  
169	  /**
170	   * 检查并处理导航目的地
171	   */
172	  checkNavigationDestination() {
173	    const navDest = AppStorage.get<FavoritePlace>('navigationDestination');
174	    if (navDest) {
175	      // 清除AppStorage中的参数
176	      AppStorage.delete('navigationDestination');
177	      // 切换到导航Tab
178	      this.currentIndex = 1;
179	      this.controller.changeIndex(1);
180	      // 设置导航目的地
181	      this.navigationDestination = navDest;
182	    }
183	  }
184	
185	  toggleExpand() {
186	    if (!this.isExpanded) {
187	      const safePadding = this.EXPAND_RADIUS + (this.ITEM_SIZE / 2) + 10;
188	      let cX = this.ballX + (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
189	      let cY = this.ballY + (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
190	      let nCX = Math.max(safePadding, Math.min(cX, this.screenWidthVp - safePadding));
191	      let nCY = Math.max(safePadding, Math.min(cY, this.screenHeightVp - safePadding));
192	
193	      this.getUIContext().animateTo({ curve: curves.springMotion(0.6, 0.8) }, () => {
194	        this.ballX = nCX - (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
195	        this.ballY = nCY - (this.BALL_SIZE / 2);
196	      });
197	    }
198	    this.getUIContext().animateTo({ curve: curves.springMotion(0.5, 0.7) }, () => {
199	      this.isExpanded = !this.isExpanded;
200	    })
201	  }
202	
203	  build() {
204	    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.TopStart }) {
205	      // 1. 内容层
206	      Tabs({ barPosition: BarPosition.End, controller: this.controller }) {
207	        TabContent() { CarStatusModule() }.backgroundColor('#000000')
208	        TabContent() { 
209	          EnhancedNavigationModule({ 
210	            externalDestination: this.navigationDestination 
211	          }) 
212	        }.backgroundColor('#000000')
213	        TabContent() { MediaModule({ isPageVisible: this.currentIndex === 2 }) }.backgroundColor('#000000')
214	        TabContent() { CollaborationModule() }.backgroundColor('#000000')
215	      }
216	      .barHeight(0).scrollable(false).width('100%').height('100%')
217	
218	      // 2. 遮罩层 (点击此处收缩)
219	      if (this.isExpanded) {
220	        Rect().width('100%').height('100%')
221	          .fill('rgba(0,0,0,0.01)') // 几乎隐形，只为了拦截点击
222	          .onClick(() => {
223	            // 点击空白处 -> 收缩
224	            this.toggleExpand()
225	          })
226	          .zIndex(9998)
227	      }
228	
229	      // 3. 子菜单项
230	      ForEach(this.menuItems, (item: ModuleConfig) => {
231	        this.PureGlassItem(item)
232	      })
233	
234	      // 4. 主悬浮球 (点击此处也可以收缩)
235	      this.PureMainBall()
236	    }
237	    .width('100%').height('100%').backgroundColor('#000000')
238	  }
239	
240	  // === 纯净磨砂子菜单 ===
241	  @Builder
242	  PureGlassItem(item: ModuleConfig): void {
243	    Column({ space: 4 }) {
244	      Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.Center }) {
245	        Text(item.icon)
246	          .fontSize(24)
247	          .fontColor(this.currentIndex === item.index ? '#FFFFFF' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.8)')
248	          .animation({ duration: 150 })
249	      }
250	      .width(this.ITEM_SIZE).height(this.ITEM_SIZE)
251	      // 样式逻辑：选中亮一点，未选中暗一点
252	      .backgroundColor(this.currentIndex === item.index ? 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)' : 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)')
253	      .backgroundBlurStyle(this.currentIndex === item.index ? BlurStyle.Regular : BlurStyle.Thin)
254	      // 一次成型裁剪
255	      .borderRadius(this.ITEM_SIZE / 2)
256	      .clip(true)
257	      .border({ width: 0.5, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)' })
258	      .onClick(() => {
259	        // === 逻辑修正 ===
260	        if (item.index === 4) {
261	          // "我的"选项 - 跳转到个人中心页面
262	          router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/UserCenterPage' })
263	          this.toggleExpand() // 收起菜单
264	        } else {
265	          // 其他选项 - 切换 Tab
266	          this.currentIndex = item.index
267	          this.controller.changeIndex(item.index)
268	          // 这里删除了 this.toggleExpand()
269	          // 这样点击切换时，菜单不会收回去，您可以继续看其他状态
270	        }
271	      })
272	
273	      // 文字
274	      Text(item.title)
275	        .fontSize(10).fontColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.7)').fontWeight(FontWeight.Regular)
276	        .opacity(this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0)
277	        .animation({ duration: 200 })
278	    }
279	    .position({
280	      x: this.ballX + (this.BALL_SIZE - this.ITEM_SIZE) / 2 +
281	        (this.isExpanded ? this.EXPAND_RADIUS * Math.cos(item.angle * Math.PI / 180) : 0),
282	      y: this.ballY + (this.BALL_SIZE - this.ITEM_SIZE) / 2 +
283	        (this.isExpanded ? this.EXPAND_RADIUS * Math.sin(item.angle * Math.PI / 180) : 0)
284	    })
285	    .zIndex(9999)
286	    .scale({ x: this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0, y: this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0 })
287	    .opacity(this.isExpanded ? 1 : 0)
288	    .animation({ curve: curves.springMotion(0.6, 0.75) })
289	  }
290	
291	  // === 纯净主球 ===
292	  @Builder
293	  PureMainBall(): void {
294	    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.Center }) {
295	      Text("＋")
296	        .fontSize(26).fontColor('#FFFFFF').fontWeight(FontWeight.Lighter)
297	        .rotate({ angle: this.isExpanded ? 135 : 0 })
298	        .animation({ duration: 300 })
299	        .margin({ bottom: 2 })
300	    }
301	    .width(this.BALL_SIZE).height(this.BALL_SIZE)
302	    .backgroundColor('rgba(40, 40, 40, 0.5)')
303	    .backgroundBlurStyle(BlurStyle.Thick)
304	    .borderRadius(this.BALL_SIZE / 2)
305	    .clip(true)
306	    .border({ width: 0.5, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)' })
307	    .shadow({ radius: 10, color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)', offsetY: 4 })
308	    .position({ x: this.ballX, y: this.ballY })
309	    .zIndex(10000)
310	    .onClick(() => {
311	      // 主动点击球体 -> 切换收缩/展开
312	      this.toggleExpand()
313	    })
314	    .gesture(
315	      PanGesture()
316	        .onActionStart(() => {
317	          if (this.isExpanded) this.toggleExpand()
318	          this.startX = this.ballX; this.startY = this.ballY
319	        })
320	        .onActionUpdate((e) => {
321	          let rX = this.startX + e.offsetX; let rY = this.startY + e.offsetY
322	          this.ballX = Math.max(0, Math.min(rX, this.screenWidthVp - this.BALL_SIZE))
323	          this.ballY = Math.max(0, Math.min(rY, this.screenHeightVp - this.BALL_SIZE))
324	        })
325	    )
326	  }
327	}
```
</details></tool-use>

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-abc39d5b/entry/src/main/ets/services/AmapService.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * 高德地图API服务
2	 * 文档: https://lbs.amap.com/api/webservice/summary
3	 */
4	import http from '@ohos.net.http';
5	import { Location, RouteInfo, RouteStep, POIResult } from '../models/NavigationModels';
6	
7	// 高德地图API配置
8	const AMAP_KEY = '2455309b8d8bb76cfdfebccb98f20153';  // TODO: 替换为你的API Key
9	const AMAP_BASE_URL = 'https://restapi.amap.com/v3';
10	
11	/**
12	 * 高德地图服务类
13	 */
14	export class AmapService {
15	  private static instance: AmapService;
16	  
17	  private constructor() {}
18	  
19	  static getInstance(): AmapService {
20	    if (!AmapService.instance) {
21	      AmapService.instance = new AmapService();
22	    }
23	    return AmapService.instance;
24	  }
25	  
26	  /**
27	   * 发送HTTP请求
28	   */
29	  private async request(url: string): Promise<Record<string, Object>> {
30	    return new Promise<Record<string, Object>>((resolve, reject) => {
31	      const httpRequest = http.createHttp();
32	      
33	      httpRequest.request(url, {
34	        method: http.RequestMethod.GET,
35	        readTimeout: 30000,
36	        connectTimeout: 30000
37	      }, (err, data) => {
38	        if (err) {
39	          console.error('Amap request error:', err);
40	          httpRequest.destroy();
41	          reject(err);
42	          return;
43	        }
44	        
45	        try {
46	          const response = JSON.parse(data.result as string) as Record<string, Object>;
47	          const status = response['status'] as string;
48	          if (status === '1') {
49	            resolve(response);
50	          } else {
51	            const info = response['info'] as string;
52	            reject(new Error(info || '请求失败'));
53	          }
54	        } catch (parseErr) {
55	          reject(new Error('响应解析失败'));
56	        } finally {
57	          httpRequest.destroy();
58	        }
59	      });
60	    });
61	  }
62	  
63	  /**
64	   * IP定位 - 通过IP地址获取大致位置(不需要GPS)
65	   */
66	  async getLocationByIP(): Promise<Location | null> {
67	    try {
68	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/ip?key=${AMAP_KEY}`;
69	      console.log('[AmapService] IP定位请求:', url);
70	      
71	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
72	      
73	      const province = response['province'] as string;
74	      const city = response['city'] as string;
75	      const rectangle = response['rectangle'] as string;
76	      
77	      console.log('[AmapService] IP定位结果 - 省份:', province, '城市:', city);
78	      
79	      if (rectangle && rectangle.length > 0) {
80	        // rectangle格式: "经度1,纬度1;经度2,纬度2"
81	        const parts = rectangle.split(';');
82	        if (parts.length >= 1) {
83	          const coords = parts[0].split(',');
84	          const lng = parseFloat(coords[0]);
85	          const lat = parseFloat(coords[1]);
86	          
87	          console.log('[AmapService] IP定位坐标:', lat, lng);
88	          
89	          return {
90	            latitude: lat,
91	            longitude: lng,
92	            address: province + city,
93	            name: 'IP定位'
94	          };
95	        }
96	      }
97	      
98	      return null;
99	    } catch (err) {
100	      console.error('[AmapService] IP定位失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
101	      return null;
102	    }
103	  }
104	  
105	  /**
106	   * 地理编码 - 地址转坐标
107	   */
108	  async geocode(address: string): Promise<Location | null> {
109	    try {
110	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/geocode/geo?key=${AMAP_KEY}&address=${encodeURIComponent(address)}`;
111	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
112	      
113	      const geocodes = response['geocodes'] as Array<Record<string, Object>>;
114	      if (geocodes && geocodes.length > 0) {
115	        const geo: Record<string, Object> = geocodes[0];
116	        const locationStr = geo['location'] as string;
117	        const parts: string[] = locationStr.split(',');
118	        const lng: number = parseFloat(parts[0]);
119	        const lat: number = parseFloat(parts[1]);
120	        
121	        return {
122	          latitude: lat,
123	          longitude: lng,
124	          address: geo['formatted_address'] as string,
125	          name: address
126	        };
127	      }
128	      
129	      return null;
130	    } catch (err) {
131	      console.error('Geocode error:', JSON.stringify(err));
132	      return null;
133	    }
134	  }
135	  
136	  /**
137	   * 逆地理编码 - 坐标转地址
138	   */
139	  async regeocode(location: Location): Promise<string> {
140	    try {
141	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/geocode/regeo?key=${AMAP_KEY}&location=${location.longitude},${location.latitude}`;
142	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
143	      
144	      const regeocode = response['regeocode'] as Record<string, Object>;
145	      if (regeocode) {
146	        return regeocode['formatted_address'] as string;
147	      }
148	      
149	      return '未知地址';
150	    } catch (err) {
151	      console.error('Regeocode error:', JSON.stringify(err));
152	      return '未知地址';
153	    }
154	  }
155	  
156	  /**
157	   * 路径规划 - 驾车
158	   */
159	  async planRoute(origin: Location, destination: Location, strategy: number): Promise<RouteInfo | null> {
160	    try {
161	      const originStr = `${origin.longitude},${origin.latitude}`;
162	      const destStr = `${destination.longitude},${destination.latitude}`;
163	      
164	      const url = `${AMAP_BASE_URL}/direction/driving?key=${AMAP_KEY}&origin=${originStr}&destination=${destStr}&strategy=${strategy}&extensions=all`;
165	      
166	      console.log('[AmapService] 请求路径规划 URL:', url);
167	      
168	      const response: Record<string, Object> = await this.request(url);
169	      
170	      console.log('[AmapService] 路径规划响应 status:', response['status']);
171	      
172	      const route = response['route'] as Record<string, Object>;
173	      if (route) {
174	        const paths = route['paths'] as Array<Record<string, Object>>;
175	        console.log('[AmapService] paths 数量:', paths ? paths.length : 0);
176	        
177	        if (paths && paths.length > 0) {
178	          const path: Record<string, Object> = paths[0];
179	          
180	          console.log('[AmapService] path 对象 keys:', Object.keys(path).join(', '));
181	          console.log('[AmapService] polyline 值:', path['polyline']);
182	          console.log('[AmapService] polyline 类型:', typeof path['polyline']);
183	          
184	          // 解析路线步骤
185	          const steps: RouteStep[] = [];
186	          const pathSteps = path['steps'] as Array<Record<string, Object>>;
187	          if (pathSteps) {
188	            for (let i = 0; i < pathSteps.length; i++) {
189	              const step: Record<string, Object> = pathSteps[i];
190	              const roadValue = step['road'];
191	              const actionValue = step['action'];
192	              steps.push({
193	                instruction: step['instruction'] as string,
194	                distance: parseInt(step['distance'] as string),
195	                duration: parseInt(step['duration'] as string),
196	                road: (roadValue !== null && roadValue !== undefined) ? (roadValue as string) : '',
197	                action: (actionValue !== null && actionValue !== undefined) ? (actionValue as string) : ''
198	              });
199	            }
200	          }
201	          
202	          const tollDistValue = path['toll_distance'];
203	          const tollsValue = path['tolls'];
204	          const trafficValue = path['traffic_lights'];
205	          
206	          // 获取 polyline，如果不存在则从 steps 中拼接
207	          let polyline = path['polyline'] as string;
208	          
209	          if (!polyline || polyline.length === 0) {
210	            console.log('[AmapService] polyline 为空，尝试从 steps 中获取');
211	            // 从 steps 中拼接 polyline
212	            const polylines: string[] = [];
213	            if (pathSteps) {
214	              for (let i = 0; i < pathSteps.length; i++) {
215	                const step: Record<string, Object> = pathSteps[i];
216	                const stepPolyline = step['polyline'] as string;
217	                if (stepPolyline && stepPolyline.length > 0) {
218	                  polylines.push(stepPolyline);
219	                }
220	              }
221	            }
222	            polyline = polylines.join(';');
223	            console.log('[AmapService] 拼接后的 polyline 长度:', polyline.length);
224	          }
225	          
226	          console.log('[AmapService] 最终 polyline 长度:', polyline ? polyline.length : 0);
227	          
228	          return {
229	            distance: parseInt(path['distance'] as string),
230	            duration: parseInt(path['duration'] as string),
231	            polyline: polyline || '',
232	            steps: steps,
233	            strategy: strategy,
234	            tollDistance: parseInt((tollDistValue !== null && tollDistValue !== undefined) ? (tollDistValue as string) : '0'),
235	            tollCost: parseInt((tollsValue !== null && tollsValue !== undefined) ? (tollsValue as string) : '0'),
236	            trafficLights: parseInt((trafficValue !== null && trafficValue !== undefined) ? (trafficValue as string) : '0')
237	          };
238	        }
239	      }
240	      
241	      console.log('[AmapService] 路径规划失败: 没有找到有效路径');
242	      return null;
243	    } catch (err) {
244	      console.error('Plan route error:', JSON.stringify(err));
245	      return null;
246	    }
247	  }

314	          });
315	        }
316	      }
317	      
318	      return results;

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-abc39d5b/entry/src/main/ets/services/MapService.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * 地图服务 - 封装地图SDK核心功能
2	 * 使用高德地图Web服务API + JS API (WebView)
3	 * 定位方式：纯IP定位
4	 */
5	import { webview } from '@kit.ArkWeb';
6	import { AmapService } from './AmapService';
7	import { Location, RouteInfo, RouteStep, POIResult, MarkerType } from '../models/NavigationModels';
8	
9	/**
10	 * 坐标点接口
11	 */
12	interface CoordinatePoint {
13	  latitude: number;
14	  longitude: number;
15	}
16	
17	/**
18	 * WebView消息数据接口
19	 */
20	interface WebMessageData {
21	  action: string;
22	  path?: number[][];
23	  lng?: number;
24	  lat?: number;
25	  zoom?: number;
26	  title?: string;
27	}
28	
29	/**
30	 * 地图服务类
31	 */
32	export class MapService {
33	  private static instance: MapService;
34	  private webController: webview.WebviewController | null = null;
35	  private amapService: AmapService;
36	  
37	  private constructor() {
38	    this.amapService = AmapService.getInstance();
39	  }
40	  
41	  static getInstance(): MapService {
42	    if (!MapService.instance) {
43	      MapService.instance = new MapService();
44	    }
45	    return MapService.instance;
46	  }
47	  
48	  /**
49	   * 设置WebView控制器
50	   */
51	  setWebController(controller: webview.WebviewController): void {
52	    this.webController = controller;
53	    console.log('[MapService] WebView控制器已设置');
54	  }
55	  
56	  /**
57	   * 向WebView发送消息
58	   */
59	  private sendMessageToWeb(action: string, data: Record<string, Object>): void {
60	    if (!this.webController) {
61	      console.error('[MapService] WebController not initialized');
62	      return;
63	    }
64	    
65	    try {
66	      const messageData: WebMessageData = {
67	        action: action
68	      };
69	      
70	      // 合并data到messageData
71	      const keys = Object.keys(data);
72	      for (let i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
73	        const key = keys[i];
74	        const value = data[key];
75	        if (key === 'path' && Array.isArray(value)) {
76	          messageData.path = value as number[][];
77	        } else if (key === 'lng' && typeof value === 'number') {
78	          messageData.lng = value;
79	        } else if (key === 'lat' && typeof value === 'number') {
80	          messageData.lat = value;
81	        } else if (key === 'zoom' && typeof value === 'number') {
82	          messageData.zoom = value;
83	        } else if (key === 'title' && typeof value === 'string') {
84	          messageData.title = value;
85	        }
86	      }
87	      
88	      const message = JSON.stringify(messageData);
89	      console.log('[MapService] 发送消息到WebView:', action);
90	      if (action === 'drawRoute' && messageData.path) {
91	        console.log('[MapService] 路线坐标点数:', messageData.path.length);
92	        console.log('[MapService] 起点:', messageData.path[0]);
93	        console.log('[MapService] 终点:', messageData.path[messageData.path.length - 1]);
94	      }
95	      if (action === 'addMarker' || action === 'addCurrentLocationMarker') {
96	        console.log('[MapService] 标记位置: [', messageData.lng, ',', messageData.lat, ']');
97	      }
98	      
99	      // 使用JSON.stringify转义特殊字符，然后替换单引号避免JS语法错误
100	      const escapedMessage = message.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "\\'");
101	      const script = `window.postMessage('${escapedMessage}', '*')`;
102	      
103	      console.log('[MapService] 执行JS脚本长度:', script.length);
104	      this.webController.runJavaScript(script);
105	    } catch (err) {
106	      console.error('[MapService] Send message error:', String(err));
107	    }
108	  }
109	  
110	  /**
111	   * 创建包含数字的数据对象
112	   */
113	  private createNumberData(key1: string, value1: number, key2?: string, value2?: number, key3?: string, value3?: number): Record<string, Object> {
114	    const data: Record<string, Object> = {};
115	    data[key1] = value1 as Object;
116	    if (key2 !== undefined && value2 !== undefined) {
117	      data[key2] = value2 as Object;
118	    }
119	    if (key3 !== undefined && value3 !== undefined) {
120	      data[key3] = value3 as Object;
121	    }
122	    return data;
123	  }
124	  
125	  /**
126	   * 创建包含路径的数据对象
127	   */
128	  private createPathData(path: number[][]): Record<string, Object> {
129	    const data: Record<string, Object> = {};
130	    data['path'] = path as Object;
131	    return data;
132	  }
133	  
134	  /**
135	   * 创建空数据对象
136	   */
137	  private createEmptyData(): Record<string, Object> {
138	    const data: Record<string, Object> = {};
139	    return data;
140	  }
141	  
142	  /**
143	   * 获取当前位置
144	   * 使用IP定位，失败时使用默认坐标
145	   */
146	  async getCurrentLocation(): Promise<Location> {
147	    try {
148	      console.log('[MapService] 开始IP定位...');
149	      const location = await this.amapService.getLocationByIP();
150	      if (location) {
151	        console.log('[MapService] IP定位成功:', location.latitude, location.longitude);
152	        return location;
153	      }
154	    } catch (err) {
155	      console.error('[MapService] IP定位失败:', err);
156	    }
157	    
158	    // IP定位失败，使用武汉默认坐标
159	    console.warn('[MapService] IP定位失败，使用默认坐标');
160	    return {
161	      latitude: 30.486874173982763,
162	      longitude: 114.309994670642,
163	      address: '武汉市',
164	      name: '默认位置'
165	    };
166	  }
167	  
168	  /**
169	   * 路径规划 - 使用高德地图API
170	   */
171	  async planRoute(start: Location, end: Location, strategy: number): Promise<RouteInfo> {
172	    try {
173	      console.log('开始路径规划');
174	      
175	      const route = await this.amapService.planRoute(start, end, strategy);
176	      
177	      if (route) {
178	        console.log('路径规划成功');
179	        return route;
180	      }
181	      
182	      throw new Error('路径规划失败: 未获取到路线数据');
183	    } catch (err) {
184	      console.error('Plan route error:', String(err));
185	      throw new Error('路径规划失败: ' + String(err));
186	    }
187	  }
188	  
189	  /**
190	   * POI搜索 - 使用高德地图API
191	   */
192	  async searchPOI(keyword: string, location: Location | null, radius: number): Promise<POIResult[]> {
193	    try {
194	      console.log('开始POI搜索:', keyword);
195	      
196	      const results = await this.amapService.searchPOI(keyword, location, radius);
197	      
198	      console.log('POI搜索结果:', results.length, '个');
199	      return results;
200	    } catch (err) {
201	      console.error('Search POI error:', String(err));
202	      return [];
203	    }
204	  }
205	  
206	  /**
207	   * 周边搜索
208	   */
209	  async searchNearby(location: Location, type: string, radius: number): Promise<POIResult[]> {
210	    try {
211	      return await this.amapService.searchNearby(location, type, radius);
212	    } catch (err) {
213	      console.error('Search nearby error:', String(err));
214	      return [];
215	    }
216	  }
217	  
218	  /**
219	   * 地理编码 - 地址转坐标
220	   */
221	  async geocode(address: string): Promise<Location | null> {
222	    try {
223	      return await this.amapService.geocode(address);
224	    } catch (err) {
225	      console.error('Geocode error:', String(err));
226	      return null;
227	    }
228	  }
229	  
230	  /**
231	   * 逆地理编码 - 坐标转地址
232	   */
233	  async regeocode(location: Location): Promise<string> {
234	    try {
235	      return await this.amapService.regeocode(location);
236	    } catch (err) {
237	      console.error('Regeocode error:', String(err));
238	      return '未知地址';
239	    }
240	  }
241	  
242	  /**
243	   * 在地图上绘制路线
244	   */
245	  drawRoute(routeInfo: RouteInfo): void {
246	    if (!this.webController) {
247	      console.error('[MapService] WebController not initialized');
248	      return;
249	    }
250	    
251	    if (!routeInfo || !routeInfo.polyline) {
252	      console.error('[MapService] Invalid route info');
253	      return;
254	    }
255	    
256	    try {
257	      console.log('[MapService] 开始绘制路线');
258	      console.log('[MapService] 路线距离:', routeInfo.distance, '米');
259	      console.log('[MapService] 预计时间:', routeInfo.duration, '秒');
260	      console.log('[MapService] Polyline原始数据:', routeInfo.polyline.substring(0, 100) + '...');
261	      
262	      // 解析路线坐标点
263	      const points = this.parsePolyline(routeInfo.polyline);
264	      
265	      if (points.length === 0) {
266	        console.error('[MapService] No points parsed from polyline');
267	        return;
268	      }
269	      
270	      console.log('[MapService] 解析到', points.length, '个坐标点');
271	      console.log('[MapService] 第一个点(起点):', points[0].latitude, points[0].longitude);
272	      console.log('[MapService] 最后一个点(终点):', points[points.length - 1].latitude, points[points.length - 1].longitude);
273	      
274	      // 转换为高德地图JS API格式 [lng, lat]
275	      const path: number[][] = [];
276	      for (const point of points) {
277	        path.push([point.longitude, point.latitude]);
278	      }
279	      
280	      console.log('[MapService] 转换后起点 [经度,纬度]:', path[0]);
281	      console.log('[MapService] 转换后终点 [经度,纬度]:', path[path.length - 1]);
282	      
283	      // 发送绘制路线消息到WebView
284	      const routeData = this.createPathData(path);
285	      this.sendMessageToWeb('drawRoute', routeData);
286	      
287	      console.log('[MapService] 路线绘制命令已发送');
288	      
289	    } catch (err) {
290	      console.error('[MapService] Draw route error:', String(err));
291	    }
292	  }
293	  
294	  /**
295	   * 解析高德地图的 polyline 编码
296	   * 简化版本：将坐标字符串转换为坐标点数组
297	   */
298	  private parsePolyline(polyline: string): CoordinatePoint[] {
299	    const points: CoordinatePoint[] = [];
300	    
301	    if (!polyline || polyline.length === 0) {
302	      return points;
303	    }
304	    
305	    try {
306	      // 高德的 polyline 格式：经度,纬度;经度,纬度;...
307	      const coords = polyline.split(';');
308	      
309	      for (let i = 0; i < coords.length; i++) {
310	        const coord = coords[i].split(',');
311	        if (coord.length === 2) {
312	          const lng = parseFloat(coord[0]);
313	          const lat = parseFloat(coord[1]);
314	          
315	          if (!isNaN(lng) && !isNaN(lat) && 
316	              lat >= -90 && lat <= 90 && 
317	              lng >= -180 && lng <= 180) {
318	            const point: CoordinatePoint = {
319	              latitude: lat,
```

```text
0	/**
1	 * 导航历史服务 - 管理导航历史记录
2	 */
3	import { HttpService } from './HttpService';
4	import { CacheService } from './CacheService';
5	import { ApiResponse, NavigationHistory, PageResponse } from '../models/BackendModels';
6	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
7	
8	/**
9	 * 导航历史服务类
10	 */
11	export class NavigationHistoryService {
12	  private static instance: NavigationHistoryService;
13	  private httpService: HttpService;
14	  private cacheService: CacheService;
15	  private readonly CACHE_KEY = 'history_cache';
16	  
17	  private constructor() {
18	    this.httpService = HttpService.getInstance();
19	    this.cacheService = CacheService.getInstance();
20	  }
21	  
22	  static getInstance(): NavigationHistoryService {
23	    if (!NavigationHistoryService.instance) {
24	      NavigationHistoryService.instance = new NavigationHistoryService();
25	    }
26	    return NavigationHistoryService.instance;
27	  }
28	  
29	  /**
30	   * 获取历史记录（支持分页）
31	   */
32	  async getHistory(page: number = 1, pageSize: number = 50): Promise<ApiResponse<PageResponse<NavigationHistory>>> {
33	    try {
34	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 获取历史记录, page:', page, 'pageSize:', pageSize);
35	      
36	      const url = `${ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY}?page=${page}&pageSize=${pageSize}`;
37	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 请求URL:', ApiConfig.BASE_URL + url);
38	      
39	      const response = await this.httpService.get<PageResponse<NavigationHistory>>(url, true);
40	      
41	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 响应状态码:', response.code);
42	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 响应消息:', response.message);
43	      
44	      // 成功时缓存数据（只缓存第一页的最近50条）
45	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data && page === 1) {
46	        await this.cacheHistory(response.data.list);
47	      }
48	      
49	      return response;
50	    } catch (err) {
51	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 获取历史记录失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
52	      
53	      // 网络失败时尝试从缓存读取
54	      if (page === 1) {
55	        const cachedData = await this.getCachedHistory();
56	        if (cachedData && cachedData.length > 0) {
57	          console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 使用缓存数据');
58	          return {
59	            code: 200,
60	            message: '从缓存加载',
61	            data: {
62	              list: cachedData,
63	              total: cachedData.length,
64	              page: 1,
65	              pageSize: cachedData.length
66	            }
67	          };
68	        }
69	      }
70	      
71	      return err as ApiResponse<PageResponse<NavigationHistory>>;
72	    }
73	  }
74	  
75	  /**
76	   * 保存导航记录
77	   */
78	  async saveHistory(record: Partial<NavigationHistory>): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
79	    try {
80	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 保存导航记录');
81	      
82	      // 验证必需字段
83	      if (!record.endName || !record.endAddress || 
84	          record.endLat === undefined || record.endLng === undefined) {
85	        console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 缺少必需字段');
86	        return {
87	          code: 400,
88	          message: '缺少必需字段：endName, endAddress, endLat, endLng'
89	        };
90	      }
91	      
92	      const response = await this.httpService.post<void>(
93	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY,
94	        record,
95	        true
96	      );
97	      
98	      // 成功时清除缓存
99	      if (response.code === 200) {
100	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
101	      }
102	      
103	      return response;
104	    } catch (err) {
105	      // 静默失败 - 不抛出异常，不阻塞导航功能
106	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 保存导航记录失败（静默）:', err);
107	      return {
108	        code: -1,
109	        message: '保存失败（已静默处理）'
110	      };
111	    }
112	  }
113	  
114	  /**
115	   * 删除历史记录
116	   */
117	  async deleteHistory(id: number): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
118	    try {
119	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 删除历史记录:', id);
120	      
121	      const response = await this.httpService.delete<void>(
122	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY_DETAIL(id),
123	        true
124	      );
125	      
126	      // 成功时清除缓存
127	      if (response.code === 200) {
128	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
129	      }
130	      
131	      return response;
132	    } catch (err) {
133	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 删除历史记录失败:', err);
134	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
135	    }
136	  }
137	  
138	  /**
139	   * 清空历史记录
140	   */
141	  async clearHistory(): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
142	    try {
143	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 清空历史记录');
144	      
145	      const response = await this.httpService.delete<void>(
146	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY,
147	        true
148	      );
149	      
150	      // 成功时清除缓存
151	      if (response.code === 200) {
152	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
153	      }
154	      
155	      return response;
156	    } catch (err) {
157	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 清空历史记录失败:', err);
158	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
159	    }
160	  }
161	  
162	  /**
163	   * 按日期范围筛选历史记录
164	   */
165	  async getHistoryByDateRange(startDate: string, endDate: string): Promise<ApiResponse<NavigationHistory[]>> {
166	    try {
167	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 按日期筛选:', startDate, '-', endDate);
168	      
169	      const url = `${ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.NAVIGATION_HISTORY}?startDate=${startDate}&endDate=${endDate}`;
170	      const response = await this.httpService.get<NavigationHistory[]>(url, true);
171	      
172	      return response;
173	    } catch (err) {
174	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 按日期筛选失败:', err);
175	      return err as ApiResponse<NavigationHistory[]>;
176	    }
177	  }
178	  
179	  /**
180	   * 从缓存获取历史记录
181	   */
182	  private async getCachedHistory(): Promise<NavigationHistory[]> {
183	    try {
184	      const cached = await this.cacheService.get<NavigationHistory[]>(this.CACHE_KEY);
185	      return cached || [];
186	    } catch (err) {
187	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 读取缓存失败:', err);
188	      return [];
189	    }
190	  }
191	  
192	  /**
193	   * 缓存历史记录（最近50条）
194	   */
195	  private async cacheHistory(history: NavigationHistory[]): Promise<void> {
196	    try {
197	      // 只缓存最近50条
198	      const toCache = history.slice(0, 50);
199	      await this.cacheService.set(
200	        this.CACHE_KEY,
201	        toCache,
202	        ApiConfig.CACHE_EXPIRE_TIME.HISTORY
203	      );
204	      console.log('[NavigationHistoryService] 历史记录已缓存');
205	    } catch (err) {
206	      console.error('[NavigationHistoryService] 缓存历史记录失败:', err);
207	    }
208	  }
209	}
210

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-abc39d5b/backend/src/controllers/navigationController.ts`

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface NavigationHistory {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  start_name?: string;
7	  start_address?: string;
8	  start_lat?: number;
9	  start_lng?: number;
10	  end_name: string;
11	  end_address: string;
12	  end_lat: number;
13	  end_lng: number;
14	  distance?: number;
15	  duration?: number;
16	  created_at: string;
17	}
18	
19	/**
20	 * 获取导航历史
21	 */
22	export async function getNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
23	  try {
24	    const userId = req.userId;
25	    const { page = 1, pageSize = 20 } = req.query;
26	    
27	    const pageNum = Number(page);
28	    const pageSizeNum = Number(pageSize);
29	    const offset = (pageNum - 1) * pageSizeNum;
30	    
31	    // 获取总数
32	    const countResult = await query<any[]>(
33	      'SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ?',
34	      [userId]
35	    );
36	    const total = countResult[0].total;
37	    
38	    // 获取列表（注意：MySQL prepared statements 不支持 LIMIT/OFFSET 占位符）
39	    const history = await query<NavigationHistory[]>(
40	      `SELECT * FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ${pageSizeNum} OFFSET ${offset}`,
41	      [userId]
42	    );
43	    
44	    // 转换字段名：下划线转驼峰
45	    const formattedHistory = history.map(item => ({
46	      id: item.id,
47	      userId: item.user_id,
48	      startName: item.start_name,
49	      startAddress: item.start_address,
50	      startLat: item.start_lat,
51	      startLng: item.start_lng,
52	      endName: item.end_name,
53	      endAddress: item.end_address,
54	      endLat: item.end_lat,
55	      endLng: item.end_lng,
56	      distance: item.distance,
57	      duration: item.duration,
58	      createdAt: item.created_at
59	    }));
60	    
61	    res.json({
62	      code: 200,
63	      message: '获取成功',
64	      data: {
65	        list: formattedHistory,
66	        total,
67	        page: pageNum,
68	        pageSize: pageSizeNum
69	      }
70	    });
71	  } catch (error) {
72	    console.error('[navigationController] Get navigation history error:', error);
73	    res.status(500).json({
74	      code: 500,
75	      message: '服务器错误'
76	    });
77	  }
78	}
79	
80	/**
81	 * 保存导航记录
82	 */
83	export async function saveNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
84	  try {
85	    const userId = req.userId;
86	    const {
87	      startName,
88	      startAddress,
89	      startLat,
90	      startLng,
91	      endName,
92	      endAddress,
93	      endLat,
94	      endLng,
95	      distance,
96	      duration
97	    } = req.body;
98	    
99	    // 验证参数
100	    if (!endName || !endAddress || !endLat || !endLng) {
101	      return res.status(400).json({
102	        code: 400,
103	        message: '缺少必要参数'
104	      });
105	    }
106	    
107	    const result: any = await query(
108	      `INSERT INTO navigation_history 
109	       (user_id, start_name, start_address, start_lat, start_lng, end_name, end_address, end_lat, end_lng, distance, duration) 
110	       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
111	      [userId, startName, startAddress, startLat, startLng, endName, endAddress, endLat, endLng, distance, duration]
112	    );
113	    
114	    res.status(201).json({
115	      code: 200,
116	      message: '保存成功',
117	      data: {
118	        id: result.insertId
119	      }
120	    });
121	  } catch (error) {
122	    console.error('Save navigation history error:', error);
123	    res.status(500).json({
124	      code: 500,
125	      message: '服务器错误'
126	    });
127	  }
128	}
129	
130	/**
131	 * 删除导航历史
132	 */
133	export async function deleteNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
134	  try {
135	    const userId = req.userId;
136	    const { id } = req.params;
137	    
138	    const result: any = await query(
139	      'DELETE FROM navigation_history WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
140	      [id, userId]
141	    );
142	    
143	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
144	      return res.status(404).json({
145	        code: 404,
146	        message: '记录不存在'
147	      });
148	    }
149	    
150	    res.json({
151	      code: 200,
152	      message: '删除成功'
153	    });
154	  } catch (error) {
155	    console.error('Delete navigation history error:', error);
156	    res.status(500).json({
157	      code: 500,
158	      message: '服务器错误'
159	    });
160	  }
161	}
162	
163	/**
164	 * 清空导航历史
165	 */
166	export async function clearNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
167	  try {
168	    const userId = req.userId;
169	    
170	    await query(
171	      'DELETE FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ?',
172	      [userId]
173	    );
174	    
175	    res.json({
176	      code: 200,
177	      message: '清空成功'
178	    });
179	  } catch (error) {
180	    console.error('Clear navigation history error:', error);
181	    res.status(500).json({
182	      code: 500,
183	      message: '服务器错误'
184	    });
185	  }
186	}
187
```

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-abc39d5b/backend/src/controllers/favoriteController.ts`

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface Favorite {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  name: string;
7	  address: string;
8	  latitude: number;
9	  longitude: number;
10	  category: string;
11	  icon?: string;
12	  created_at: string;
13	}
14	
15	/**
16	 * 获取收藏列表
17	 */
18	export async function getFavorites(req: Request, res: Response) {
19	  try {
20	    const userId = req.userId;
21	    const { category } = req.query;
22	    
23	    let sql = 'SELECT * FROM favorites WHERE user_id = ?';
24	    const params: any[] = [userId];
25	    
26	    if (category) {
27	      sql += ' AND category = ?';
28	      params.push(category);
29	    }
30	    
31	    sql += ' ORDER BY created_at DESC';
32	    
33	    const favorites = await query<Favorite[]>(sql, params);
34	    
35	    res.json({
36	      code: 200,
37	      message: '获取成功',
38	      data: favorites
39	    });
40	  } catch (error) {
41	    console.error('Get favorites error:', error);
42	    res.status(500).json({
43	      code: 500,
44	      message: '服务器错误'
45	    });
46	  }
47	}
48	
49	/**
50	 * 添加收藏
51	 */
52	export async function addFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
53	  try {
54	    console.log('=== 收藏请求开始 ===');
55	    console.log('userId:', req.userId);
56	    console.log('请求体:', JSON.stringify(req.body));
57	    
58	    const userId = req.userId;
59	    const { name, address, latitude, longitude, category, icon } = req.body;
60	    
61	    // 验证userId
62	    if (!userId) {
63	      console.error('❌ userId未定义');
64	      return res.status(401).json({
65	        code: 401,
66	        message: '用户未认证'
67	      });
68	    }
69	    
70	    // 验证参数
71	    if (!name || !address || !latitude || !longitude) {
72	      console.error('❌ 缺少必要参数:', { name, address, latitude, longitude });
73	      return res.status(400).json({
74	        code: 400,
75	        message: '缺少必要参数'
76	      });
77	    }
78	    
79	    console.log('✅ 参数验证通过');
80	    
81	    // 检查是否已收藏
82	    console.log('检查是否已收藏...');
83	    const existing = await query<Favorite[]>(
84	      'SELECT id FROM favorites WHERE user_id = ? AND latitude = ? AND longitude = ?',
85	      [userId, latitude, longitude]
86	    );
87	    
88	    if (existing.length > 0) {
89	      console.log('⚠️ 该地点已收藏');
90	      return res.status(400).json({
91	        code: 400,
92	        message: '该地点已收藏'
93	      });
94	    }
95	    
96	    console.log('插入收藏记录...');
97	    const result: any = await query(
98	      'INSERT INTO favorites (user_id, name, address, latitude, longitude, category, icon) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)',
99	      [userId, name, address, latitude, longitude, category || 'custom', icon || null]
100	    );
101	    
102	    console.log('✅ 收藏成功, insertId:', result.insertId);
103	    console.log('=== 收藏请求结束 ===');
104	    
105	    res.status(201).json({
106	      code: 200,
107	      message: '收藏成功',
108	      data: {
109	        id: result.insertId
110	      }
111	    });
112	  } catch (error) {
113	    console.error('❌ Add favorite error:', error);
114	    console.error('错误堆栈:', error instanceof Error ? error.stack : 'No stack trace');
115	    res.status(500).json({
116	      code: 500,
117	      message: '服务器错误: ' + (error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error))
118	    });
119	  }
120	}
121	
122	/**
123	 * 更新收藏
124	 */
125	export async function updateFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
126	  try {
127	    const userId = req.userId;
128	    const { id } = req.params;
129	    const { name, address, category, icon } = req.body;
130	    
131	    // 验证权限
132	    const favorites = await query<Favorite[]>(
133	      'SELECT id FROM favorites WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
134	      [id, userId]
135	    );
136	    
137	    if (favorites.length === 0) {
138	      return res.status(404).json({
139	        code: 404,
140	        message: '收藏不存在'
141	      });
142	    }
143	    
144	    const updates: string[] = [];
145	    const params: any[] = [];
146	    
147	    if (name) {
148	      updates.push('name = ?');
149	      params.push(name);
150	    }
151	    if (address) {
152	      updates.push('address = ?');
153	      params.push(address);
154	    }
155	    if (category) {
156	      updates.push('category = ?');
157	      params.push(category);
158	    }
159	    if (icon) {
160	      updates.push('icon = ?');
161	      params.push(icon);
162	    }
163	    
164	    if (updates.length === 0) {
165	      return res.status(400).json({
166	        code: 400,
167	        message: '没有要更新的内容'
168	      });
169	    }
170	    
171	    params.push(id, userId);
172	    
173	    await query(
174	      `UPDATE favorites SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`,
175	      params
176	    );
177	    
178	    res.json({
179	      code: 200,
180	      message: '更新成功'
181	    });
182	  } catch (error) {
183	    console.error('Update favorite error:', error);
184	    res.status(500).json({
185	      code: 500,
186	      message: '服务器错误'
187	    });
188	  }
189	}
190	
191	/**
192	 * 删除收藏
193	 */
194	export async function deleteFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
195	  try {
196	    const userId = req.userId;
197	    const { id } = req.params;
198	    
199	    const result: any = await query(
200	      'DELETE FROM favorites WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
201	      [id, userId]
202	    );
203	    
204	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
205	      return res.status(404).json({
206	        code: 404,
207	        message: '收藏不存在'
208	      });
209	    }
210	    
211	    res.json({
212	      code: 200,
213	      message: '删除成功'
214	    });
215	  } catch (error) {
216	    console.error('Delete favorite error:', error);
217	    res.status(500).json({
218	      code: 500,
219	      message: '服务器错误'

0	import express from 'express';
1	import cors from 'cors';
2	import dotenv from 'dotenv';
3	import routes from './routes';
4	import { testConnection } from './config/database';
5	
6	// 加载环境变量
7	dotenv.config();
8	
9	const app = express();
10	
11	const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
12	
13	// 中间件
14	app.use(cors());  // 允许跨域
15	app.use(express.json());  // 解析JSON请求体
16	app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true }));  // 解析URL编码请求体
17	
18	// 请求日志
19	app.use((req, res, next) => {
20	  console.log(`${new Date().toISOString()} - ${req.method} ${req.path}`);
21	  next();
22	});
23	
24	// API路由
25	app.use('/api/v1', routes);
26	
27	// 健康检查
28	app.get('/health', (req, res) => {
29	  res.json({
30	    status: 'ok',
31	    timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
32	  });
33	});
34	
35	// 404处理
36	app.use((req, res) => {
37	  res.status(404).json({
38	    code: 404,
39	    message: '接口不存在'
40	  });
41	});
42	
43	// 错误处理
44	app.use((err: any, req: express.Request, res: express.Response, next: express.NextFunction) => {
45	  console.error('Server error:', err);
46	  res.status(500).json({
47	    code: 500,
48	    message: '服务器内部错误'
49	  });
50	});
51	
52	// 启动服务器
53	async function startServer() {
54	  try {
55	    // 测试数据库连接
56	    const dbConnected = await testConnection();
57	    
58	    if (!dbConnected) {
59	      console.error('❌ 数据库连接失败，服务器启动中止');
60	      process.exit(1);
61	    }
62	    
63	    // 启动HTTP服务
64	    app.listen(PORT, () => {
65	      console.log('');
66	      console.log('🚀 ========================================');
67	      console.log(`🚀 车载导航系统后端服务已启动`);
68	      console.log(`🚀 运行环境: ${process.env.NODE_ENV || 'development'}`);
69	      console.log(`🚀 服务地址: http://localhost:${PORT}`);
70	      console.log(`🚀 API文档: http://localhost:${PORT}/api/v1`);
71	      console.log(`🚀 健康检查: http://localhost:${PORT}/health`);
72	      console.log('🚀 ========================================');
73	      console.log('');
74	    });
75	  } catch (error) {
76	    console.error('❌ 服务器启动失败:', error);
77	    process.exit(1);
78	  }
79	}
80	
81	// 优雅关闭
82	process.on('SIGTERM', () => {
83	  console.log('收到SIGTERM信号，正在关闭服务器...');
84	  process.exit(0);
85	});
86	
87	process.on('SIGINT', () => {
88	  console.log('收到SIGINT信号，正在关闭服务器...');
89	  process.exit(0);
90	});
91	
92	// 启动
93	startServer();
94
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-abc39d5b/backend/src/config/database.ts`

```text
0	import mysql from 'mysql2/promise';
1	import dotenv from 'dotenv';
2	
3	dotenv.config();
4	
5	// 数据库连接池配置
6	export const pool = mysql.createPool({
7	  host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost',
8	  port: parseInt(process.env.DB_PORT || '3306'),
9	  user: process.env.DB_USER || 'root',
10	  password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || '',
11	  database: process.env.DB_NAME || 'car_navigation',
12	  waitForConnections: true,
13	  connectionLimit: 10,
14	  queueLimit: 0,
15	  enableKeepAlive: true,
16	  keepAliveInitialDelay: 0
17	});
18	
19	// 测试数据库连接
20	export async function testConnection() {
21	  try {
22	    const connection = await pool.getConnection();
23	    console.log('✅ 数据库连接成功');
24	    connection.release();
25	    return true;
26	  } catch (error) {
27	    console.error('❌ 数据库连接失败:', error);
28	    return false;
29	  }
30	}
31	
32	// 执行SQL查询
33	export async function query<T = any>(sql: string, params?: any[]): Promise<T> {
34	  const [rows] = await pool.execute(sql, params);
35	  return rows as T;
36	}
37
```
</details></tool-use>

3	import router from '@ohos.router'

6	
7	@Entry

11	  @State isLoggedIn: boolean = false

13

16	    if (this.isLoggedIn) {
17	      this.currentUser = await this.authService.getCurrentUser()
18	    }

25	  }
26	  
27	  build() {
28	    Column() {

37	          })
38	        
39	        Text('我的')

41	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
42	          .fontColor('#FFFFFF')

44	          .textAlign(TextAlign.Center)
45	        
46	        // 占位，保持标题居中
47	        Text('')
48	          .width(60)
49	      }
50	      .width('100%')
51	      .height(56)
52	      .padding({ left: 16, right: 16 })
53	      .backgroundColor('#1A1A1A')
54	      
55	      // 用户信息区域
56	      Column() {
57	        if (this.isLoggedIn && this.currentUser) {
58	          // 已登录

60	            // 头像
61	            Text(this.currentUser.nickname?.charAt(0) || '用')
62	              .fontSize(40)
63	              .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
64	              .width(80)
65	              .height(80)
66	              .borderRadius(40)
67	              .backgroundColor('#4A90E2')

70

73	              .fontSize(20)

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-abc39d5b/entry/src/main/ets/view/EnhancedNavigationModule.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * 增强版导航模块
2	 * 集成完整的导航功能：定位、路径规划、导航指引、POI搜索
3	 * 使用IP定位（简单可靠）
4	 */
5	import { webview } from '@kit.ArkWeb';
6	import { MapService, Location, POIResult } from '../services/MapService';
7	import { NavigationService, NavigationState, NavigationInfo } from '../services/NavigationService';
8	import { VoiceGuideService } from '../services/VoiceGuideService';
9	import { FavoriteService } from '../services/FavoriteService';
10	import { NavigationHistoryService } from '../services/NavigationHistoryService';
11	import { AuthService } from '../services/AuthService';
12	import { FavoritePlace } from '../models/BackendModels';
13	import promptAction from '@ohos.promptAction';
14	
15	@Component
16	export struct EnhancedNavigationModule {
17	  // 外部传入的导航目的地
18	  @Prop @Watch('onDestinationChange') externalDestination: FavoritePlace | null = null;
19	  
20	  // 地图相关
21	  @State isMapLoaded: boolean = false;
22	  @State zoomLevel: number = 15;
23	  private webController: webview.WebviewController = new webview.WebviewController();
24	  
25	  // 定位相关
26	  @State latitude: number = 30.486874173982763;
27	  @State longitude: number = 114.309994670642;
28	  @State addressText: string = "正在定位...";
29	  
30	  // 导航相关
31	  @State isNavigating: boolean = false;
32	  @State navigationInfo: NavigationInfo | null = null;
33	  @State remainingDistance: string = '';
34	  @State remainingTime: string = '';
35	  @State nextInstruction: string = '';
36	  
37	  // 搜索相关
38	  @State showSearchPanel: boolean = false;
39	  @State searchKeyword: string = '';
40	  @State searchResults: POIResult[] = [];
41	  @State isSearching: boolean = false;
42	  @State showSearchHistory: boolean = false;
43	  @State searchHistory: string[] = [];
44	  
45	  // 服务实例
46	  private mapService: MapService = MapService.getInstance();
47	  private navigationService: NavigationService = NavigationService.getInstance();
48	  private voiceService: VoiceGuideService = VoiceGuideService.getInstance();
49	  private favoriteService: FavoriteService = FavoriteService.getInstance();
50	  private historyService: NavigationHistoryService = NavigationHistoryService.getInstance();
51	  private authService: AuthService = AuthService.getInstance();
52	  
53	  aboutToAppear() {
54	    // 监听导航状态变化
55	    this.navigationService.addListener((info) => {
56	      this.onNavigationUpdate(info);
57	    });
58	    
59	    // 检查是否有外部传入的导航目的地
60	    if (this.externalDestination) {
61	      this.handleExternalDestination();
62	    }
63	  }
64	  
65	  /**
66	   * 监听外部传入的导航目的地变化
67	   */
68	  onDestinationChange() {
69	    if (this.externalDestination) {
70	      this.handleExternalDestination();
71	    }
72	  }
73	  
74	  /**
75	   * 处理外部传入的导航目的地
76	   */
77	  handleExternalDestination() {
78	    if (!this.externalDestination) {
79	      return;
80	    }
81	    
82	    console.log('[Navigation] 收到外部导航目的地:', this.externalDestination.name);
83	    console.log('[Navigation] 坐标:', this.externalDestination.latitude, this.externalDestination.longitude);
84	    
85	    const destination: Location = {
86	      latitude: this.externalDestination.latitude,
87	      longitude: this.externalDestination.longitude
88	    };
89	    
90	    // 如果地图已加载,立即启动导航;否则等待地图加载
91	    if (this.isMapLoaded) {
92	      console.log('[Navigation] 地图已加载,立即启动导航');
93	      // 延迟一下,确保WebView完全准备好
94	      setTimeout(() => {
95	        this.startNavigation(destination);
96	      }, 500);
97	    } else {
98	      console.log('[Navigation] 等待地图加载...');
99	      // 等待地图加载完成后再启动导航
100	      let retryCount = 0;
101	      const maxRetries = 100; // 10秒超时
102	      const checkInterval = setInterval(() => {
103	        retryCount++;
104	        if (this.isMapLoaded) {
105	          console.log('[Navigation] 地图加载完成(重试', retryCount, '次),启动导航');
106	          clearInterval(checkInterval);
107	          // 延迟一下,确保WebView完全准备好
108	          setTimeout(() => {
109	            this.startNavigation(destination);
110	          }, 500);
111	        } else if (retryCount >= maxRetries) {
112	          console.error('[Navigation] 等待地图加载超时');
113	          clearInterval(checkInterval);
114	        }
115	      }, 100);
116	    }
117	  }
118	  
119	  aboutToDisappear() {
120	    this.voiceService.release();
121	  }
122	  
123	  /**
124	   * IP定位
125	   */
126	  async startIPLocation() {
127	    try {
128	      console.log('[Navigation] 开始IP定位...');
129	      this.addressText = "IP定位中...";
130	      
131	      const location = await this.mapService.getCurrentLocation();
132	      
133	      this.latitude = location.latitude;
134	      this.longitude = location.longitude;
135	      this.addressText = location.address ? `IP定位 (${location.address})` : "默认位置(武汉)";
136	      
137	      console.log('[Navigation] IP定位完成:', this.latitude, this.longitude);
138	      
139	      // 更新地图标记
140	      const currentLocation: Location = {
141	        latitude: this.latitude,
142	        longitude: this.longitude
143	      };
144	      this.mapService.addCurrentLocationMarker(currentLocation);
145	      this.mapService.moveToLocation(currentLocation, this.zoomLevel);
146	      
147	    } catch (err) {
148	      console.error('[Navigation] IP定位失败:', err);
149	      this.addressText = "定位失败,使用默认位置";
150	    }
151	  }
152	  
153	  /**
154	   * 地图加载完成
155	   */
156	  onMapLoad() {
157	    this.isMapLoaded = true;
158	    this.mapService.setWebController(this.webController);
159	    
160	    // 移动地图到默认位置
161	    const defaultLocation: Location = {
162	      latitude: this.latitude,
163	      longitude: this.longitude
164	    };
165	    this.mapService.moveToLocation(defaultLocation, this.zoomLevel);
166	    
167	    // 延迟添加标记，确保WebView准备好
168	    setTimeout(() => {
169	      this.mapService.addCurrentLocationMarker(defaultLocation);
170	      console.log('[Navigation] 地图初始化完成');
171	    }, 300);
172	    
173	    // 启动IP定位
174	    setTimeout(() => {
175	      this.startIPLocation();
176	    }, 500);
177	  }
178	  
179	  /**
180	   * 缩放地图
181	   */
182	  changeZoom(delta: number): void {
183	    if (!this.webController) return;
184	    this.zoomLevel = Math.max(3, Math.min(20, this.zoomLevel + delta));
185	    try {
186	      const message = JSON.stringify({
187	        action: 'setZoom',
188	        zoom: this.zoomLevel
189	      });
190	      this.webController.runJavaScript(`window.postMessage('${message}', '*')`);
191	    } catch(e) {
192	      console.error('Change zoom error:', e);
193	    }
194	  }
195	  
196	  /**
197	   * 回到当前位置
198	   */
199	  backToCurrentLocation(): void {
200	    if (this.webController) {
201	      const currentLocation: Location = {
202	        latitude: this.latitude,
203	        longitude: this.longitude
204	      };
205	      this.mapService.moveToLocation(currentLocation, this.zoomLevel);
206	    }
207	  }
208	  
209	  /**
210	   * 开始导航
211	   */
212	  async startNavigation(destination: Location) {
213	    try {
214	      await this.navigationService.startNavigation(destination);
215	      this.isNavigating = true;
216	      this.showSearchPanel = false;
217	    } catch (err) {
218	      console.error('Start navigation error:', err);
219	    }
220	  }
221	  
222	  /**
223	   * 停止导航
224	   */
225	  stopNavigation() {
226	    this.navigationService.stopNavigation();
227	    this.isNavigating = false;
228	    this.navigationInfo = null;
229	    this.addressText = "实时定位";
230	  }
231	  
232	  /**
233	   * 导航状态更新
234	   */
235	  onNavigationUpdate(info: NavigationInfo) {
236	    this.navigationInfo = info;
237	    
238	    // 更新显示信息
239	    if (info.remainingDistance > 1000) {
240	      this.remainingDistance = `${(info.remainingDistance / 1000).toFixed(1)} 公里`;
241	    } else {
242	      this.remainingDistance = `${Math.round(info.remainingDistance)} 米`;
243	    }
244	    
245	    const hours = Math.floor(info.remainingTime / 3600);
246	    const minutes = Math.floor((info.remainingTime % 3600) / 60);
247	    if (hours > 0) {
248	      this.remainingTime = `${hours}小时${minutes}分钟`;
249	    } else {
250	      this.remainingTime = `${minutes}分钟`;
251	    }
252	    
253	    this.nextInstruction = info.nextInstruction;
254	    this.addressText = info.nextInstruction;
255	    
256	    // 到达目的地
257	    if (info.state === NavigationState.ARRIVED) {
258	      this.voiceService.speakArrival();
259	      setTimeout(() => {
260	        this.stopNavigation();
261	      }, 3000);
262	    }
263	  }
264	  
265	  /**
266	   * 搜索POI
267	   */
268	  async searchPOI() {
269	    if (!this.searchKeyword.trim()) return;
270	    
271	    this.isSearching = true;
272	    try {
273	      const currentLocation: Location = { latitude: this.latitude, longitude: this.longitude };
274	      const results = await this.mapService.searchPOI(
275	        this.searchKeyword,
276	        currentLocation,
277	        5000
278	      );
279	      this.searchResults = results;
280	    } catch (err) {
281	      console.error('Search error:', err);
282	    } finally {
283	      this.isSearching = false;
284	    }
285	  }
286	  
287	  /**
288	   * 选择POI并导航
289	   */
290	  selectPOI(poi: POIResult) {
291	    this.startNavigation(poi.location);
292	  }
293	  
294	  /**
295	   * 收藏当前位置或POI
296	   */
297	  async addToFavorites(name: string, address: string, location: Location) {
298	    try {
299	      console.log('[Navigation] 开始收藏:', name);
300	      console.log('[Navigation] 地址:', address);
301	      console.log('[Navigation] 坐标:', location.latitude, location.longitude);
302	      
303	      const isLoggedIn = await this.authService.isLoggedIn();
304	      console.log('[Navigation] 登录状态:', isLoggedIn);
305	      
306	      if (!isLoggedIn) {
307	        console.log('[Navigation] 未登录，提示用户登录');
308	        promptAction.showToast({
309	          message: '请先登录',
310	          duration: 2000
311	        });
312	        return;
313	      }
314	      
315	      const response = await this.favoriteService.addFavorite({
316	        name: name,
317	        address: address,
318	        latitude: location.latitude,
319	        longitude: location.longitude
320	      });
321	      
322	      console.log('[Navigation] 收藏响应代码:', response.code);
323	      console.log('[Navigation] 收藏响应消息:', response.message);
324	      console.log('[Navigation] 完整响应:', JSON.stringify(response));
325	      
326	      if (response.code === 200) {
327	        console.log('[Navigation] 收藏成功');
328	        promptAction.showToast({
329	          message: '收藏成功',
330	          duration: 2000
331	        });
332	      } else {
333	        console.error('[Navigation] 收藏失败:', response.message);
334	        promptAction.showToast({
335	          message: response.message || '收藏失败',
336	          duration: 2000
337	        });
338	      }
339	    } catch (err) {
340	      console.error('[Navigation] 收藏异常 - 类型:', typeof err);
341	      console.error('[Navigation] 收藏异常 - 详情:', JSON.stringify(err));
342	      promptAction.showToast({
343	        message: '收藏失败，请稍后重试',
344	        duration: 2000
345	      });
346	    }
347	  }
348	  
349	  /**
350	   * 加载搜索历史
351	   */
352	  async loadSearchHistory() {
353	    try {
354	      const response = await this.historyService.getHistory();
355	      // 提取最近5条搜索记录的目的地名称
356	      if (response.data && response.data.list) {
357	        this.searchHistory = response.data.list.slice(0, 5).map(item => item.endName);
358	      } else {
359	        this.searchHistory = [];
360	      }
361	    } catch (err) {
362	      console.error('[Navigation] 加载搜索历史失败:', err);
363	      this.searchHistory = [];
364	    }
365	  }
366	  
367	  /**
368	   * 保存导航历史
369	   */
370	  async saveNavigationHistory(destination: Location, destinationName: string) {
371	    try {
372	      const isLoggedIn = await this.authService.isLoggedIn();
373	      if (!isLoggedIn) {
374	        return;
375	      }
376	      
377	      await this.historyService.saveHistory({
378	        startLat: this.latitude,
379	        startLng: this.longitude,
380	        startName: '当前位置',
381	        startAddress: this.addressText,
382	        endLat: destination.latitude,
383	        endLng: destination.longitude,
384	        endName: destinationName,
385	        endAddress: destinationName,
386	        distance: 0, // 实际距离由后端计算
387	        duration: 0  // 实际时长由后端计算
388	      });
389	      
390	      console.log('[Navigation] 导航历史已保存');
391	    } catch (err) {
392	      console.error('[Navigation] 保存导航历史失败:', err);
393	    }
394	  }
395	  
396	  build() {
397	    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.Bottom }) {
398	      // 1. 地图层 - 使用WebView加载高德地图
399	      Stack() {
400	        Web({ src: $rawfile('amap.html'), controller: this.webController })
401	          .width('100%')
402	          .height('100%')
403	          .onPageEnd(() => {
404	            console.log('地图页面加载完成');
405	            this.onMapLoad();
406	          })
407	          .onErrorReceive((event) => {
408	            console.error('地图加载错误:', event?.error);
409	          })
410	          .onConsole((event) => {
411	            // 转发WebView的console日志到ArkTS
412	            if (event && event.message) {
413	              const msg = event.message;
414	              const message = msg.getMessage();
415	              const sourceId = msg.getSourceId();
416	              const lineNumber = msg.getLineNumber();
417	              
418	              // 输出WebView日志，包含来源信息
419	              console.log('[WebView]', message, 'at', sourceId, ':', lineNumber);
420	            }
421	            return false;
422	          })
423	      }
424	      
425	      // 2. 顶部搜索栏
426	      if (!this.isNavigating) {
427	        this.SearchBar()
428	      }
429	      
430	      // 3. 右侧控制按钮
431	      this.ControlButtons()
432	      
433	      // 4. 底部信息面板
434	      if (this.isNavigating && this.navigationInfo) {
435	        this.NavigationPanel()
436	      } else {
437	        this.LocationPanel()
438	      }
439	      
440	      // 5. 搜索结果面板
441	      if (this.showSearchPanel) {
442	        this.SearchResultPanel()
443	      }
444	    }
445	  }
446	  
447	  /**
448	   * 搜索栏
449	   */
450	  @Builder
451	  SearchBar(): void {
452	    Column() {
453	      Row() {
454	        TextInput({ placeholder: '搜索地点、地址' })
455	          .layoutWeight(1)
456	          .height(48)
457	          .backgroundColor(Color.White)
458	          .borderRadius(24)
459	          .padding({ left: 20, right: 20 })
460	          .onChange((value: string): void => {
461	            this.searchKeyword = value;
462	          })
463	          .onFocus(() => {
464	            // 获得焦点时加载搜索历史
465	            this.showSearchHistory = true;
466	            this.loadSearchHistory();
467	          })
468	          .onBlur(() => {
469	            // 延迟隐藏，以便点击历史记录
470	            setTimeout(() => {
471	              this.showSearchHistory = false;
472	            }, 200);
473	          })
474	          .onSubmit((): void => {
475	            this.showSearchPanel = true;
476	            this.showSearchHistory = false;
477	            this.searchPOI();
478	            return;
479	          })
480	        
481	        // 收藏按钮
482	        Button() {
483	          Text('⭐')
484	            .fontSize(20)
485	        }
486	        .height(48)
487	        .width(48)
488	        .backgroundColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.9)')
489	        .borderRadius(24)
490	        .margin({ left: 10 })
491	        .onClick(async () => {
492	          // 收藏当前位置
493	          await this.addToFavorites(
494	            '当前位置',
495	            this.addressText,
496	            { latitude: this.latitude, longitude: this.longitude }
497	          );
498	        })
499
```
