 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/.claude/worktrees/agent-abc39d5b/entry/src/main/ets/services/NavigationService.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * 导航服务 - 管理导航状态和逻辑
2	 * 使用IP定位（不支持实时追踪）
3	 */
4	import { MapService, Location, RouteInfo } from './MapService';
5	
6	export enum NavigationState {
7	  IDLE = 0,           // 空闲
8	  PLANNING = 1,       // 规划中
9	  NAVIGATING = 2,     // 导航中
10	  PAUSED = 3,         // 暂停
11	  ARRIVED = 4         // 已到达
12	}
13	
14	export interface NavigationInfo {
15	  state: NavigationState;
16	  currentLocation: Location;
17	  destination: Location;
18	  route: RouteInfo | null;
19	  remainingDistance: number;  // 剩余距离（米）
20	  remainingTime: number;      // 剩余时间（秒）
21	  currentStepIndex: number;   // 当前步骤索引
22	  nextInstruction: string;    // 下一个指令
23	}
24	
25	/**
26	 * 导航服务类
27	 */
28	export class NavigationService {
29	  private static instance: NavigationService;
30	  private mapService: MapService;
31	  private navigationInfo: NavigationInfo | null = null;
32	  private listeners: ((info: NavigationInfo) => void)[] = [];
33	  
34	  private constructor() {
35	    this.mapService = MapService.getInstance();
36	  }
37	  
38	  static getInstance(): NavigationService {
39	    if (!NavigationService.instance) {
40	      NavigationService.instance = new NavigationService();
41	    }
42	    return NavigationService.instance;
43	  }
44	  
45	  /**
46	   * 开始导航
47	   */
48	  async startNavigation(destination: Location): Promise<void> {
49	    try {
50	      // 获取当前位置（IP定位）
51	      let currentLocation: Location;
52	      try {
53	        currentLocation = await this.mapService.getCurrentLocation();
54	        console.log('[NavigationService] 获取到当前位置:', currentLocation.latitude, currentLocation.longitude);
55	      } catch (err) {
56	        console.warn('[NavigationService] 获取当前位置失败，使用默认位置:', String(err));
57	        currentLocation = {
58	          latitude: 30.486874173982763,
59	          longitude: 114.309994670642
60	        };
61	      }
62	      
63	      console.log('[NavigationService] 起点:', currentLocation.latitude, currentLocation.longitude);
64	      console.log('[NavigationService] 终点:', destination.latitude, destination.longitude);
65	      
66	      // 更新状态为规划中
67	      this.updateNavigationInfo({
68	        state: NavigationState.PLANNING,
69	        currentLocation,
70	        destination,
71	        route: null,
72	        remainingDistance: 0,
73	        remainingTime: 0,
74	        currentStepIndex: 0,
75	        nextInstruction: '正在规划路线...'
76	      });
77	      
78	      // 规划路线
79	      const route = await this.mapService.planRoute(currentLocation, destination, 0);
80	      
81	      // 绘制路线
82	      this.mapService.drawRoute(route);
83	      
84	      // 更新状态为导航中
85	      this.updateNavigationInfo({
86	        state: NavigationState.NAVIGATING,
87	        currentLocation,
88	        destination,
89	        route,
90	        remainingDistance: route.distance,
91	        remainingTime: route.duration,
92	        currentStepIndex: 0,
93	        nextInstruction: route.steps[0]?.instruction || '开始导航'
94	      });
95	      
96	      console.log('[NavigationService] 导航已启动（IP定位，无实时追踪）');
97	      
98	    } catch (err) {
99	      console.error('Start navigation error:', err);
100	      throw new Error('导航启动失败: ' + String(err));
101	    }
102	  }
103	  
104	  /**
105	   * 停止导航
106	   */
107	  stopNavigation(): void {
108	    this.mapService.clearOverlays();
109	    this.navigationInfo = null;
110	    this.notifyListeners();
111	  }
112	  
113	  /**
114	   * 暂停导航
115	   */
116	  pauseNavigation(): void {
117	    if (this.navigationInfo) {
118	      this.navigationInfo.state = NavigationState.PAUSED;
119	      this.notifyListeners();
120	    }
121	  }
122	  
123	  /**
124	   * 恢复导航
125	   */
126	  resumeNavigation(): void {
127	    if (this.navigationInfo && this.navigationInfo.state === NavigationState.PAUSED) {
128	      this.navigationInfo.state = NavigationState.NAVIGATING;
129	      this.notifyListeners();
130	    }
131	  }
132	  
133	  /**
134	   * 重新规划路线
135	   */
136	  async replanRoute(): Promise<void> {
137	    if (!this.navigationInfo) return;
138	    
139	    try {
140	      const currentLocation = await this.mapService.getCurrentLocation();
141	      const route = await this.mapService.planRoute(currentLocation, this.navigationInfo.destination, 0);
142	      
143	      this.mapService.clearOverlays();
144	      this.mapService.drawRoute(route);
145	      
146	      if (this.navigationInfo) {
147	        this.navigationInfo.currentLocation = currentLocation;
148	        this.navigationInfo.route = route;
149	        this.navigationInfo.remainingDistance = route.distance;
150	        this.navigationInfo.remainingTime = route.duration;
151	        this.navigationInfo.currentStepIndex = 0;
152	        this.navigationInfo.nextInstruction = route.steps[0]?.instruction || '';
153	        this.notifyListeners();
154	      }
155	    } catch (err) {
156	      console.error('Replan route error:', err);
157	    }
158	  }
159	  
160	  /**
161	   * 获取当前导航信息
162	   */
163	  getNavigationInfo(): NavigationInfo | null {
164	    return this.navigationInfo;
165	  }
166	  
167	  /**
168	   * 添加导航状态监听器
169	   */
170	  addListener(listener: (info: NavigationInfo) => void): void {
171	    this.listeners.push(listener);
172	  }
173	  
174	  /**
175	   * 移除导航状态监听器
176	   */
177	  removeListener(listener: (info: NavigationInfo) => void): void {
178	    const index = this.listeners.indexOf(listener);
179	    if (index > -1) {
180	      this.listeners.splice(index, 1);
181	    }
182	  }
183	  
184	  /**
185	   * 更新导航信息
186	   */
187	  private updateNavigationInfo(info: NavigationInfo): void {
188	    this.navigationInfo = info;
189	    this.notifyListeners();
190	  }
191	  
192	  /**
193	   * 通知所有监听器
194	   */
195	  private notifyListeners(): void {
196	    if (this.navigationInfo) {
197	      this.listeners.forEach(listener => {
198	        try {
199	          listener(this.navigationInfo!);
200	        } catch (err) {
201	          console.error('Listener error:', err);
202	        }
203	      });
204	    }
205	  }
206	}
207
```

```text
700	          .margin({ top: 40 })
701	      } else {
702	        List({ space: 0 }) {
703	          ForEach(this.searchResults, (poi: POIResult) => {
704	            ListItem() {
705	              this.POIItem(poi)
706	            }
707	          })
708	        }
709	        .width('100%')
710	        .layoutWeight(1)
711	      }
712	    }
713	    .width('100%')
714	    .height('50%')
715	    .backgroundColor('rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.98)')
716	    .backdropBlur(30)
717	    .borderRadius({ topLeft: 24, topRight: 24 })
718	    .position({ x: 0, y: '50%' })
719	  }
720	  
721	  /**
722	   * POI列表项
723	   */
724	  @Builder
725	  POIItem(poi: POIResult): void {
726	    Row() {
727	      Column() {
728	        Text(poi.name)
729	          .fontSize(16)
730	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
731	          .fontColor(Color.White)
732	        Text(poi.address)
733	          .fontSize(12)
734	          .fontColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.6)')
735	          .margin({ top: 4 })
736	        Text(`${(poi.distance / 1000).toFixed(1)}km`)
737	          .fontSize(12)
738	          .fontColor('#00E5FF')
739	          .margin({ top: 4 })
740	      }
741	      .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Start)
742	      .layoutWeight(1)
743	      
744	      // 收藏按钮
745	      Button() {
746	        Text('⭐')
747	          .fontSize(18)
748	      }
749	      .height(36)
750	      .width(36)
751	      .backgroundColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.1)')
752	      .borderRadius(18)
753	      .margin({ right: 8 })
754	      .onClick(async () => {
755	        await this.addToFavorites(poi.name, poi.address, poi.location);
756	      })
757	      
758	      Button('导航')
759	        .height(36)
760	        .backgroundColor('#00E5FF')
761	        .borderRadius(18)
762	        .onClick(() => {
763	          this.selectPOI(poi);
764	          // 保存导航历史
765	          this.saveNavigationHistory(poi.location, poi.name);
766	        })
767	    }
768	    .width('100%')
769	    .padding(16)
770	    .borderRadius(12)
771	    .backgroundColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.05)')
772	    .margin({ left: 16, right: 16, top: 8 })
773	  }
774	  
775	  /**
776	   * 地图按钮
777	   */
778	  @Builder
779	  MapBtn(text: string, action: () => void): void {
780	    Button(text)
781	      .type(ButtonType.Circle)
782	      .width(50)
783	      .height(50)
784	      .fontSize(20)
785	      .fontColor(Color.White)
786	      .backgroundColor('rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.9)')
787	      .shadow({ radius: 10, color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)' })
788	      .onClick(action)
789	  }
790	}
791
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
0	<!DOCTYPE html>
1	<html>
2	<head>
3	    <meta charset="utf-8">
4	    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
5	    <title>高德地图</title>
6	    <style>
7	        * {
8	            margin: 0;
9	            padding: 0;
10	        }
11	        html, body {
12	            width: 100%;
13	            height: 100%;
14	            overflow: hidden;
15	        }
16	        #container {
17	            width: 100%;
18	            height: 100%;
19	        }
20	    </style>
21	    <script src="https://webapi.amap.com/maps?v=2.0&key=2455309b8d8bb76cfdfebccb98f20153"></script>
22	    <style>
23	        .amap-logo, .amap-copyright {
24	            display: none !important;
25	        }
26	    </style>
27	</head>
28	<body>
29	    <div id="container"></div>
30	    <script>
31	        let map = null;
32	        let currentPolyline = null;
33	        let markers = [];
34	        let currentLocationMarker = null;
35	        
36	        // 初始化地图 - 2D模式
37	        function initMap() {
38	            map = new AMap.Map('container', {
39	                zoom: 15,
40	                center: [114.309994670642, 30.486874173982763],
41	                mapStyle: 'amap://styles/normal',
42	                showLabel: true,
43	                features: ['bg', 'road', 'building', 'point']
44	            });
45	            
46	            console.log('地图初始化完成');
47	            
48	            if (window.mapController) {
49	                window.mapController.postMessage('mapLoaded');
50	            }
51	        }
52	        
53	        // 设置地图中心
54	        function setCenter(lng, lat, zoom) {
55	            if (map) {
56	                map.setCenter([lng, lat]);
57	                if (zoom) {
58	                    map.setZoom(zoom);
59	                }
60	            }
61	        }
62	        
63	
64	        // 绘制路线
65	        function drawRoute(path) {
66	            clearOverlays();
67	            
68	            if (!path || path.length === 0) {
69	                console.error('路线坐标为空');
70	                return;
71	            }
72	            
73	            console.log('绘制路线: 起点', path[0], '终点', path[path.length - 1]);
74	            
75	            // 创建路线
76	            currentPolyline = new AMap.Polyline({
77	                path: path,
78	                strokeColor: '#4A90E2',
79	                strokeWeight: 6,
80	                strokeOpacity: 0.8,
81	                lineJoin: 'round',
82	                lineCap: 'round',
83	                showDir: true,
84	                dirColor: '#FFFFFF',
85	                zIndex: 50
86	            });
87	            
88	            map.add(currentPolyline);
89	            
90	            // 添加起点标记
91	            if (path.length > 0) {
92	                const startMarker = new AMap.Marker({
93	                    position: path[0],
94	                    title: '起点',
95	                    icon: new AMap.Icon({
96	                        size: new AMap.Size(40, 50),
97	                        image: 'https://webapi.amap.com/theme/v1.3/markers/n/start.png',
98	                        imageSize: new AMap.Size(40, 50)
99	                    }),
100	                    offset: new AMap.Pixel(-20, -50),
101	                    zIndex: 100,
102	                    animation: 'AMAP_ANIMATION_DROP'
103	                });
104	                map.add(startMarker);
105	                markers.push(startMarker);
106	                
107	                // 添加终点标记
108	                const endMarker = new AMap.Marker({
109	                    position: path[path.length - 1],
110	                    title: '终点',
111	                    icon: new AMap.Icon({
112	                        size: new AMap.Size(40, 50),
113	                        image: 'https://webapi.amap.com/theme/v1.3/markers/n/end.png',
114	                        imageSize: new AMap.Size(40, 50)
115	                    }),
116	                    offset: new AMap.Pixel(-20, -50),
117	                    zIndex: 100,
118	                    animation: 'AMAP_ANIMATION_DROP'
119	                });
120	                map.add(endMarker);
121	                markers.push(endMarker);
122	            }
123	            
124	            // 自动调整视野
125	            map.setFitView(null, false, [100, 100, 100, 100]);
126	        }
127	        
128	        // 清除所有覆盖物
129	        function clearOverlays() {
130	            if (currentPolyline) {
131	                map.remove(currentPolyline);
132	                currentPolyline = null;
133	            }
134	            
135	            if (markers.length > 0) {
136	                map.remove(markers);
137	                markers = [];
138	            }
139	        }
140	        
141	        // 添加标记
142	        function addMarker(lng, lat, title) {
143	            const marker = new AMap.Marker({
144	                position: [lng, lat],
145	                title: title
146	            });
147	            map.add(marker);
148	            markers.push(marker);
149	            return markers.length - 1;
150	        }
151	        
152	        // 添加当前位置标记
153	        function addCurrentLocationMarker(lng, lat) {
154	            if (currentLocationMarker) {
155	                map.remove(currentLocationMarker);
156	            }
157	            
158	            currentLocationMarker = new AMap.Marker({
159	                position: [lng, lat],
160	                title: '当前位置',
161	                icon: new AMap.Icon({
162	                    size: new AMap.Size(20, 20),
163	                    image: 'data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMjAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjAiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+PGNpcmNsZSBjeD0iMTAiIGN5PSIxMCIgcj0iOCIgZmlsbD0iIzAwN0FGRiIgc3Ryb2tlPSIjRkZGRkZGIiBzdHJva2Utd2lkdGg9IjIiLz48L3N2Zz4=',
164	                    imageSize: new AMap.Size(20, 20)
165	                }),
166	                offset: new AMap.Pixel(-10, -10),
167	                zIndex: 200
168	            });
169	            
170	            map.add(currentLocationMarker);
171	        }
172	        
173	        // 缩放地图
174	        function setZoom(zoom) {
175	            if (map) {
176	                map.setZoom(zoom);
177	            }
178	        }
179	        
180	        // 获取当前缩放级别
181	        function getZoom() {
182	            return map ? map.getZoom() : 15;
183	        }
184	        
185	        // 接收来自ArkTS的消息
186	        window.addEventListener('message', function(event) {
187	            try {
188	                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
189	                
190	                switch(data.action) {
191	                    case 'setCenter':
192	                        setCenter(data.lng, data.lat, data.zoom);
193	                        break;
194	                    case 'drawRoute':
195	                        console.log('执行drawRoute, 坐标点数:', data.path ? data.path.length : 0);
196	                        drawRoute(data.path);
197	                        break;
198	                    case 'clearOverlays':
199	                        clearOverlays();
200	                        break;
201	                    case 'addMarker':
202	                        addMarker(data.lng, data.lat, data.title);
203	                        break;
204	                    case 'addCurrentLocationMarker':
205	                        addCurrentLocationMarker(data.lng, data.lat);
206	                        break;
207	                    case 'setZoom':
208	                        setZoom(data.zoom);
209	                        break;
210	                    default:
211	                        console.warn('未知的action:', data.action);
212	                }
213	            } catch (e) {
214	                console.error('WebView消息处理错误:', e);
215	            }
216	        });
217	        
218	        // 页面加载完成后初始化地图
219	        window.onload = function() {
220	            initMap();
221	        };
222	    </script>
223	</body>
224	</html>
225
```

今天可演示最小计划（仅规划）  
P0：1) 安全兜底：后端统一500文案，去掉`error.message/stack`透出；清理仓库内`.env`，仅保留脱敏`.env.example`。2) 修经纬度校验：`!lat/!lng`改`== null + Number.isFinite`（含0值）。3) 修token竞态：`HttpService`加初始化就绪Promise，鉴权请求前等待。4) 未登录进收藏/历史先弹“去登录”引导。5) 外部目的地触发导航后补写历史。  
P1：收敛`BASE_URL`、AMAP key、`client_id`到单一配置源。  
执行顺序：安全→后端校验→token→登录引导→历史补写→配置收敛。  
验证清单：未登录入口有引导；冷启动首个鉴权请求成功；外部导航生成历史；0经纬度可入库；接口不泄露敏感信息。关键文件见下。

```md
## Context
你要求今天完成毕业设计项目并达到“可答辩、可演示”。当前代码主链路（登录/注册/收藏/历史/导航）基本存在，但有若干高风险断点会导致现场演示失败：后端地址硬编码、token 初始化竞态、未登录进入收藏/历史无引导、外部目的地导航不写历史、后端参数校验边界问题与错误信息泄露。目标是在不做大重构的前提下，用最小改动把核心演示链路收口并可稳定复现。

## Recommended approach (today)

### P0（今天必须完成）
1. **安全与配置收口（最小必要）**
   - 处理 `backend/.env` 入库风险：新增/更新 `.gitignore` 忽略 `backend/.env`，保留脱敏 `backend/.env.example`。
   - 去除后端接口错误信息直出（不再返回内部 `error.message/stack`）。

2. **后端参数校验修复（保证接口稳定）**
   - 将经纬度判空从 `!latitude/!longitude` 改为显式 `=== undefined || === null` + 数值有效性检查，避免 `0` 被误判。
   - 涉及收藏、导航历史、位置、常去地点等核心控制器。

3. **前端登录态稳定化（修复冷启动误判）**
   - 在 `HttpService` 增加“初始化完成”等待机制（基于已有 `initPreferences/loadToken`），确保鉴权请求和登录态判断前 token 已加载。
   - `AuthService.isLoggedIn` 改为依赖初始化完成后再判断。

4. **未登录分流与演示闭环修复**
   - 收藏页/历史页在 401 场景提供“去登录”引导，避免卡在错误重试。
   - 外部目的地触发导航时，复用现有 `saveNavigationHistory`，保证“收藏/历史 -> 导航 -> 历史可见”闭环。

5. **后端地址收口（避免演示环境切换失败）**
   - 将 `ApiConfig.BASE_URL` 统一到单一可切换配置（至少开发地址只在一处改动），并在启动前检查。

### P1（今天尽量完成）
1. 地图 key/client_id 配置集中化（`AmapService`、`amap.html`、`module.json5` 的配置一致性）。
2. 同步更新运行与接口文档，确保答辩材料与实际实现一致。

## Execution order (timeboxed)
1. **阶段A（~1.5h）**：后端安全与校验（P0-1, P0-2）
2. **阶段B（~1.5h）**：前端 token 初始化与登录态稳定（P0-3）
3. **阶段C（~1h）**：未登录分流 + 导航历史补写闭环（P0-4）
4. **阶段D（~0.5h）**：BASE_URL 收口（P0-5）
5. **阶段E（~1.5h）**：联调回归 + 演示脚本整理 + 文档同步（P1 可插入）

## Critical files to modify
- `entry/src/main/ets/config/ApiConfig.ets`
- `entry/src/main/ets/services/HttpService.ets`
- `entry/src/main/ets/services/AuthService.ets`
- `entry/src/main/ets/pages/FavoritesPage.ets`
- `entry/src/main/ets/pages/HistoryPage.ets`
- `entry/src/main/ets/pages/UserCenterPage.ets`
- `entry/src/main/ets/view/EnhancedNavigationModule.ets`
- `backend/src/controllers/favoriteController.ts`
- `backend/src/controllers/navigationController.ts`
- `backend/src/controllers/locationController.ts`
- `backend/src/controllers/frequentLocationController.ts`
- `backend/src/controllers/feedbackController.ts`（仅统一错误返回时）
- `backend/.env.example`（新建或更新）
- `.gitignore`

## Existing code to reuse (no reinvention)
- `EnhancedNavigationModule.saveNavigationHistory(...)`（已存在历史写入逻辑）
  - `entry/src/main/ets/view/EnhancedNavigationModule.ets`
- `NavigationHistoryService.saveHistory(...)`（已有历史接口调用）
  - `entry/src/main/ets/services/NavigationHistoryService.ets`
- `AuthService.isLoggedIn/getCurrentUser/login/logout`（现有认证入口）
  - `entry/src/main/ets/services/AuthService.ets`
- `HttpService.initPreferences/loadToken/getToken`（现有 token 存取能力）
  - `entry/src/main/ets/services/HttpService.ets`
- 后端统一数据库访问 `query(...)`（无需新增数据层）
  - `backend/src/config/database.ts`

## Risks and rollback points
- 登录态改动可能影响全局请求时序：先做小步提交，异常时回滚到前一提交。
- 校验逻辑调整可能改变历史容错：仅改参数边界判断，不改 SQL 结构。
- BASE_URL 改动可能影响当前联调：保留可快速切回的开发地址。

## Verification (end-to-end)
1. **后端启动验证**
   - `npm run dev`（backend）
   - `GET /health` 返回 `status=ok`

2. **关键 API 冒烟（带 token）**
   - `POST /api/v1/auth/login`
   - `GET /api/v1/auth/profile`
   - `GET/POST/DELETE /api/v1/favorites`
   - `GET/POST/DELETE /api/v1/navigation/history`
   - 校验：401 返回可预期、500 不泄露内部细节

3. **前端演示主链路**
   - 注册/登录成功进入首页
   - 未登录进入收藏/历史时可一键去登录
   - 收藏目的地 -> 触发导航 -> 历史页可看到新增记录
   - 冷启动后登录态判断稳定（不再随机误判未登录）

4. **交付检查**
   - 仓库不包含 `backend/.env` 明文配置
   - 文档与实际 API/运行步骤一致
```

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface Favorite {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  name: string;
7	  address: string;
8	  latitude: number;
9	  longitude: number;
10	  category: string;

15	/**
16	 * 获取收藏列表
17	 */
18	export async function getFavorites(req: Request, res: Response) {
19	  try {
20	    const userId = req.userId;
21	    const { category } = req.query;
22	    
23	    let sql = 'SELECT * FROM favorites WHERE user_id = ?';
24	    const params: any[] = [userId];
25	    
26	    if (category) {
27	      sql += ' AND category = ?';
28	      params.push(category);
29	    }
30	    
31	    sql += ' ORDER BY created_at DESC';
32	    
33	    const favorites = await query<Favorite[]>(sql, params);
34	    
35	    res.json({
36	      code: 200,
37	      message: '获取成功',
38	      data: favorites
39	    });
40	  } catch (error) {
41	    console.error('Get favorites error:', error);
42	    res.status(500).json({
43	      code: 500,
44	      message: '服务器错误'
45	    });
46	  }
47	}
48	
49	/**
50	 * 添加收藏
51	 */
52	export async function addFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
53	  try {
54	    console.log('=== 收藏请求开始 ===');
55	    console.log('userId:', req.userId);
56	    console.log('请求体:', JSON.stringify(req.body));
57	    
58	    const userId = req.userId;
59	    const { name, address, latitude, longitude, category, icon } = req.body;
60	    
61	    // 验证userId
62	    if (!userId) {
63	      console.error('❌ userId未定义');
64	      return res.status(401).json({
65	        code: 401,
66	        message: '用户未认证'
67	      });
68	    }
69	    
70	    // 验证参数
71	    if (!name || !address || !latitude || !longitude) {
72	      console.error('❌ 缺少必要参数:', { name, address, latitude, longitude });
73	      return res.status(400).json({
74	        code: 400,
75	        message: '缺少必要参数'
76	      });
77	    }
78	    
79	    console.log('✅ 参数验证通过');
80	    
81	    // 检查是否已收藏
82	    console.log('检查是否已收藏...');
83	    const existing = await query<Favorite[]>(
84	      'SELECT id FROM favorites WHERE user_id = ? AND latitude = ? AND longitude = ?',
85	      [userId, latitude, longitude]
86	    );
87	    
88	    if (existing.length > 0) {
89	      console.log('⚠️ 该地点已收藏');
90	      return res.status(400).json({
91	        code: 400,
92	        message: '该地点已收藏'
93	      });
94	    }
95	    
96	    console.log('插入收藏记录...');
97	    const result: any = await query(
98	      'INSERT INTO favorites (user_id, name, address, latitude, longitude, category, icon) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)',
99	      [userId, name, address, latitude, longitude, category || 'custom', icon || null]
100	    );
101	    
102	    console.log('✅ 收藏成功, insertId:', result.insertId);
103	    console.log('=== 收藏请求结束 ===');
104	    
105	    res.status(201).json({
106	      code: 200,
107	      message: '收藏成功',
108	      data: {
109	        id: result.insertId
110	      }
111	    });
112	  } catch (error) {
113	    console.error('❌ Add favorite error:', error);
114	    console.error('错误堆栈:', error instanceof Error ? error.stack : 'No stack trace');
115	    res.status(500).json({
116	      code: 500,
117	      message: '服务器错误: ' + (error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error))
118	    });
119	  }
120	}
121	
122	/**
123	 * 更新收藏
124	 */
125	export async function updateFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
126	  try {
127	    const userId = req.userId;
128	    const { id } = req.params;
129	    const { name, address, category, icon } = req.body;
130	    
131	    // 验证权限
132	    const favorites = await query<Favorite[]>(
133	      'SELECT id FROM favorites WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
134	      [id, userId]
135	    );
136	    
137	    if (favorites.length === 0) {
138	      return res.status(404).json({
139	        code: 404,
140	        message: '收藏不存在'
141	      });
142	    }
143	    
144	    const updates: string[] = [];
145	    const params: any[] = [];
146	    
147	    if (name) {
148	      updates.push('name = ?');
149	      params.push(name);
150	    }
151	    if (address) {
152	      updates.push('address = ?');
153	      params.push(address);
154	    }
155	    if (category) {
156	      updates.push('category = ?');
157	      params.push(category);
158	    }
159	    if (icon) {
160	      updates.push('icon = ?');
161	      params.push(icon);
162	    }
163	    
164	    if (updates.length === 0) {
165	      return res.status(400).json({
166	        code: 400,
167	        message: '没有要更新的内容'
168	      });
169	    }
170	    
171	    params.push(id, userId);
172	    
173	    await query(
174	      `UPDATE favorites SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`,
175	      params
176	    );
177	    
178	    res.json({
179	      code: 200,
180	      message: '更新成功'
181	    });
182	  } catch (error) {
183	    console.error('Update favorite error:', error);
184	    res.status(500).json({
185	      code: 500,
186	      message: '服务器错误'
187	    });
188	  }
189	}
190	
191	/**
192	 * 删除收藏
193	 */
194	export async function deleteFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
195	  try {
196	    const userId = req.userId;
197	    const { id } = req.params;
198	    
199	    const result: any = await query(
200	      'DELETE FROM favorites WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
201	      [id, userId]
202	    );
203	    
204	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
205	      return res.status(404).json({
206	        code: 404,
207	        message: '收藏不存在'
208	      });
209	    }
210	    
211	    res.json({
212	      code: 200,
213	      message: '删除成功'
214	    });

217	    res.status(500).json({

219	      message: '服务器错误'
220	    });
221	  }
222	}
```

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface NavigationHistory {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  start_name?: string;
7	  start_address?: string;
8	  start_lat?: number;
9	  start_lng?: number;
10	  end_name: string;
11	  end_address: string;
12	  end_lat: number;
13	  end_lng: number;
14	  distance?: number;
15	  duration?: number;
16	  created_at: string;
17	}
18	
19	/**
20	 * 获取导航历史
21	 */
22	export async function getNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
23	  try {
24	    const userId = req.userId;
25	    const { page = 1, pageSize = 20 } = req.query;
26	    
27	    const pageNum = Number(page);
28	    const pageSizeNum = Number(pageSize);
29	    const offset = (pageNum - 1) * pageSizeNum;
30	    
31	    // 获取总数
32	    const countResult = await query<any[]>(
33	      'SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ?',
34	      [userId]
35	    );
36	    const total = countResult[0].total;
37	    
38	    // 获取列表（注意：MySQL prepared statements 不支持 LIMIT/OFFSET 占位符）
39	    const history = await query<NavigationHistory[]>(
40	      `SELECT * FROM navigation_history WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ${pageSizeNum} OFFSET ${offset}`,
41	      [userId]
42	    );
43	    
44	    // 转换字段名：下划线转驼峰
45	    const formattedHistory = history.map(item => ({
46	      id: item.id,
47	      userId: item.user_id,
48	      startName: item.start_name,
49	      startAddress: item.start_address,
50	      startLat: item.start_lat,
51	      startLng: item.start_lng,
52	      endName: item.end_name,
53	      endAddress: item.end_address,
54	      endLat: item.end_lat,
55	      endLng: item.end_lng,
56	      distance: item.distance,
57	      duration: item.duration,
58	      createdAt: item.created_at
59	    }));
60	    
61	    res.json({
62	      code: 200,
63	      message: '获取成功',
64	      data: {
65	        list: formattedHistory,
66	        total,
67	        page: pageNum,
68	        pageSize: pageSizeNum
69	      }
70	    });
71	  } catch (error) {
72	    console.error('[navigationController] Get navigation history error:', error);
73	    res.status(500).json({
74	      code: 500,
75	      message: '服务器错误'
76	    });
77	  }
78	}
79	
80	/**
81	 * 保存导航记录
82	 */
83	export async function saveNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
84	  try {
85	    const userId = req.userId;
86	    const {
87	      startName,
88	      startAddress,
89	      startLat,
90	      startLng,
91	      endName,
92	      endAddress,
93	      endLat,
94	      endLng,
95	      distance,
96	      duration
97	    } = req.body;
98	    
99	    // 验证参数
100	    if (!endName || !endAddress || !endLat || !endLng) {
101	      return res.status(400).json({
102	        code: 400,
103	        message: '缺少必要参数'
104	      });
105	    }
106	    
107	    const result: any = await query(
108	      `INSERT INTO navigation_history 
109	       (user_id, start_name, start_address, start_lat, start_lng, end_name, end_address, end_lat, end_lng, distance, duration) 
110	       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
111	      [userId, startName, startAddress, startLat, startLng, endName, endAddress, endLat, endLng, distance, duration]
112	    );
113	    
114	    res.status(201).json({
115	      code: 200,
116	      message: '保存成功',
117	      data: {
118	        id: result.insertId
119	      }
120	    });
121	  } catch (error) {
122	    console.error('Save navigation history error:', error);
123	    res.status(500).json({
124	      code: 500,
125	      message: '服务器错误'
126	    });
127	  }
128	}
129	
130	/**
131	 * 删除导航历史
132	 */
133	export async function deleteNavigationHistory(req: Request, res: Response) {
134	  try {
135	    const userId = req.userId;
136	    const { id } = req.params;
137	    
138	    const result: any = await query(
139	      'DELETE FROM navigation_history WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
140	      [id, userId]
141	    );
142	    
143	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
144	      return res.status(404).json({
145	        code: 404,
146	        message: '记录不存在'
147	      });
148	    }
149	    
150	    res.json({
151	      code: 200,
152	      message: '删除成功'
153	    });
154	  } catch (error) {
155	    console.error('Delete navigation history error:', error);
156	    res.status(500).json({
157	      code: 500,
158	      message: '服务器错误'
159	    });
160	  }
161	}
162

164	 * 清空导航历史
165	 */
```

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';

2	
3	interface UserLocation {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  latitude: number;
7	  longitude: number;
8	  accuracy?: number;
9	  speed?: number;
10	  heading?: number;
11	  location_type: string;

18	  sharer_id: number;

21	  is_active: boolean;
22	  created_at: string;

25	/**
26	 * 更新用户位置
27	 */
28	export async function updateLocation(req: Request, res: Response) {
29	  try {
30	    const userId = req.userId;
31	    const {
32	      latitude,
33	      longitude,
34	      accuracy,
35	      speed,
36	      heading,
37	      locationType = 'ip',
38	      isSharing = false
39	    } = req.body;
40	    
41	    // 验证参数
42	    if (!latitude || !longitude) {
43	      return res.status(400).json({
44	        code: 400,
45	        message: '缺少必要参数'
46	      });
47	    }
48	    
49	    // 检查是否已存在
50	    const existing = await query<UserLocation[]>(
51	      'SELECT id FROM user_locations WHERE user_id = ?',
52	      [userId]
53	    );
54	    
55	    if (existing.length > 0) {
56	      // 更新
57	      await query(
58	        `UPDATE user_locations 
59	         SET latitude = ?, longitude = ?, accuracy = ?, speed = ?, heading = ?, 
60	             location_type = ?, is_sharing = ?, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP 
61	         WHERE user_id = ?`,
62	        [latitude, longitude, accuracy, speed, heading, locationType, isSharing, userId]
63	      );
64	    } else {
65	      // 插入
66	      await query(
67	        `INSERT INTO user_locations 
68	         (user_id, latitude, longitude, accuracy, speed, heading, location_type, is_sharing) 
69	         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
70	        [userId, latitude, longitude, accuracy, speed, heading, locationType, isSharing]
71	      );
72	    }
73	    
74	    res.json({
75	      code: 200,
76	      message: '位置更新成功'
77	    });
78	  } catch (error) {
79	    console.error('Update location error:', error);
80	    res.status(500).json({
81	      code: 500,
82	      message: '服务器错误'
83	    });
84	  }
85	}
86	
87	/**
88	 * 获取用户位置
89	 */
90	export async function getLocation(req: Request, res: Response) {
91	  try {
92	    const userId = req.userId;
93	    const { targetUserId } = req.params;
94	    
95	    const targetId = targetUserId || userId;
96	    
97	    // 如果查询其他用户位置，需要检查共享权限
98	    if (targetId !== userId) {
99	      const shares = await query<LocationShare[]>(
100	        'SELECT * FROM location_shares WHERE sharer_id = ? AND viewer_id = ? AND is_active = TRUE',
101	        [targetId, userId]
102	      );
103	      
104	      if (shares.length === 0) {
105	        return res.status(403).json({
106	          code: 403,
107	          message: '无权查看该用户位置'
108	        });
109	      }
110	      
111	      // 检查是否过期
112	      const share = shares[0];
113	      if (share.expire_time && new Date(share.expire_time) < new Date()) {
114	        return res.status(403).json({
115	          code: 403,
116	          message: '位置共享已过期'
117	        });
118	      }
119	    }
120	    
121	    const locations = await query<UserLocation[]>(
122	      'SELECT * FROM user_locations WHERE user_id = ?',
123	      [targetId]
124	    );
125	    
126	    if (locations.length === 0) {
127	      return res.status(404).json({
128	        code: 404,
129	        message: '位置信息不存在'
130	      });
131	    }
132	    
133	    res.json({
134	      code: 200,
135	      message: '获取成功',
136	      data: locations[0]
137	    });
138	  } catch (error) {
139	    console.error('Get location error:', error);
140	    res.status(500).json({
141	      code: 500,
142	      message: '服务器错误'
143	    });
144	  }
145	}
146	
147	/**
148	 * 开启/关闭位置共享
149	 */
150	export async function toggleLocationSharing(req: Request, res: Response) {
151	  try {
152	    const userId = req.userId;
153	    const { isSharing } = req.body;
154	    
155	    if (isSharing === undefined) {
156	      return res.status(400).json({
157	        code: 400,
158	        message: '缺少必要参数'
159	      });
160	    }
161	    
162	    await query(
163	      'UPDATE user_locations SET is_sharing = ? WHERE user_id = ?',
164	      [isSharing, userId]
165	    );
166	    
167	    res.json({
168	      code: 200,
169	      message: isSharing ? '位置共享已开启' : '位置共享已关闭'
170	    });
171	  } catch (error) {
172	    console.error('Toggle location sharing error:', error);
173	    res.status(500).json({
174	      code: 500,
175	      message: '服务器错误'
176	    });
177	  }
178	}
179	
180	/**
181	 * 创建位置共享
182	 */
183	export async function createLocationShare(req: Request, res: Response) {
184	  try {
185	    const userId = req.userId;
186	    const { viewerId, expireHours } = req.body;
187	    
188	    if (!viewerId) {
189	      return res.status(400).json({
190	        code: 400,
191	        message: '缺少必要参数'
192	      });
193	    }
194	    
195	    // 检查是否已存在
196	    const existing = await query<LocationShare[]>(
197	      'SELECT id FROM location_shares WHERE sharer_id = ? AND viewer_id = ?',
198	      [userId, viewerId]
199	    );
200	    
201	    let expireTime = null;
202	    if (expireHours) {
203	      const expire = new Date();
204	      expire.setHours(expire.getHours() + expireHours);
205	      expireTime = expire.toISOString().slice(0, 19).replace('T', ' ');
206	    }
207	    
208	    if (existing.length > 0) {
209	      // 更新
210	      await query(
211	        'UPDATE location_shares SET expire_time = ?, is_active = TRUE WHERE sharer_id = ? AND viewer_id = ?',
212	        [expireTime, userId, viewerId]
213	      );
214	    } else {
215	      // 插入
216	      await query(
217	        'INSERT INTO location_shares (sharer_id, viewer_id, expire_time, is_active) VALUES (?, ?, ?, TRUE)',
218	        [userId, viewerId, expireTime]
219	      );
220	    }
221	    
222	    res.status(201).json({
223	      code: 200,
224	      message: '位置共享创建成功'
225	    });
226	  } catch (error) {
227	    console.error('Create location share error:', error);
228	    res.status(500).json({
229	      code: 500,
230	      message: '服务器错误'
231	    });
232	  }
233	}
234	
235	/**
236	 * 获取位置共享列表
237	 */
238	export async function getLocationShares(req: Request, res: Response) {
239	  try {
240	    const userId = req.userId;
241	    const { type = 'sharing' } = req.query; // sharing: 我分享的, viewing: 我查看的
242	    
243	    let sql = '';
244	    if (type === 'sharing') {
245	      sql = `SELECT ls.*, u.nickname, u.phone 
246	             FROM location_shares ls 
247	             LEFT JOIN users u ON ls.viewer_id = u.id 
248	             WHERE ls.sharer_id = ? AND ls.is_active = TRUE 
249	             ORDER BY ls.created_at DESC`;
250	    } else {
251	      sql = `SELECT ls.*, u.nickname, u.phone 
252	             FROM location_shares ls 
253	             LEFT JOIN users u ON ls.sharer_id = u.id 
254	             WHERE ls.viewer_id = ? AND ls.is_active = TRUE 
255	             ORDER BY ls.created_at DESC`;
256	    }
257	    
258	    const shares = await query<any[]>(sql, [userId]);
259	    
260	    res.json({
261	      code: 200,
262	      message: '获取成功',
263	      data: shares
264	    });
265	  } catch (error) {
266	    console.error('Get location shares error:', error);
267	    res.status(500).json({
268	      code: 500,
269	      message: '服务器错误'
270	    });
271	  }
272	}
273	
274	/**
275	 * 取消位置共享
276	 */
277	export async function cancelLocationShare(req: Request, res: Response) {
278	  try {
279	    const userId = req.userId;
280	    const { id } = req.params;
281	    
282	    const result: any = await query(
283	      'UPDATE location_shares SET is_active = FALSE WHERE id = ? AND sharer_id = ?',
284	      [id, userId]
285	    );
286	    
287	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
288	      return res.status(404).json({
289	        code: 404,
290	        message: '共享记录不存在'
291	      });
292	    }
293	    
294	    res.json({
295	      code: 200,
296	      message: '取消成功'
297	    });
298	  } catch (error) {
299	    console.error('Cancel location share error:', error);
300	    res.status(500).json({
301	      code: 500,
302	      message: '服务器错误'
303	    });
304	  }
305	}
306	
307	/**
308	 * 获取附近共享位置的用户
309	 */
310	export async function getNearbySharedUsers(req: Request, res: Response) {
311	  try {
312	    const userId = req.userId;
313	    const { latitude, longitude, radius = 5000 } = req.query; // radius单位：米
314	    
315	    if (!latitude || !longitude) {
316	      return res.status(400).json({
317	        code: 400,
318	        message: '缺少必要参数'
319	      });
320	    }
321	    
322	    // 获取我可以查看的用户列表
323	    const shares = await query<LocationShare[]>(
324	      'SELECT sharer_id FROM location_shares WHERE viewer_id = ? AND is_active = TRUE',
325	      [userId]
326	    );
327	    
328	    if (shares.length === 0) {
329	      return res.json({
330	        code: 200,
331	        message: '获取成功',
332	        data: []
333	      });
334	    }
335	    
336	    const sharerIds = shares.map(s => s.sharer_id);
337	    
338	    // 计算距离并筛选
339	    const sql = `
340	      SELECT ul.*, u.nickname, u.avatar,
341	             (6371000 * acos(cos(radians(?)) * cos(radians(ul.latitude)) * 
342	              cos(radians(ul.longitude) - radians(?)) + 
343	              sin(radians(?)) * sin(radians(ul.latitude)))) AS distance
344	      FROM user_locations ul
345	      LEFT JOIN users u ON ul.user_id = u.id
346	      WHERE ul.user_id IN (${sharerIds.join(',')}) AND ul.is_sharing = TRUE
347	      HAVING distance <= ?
348	      ORDER BY distance ASC
349	    `;
350	    
351	    const nearbyUsers = await query<any[]>(sql, [latitude, longitude, latitude, radius]);
352	    
353	    res.json({
354	      code: 200,
355	      message: '获取成功',
356	      data: nearbyUsers
357	    });
358	  } catch (error) {
359	    console.error('Get nearby shared users error:', error);
360	    res.status(500).json({
361	      code: 500,
362	      message: '服务器错误'
363	    });
364	  }
365	}
366
```

```text
0	import { Request, Response } from 'express';
1	import { query } from '../config/database';
2	
3	interface FrequentLocation {
4	  id: number;
5	  user_id: number;
6	  name: string;
7	  address?: string;
8	  latitude: number;
9	  longitude: number;
10	  visit_count: number;
11	  last_visit: string;
12	  time_pattern?: string;
13	}
14	
15	/**
16	 * 记录地点访问
17	 */
18	export async function recordVisit(req: Request, res: Response) {
19	  try {
20	    const userId = req.userId;
21	    const { name, address, latitude, longitude, timePattern } = req.body;
22	    
23	    // 验证参数
24	    if (!name || !latitude || !longitude) {
25	      return res.status(400).json({
26	        code: 400,
27	        message: '缺少必要参数'
28	      });
29	    }
30	    
31	    // 检查是否已存在（使用坐标判断，允许小范围误差）
32	    const existing = await query<FrequentLocation[]>(
33	      `SELECT * FROM frequent_locations 
34	       WHERE user_id = ? 
35	       AND ABS(latitude - ?) < 0.001 
36	       AND ABS(longitude - ?) < 0.001`,
37	      [userId, latitude, longitude]
38	    );
39	    
40	    if (existing.length > 0) {
41	      // 更新访问次数和时间
42	      await query(
43	        `UPDATE frequent_locations 
44	         SET visit_count = visit_count + 1, 
45	             last_visit = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
46	             time_pattern = ?
47	         WHERE id = ?`,
48	        [timePattern, existing[0].id]
49	      );
50	      
51	      res.json({
52	        code: 200,
53	        message: '访问记录更新成功',
54	        data: {
55	          id: existing[0].id,
56	          visitCount: existing[0].visit_count + 1
57	        }
58	      });
59	    } else {
60	      // 新增记录
61	      const result: any = await query(
62	        `INSERT INTO frequent_locations 
63	         (user_id, name, address, latitude, longitude, visit_count, time_pattern) 
64	         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1, ?)`,
65	        [userId, name, address, latitude, longitude, timePattern]
66	      );
67	      
68	      res.status(201).json({
69	        code: 200,
70	        message: '访问记录创建成功',
71	        data: {
72	          id: result.insertId,
73	          visitCount: 1
74	        }
75	      });
76	    }
77	  } catch (error) {
78	    console.error('Record visit error:', error);
79	    res.status(500).json({
80	      code: 500,
81	      message: '服务器错误'
82	    });
83	  }
84	}
85	
86	/**
87	 * 获取常去地点列表
88	 */
89	export async function getFrequentLocations(req: Request, res: Response) {
90	  try {
91	    const userId = req.userId;
92	    const { limit = 10, minVisits = 2 } = req.query;
93	    
94	    const locations = await query<FrequentLocation[]>(
95	      `SELECT * FROM frequent_locations 
96	       WHERE user_id = ? AND visit_count >= ? 
97	       ORDER BY visit_count DESC, last_visit DESC 
98	       LIMIT ?`,
99	      [userId, Number(minVisits), Number(limit)]
100	    );
101	    
102	    res.json({
103	      code: 200,
104	      message: '获取成功',
105	      data: locations
106	    });
107	  } catch (error) {
108	    console.error('Get frequent locations error:', error);
109	    res.status(500).json({
110	      code: 500,
111	      message: '服务器错误'
112	    });
113	  }
114	}
115	
116	/**
117	 * 获取智能推荐地点
118	 */
119	export async function getRecommendedLocations(req: Request, res: Response) {
120	  try {
121	    const userId = req.userId;
122	    const { timePattern, limit = 5 } = req.query;
123	    
124	    let sql = `SELECT * FROM frequent_locations WHERE user_id = ?`;
125	    const params: any[] = [userId];
126	    
127	    if (timePattern) {
128	      sql += ' AND time_pattern = ?';
129	      params.push(timePattern);
130	    }
131	    
132	    sql += ' ORDER BY visit_count DESC, last_visit DESC LIMIT ?';
133	    params.push(Number(limit));
134	    
135	    const locations = await query<FrequentLocation[]>(sql, params);
136	    
137	    res.json({
138	      code: 200,
139	      message: '获取成功',
140	      data: locations
141	    });
142	  } catch (error) {

144	    res.status(500).json({
145	      code: 500,
146	      message: '服务器错误'
147	    });
148	  }
149	}

152	 * 获取地点详情

184	
185	/**
186	 * 更新地点信息
187	 */
188	export async function updateLocation(req: Request, res: Response) {
189	  try {
190	    const userId = req.userId;
191	    const { id } = req.params;
192	    const { name, address, timePattern } = req.body;
193	    
194	    // 验证权限
195	    const locations = await query<FrequentLocation[]>(
196	      'SELECT id FROM frequent_locations WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
197	      [id, userId]
198	    );
199	    
200	    if (locations.length === 0) {
201	      return res.status(404).json({
202	        code: 404,
203	        message: '地点不存在'
204	      });
205	    }
206	    
207	    const updates: string[] = [];
208	    const params: any[] = [];
209	    
210	    if (name) {
211	      updates.push('name = ?');
212	      params.push(name);
213	    }
214	    if (address) {
215	      updates.push('address = ?');
216	      params.push(address);
217	    }
218	    if (timePattern) {
219	      updates.push('time_pattern = ?');
220	      params.push(timePattern);
221	    }
222	    
223	    if (updates.length === 0) {
224	      return res.status(400).json({
225	        code: 400,
226	        message: '没有要更新的内容'
227	      });
228	    }
229	    
230	    params.push(id, userId);
231	    
232	    await query(
233	      `UPDATE frequent_locations SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`,
234	      params
235	    );
236	    
237	    res.json({
238	      code: 200,
239	      message: '更新成功'
240	    });
241	  } catch (error) {
242	    console.error('Update location error:', error);
243	    res.status(500).json({
244	      code: 500,
245	      message: '服务器错误'
246	    });
247	  }
248	}
249	
250	/**
251	 * 删除常去地点
252	 */
253	export async function deleteLocation(req: Request, res: Response) {
254	  try {
255	    const userId = req.userId;
256	    const { id } = req.params;
257	    
258	    const result: any = await query(
259	      'DELETE FROM frequent_locations WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
260	      [id, userId]
261	    );
262	    
263	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
264	      return res.status(404).json({
265	        code: 404,
266	        message: '地点不存在'
267	      });
268	    }
269	    
270	    res.json({
271	      code: 200,
272	      message: '删除成功'
273	    });
274	  } catch (error) {
275	    console.error('Delete location error:', error);
276	    res.status(500).json({
277	      code: 500,
278	      message: '服务器错误'
279	    });
280	  }
281	}
282	
283	/**
284	 * 获取访问统计
285	 */
286	export async function getVisitStats(req: Request, res: Response) {
287	  try {
288	    const userId = req.userId;
289	    
290	    // 总访问次数
291	    const totalResult = await query<any[]>(
292	      'SELECT SUM(visit_count) as total_visits, COUNT(*) as location_count FROM frequent_locations WHERE user_id = ?',
293	      [userId]
294	    );
295	    
296	    // 按时间规律统计
297	    const patternStats = await query<any[]>(
298	      `SELECT time_pattern, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(visit_count) as total_visits 
299	       FROM frequent_locations 
300	       WHERE user_id = ? AND time_pattern IS NOT NULL 
301	       GROUP BY time_pattern`,
302	      [userId]
303	    );
304	    
305	    res.json({
306	      code: 200,
307	      message: '获取成功',
308	      data: {
309	        totalVisits: totalResult[0].total_visits || 0,
310	        locationCount: totalResult[0].location_count || 0,
311	        byPattern: patternStats
312	      }
313	    });
314	  } catch (error) {
315	    console.error('Get visit stats error:', error);
316	    res.status(500).json({
317	      code: 500,
318	      message: '服务器错误'
319	    });
320	  }
321	}
```

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/entry/src/main/ets/services/HttpService.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * HTTP服务 - 封装网络请求
2	 * 统一处理HTTP通信、Token管理、错误处理
3	 */
4	import http from '@ohos.net.http';
5	import preferences from '@ohos.data.preferences';
6	import { ApiResponse } from '../models/BackendModels';
7	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
8	
9	/**
10	 * HTTP服务类
11	 */
12	export class HttpService {
13	  private static instance: HttpService;
14	  private token: string = '';
15	  private preferencesInstance: preferences.Preferences | null = null;
16	  private readonly PREFERENCES_NAME = 'app_auth';
17	  
18	  private constructor() {
19	    // 从本地存储加载token
20	    this.initPreferences();
21	  }
22	  
23	  static getInstance(): HttpService {
24	    if (!HttpService.instance) {
25	      HttpService.instance = new HttpService();
26	    }
27	    return HttpService.instance;
28	  }
29	  
30	  /**
31	   * 初始化Preferences
32	   */
33	  private async initPreferences(): Promise<void> {
34	    try {
35	      const context = getContext();
36	      this.preferencesInstance = await preferences.getPreferences(context, this.PREFERENCES_NAME);
37	      await this.loadToken();
38	      console.log('[HttpService] Preferences初始化成功');
39	    } catch (err) {
40	      console.error('[HttpService] Preferences初始化失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
41	    }
42	  }
43	  
44	  /**
45	   * 设置认证token
46	   */
47	  async setToken(token: string): Promise<void> {
48	    this.token = token;
49	    await this.saveToken(token);
50	  }
51	  
52	  /**
53	   * 获取token
54	   */
55	  getToken(): string {
56	    return this.token;
57	  }
58	  
59	  /**
60	   * 清除token
61	   */
62	  async clearToken(): Promise<void> {
63	    this.token = '';
64	    try {
65	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
66	        await this.preferencesInstance.delete(ApiConfig.TOKEN_KEY);
67	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
68	        console.log('[HttpService] Token已清除');
69	      }
70	    } catch (err) {
71	      console.error('[HttpService] 清除Token失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
72	    }
73	  }
74	  
75	  /**
76	   * 保存token到Preferences
77	   */
78	  private async saveToken(token: string): Promise<void> {
79	    try {
80	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
81	        await this.preferencesInstance.put(ApiConfig.TOKEN_KEY, token);
82	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
83	        console.log('[HttpService] Token已保存');
84	      }
85	    } catch (err) {
86	      console.error('[HttpService] 保存Token失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
87	    }
88	  }
89	  
90	  /**
91	   * 从Preferences加载token
92	   */
93	  private async loadToken(): Promise<void> {
94	    try {
95	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
96	        const token = await this.preferencesInstance.get(ApiConfig.TOKEN_KEY, '');
97	        if (token && token !== '') {
98	          this.token = token as string;
99	          console.log('[HttpService] Token已加载');
100	        }
101	      }
102	    } catch (err) {
103	      console.error('[HttpService] 加载Token失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
104	    }
105	  }
106	  
107	  /**
108	   * 发送HTTP请求
109	   */
110	  private async request<T>(
111	    method: http.RequestMethod,
112	    url: string,
113	    data?: Object,
114	    needAuth: boolean = true
115	  ): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
116	    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
117	      const httpRequest = http.createHttp();
118	      
119	      const fullUrl = `${ApiConfig.BASE_URL}${url}`;
120	      console.log(`[HttpService] ========== 请求详情 ==========`);
121	      console.log(`[HttpService] 方法: ${method}`);
122	      console.log(`[HttpService] BASE_URL: ${ApiConfig.BASE_URL}`);
123	      console.log(`[HttpService] 路径: ${url}`);
124	      console.log(`[HttpService] 完整URL: ${fullUrl}`);
125	      console.log(`[HttpService] ================================`);
126	      
127	      const headers: Record<string, string> = {
128	        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
129	      };
130	      
131	      // 添加认证头
132	      if (needAuth && this.token) {
133	        headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;
134	      }
135	      
136	      const options: http.HttpRequestOptions = {
137	        method,
138	        header: headers,
139	        readTimeout: ApiConfig.TIMEOUT,
140	        connectTimeout: ApiConfig.TIMEOUT
141	      };
142	      
143	      // 添加请求体
144	      if (data && (method === http.RequestMethod.POST || method === http.RequestMethod.PUT)) {
145	        options.extraData = JSON.stringify(data);
146	        console.log('[HttpService] 请求数据:', JSON.stringify(data));
147	      }
148	      
149	      console.log('[HttpService] 开始发送请求...');
150	      
151	      httpRequest.request(fullUrl, options, (err: Error, data: http.HttpResponse) => {
152	        console.log('[HttpService] 收到响应回调');
153	        
154	        if (err) {
155	          console.error('[HttpService] ========== 错误详情 ==========');
156	          console.error('[HttpService] 请求失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
157	          console.error('[HttpService] ================================');
158	          const errorMessage = this.getErrorMessage(err);
159	          reject({
160	            code: -1,
161	            message: errorMessage
162	          });
163	          httpRequest.destroy();
164	          return;
165	        }
166	        
167	        try {
168	          const responseCode = data.responseCode;
169	          const resultString = data.result as string;
170	          
171	          console.log(`[HttpService] ========== 响应详情 ==========`);
172	          console.log(`[HttpService] HTTP状态码: ${responseCode}`);
173	          console.log(`[HttpService] 响应内容: ${resultString}`);
174	          console.log(`[HttpService] 响应头: ${JSON.stringify(data.header)}`);
175	          console.log(`[HttpService] ================================`);
176	          
177	          // 尝试解析响应体
178	          let response: ApiResponse<T>;
179	          try {
180	            response = JSON.parse(resultString) as ApiResponse<T>;
181	          } catch (parseErr) {
182	            console.error('[HttpService] 响应解析失败:', JSON.stringify(parseErr));
183	            // 如果解析失败，使用HTTP状态码生成错误信息
184	            reject({
185	              code: responseCode,
186	              message: this.getHttpStatusMessage(responseCode)
187	            });
188	            httpRequest.destroy();
189	            return;
190	          }
191	          
192	          // 处理HTTP状态码
193	          if (responseCode !== 200 && responseCode !== 201) {
194	            // 返回后端的实际错误信息
195	            reject(response);
196	            httpRequest.destroy();
197	            return;
198	          }
199	          
200	          // 处理401未授权
201	          if (response.code === 401) {
202	            console.log('[HttpService] Token无效，清除本地token');
203	            this.clearToken();
204	          }
205	          
206	          console.log(`[HttpService] 请求成功: ${response.code} ${response.message}`);
207	          resolve(response);
208	        } catch (parseErr) {
209	          console.error('[HttpService] 响应解析失败:', JSON.stringify(parseErr));
210	          reject({
211	            code: -1,
212	            message: '响应解析失败'
213	          });
214	        } finally {
215	          httpRequest.destroy();
216	        }
217	      });
218	    });
219	  }
220	  
221	  /**
222	   * 获取错误信息
223	   */
224	  private getErrorMessage(err: Error): string {
225	    const errorStr = JSON.stringify(err);
226	    const errorObj = JSON.parse(errorStr) as Record<string, Object>;
227	    const errorCode = errorObj['code'] as number;
228	    
229	    // 网络错误映射
230	    const errorMap: Record<number, string> = {
231	      2300001: '协议不支持',
232	      2300003: 'URL格式错误',
233	      2300005: '无法解析远程主机名',
234	      2300006: '无法连接到服务器',
235	      2300007: '无法连接到代理服务器',
236	      2300008: '无效的服务器响应',
237	      2300009: '远程服务器拒绝访问',
238	      2300023: '写入数据失败',
239	      2300025: '上传失败',
240	      2300026: '读取数据失败',
241	      2300027: '内存不足',
242	      2300028: '操作超时',
243	      2300047: '请求数量过多',
244	      2300052: '服务器返回空数据',
245	      2300055: '发送网络数据失败',
246	      2300056: '接收网络数据失败',
247	      2300058: '本地SSL证书问题',
248	      2300059: '无法使用指定的SSL加密',
249	      2300060: '远程SSL证书无效',
250	      2300077: 'SSL CA证书无效',
251	      2300078: '远程服务器无法访问'
252	    };
253	    
254	    return errorMap[errorCode] || '网络请求失败';
255	  }
256	  
257	  /**
258	   * 获取HTTP状态码对应的错误信息
259	   */
260	  private getHttpStatusMessage(statusCode: number): string {
261	    const statusMap: Record<number, string> = {
262	      400: '请求参数错误',
263	      401: '登录已过期，请重新登录',
264	      403: '无权限访问',
265	      404: '请求的资源不存在',
266	      500: '服务器错误，请稍后重试',
267	      502: '网关错误',
268	      503: '服务暂时不可用，请稍后重试',
269	      504: '网关超时'
270	    };
271	    
272	    return statusMap[statusCode] || `请求失败 (${statusCode})`;
273	  }
274	  
275	  /**
276	   * GET请求
277	   */
278	  async get<T>(url: string, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
279	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.GET, url, undefined, needAuth);
280	  }
281	  
282	  /**
283	   * POST请求
284	   */
285	  async post<T>(url: string, data: Object, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
286	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.POST, url, data, needAuth);
287	  }
288	  
289	  /**
290	   * PUT请求
291	   */
292	  async put<T>(url: string, data: Object, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
293	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.PUT, url, data, needAuth);
294	  }
295	  
296	  /**
297	   * DELETE请求
298	   */
299	  async delete<T>(url: string, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
300	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.DELETE, url, undefined, needAuth);
301	  }
302	}
303
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
0	/**
1	 * 认证服务 - 管理用户认证、注册、登录和登出
2	 */
3	import preferences from '@ohos.data.preferences';
4	import { HttpService } from './HttpService';
5	import { 
6	  ApiResponse, 
7	  UserInfo, 
8	  RegisterRequest, 
9	  LoginRequest, 
10	  UpdateProfileRequest 
11	} from '../models/BackendModels';

14	/**
15	 * 认证服务类
16	 */
17	export class AuthService {
18	  private static instance: AuthService;
19	  private httpService: HttpService;
20	  private currentUser: UserInfo | null = null;
21	  private preferencesInstance: preferences.Preferences | null = null;
22	  private readonly PREFERENCES_NAME = 'app_auth';
23	  
24	  private constructor() {
25	    this.httpService = HttpService.getInstance();
26	    this.initPreferences();
27	  }
28	  
29	  static getInstance(): AuthService {
30	    if (!AuthService.instance) {
31	      AuthService.instance = new AuthService();
32	    }
33	    return AuthService.instance;
34	  }
35	  
36	  /**
37	   * 初始化Preferences
38	   */
39	  private async initPreferences(): Promise<void> {
40	    try {
41	      const context = getContext();
42	      this.preferencesInstance = await preferences.getPreferences(context, this.PREFERENCES_NAME);
43	      await this.loadUserInfo();
44	      console.log('[AuthService] Preferences初始化成功');
45	    } catch (err) {
46	      console.error('[AuthService] Preferences初始化失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
47	    }
48	  }
49	
50	  /**
51	   * 用户注册
52	   */
53	  async register(phone: string, password: string, nickname?: string): Promise<ApiResponse<UserInfo>> {
54	    try {
55	      console.log('[AuthService] 注册用户:', phone);
56	      
57	      // 只包含有值的字段
58	      const requestData: RegisterRequest = { phone, password };
59	      if (nickname && nickname.trim() !== '') {
60	        requestData.nickname = nickname;
61	      }
62	      
63	      const response = await this.httpService.post<UserInfo>(
64	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_REGISTER,
65	        requestData,
66	        false  // 注册不需要认证
67	      );
68	      
69	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
70	        // 保存token和用户信息
71	        if (response.data.token) {
72	          await this.httpService.setToken(response.data.token);
73	          await this.saveUserInfo(response.data);
74	          this.currentUser = response.data;
75	        }
76	      }
77	      
78	      return response;
79	    } catch (err) {
80	      console.error('[AuthService] 注册失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
81	      return err as ApiResponse<UserInfo>;
82	    }
83	  }
84	  
85	  /**
86	   * 用户登录
87	   */
88	  async login(phone: string, password: string): Promise<ApiResponse<UserInfo>> {
89	    try {
90	      console.log('[AuthService] 用户登录:', phone);
91	      
92	      const requestData: LoginRequest = { phone, password };
93	      
94	      const response = await this.httpService.post<UserInfo>(
95	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_LOGIN,
96	        requestData,
97	        false  // 登录不需要认证
98	      );
99	      
100	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
101	        // 保存token和用户信息
102	        if (response.data.token) {
103	          await this.httpService.setToken(response.data.token);
104	          await this.saveUserInfo(response.data);
105	          this.currentUser = response.data;
106	        }
107	      }
108	      
109	      return response;
110	    } catch (err) {
111	      console.error('[AuthService] 登录失败:', err);
112	      return err as ApiResponse<UserInfo>;
113	    }
114	  }
115	  
116	  /**
117	   * 获取用户信息
118	   */
119	  async getProfile(): Promise<ApiResponse<UserInfo>> {
120	    try {
121	      console.log('[AuthService] 获取用户信息');
122	      
123	      const response = await this.httpService.get<UserInfo>(
124	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_PROFILE,
125	        true  // 需要认证
126	      );
127	      
128	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
129	        await this.saveUserInfo(response.data);
130	        this.currentUser = response.data;
131	      }
132	      
133	      return response;
134	    } catch (err) {
135	      console.error('[AuthService] 获取用户信息失败:', err);
136	      return err as ApiResponse<UserInfo>;
137	    }
138	  }
139	  
140	  /**
141	   * 更新用户信息
142	   */
143	  async updateProfile(nickname?: string, avatar?: string): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
144	    try {
145	      console.log('[AuthService] 更新用户信息');
146	      
147	      // 只包含有值的字段
148	      const requestData: UpdateProfileRequest = {};
149	      if (nickname && nickname.trim() !== '') {
150	        requestData.nickname = nickname;
151	      }
152	      if (avatar && avatar.trim() !== '') {
153	        requestData.avatar = avatar;
154	      }
155	      
156	      const response = await this.httpService.put<void>(
157	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.AUTH_PROFILE,
158	        requestData,
159	        true  // 需要认证
160	      );
161	      
162	      if (response.code === 200) {
163	        // 更新本地用户信息
164	        if (this.currentUser) {
165	          if (nickname) this.currentUser.nickname = nickname;
166	          if (avatar) this.currentUser.avatar = avatar;
167	          await this.saveUserInfo(this.currentUser);
168	        }
169	      }
170	      
171	      return response;
172	    } catch (err) {
173	      console.error('[AuthService] 更新用户信息失败:', err);
174	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
175	    }
176	  }
177	  
178	  /**
179	   * 登出
180	   */
181	  async logout(): Promise<void> {
182	    try {
183	      console.log('[AuthService] 用户登出');
184	      
185	      // 清除token
186	      await this.httpService.clearToken();
187	      
188	      // 清除用户信息
189	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
190	        await this.preferencesInstance.delete(ApiConfig.USER_KEY);
191	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
192	      }
193	      
194	      this.currentUser = null;
195	      console.log('[AuthService] 登出成功');
196	    } catch (err) {
197	      console.error('[AuthService] 登出失败:', err);
198	    }
199	  }
200	  
201	  /**
202	   * 检查登录状态
203	   */
204	  async isLoggedIn(): Promise<boolean> {
205	    const token = this.httpService.getToken();
206	    return token !== '' && token !== null && token !== undefined;
207	  }
208	  
209	  /**
210	   * 获取当前用户
211	   */
212	  async getCurrentUser(): Promise<UserInfo | null> {
213	    if (this.currentUser) {
214	      return this.currentUser;
215	    }
216	    
217	    // 尝试从本地存储加载
218	    await this.loadUserInfo();
219	    return this.currentUser;
220	  }
221	  
222	  /**
223	   * 保存用户信息到Preferences
224	   */
225	  private async saveUserInfo(userInfo: UserInfo): Promise<void> {
226	    try {
227	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
228	        await this.preferencesInstance.put(ApiConfig.USER_KEY, JSON.stringify(userInfo));
229	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
230	        console.log('[AuthService] 用户信息已保存');
231	      }
232	    } catch (err) {
233	      console.error('[AuthService] 保存用户信息失败:', err);
234	    }
235	  }
236	  
237	  /**
238	   * 从Preferences加载用户信息
239	   */
240	  private async loadUserInfo(): Promise<void> {
241	    try {
242	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
243	        const userInfoStr = await this.preferencesInstance.get(ApiConfig.USER_KEY, '');
244	        if (userInfoStr && userInfoStr !== '') {
245	          this.currentUser = JSON.parse(userInfoStr as string) as UserInfo;
246	          console.log('[AuthService] 用户信息已加载');
247	        }
248	      }
249	    } catch (err) {
250	      console.error('[AuthService] 加载用户信息失败:', err);
251	    }
252	  }
253	}
254
```

```text
0	/**
1	 * API配置类
2	 * 集中管理所有API端点和配置
3	 */
4	
5	/**
6	 * API端点接口
7	 */
8	interface ApiEndpoints {
9	  AUTH_REGISTER: string;
10	  AUTH_LOGIN: string;
11	  AUTH_PROFILE: string;
12	  FAVORITES: string;
13	  FAVORITE_DETAIL: (id: number) => string;
14	  NAVIGATION_HISTORY: string;
15	  NAVIGATION_HISTORY_DETAIL: (id: number) => string;
16	  FREQUENT_LOCATIONS: string;
17	  FREQUENT_LOCATIONS_VISIT: string;
18	  FREQUENT_LOCATIONS_RECOMMENDED: string;
19	  FREQUENT_LOCATIONS_STATS: string;
20	  FREQUENT_LOCATIONS_DETAIL: (id: number) => string;
21	  LOCATION: string;
22	  LOCATION_USER: (userId: number) => string;
23	  LOCATION_SHARING_TOGGLE: string;
24	  LOCATION_SHARING: string;
25	  LOCATION_SHARING_DETAIL: (id: number) => string;
26	  LOCATION_NEARBY: string;
27	  FEEDBACK: string;
28	  FEEDBACK_STATS: string;
29	  FEEDBACK_DETAIL: (id: number) => string;
30	}
31	
32	/**
33	 * 缓存过期时间配置接口
34	 */
35	interface CacheExpireConfig {
36	  FAVORITES: number;
37	  HISTORY: number;
38	  FREQUENT: number;
39	  USER_INFO: number;
40	}
41	
42	export class ApiConfig {
43	  // 环境配置
44	  static readonly ENV: 'development' | 'production' = 'development';
45	  
46	  // 基础URL
47	  static readonly BASE_URL = ApiConfig.ENV === 'development' 
48	    ? 'http://192.168.6.191:3000/api/v1'
49	    : 'https://your-api.com/api/v1';
50	  
51	  // 超时配置（毫秒）
52	  static readonly TIMEOUT = 30000;  // 30秒
53	  
54	  // Token存储key
55	  static readonly TOKEN_KEY = 'auth_token';
56	  static readonly USER_KEY = 'user_info';
57	  
58	  // API端点
59	  static readonly ENDPOINTS: ApiEndpoints = {
60	    // 认证
61	    AUTH_REGISTER: '/auth/register',
62	    AUTH_LOGIN: '/auth/login',
63	    AUTH_PROFILE: '/auth/profile',
64	    
65	    // 收藏
66	    FAVORITES: '/favorites',
67	    FAVORITE_DETAIL: (id: number): string => `/favorites/${id}`,
68	    
69	    // 导航历史
70	    NAVIGATION_HISTORY: '/navigation/history',
71	    NAVIGATION_HISTORY_DETAIL: (id: number): string => `/navigation/history/${id}`,
72	    
73	    // 常去地点
74	    FREQUENT_LOCATIONS: '/frequent-locations',
75	    FREQUENT_LOCATIONS_VISIT: '/frequent-locations/visit',
76	    FREQUENT_LOCATIONS_RECOMMENDED: '/frequent-locations/recommended',
77	    FREQUENT_LOCATIONS_STATS: '/frequent-locations/stats',
78	    FREQUENT_LOCATIONS_DETAIL: (id: number): string => `/frequent-locations/${id}`,
79	    
80	    // 位置共享
81	    LOCATION: '/location',
82	    LOCATION_USER: (userId: number): string => `/location/${userId}`,
83	    LOCATION_SHARING_TOGGLE: '/location/sharing/toggle',
84	    LOCATION_SHARING: '/location/sharing',
85	    LOCATION_SHARING_DETAIL: (id: number): string => `/location/sharing/${id}`,
86	    LOCATION_NEARBY: '/location/nearby',
87	    
88	    // 反馈
89	    FEEDBACK: '/feedback',
90	    FEEDBACK_STATS: '/feedback/stats',
91	    FEEDBACK_DETAIL: (id: number): string => `/feedback/${id}`
92	  };
93	  
94	  // 缓存配置（毫秒）
95	  static readonly CACHE_EXPIRE_TIME: CacheExpireConfig = {
96	    FAVORITES: 3600000,      // 1小时
97	    HISTORY: 3600000,        // 1小时
98	    FREQUENT: 7200000,       // 2小时
99	    USER_INFO: 86400000      // 24小时
100	  };
101	}
102
```
</details></tool-use>

 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/entry/src/main/ets/pages/UserCenterPage.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * 个人中心页面
2	 */
3	import router from '@ohos.router'
4	import { AuthService } from '../services/AuthService'
5	import { UserInfo } from '../models/BackendModels'
6	
7	@Entry
8	@Component
9	struct UserCenterPage {
10	  private authService: AuthService = AuthService.getInstance()
11	  @State isLoggedIn: boolean = false
12	  @State currentUser: UserInfo | null = null
13	  
14	  async aboutToAppear() {
15	    this.isLoggedIn = await this.authService.isLoggedIn()
16	    if (this.isLoggedIn) {
17	      this.currentUser = await this.authService.getCurrentUser()
18	    }
19	  }
20	  
21	  async handleLogout() {
22	    await this.authService.logout()
23	    this.isLoggedIn = false
24	    this.currentUser = null
25	  }
26	  
27	  build() {
28	    Column() {
29	      // 顶部导航栏
30	      Row() {
31	        Button('返回')
32	          .fontSize(16)
33	          .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
34	          .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
35	          .onClick(() => {
36	            router.back()
37	          })
38	        
39	        Text('我的')
40	          .fontSize(20)
41	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
42	          .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
43	          .layoutWeight(1)
44	          .textAlign(TextAlign.Center)
45	        
46	        // 占位，保持标题居中
47	        Text('')
48	          .width(60)
49	      }
50	      .width('100%')
51	      .height(56)
52	      .padding({ left: 16, right: 16 })
53	      .backgroundColor('#1A1A1A')
54	      
55	      // 用户信息区域
56	      Column() {
57	        if (this.isLoggedIn && this.currentUser) {
58	          // 已登录
59	          Column({ space: 12 }) {
60	            // 头像
61	            Text(this.currentUser.nickname?.charAt(0) || '用')
62	              .fontSize(40)
63	              .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
64	              .width(80)
65	              .height(80)
66	              .borderRadius(40)
67	              .backgroundColor('#4A90E2')
68	              .textAlign(TextAlign.Center)
69	              .lineHeight(80)
70	            
71	            // 昵称
72	            Text(this.currentUser.nickname || '用户')
73	              .fontSize(20)
74	              .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
75	              .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
76	            
77	            // 手机号
78	            Text(this.currentUser.phone)
79	              .fontSize(14)
80	              .fontColor('#999999')
81	          }
82	          .padding({ top: 40, bottom: 40 })
83	        } else {
84	          // 未登录
85	          Column({ space: 16 }) {
86	            Text('👤')
87	              .fontSize(60)
88	            
89	            Text('未登录')
90	              .fontSize(18)
91	              .fontColor('#999999')
92	            
93	            Row({ space: 12 }) {
94	              Button('登录')
95	                .fontSize(16)
96	                .width(100)
97	                .height(40)
98	                .backgroundColor('#4A90E2')
99	                .onClick(() => {
100	                  router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/LoginPage' })
101	                })
102	              
103	              Button('注册')
104	                .fontSize(16)
105	                .width(100)
106	                .height(40)
107	                .backgroundColor('#666666')
108	                .onClick(() => {
109	                  router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/RegisterPage' })
110	                })
111	            }
112	          }
113	          .padding({ top: 40, bottom: 40 })
114	        }
115	      }
116	      .width('100%')
117	      .backgroundColor('#2A2A2A')
118	      
119	      // 功能列表
120	      Column() {
121	        // 我的收藏
122	        this.MenuItem('⭐', '我的收藏', () => {
123	          router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/FavoritesPage' })
124	        })
125	        
126	        Divider().color('#333333')
127	        
128	        // 导航历史
129	        this.MenuItem('📍', '导航历史', () => {
130	          router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/HistoryPage' })
131	        })
132	        
133	        if (this.isLoggedIn) {
134	          Divider().color('#333333')
135	          
136	          // 退出登录
137	          this.MenuItem('🚪', '退出登录', () => {
138	            this.handleLogout()
139	          })
140	        }
141	      }
142	      .width('100%')
143	      .backgroundColor('#1A1A1A')
144	      .margin({ top: 12 })
145	      .borderRadius(12)
146	      .padding({ left: 16, right: 16 })
147	    }
148	    .width('100%')
149	    .height('100%')
150	    .backgroundColor('#000000')
151	  }
152	  
153	  @Builder
154	  MenuItem(icon: string, title: string, onClick: () => void) {
155	    Row() {
156	      Text(icon)
157	        .fontSize(24)
158	        .margin({ right: 16 })
159	      
160	      Text(title)
161	        .fontSize(16)
162	        .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
163	        .layoutWeight(1)
164	      
165	      Text('›')
166	        .fontSize(24)
167	        .fontColor('#666666')
168	    }
169	    .width('100%')
170	    .height(56)
171	    .onClick(onClick)
172	  }
173	}
174
```
