<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/entry/src/main/ets/pages/FavoritesPage.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * 收藏列表页面
2	 */
3	import { FavoriteService } from '../services/FavoriteService'
4	import { FavoritePlace } from '../models/BackendModels'
5	import router from '@ohos.router'
6	import promptAction from '@ohos.promptAction'
7	
8	@Entry
9	@Component
10	struct FavoritesPage {
11	  @State favorites: FavoritePlace[] = []
12	  @State isLoading: boolean = false
13	  @State errorMessage: string = ''
14	  
15	  private favoriteService: FavoriteService = FavoriteService.getInstance()
16	  
17	  aboutToAppear() {
18	    this.loadFavorites()
19	  }
20	  
21	  build() {
22	    Column() {
23	      // 标题栏
24	      Row() {
25	        Button('< 返回')
26	          .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
27	          .fontColor('#333333')
28	          .onClick(() => {
29	            router.back()
30	          })
31	        
32	        Text('我的收藏')
33	          .fontSize(20)
34	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
35	          .layoutWeight(1)
36	          .textAlign(TextAlign.Center)
37	        
38	        // 占位，保持标题居中
39	        Text('      ')
40	      }
41	      .width('100%')
42	      .height(56)
43	      .padding({ left: 16, right: 16 })
44	      .backgroundColor('#FFFFFF')
45	      
46	      // 内容区域
47	      if (this.isLoading) {
48	        // 加载中
49	        Column() {
50	          LoadingProgress()
51	            .width(50)
52	            .height(50)
53	          Text('加载中...')
54	            .fontSize(14)
55	            .fontColor('#999999')
56	            .margin({ top: 10 })
57	        }
58	        .width('100%')
59	        .layoutWeight(1)
60	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
61	      } else if (this.errorMessage) {
62	        // 错误提示
63	        Column() {
64	          Text(this.errorMessage)
65	            .fontSize(14)
66	            .fontColor('#FF0000')
67	            .margin({ bottom: 20 })
68	          
69	          Button('重试')
70	            .onClick(() => {
71	              this.loadFavorites()
72	            })
73	        }
74	        .width('100%')
75	        .layoutWeight(1)
76	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
77	      } else if (this.favorites.length === 0) {
78	        // 空状态
79	        Column() {
80	          Text('暂无收藏')
81	            .fontSize(16)
82	            .fontColor('#999999')
83	        }
84	        .width('100%')
85	        .layoutWeight(1)
86	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
87	      } else {
88	        // 收藏列表
89	        List() {
90	          ForEach(this.favorites, (item: FavoritePlace) => {
91	            ListItem() {
92	              this.FavoriteItem(item)
93	            }
94	          })
95	        }
96	        .width('100%')
97	        .layoutWeight(1)
98	        .divider({ strokeWidth: 1, color: '#F0F0F0' })
99	      }
100	    }
101	    .width('100%')
102	    .height('100%')
103	    .backgroundColor('#F5F5F5')
104	  }
105	  
106	  /**
107	   * 收藏项组件
108	   */
109	  @Builder
110	  FavoriteItem(item: FavoritePlace) {
111	    Row() {
112	      Column() {
113	        // 名称
114	        Text(item.name)
115	          .fontSize(16)
116	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
117	          .maxLines(1)
118	          .textOverflow({ overflow: TextOverflow.Ellipsis })
119	        
120	        // 地址
121	        Text(item.address)
122	          .fontSize(14)
123	          .fontColor('#666666')
124	          .maxLines(1)
125	          .textOverflow({ overflow: TextOverflow.Ellipsis })
126	          .margin({ top: 4 })
127	        
128	        // 添加时间
129	        Text(this.formatDate(item.createdAt))
130	          .fontSize(12)
131	          .fontColor('#999999')
132	          .margin({ top: 4 })
133	      }
134	      .layoutWeight(1)
135	      .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Start)
136	      
137	      // 操作按钮
138	      Row() {
139	        Button('导航')
140	          .fontSize(14)
141	          .height(32)
142	          .backgroundColor('#007AFF')
143	          .onClick(() => {
144	            this.navigateToPlace(item)
145	          })
146	        
147	        Button('删除')
148	          .fontSize(14)
149	          .height(32)
150	          .backgroundColor('#FF3B30')
151	          .margin({ left: 10 })
152	          .onClick(() => {
153	            this.showDeleteConfirm(item)
154	          })
155	      }
156	    }
157	    .width('100%')
158	    .padding(16)
159	    .backgroundColor('#FFFFFF')
160	  }
161	  
162	  /**
163	   * 加载收藏列表
164	   */
165	  async loadFavorites() {
166	    this.isLoading = true
167	    this.errorMessage = ''
168	    
169	    try {
170	      const response = await this.favoriteService.getFavorites()
171	      
172	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
173	        this.favorites = response.data
174	      } else {
175	        this.errorMessage = response.message || '加载失败'
176	      }
177	    } catch (err) {
178	      console.error('[FavoritesPage] 加载收藏列表失败:', err)
179	      this.errorMessage = '加载失败，请稍后重试'
180	    } finally {
181	      this.isLoading = false
182	    }
183	  }
184	  
185	  /**
186	   * 导航到地点
187	   */
188	  navigateToPlace(item: FavoritePlace) {
189	    console.log('[FavoritesPage] ========== 开始导航流程 ==========');
190	    console.log('[FavoritesPage] 导航到:', item.name);
191	    console.log('[FavoritesPage] 坐标:', item.latitude, item.longitude);
192	    
193	    // 使用 router 参数传递数据（更可靠）
194	    console.log('[FavoritesPage] 通过 router 参数传递导航目的地');
195	    router.back({
196	      url: 'pages/Index',
197	      params: {
198	        action: 'navigate',
199	        destination: item
200	      }
201	    });
202	    console.log('[FavoritesPage] ========== router.back() 已调用 ==========');
203	  }
204	  
205	  /**
206	   * 显示删除确认对话框
207	   */
208	  showDeleteConfirm(item: FavoritePlace) {
209	    promptAction.showDialog({
210	      title: '确认删除',
211	      message: `确定要删除收藏"${item.name}"吗？`,
212	      buttons: [
213	        { text: '取消', color: '#666666' },
214	        { text: '删除', color: '#FF3B30' }
215	      ]
216	    }).then((result) => {
217	      if (result.index === 1) {
218	        this.deleteFavorite(item.id)
219	      }
220	    })
221	  }
222	  
223	  /**
224	   * 删除收藏
225	   */
226	  async deleteFavorite(id: number) {
227	    try {
228	      const response = await this.favoriteService.deleteFavorite(id)
229	      
230	      if (response.code === 200) {
231	        promptAction.showToast({
232	          message: '删除成功',
233	          duration: 2000
234	        })
235	        // 刷新列表
236	        this.loadFavorites()
237	      } else {
238	        promptAction.showToast({
239	          message: response.message || '删除失败',
240	          duration: 2000
241	        })
242	      }
243	    } catch (err) {
244	      console.error('[FavoritesPage] 删除收藏失败:', err)
245	      promptAction.showToast({
246	        message: '删除失败',
247	        duration: 2000
248	      })
249	    }
250	  }
251	  
252	  /**
253	   * 格式化日期
254	   */
255	  formatDate(dateStr: string): string {
256	    try {
257	      const date = new Date(dateStr)
258	      const year = date.getFullYear()
259	      const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')
260	      const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')
261	      return `${year}-${month}-${day}`
262	    } catch (err) {
263	      return dateStr
264	    }
265	  }
266	}
267
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
0	/**
1	 * 导航历史页面
2	 */
3	import { NavigationHistoryService } from '../services/NavigationHistoryService'
4	import { NavigationHistory } from '../models/BackendModels'
5	import router from '@ohos.router'
6	import promptAction from '@ohos.promptAction'
7	
8	@Entry
9	@Component
10	struct HistoryPage {
11	  @State historyList: NavigationHistory[] = []
12	  @State isLoading: boolean = false
13	  @State errorMessage: string = ''
14	  @State currentPage: number = 1
15	  @State hasMore: boolean = true
16	  
17	  private historyService: NavigationHistoryService = NavigationHistoryService.getInstance()
18	  
19	  aboutToAppear() {
20	    this.loadHistory()
21	  }
22	  
23	  build() {
24	    Column() {
25	      // 标题栏
26	      Row() {
27	        Button('< 返回')
28	          .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
29	          .fontColor('#333333')
30	          .onClick(() => {
31	            router.back()
32	          })
33	        
34	        Text('导航历史')
35	          .fontSize(20)
36	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
37	          .layoutWeight(1)
38	          .textAlign(TextAlign.Center)
39	        
40	        Button('清空')
41	          .fontSize(14)
42	          .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
43	          .fontColor('#FF3B30')
44	          .onClick(() => {
45	            this.showClearConfirm()
46	          })
47	      }
48	      .width('100%')
49	      .height(56)
50	      .padding({ left: 16, right: 16 })
51	      .backgroundColor('#FFFFFF')
52	      
53	      // 内容区域
54	      if (this.isLoading && this.historyList.length === 0) {
55	        // 首次加载中
56	        Column() {
57	          LoadingProgress()
58	            .width(50)
59	            .height(50)
60	          Text('加载中...')
61	            .fontSize(14)
62	            .fontColor('#999999')
63	            .margin({ top: 10 })
64	        }
65	        .width('100%')
66	        .layoutWeight(1)
67	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
68	      } else if (this.errorMessage && this.historyList.length === 0) {
69	        // 错误提示
70	        Column() {
71	          Text(this.errorMessage)
72	            .fontSize(14)
73	            .fontColor('#FF0000')
74	            .margin({ bottom: 20 })
75	          
76	          Button('重试')
77	            .onClick(() => {
78	              this.loadHistory()
79	            })
80	        }
81	        .width('100%')
82	        .layoutWeight(1)
83	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
84	      } else if (this.historyList.length === 0) {
85	        // 空状态
86	        Column() {
87	          Text('暂无导航历史')
88	            .fontSize(16)
89	            .fontColor('#999999')
90	        }
91	        .width('100%')
92	        .layoutWeight(1)
93	        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
94	      } else {
95	        // 历史列表
96	        List() {
97	          ForEach(this.historyList, (item: NavigationHistory) => {
98	            ListItem() {
99	              this.HistoryItem(item)
100	            }
101	          })
102	          
103	          // 加载更多
104	          if (this.hasMore) {
105	            ListItem() {
106	              Row() {
107	                if (this.isLoading) {
108	                  LoadingProgress()
109	                    .width(30)
110	                    .height(30)
111	                  Text('加载中...')
112	                    .fontSize(14)
113	                    .fontColor('#999999')
114	                    .margin({ left: 10 })
115	                } else {
116	                  Button('加载更多')
117	                    .fontSize(14)
118	                    .onClick(() => {
119	                      this.loadMore()
120	                    })
121	                }
122	              }
123	              .width('100%')
124	              .height(60)
125	              .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
126	            }
127	          }
128	        }
129	        .width('100%')
130	        .layoutWeight(1)
131	        .divider({ strokeWidth: 1, color: '#F0F0F0' })
132	      }
133	    }
134	    .width('100%')
135	    .height('100%')
136	    .backgroundColor('#F5F5F5')
137	  }
138	  
139	  /**
140	   * 历史记录项组件
141	   */
142	  @Builder
143	  HistoryItem(item: NavigationHistory) {
144	    Row() {
145	      Column() {
146	        // 起点和终点
147	        Row() {
148	          Text(item.startName || '当前位置')
149	            .fontSize(14)
150	            .fontColor('#666666')
151	          
152	          Text(' → ')
153	            .fontSize(14)
154	            .fontColor('#999999')
155	            .margin({ left: 5, right: 5 })
156	          
157	          Text(item.endName)
158	            .fontSize(14)
159	            .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
160	        }
161	        
162	        // 地址
163	        Text(item.endAddress)
164	          .fontSize(12)
165	          .fontColor('#999999')
166	          .maxLines(1)
167	          .textOverflow({ overflow: TextOverflow.Ellipsis })
168	          .margin({ top: 4 })
169	        
170	        // 距离和时长
171	        Row() {
172	          Text(this.formatDistance(item.distance))
173	            .fontSize(12)
174	            .fontColor('#999999')
175	          
176	          Text(' | ')
177	            .fontSize(12)
178	            .fontColor('#999999')
179	            .margin({ left: 5, right: 5 })
180	          
181	          Text(this.formatDuration(item.duration))
182	            .fontSize(12)
183	            .fontColor('#999999')
184	          
185	          Text(' | ')
186	            .fontSize(12)
187	            .fontColor('#999999')
188	            .margin({ left: 5, right: 5 })
189	          
190	          Text(this.formatDate(item.createdAt))
191	            .fontSize(12)
192	            .fontColor('#999999')
193	        }
194	        .margin({ top: 4 })
195	      }
196	      .layoutWeight(1)
197	      .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Start)
198	      
199	      // 重新导航按钮
200	      Button('再次导航')
201	        .fontSize(14)
202	        .height(32)
203	        .backgroundColor('#007AFF')
204	        .onClick(() => {
205	          this.navigateAgain(item)
206	        })
207	    }
208	    .width('100%')
209	    .padding(16)
210	    .backgroundColor('#FFFFFF')
211	  }
212	  
213	  /**
214	   * 加载历史记录
215	   */
216	  async loadHistory() {
217	    this.isLoading = true
218	    this.errorMessage = ''
219	    this.currentPage = 1
220	    
221	    try {
222	      const response = await this.historyService.getHistory(this.currentPage, 20)
223	      
224	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
225	        this.historyList = response.data.list
226	        this.hasMore = this.historyList.length < response.data.total
227	      } else {
228	        this.errorMessage = response.message || '加载失败'
229	      }
230	    } catch (err) {
231	      console.error('[HistoryPage] 加载历史记录失败:', err)
232	      this.errorMessage = '加载失败，请稍后重试'
233	    } finally {
234	      this.isLoading = false
235	    }
236	  }
237	  
238	  /**
239	   * 加载更多
240	   */
241	  async loadMore() {
242	    if (this.isLoading || !this.hasMore) {
243	      return
244	    }
245	    
246	    this.isLoading = true
247	    this.currentPage++
248	    
249	    try {
250	      const response = await this.historyService.getHistory(this.currentPage, 20)
251	      
252	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
253	        this.historyList = this.historyList.concat(response.data.list)
254	        this.hasMore = this.historyList.length < response.data.total
255	      }
256	    } catch (err) {
257	      console.error('[HistoryPage] 加载更多失败:', err)
258	      this.currentPage--
259	    } finally {
260	      this.isLoading = false
261	    }
262	  }
263	  
264	  /**
265	   * 再次导航
266	   */
267	  navigateAgain(item: NavigationHistory) {
268	    // 使用 router 参数传递导航目的地数据
269	    router.back({
270	      url: 'pages/Index',
271	      params: {
272	        navigationDestination: {
273	          name: item.endName,
274	          address: item.endAddress,
275	          latitude: item.endLat,
276	          longitude: item.endLng
277	        }
278	      }
279	    })
280	  }
281	  
282	  /**
283	   * 显示清空确认对话框
284	   */
285	  showClearConfirm() {
286	    promptAction.showDialog({
287	      title: '确认清空',
288	      message: '确定要清空所有导航历史吗？',
289	      buttons: [
290	        { text: '取消', color: '#666666' },
291	        { text: '清空', color: '#FF3B30' }
292	      ]
293	    }).then((result) => {
294	      if (result.index === 1) {
295	        this.clearHistory()
296	      }
297	    })
298	  }
299	  
300	  /**
301	   * 清空历史记录
302	   */
303	  async clearHistory() {
304	    try {
305	      const response = await this.historyService.clearHistory()
306	      
307	      if (response.code === 200) {
308	        promptAction.showToast({
309	          message: '清空成功',
310	          duration: 2000
311	        })
312	        this.historyList = []
313	      } else {
314	        promptAction.showToast({
315	          message: response.message || '清空失败',
316	          duration: 2000
317	        })
318	      }
319	    } catch (err) {
320	      console.error('[HistoryPage] 清空历史失败:', err)
321	      promptAction.showToast({
322	        message: '清空失败',
323	        duration: 2000
324	      })
325	    }
326	  }
327	  
328	  /**
329	   * 格式化距离
330	   */
331	  formatDistance(meters: number): string {
332	    if (meters < 1000) {
333	      return `${meters}米`
334	    } else {
335	      return `${(meters / 1000).toFixed(1)}公里`
336	    }
337	  }
338	  
339	  /**
340	   * 格式化时长
341	   */
342	  formatDuration(seconds: number): string {
343	    if (seconds < 60) {
344	      return `${seconds}秒`
345	    } else if (seconds < 3600) {
346	      return `${Math.floor(seconds / 60)}分钟`
347	    } else {
348	      const hours = Math.floor(seconds / 3600)
349	      const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60)
350	      return `${hours}小时${minutes}分钟`
351	    }
352	  }
353	  
354	  /**
355	   * 格式化日期
356	   */
357	  formatDate(dateStr: string): string {
358	    try {
359	      const date = new Date(dateStr)
360	      const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')
361	      const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')
362	      const hour = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, '0')
363	      const minute = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0')
364	      return `${month}-${day} ${hour}:${minute}`
365	    } catch (err) {
366	      return dateStr
367	    }
368	  }
369	}
370
```

```text
0	/**
1	 * 增强版导航模块
2	 * 集成完整的导航功能：定位、路径规划、导航指引、POI搜索
3	 * 使用IP定位（简单可靠）
4	 */
5	import { webview } from '@kit.ArkWeb';
6	import { MapService, Location, POIResult } from '../services/MapService';
7	import { NavigationService, NavigationState, NavigationInfo } from '../services/NavigationService';
8	import { VoiceGuideService } from '../services/VoiceGuideService';
9	import { FavoriteService } from '../services/FavoriteService';
10	import { NavigationHistoryService } from '../services/NavigationHistoryService';
11	import { AuthService } from '../services/AuthService';
12	import { FavoritePlace } from '../models/BackendModels';
13	import promptAction from '@ohos.promptAction';
14	
15	@Component
16	export struct EnhancedNavigationModule {
17	  // 外部传入的导航目的地
18	  @Prop @Watch('onDestinationChange') externalDestination: FavoritePlace | null = null;
19	  
20	  // 地图相关
21	  @State isMapLoaded: boolean = false;
22	  @State zoomLevel: number = 15;
23	  private webController: webview.WebviewController = new webview.WebviewController();
24	  
25	  // 定位相关
26	  @State latitude: number = 30.486874173982763;
27	  @State longitude: number = 114.309994670642;
28	  @State addressText: string = "正在定位...";
29	  
30	  // 导航相关
31	  @State isNavigating: boolean = false;
32	  @State navigationInfo: NavigationInfo | null = null;
33	  @State remainingDistance: string = '';
34	  @State remainingTime: string = '';
35	  @State nextInstruction: string = '';
36	  
37	  // 搜索相关
38	  @State showSearchPanel: boolean = false;
39	  @State searchKeyword: string = '';
40	  @State searchResults: POIResult[] = [];
41	  @State isSearching: boolean = false;
42	  @State showSearchHistory: boolean = false;
43	  @State searchHistory: string[] = [];
44	  
45	  // 服务实例
46	  private mapService: MapService = MapService.getInstance();
47	  private navigationService: NavigationService = NavigationService.getInstance();
48	  private voiceService: VoiceGuideService = VoiceGuideService.getInstance();
49	  private favoriteService: FavoriteService = FavoriteService.getInstance();
50	  private historyService: NavigationHistoryService = NavigationHistoryService.getInstance();
51	  private authService: AuthService = AuthService.getInstance();
52	  
53	  aboutToAppear() {
54	    // 监听导航状态变化
55	    this.navigationService.addListener((info) => {
56	      this.onNavigationUpdate(info);
57	    });
58	    
59	    // 检查是否有外部传入的导航目的地
60	    if (this.externalDestination) {
61	      this.handleExternalDestination();
62	    }
63	  }
64	  
65	  /**
66	   * 监听外部传入的导航目的地变化
67	   */
68	  onDestinationChange() {
69	    if (this.externalDestination) {
70	      this.handleExternalDestination();
71	    }
72	  }
73	  
74	  /**
75	   * 处理外部传入的导航目的地
76	   */
77	  handleExternalDestination() {
78	    if (!this.externalDestination) {
79	      return;
80	    }
81	    
82	    console.log('[Navigation] 收到外部导航目的地:', this.externalDestination.name);
83	    console.log('[Navigation] 坐标:', this.externalDestination.latitude, this.externalDestination.longitude);
84	    
85	    const destination: Location = {
86	      latitude: this.externalDestination.latitude,
87	      longitude: this.externalDestination.longitude
88	    };
89	    
90	    // 如果地图已加载,立即启动导航;否则等待地图加载
91	    if (this.isMapLoaded) {
92	      console.log('[Navigation] 地图已加载,立即启动导航');
93	      // 延迟一下,确保WebView完全准备好
94	      setTimeout(() => {
95	        this.startNavigation(destination);
96	      }, 500);
97	    } else {
98	      console.log('[Navigation] 等待地图加载...');
99	      // 等待地图加载完成后再启动导航
100	      let retryCount = 0;
101	      const maxRetries = 100; // 10秒超时
102	      const checkInterval = setInterval(() => {
103	        retryCount++;
104	        if (this.isMapLoaded) {
105	          console.log('[Navigation] 地图加载完成(重试', retryCount, '次),启动导航');
106	          clearInterval(checkInterval);
107	          // 延迟一下,确保WebView完全准备好
108	          setTimeout(() => {
109	            this.startNavigation(destination);
110	          }, 500);
111	        } else if (retryCount >= maxRetries) {
112	          console.error('[Navigation] 等待地图加载超时');
113	          clearInterval(checkInterval);
114	        }
115	      }, 100);
116	    }
117	  }
118	  
119	  aboutToDisappear() {
120	    this.voiceService.release();
121	  }
122	  
123	  /**
124	   * IP定位
125	   */
126	  async startIPLocation() {
127	    try {
128	      console.log('[Navigation] 开始IP定位...');
129	      this.addressText = "IP定位中...";
130	      
131	      const location = await this.mapService.getCurrentLocation();
132	      
133	      this.latitude = location.latitude;
134	      this.longitude = location.longitude;
135	      this.addressText = location.address ? `IP定位 (${location.address})` : "默认位置(武汉)";
136	      
137	      console.log('[Navigation] IP定位完成:', this.latitude, this.longitude);
138	      
139	      // 更新地图标记
140	      const currentLocation: Location = {
141	        latitude: this.latitude,
142	        longitude: this.longitude
143	      };
144	      this.mapService.addCurrentLocationMarker(currentLocation);
145	      this.mapService.moveToLocation(currentLocation, this.zoomLevel);
146	      
147	    } catch (err) {
148	      console.error('[Navigation] IP定位失败:', err);
149	      this.addressText = "定位失败,使用默认位置";
150	    }
151	  }
152	  
153	  /**
154	   * 地图加载完成
155	   */
156	  onMapLoad() {
157	    this.isMapLoaded = true;
158	    this.mapService.setWebController(this.webController);
159	    
160	    // 移动地图到默认位置
161	    const defaultLocation: Location = {
162	      latitude: this.latitude,
163	      longitude: this.longitude
164	    };
165	    this.mapService.moveToLocation(defaultLocation, this.zoomLevel);
166	    
167	    // 延迟添加标记，确保WebView准备好
168	    setTimeout(() => {
169	      this.mapService.addCurrentLocationMarker(defaultLocation);
170	      console.log('[Navigation] 地图初始化完成');
171	    }, 300);
172	    
173	    // 启动IP定位
174	    setTimeout(() => {
175	      this.startIPLocation();
176	    }, 500);
177	  }
178	  
179	  /**
180	   * 缩放地图
181	   */
182	  changeZoom(delta: number): void {
183	    if (!this.webController) return;
184	    this.zoomLevel = Math.max(3, Math.min(20, this.zoomLevel + delta));
185	    try {
186	      const message = JSON.stringify({
187	        action: 'setZoom',
188	        zoom: this.zoomLevel
189	      });
190	      this.webController.runJavaScript(`window.postMessage('${message}', '*')`);
191	    } catch(e) {
192	      console.error('Change zoom error:', e);
193	    }
194	  }
195	  
196	  /**
197	   * 回到当前位置
198	   */
199	  backToCurrentLocation(): void {
200	    if (this.webController) {
201	      const currentLocation: Location = {
202	        latitude: this.latitude,
203	        longitude: this.longitude
204	      };
205	      this.mapService.moveToLocation(currentLocation, this.zoomLevel);
206	    }
207	  }
208	  
209	  /**
210	   * 开始导航
211	   */
212	  async startNavigation(destination: Location) {
213	    try {
214	      await this.navigationService.startNavigation(destination);
215	      this.isNavigating = true;
216	      this.showSearchPanel = false;
217	    } catch (err) {
218	      console.error('Start navigation error:', err);
219	    }
220	  }
221	  
222	  /**
223	   * 停止导航
224	   */
225	  stopNavigation() {
226	    this.navigationService.stopNavigation();
227	    this.isNavigating = false;
228	    this.navigationInfo = null;
229	    this.addressText = "实时定位";
230	  }
231	  
232	  /**
233	   * 导航状态更新
234	   */
235	  onNavigationUpdate(info: NavigationInfo) {
236	    this.navigationInfo = info;
237	    
238	    // 更新显示信息
239	    if (info.remainingDistance > 1000) {
240	      this.remainingDistance = `${(info.remainingDistance / 1000).toFixed(1)} 公里`;
241	    } else {
242	      this.remainingDistance = `${Math.round(info.remainingDistance)} 米`;
243	    }
244	    
245	    const hours = Math.floor(info.remainingTime / 3600);
246	    const minutes = Math.floor((info.remainingTime % 3600) / 60);
247	    if (hours > 0) {
248	      this.remainingTime = `${hours}小时${minutes}分钟`;
249	    } else {
250	      this.remainingTime = `${minutes}分钟`;
251	    }
252	    
253	    this.nextInstruction = info.nextInstruction;
254	    this.addressText = info.nextInstruction;
255	    
256	    // 到达目的地
257	    if (info.state === NavigationState.ARRIVED) {
258	      this.voiceService.speakArrival();
259	      setTimeout(() => {
260	        this.stopNavigation();
261	      }, 3000);
262	    }
263	  }
264	  
265	  /**
266	   * 搜索POI
267	   */
268	  async searchPOI() {
269	    if (!this.searchKeyword.trim()) return;
270	    
271	    this.isSearching = true;
272	    try {
273	      const currentLocation: Location = { latitude: this.latitude, longitude: this.longitude };
274	      const results = await this.mapService.searchPOI(
275	        this.searchKeyword,
276	        currentLocation,
277	        5000
278	      );
279	      this.searchResults = results;
280	    } catch (err) {
281	      console.error('Search error:', err);
282	    } finally {
283	      this.isSearching = false;
284	    }
285	  }
286	  
287	  /**
288	   * 选择POI并导航
289	   */
290	  selectPOI(poi: POIResult) {
291	    this.startNavigation(poi.location);
292	  }
293	  
294	  /**
295	   * 收藏当前位置或POI
296	   */
297	  async addToFavorites(name: string, address: string, location: Location) {
298	    try {
299	      console.log('[Navigation] 开始收藏:', name);
300	      console.log('[Navigation] 地址:', address);
301	      console.log('[Navigation] 坐标:', location.latitude, location.longitude);
302	      
303	      const isLoggedIn = await this.authService.isLoggedIn();
304	      console.log('[Navigation] 登录状态:', isLoggedIn);
305	      
306	      if (!isLoggedIn) {
307	        console.log('[Navigation] 未登录，提示用户登录');
308	        promptAction.showToast({
309	          message: '请先登录',
310	          duration: 2000
311	        });
312	        return;
313	      }
314	      
315	      const response = await this.favoriteService.addFavorite({
316	        name: name,
317	        address: address,
318	        latitude: location.latitude,
319	        longitude: location.longitude
320	      });
321	      
322	      console.log('[Navigation] 收藏响应代码:', response.code);
323	      console.log('[Navigation] 收藏响应消息:', response.message);
324	      console.log('[Navigation] 完整响应:', JSON.stringify(response));
325	      
326	      if (response.code === 200) {
327	        console.log('[Navigation] 收藏成功');
328	        promptAction.showToast({
329	          message: '收藏成功',
330	          duration: 2000
331	        });
332	      } else {
333	        console.error('[Navigation] 收藏失败:', response.message);
334	        promptAction.showToast({
335	          message: response.message || '收藏失败',
336	          duration: 2000
337	        });
338	      }
339	    } catch (err) {
340	      console.error('[Navigation] 收藏异常 - 类型:', typeof err);
341	      console.error('[Navigation] 收藏异常 - 详情:', JSON.stringify(err));
342	      promptAction.showToast({
343	        message: '收藏失败，请稍后重试',
344	        duration: 2000
345	      });
346	    }
347	  }
348	  
349	  /**
350	   * 加载搜索历史
351	   */
352	  async loadSearchHistory() {
353	    try {
354	      const response = await this.historyService.getHistory();
355	      // 提取最近5条搜索记录的目的地名称
356	      if (response.data && response.data.list) {
357	        this.searchHistory = response.data.list.slice(0, 5).map(item => item.endName);
358	      } else {
359	        this.searchHistory = [];
360	      }
361	    } catch (err) {
362	      console.error('[Navigation] 加载搜索历史失败:', err);
363	      this.searchHistory = [];
364	    }
365	  }
366	  
367	  /**
368	   * 保存导航历史
369	   */
370	  async saveNavigationHistory(destination: Location, destinationName: string) {
371	    try {
372	      const isLoggedIn = await this.authService.isLoggedIn();
373	      if (!isLoggedIn) {
374	        return;
375	      }
376	      
377	      await this.historyService.saveHistory({
378	        startLat: this.latitude,
379	        startLng: this.longitude,
380	        startName: '当前位置',
381	        startAddress: this.addressText,
382	        endLat: destination.latitude,
383	        endLng: destination.longitude,
384	        endName: destinationName,
385	        endAddress: destinationName,
386	        distance: 0, // 实际距离由后端计算
387	        duration: 0  // 实际时长由后端计算
388	      });
389	      
390	      console.log('[Navigation] 导航历史已保存');
391	    } catch (err) {
392	      console.error('[Navigation] 保存导航历史失败:', err);
393	    }
394	  }
395	  
396	  build() {
397	    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.Bottom }) {
398	      // 1. 地图层 - 使用WebView加载高德地图
399	      Stack() {
400	        Web({ src: $rawfile('amap.html'), controller: this.webController })
401	          .width('100%')
402	          .height('100%')
403	          .onPageEnd(() => {
404	            console.log('地图页面加载完成');
405	            this.onMapLoad();
406	          })
407	          .onErrorReceive((event) => {
408	            console.error('地图加载错误:', event?.error);
409	          })
410	          .onConsole((event) => {
411	            // 转发WebView的console日志到ArkTS
412	            if (event && event.message) {
413	              const msg = event.message;
414	              const message = msg.getMessage();
415	              const sourceId = msg.getSourceId();
416	              const lineNumber = msg.getLineNumber();
417	              
418	              // 输出WebView日志，包含来源信息
419	              console.log('[WebView]', message, 'at', sourceId, ':', lineNumber);
420	            }
421	            return false;
422	          })
423	      }
424	      
425	      // 2. 顶部搜索栏
426	      if (!this.isNavigating) {
427	        this.SearchBar()
428	      }
429	      
430	      // 3. 右侧控制按钮
431	      this.ControlButtons()
432	      
433	      // 4. 底部信息面板
434	      if (this.isNavigating && this.navigationInfo) {
435	        this.NavigationPanel()
436	      } else {
437	        this.LocationPanel()
438	      }
439	      
440	      // 5. 搜索结果面板
441	      if (this.showSearchPanel) {
442	        this.SearchResultPanel()
443	      }
444	    }
445	  }
446	  
447	  /**
448	   * 搜索栏
449	   */
450	  @Builder
451	  SearchBar(): void {
452	    Column() {
453	      Row() {
454	        TextInput({ placeholder: '搜索地点、地址' })
455	          .layoutWeight(1)
456	          .height(48)
457	          .backgroundColor(Color.White)
458	          .borderRadius(24)
459	          .padding({ left: 20, right: 20 })
460	          .onChange((value: string): void => {
461	            this.searchKeyword = value;
462	          })
463	          .onFocus(() => {
464	            // 获得焦点时加载搜索历史
465	            this.showSearchHistory = true;
466	            this.loadSearchHistory();
467	          })
468	          .onBlur(() => {
469	            // 延迟隐藏，以便点击历史记录
470	            setTimeout(() => {
471	              this.showSearchHistory = false;
472	            }, 200);
473	          })
474	          .onSubmit((): void => {
475	            this.showSearchPanel = true;
476	            this.showSearchHistory = false;
477	            this.searchPOI();
478	            return;
479	          })
480	        
481	        // 收藏按钮
482	        Button() {
483	          Text('⭐')
484	            .fontSize(20)
485	        }
486	        .height(48)
487	        .width(48)
488	        .backgroundColor('rgba(255,255,255,0.9)')
489	        .borderRadius(24)
490	        .margin({ left: 10 })
491	        .onClick(async () => {
492	          // 收藏当前位置
493	          await this.addToFavorites(
494	            '当前位置',
495	            this.addressText,
496	            { latitude: this.latitude, longitude: this.longitude }
497	          );
498	        })
499	        
500	        Button('搜索')
501	          .height(48)
502	          .backgroundColor('#00E5FF')
503	          .borderRadius(24)
504	          .margin({ left: 10 })
505	          .onClick((): void => {
506	            this.showSearchPanel = true;
507	            this.showSearchHistory = false;
508	            this.searchPOI();
509	          })
510	      }
511	      .width('90%')
512	      
513	      // 搜索历史面板
514	      if (this.showSearchHistory && this.searchHistory.length > 0) {
515	        Column() {
516	          Text('搜索历史')
517	            .fontSize(14)
518	            .fontColor('#666')
519	            .width('100%')
520	            .padding({ left: 15, top: 10, bottom: 5 })
521	          
522	          ForEach(this.searchHistory, (keyword: string) => {
523	            Row() {
524	              Text('🕐')
525	                .fontSize(16)
526	                .margin({ right: 10 })
527	              
528	              Text(keyword)
529	                .fontSize(14)
530	                .fontColor('#333')
531	                .layoutWeight(1)
532	            }
533	            .width('100%')
534	            .height(40)
535	            .padding({ left: 15, right: 15 })
536	            .onClick(() => {
537	              this.searchKeyword = keyword;
538	              this.showSearchPanel = true;
539	              this.showSearchHistory = false;
540	              this.searchPOI();
541	            })
542	          })
543	        }
544	        .width('90%')
545	        .backgroundColor(Color.White)
546	        .borderRadius(12)
547	        .margin({ top: 10 })
548	        .padding({ bottom: 10 })
549	      }
550	    }
551	    .width('100%')
552	    .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Center)
553	    .padding(16)
554	    .position({ x: '5%', y: 60 })
555	  }
556	  
557	  @Builder
558	  ControlButtons(): void {
559	    Column({ space: 15 }) {
560	      this.MapBtn("＋", (): void => this.changeZoom(1))
561	      
562	      this.MapBtn("－", (): void => this.changeZoom(-1))
563	      
564	      this.MapBtn("◎", (): void => this.backToCurrentLocation())
565	      
566	      if (this.isNavigating) {
567	        this.MapBtn("■", (): void => this.stopNavigation())
568	      }
569	    }
570	    .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.Center)
571	    .position({ x: '100%', y: '50%' })
572	    .markAnchor({ x: '100%', y: '50%' })
573	    .padding({ right: 20 })
574	  }
575	  
576	  /**
577	   * 导航信息面板
578	   */
579	  @Builder
580	  NavigationPanel(): void {
581	    Column({ space: 12 }) {

583	      Row() {
584	        Column() {

586	            .fontSize(28)

632	  /**
```

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-20 03:43:51Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/d/Users/47346/DevEcoStudioProjects/huawei/entry/src/main/ets/services/HttpService.ets`

```text
0	/**
1	 * HTTP服务 - 封装网络请求
2	 * 统一处理HTTP通信、Token管理、错误处理
3	 */
4	import http from '@ohos.net.http';
5	import preferences from '@ohos.data.preferences';
6	import { ApiResponse } from '../models/BackendModels';
7	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
8	
9	/**
10	 * HTTP服务类
11	 */
12	export class HttpService {
13	  private static instance: HttpService;
14	  private token: string = '';
15	  private preferencesInstance: preferences.Preferences | null = null;
16	  private readonly PREFERENCES_NAME = 'app_auth';
17	  private initialized: boolean = false;
18	  private initPromise: Promise<void>;
19	
20	  private constructor() {
21	    // 从本地存储加载token
22	    this.initPromise = this.initPreferences();
23	  }
24	  
25	  static getInstance(): HttpService {
26	    if (!HttpService.instance) {
27	      HttpService.instance = new HttpService();
28	    }
29	    return HttpService.instance;
30	  }
31	  
32	  /**
33	   * 初始化Preferences
34	   */
35	  private async initPreferences(): Promise<void> {
36	    if (this.initialized) {
37	      return;
38	    }
39	    try {
40	      const context = getContext();
41	      this.preferencesInstance = await preferences.getPreferences(context, this.PREFERENCES_NAME);
42	      await this.loadToken();
43	      this.initialized = true;
44	      console.log('[HttpService] Preferences初始化成功');
45	    } catch (err) {
46	      console.error('[HttpService] Preferences初始化失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
47	      throw err;
48	    }
49	  }
50	
51	  async ensureInitialized(): Promise<void> {
52	    try {
53	      await this.initPromise;
54	    } catch (err) {
55	      console.error('[HttpService] 初始化等待失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
56	    }
57	  }
58	  
59	  /**
60	   * 设置认证token
61	   */
62	  async setToken(token: string): Promise<void> {
63	    await this.ensureInitialized();
64	    this.token = token;
65	    await this.saveToken(token);
66	  }
67	  
68	  /**
69	   * 获取token
70	   */
71	  async getToken(): Promise<string> {
72	    await this.ensureInitialized();
73	    return this.token;
74	  }
75	  
76	  /**
77	   * 清除token
78	   */
79	  async clearToken(): Promise<void> {
80	    await this.ensureInitialized();
81	    this.token = '';
82	    try {
83	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
84	        await this.preferencesInstance.delete(ApiConfig.TOKEN_KEY);
85	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
86	        console.log('[HttpService] Token已清除');
87	      }
88	    } catch (err) {
89	      console.error('[HttpService] 清除Token失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
90	    }
91	  }
92	  
93	  /**
94	   * 保存token到Preferences
95	   */
96	  private async saveToken(token: string): Promise<void> {
97	    try {
98	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
99	        await this.preferencesInstance.put(ApiConfig.TOKEN_KEY, token);
100	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
101	        console.log('[HttpService] Token已保存');
102	      }
103	    } catch (err) {
104	      console.error('[HttpService] 保存Token失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
105	    }
106	  }
107	  
108	  /**
109	   * 从Preferences加载token
110	   */
111	  private async loadToken(): Promise<void> {
112	    try {
113	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
114	        const token = await this.preferencesInstance.get(ApiConfig.TOKEN_KEY, '');
115	        if (token && token !== '') {
116	          this.token = token as string;
117	          console.log('[HttpService] Token已加载');
118	        }
119	      }
120	    } catch (err) {
121	      console.error('[HttpService] 加载Token失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
122	    }
123	  }
124	  
125	  /**
126	   * 发送HTTP请求
127	   */
128	  private async request<T>(
129	    method: http.RequestMethod,
130	    url: string,
131	    data?: Object,
132	    needAuth: boolean = true
133	  ): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
134	    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
135	      await this.ensureInitialized();
136	      const httpRequest = http.createHttp();
137	      
138	      const fullUrl = `${ApiConfig.BASE_URL}${url}`;
139	      console.log(`[HttpService] ========== 请求详情 ==========`);
140	      console.log(`[HttpService] 方法: ${method}`);
141	      console.log(`[HttpService] BASE_URL: ${ApiConfig.BASE_URL}`);
142	      console.log(`[HttpService] 路径: ${url}`);
143	      console.log(`[HttpService] 完整URL: ${fullUrl}`);
144	      console.log(`[HttpService] ================================`);
145	      
146	      const headers: Record<string, string> = {
147	        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
148	      };
149	      
150	      // 添加认证头
151	      if (needAuth && this.token) {
152	        headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;
153	      }
154	      
155	      const options: http.HttpRequestOptions = {
156	        method,
157	        header: headers,
158	        readTimeout: ApiConfig.TIMEOUT,
159	        connectTimeout: ApiConfig.TIMEOUT
160	      };
161	      
162	      // 添加请求体
163	      if (data && (method === http.RequestMethod.POST || method === http.RequestMethod.PUT)) {
164	        options.extraData = JSON.stringify(data);
165	        console.log('[HttpService] 请求数据:', JSON.stringify(data));
166	      }
167	      
168	      console.log('[HttpService] 开始发送请求...');
169	      
170	      httpRequest.request(fullUrl, options, (err: Error, data: http.HttpResponse) => {
171	        console.log('[HttpService] 收到响应回调');
172	        
173	        if (err) {
174	          console.error('[HttpService] ========== 错误详情 ==========');
175	          console.error('[HttpService] 请求失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
176	          console.error('[HttpService] ================================');
177	          const errorMessage = this.getErrorMessage(err);
178	          reject({
179	            code: -1,
180	            message: errorMessage
181	          });
182	          httpRequest.destroy();
183	          return;
184	        }
185	        
186	        try {
187	          const responseCode = data.responseCode;
188	          const resultString = data.result as string;
189	          
190	          console.log(`[HttpService] ========== 响应详情 ==========`);
191	          console.log(`[HttpService] HTTP状态码: ${responseCode}`);
192	          console.log(`[HttpService] 响应内容: ${resultString}`);
193	          console.log(`[HttpService] 响应头: ${JSON.stringify(data.header)}`);
194	          console.log(`[HttpService] ================================`);
195	          
196	          // 尝试解析响应体
197	          let response: ApiResponse<T>;
198	          try {
199	            response = JSON.parse(resultString) as ApiResponse<T>;
200	          } catch (parseErr) {
201	            console.error('[HttpService] 响应解析失败:', JSON.stringify(parseErr));
202	            // 如果解析失败，使用HTTP状态码生成错误信息
203	            reject({
204	              code: responseCode,
205	              message: this.getHttpStatusMessage(responseCode)
206	            });
207	            httpRequest.destroy();
208	            return;
209	          }
210	          
211	          // 处理HTTP状态码
212	          if (responseCode !== 200 && responseCode !== 201) {
213	            // 返回后端的实际错误信息
214	            reject(response);
215	            httpRequest.destroy();
216	            return;
217	          }
218	          
219	          // 处理401未授权
220	          if (response.code === 401) {
221	            console.log('[HttpService] Token无效，清除本地token');
222	            this.clearToken();
223	          }
224	          
225	          console.log(`[HttpService] 请求成功: ${response.code} ${response.message}`);
226	          resolve(response);
227	        } catch (parseErr) {
228	          console.error('[HttpService] 响应解析失败:', JSON.stringify(parseErr));
229	          reject({
230	            code: -1,
231	            message: '响应解析失败'
232	          });
233	        } finally {
234	          httpRequest.destroy();
235	        }
236	      });
237	    });
238	  }
239	  
240	  /**
241	   * 获取错误信息
242	   */
243	  private getErrorMessage(err: Error): string {
244	    const errorStr = JSON.stringify(err);
245	    const errorObj = JSON.parse(errorStr) as Record<string, Object>;
246	    const errorCode = errorObj['code'] as number;
247	    
248	    // 网络错误映射
249	    const errorMap: Record<number, string> = {
250	      2300001: '协议不支持',
251	      2300003: 'URL格式错误',
252	      2300005: '无法解析远程主机名',
253	      2300006: '无法连接到服务器',
254	      2300007: '无法连接到代理服务器',
255	      2300008: '无效的服务器响应',
256	      2300009: '远程服务器拒绝访问',
257	      2300023: '写入数据失败',
258	      2300025: '上传失败',
259	      2300026: '读取数据失败',
260	      2300027: '内存不足',
261	      2300028: '操作超时',
262	      2300047: '请求数量过多',
263	      2300052: '服务器返回空数据',
264	      2300055: '发送网络数据失败',
265	      2300056: '接收网络数据失败',
266	      2300058: '本地SSL证书问题',
267	      2300059: '无法使用指定的SSL加密',
268	      2300060: '远程SSL证书无效',
269	      2300077: 'SSL CA证书无效',
270	      2300078: '远程服务器无法访问'
271	    };
272	    
273	    return errorMap[errorCode] || '网络请求失败';
274	  }
275	  
276	  /**
277	   * 获取HTTP状态码对应的错误信息
278	   */
279	  private getHttpStatusMessage(statusCode: number): string {
280	    const statusMap: Record<number, string> = {
281	      400: '请求参数错误',
282	      401: '登录已过期，请重新登录',
283	      403: '无权限访问',
284	      404: '请求的资源不存在',
285	      500: '服务器错误，请稍后重试',
286	      502: '网关错误',
287	      503: '服务暂时不可用，请稍后重试',
288	      504: '网关超时'
289	    };
290	    
291	    return statusMap[statusCode] || `请求失败 (${statusCode})`;
292	  }
293	  
294	  /**
295	   * GET请求
296	   */
297	  async get<T>(url: string, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
298	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.GET, url, undefined, needAuth);
299	  }
300	  
301	  /**
302	   * POST请求
303	   */
304	  async post<T>(url: string, data: Object, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
305	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.POST, url, data, needAuth);
306	  }
307	  
308	  /**
309	   * PUT请求
310	   */
311	  async put<T>(url: string, data: Object, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
312	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.PUT, url, data, needAuth);
313	  }
314	  
315	  /**
316	   * DELETE请求
317	   */
318	  async delete<T>(url: string, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
319	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.DELETE, url, undefined, needAuth);
320	  }
321	}
322
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
0	/**
1	 * 收藏服务 - 管理用户收藏的地点
2	 */
3	import { HttpService } from './HttpService';
4	import { CacheService } from './CacheService';
5	import { ApiResponse, FavoritePlace } from '../models/BackendModels';
6	import { ApiConfig } from '../config/ApiConfig';
7	
8	/**
9	 * 收藏服务类
10	 */
11	export class FavoriteService {
12	  private static instance: FavoriteService;
13	  private httpService: HttpService;
14	  private cacheService: CacheService;
15	  private readonly CACHE_KEY = 'favorites_cache';
16	  
17	  private constructor() {
18	    this.httpService = HttpService.getInstance();
19	    this.cacheService = CacheService.getInstance();
20	  }
21	  
22	  static getInstance(): FavoriteService {
23	    if (!FavoriteService.instance) {
24	      FavoriteService.instance = new FavoriteService();
25	    }
26	    return FavoriteService.instance;
27	  }
28	  
29	  /**
30	   * 获取收藏列表
31	   */
32	  async getFavorites(category?: string): Promise<ApiResponse<FavoritePlace[]>> {
33	    try {
34	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 获取收藏列表, category:', category);
35	      
36	      // 检查是否登录
37	      const token = this.httpService.getToken();
38	      if (!token) {
39	        return {
40	          code: 401,
41	          message: '需要登录'
42	        };
43	      }
44	      
45	      // 构建URL
46	      let url = ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FAVORITES;
47	      if (category) {
48	        url += `?category=${category}`;
49	      }
50	      
51	      const response = await this.httpService.get<FavoritePlace[]>(url, true);
52	      
53	      // 成功时缓存数据
54	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
55	        await this.cacheFavorites(response.data);
56	      }
57	      
58	      return response;
59	    } catch (err) {
60	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 获取收藏列表失败:', err);
61	      
62	      // 网络失败时尝试从缓存读取
63	      const cachedData = await this.getCachedFavorites();
64	      if (cachedData && cachedData.length > 0) {
65	        console.log('[FavoriteService] 使用缓存数据');
66	        return {
67	          code: 200,
68	          message: '从缓存加载',
69	          data: cachedData
70	        };
71	      }
72	      
73	      return err as ApiResponse<FavoritePlace[]>;
74	    }
75	  }
76	  
77	  /**
78	   * 添加收藏
79	   */
80	  async addFavorite(place: Partial<FavoritePlace>): Promise<ApiResponse<FavoritePlace>> {
81	    try {
82	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 添加收藏:', place.name);
83	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 完整数据:', JSON.stringify(place));
84	      
85	      // 检查是否登录
86	      const token = this.httpService.getToken();
87	      console.log('[FavoriteService] Token存在:', !!token);
88	      if (!token) {
89	        return {
90	          code: 401,
91	          message: '需要登录'
92	        };
93	      }
94	      
95	      const response = await this.httpService.post<FavoritePlace>(
96	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FAVORITES,
97	        place,
98	        true
99	      );
100	      
101	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 响应代码:', response.code);
102	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 响应消息:', response.message);
103	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 完整响应:', JSON.stringify(response));
104	      
105	      // 成功时清除缓存，下次重新加载
106	      if (response.code === 200) {
107	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
108	      }
109	      
110	      return response;
111	    } catch (err) {
112	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 添加收藏失败 - 错误类型:', typeof err);
113	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 添加收藏失败 - 详情:', JSON.stringify(err));
114	      return err as ApiResponse<FavoritePlace>;
115	    }
116	  }
117	  
118	  /**
119	   * 更新收藏
120	   */
121	  async updateFavorite(id: number, updates: Partial<FavoritePlace>): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
122	    try {
123	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 更新收藏:', id);
124	      
125	      // 检查是否登录
126	      const token = this.httpService.getToken();
127	      if (!token) {
128	        return {
129	          code: 401,
130	          message: '需要登录'
131	        };
132	      }
133	      
134	      const response = await this.httpService.put<void>(
135	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FAVORITE_DETAIL(id),
136	        updates,
137	        true
138	      );
139	      
140	      // 成功时清除缓存
141	      if (response.code === 200) {
142	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
143	      }
144	      
145	      return response;
146	    } catch (err) {
147	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 更新收藏失败:', err);
148	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
149	    }
150	  }
151	  
152	  /**
153	   * 删除收藏
154	   */
155	  async deleteFavorite(id: number): Promise<ApiResponse<void>> {
156	    try {
157	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 删除收藏:', id);
158	      
159	      // 检查是否登录
160	      const token = this.httpService.getToken();
161	      if (!token) {
162	        return {
163	          code: 401,
164	          message: '需要登录'
165	        };
166	      }
167	      
168	      const response = await this.httpService.delete<void>(
169	        ApiConfig.ENDPOINTS.FAVORITE_DETAIL(id),
170	        true
171	      );
172	      
173	      // 成功时清除缓存
174	      if (response.code === 200) {
175	        await this.cacheService.remove(this.CACHE_KEY);
176	      }
177	      
178	      return response;
179	    } catch (err) {
180	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 删除收藏失败:', err);
181	      return err as ApiResponse<void>;
182	    }
183	  }
184	  
185	  /**
186	   * 搜索收藏
187	   */
188	  async searchFavorites(keyword: string): Promise<FavoritePlace[]> {
189	    try {
190	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 搜索收藏:', keyword);
191	      
192	      // 先获取所有收藏
193	      const response = await this.getFavorites();
194	      
195	      if (response.code === 200 && response.data) {
196	        // 按名称搜索（不区分大小写）
197	        const lowerKeyword = keyword.toLowerCase();
198	        return response.data.filter(place => 
199	          place.name.toLowerCase().includes(lowerKeyword)
200	        );
201	      }
202	      
203	      return [];
204	    } catch (err) {
205	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 搜索收藏失败:', err);
206	      return [];
207	    }
208	  }
209	  
210	  /**
211	   * 从缓存获取收藏列表
212	   */
213	  private async getCachedFavorites(): Promise<FavoritePlace[]> {
214	    try {
215	      const cached = await this.cacheService.get<FavoritePlace[]>(this.CACHE_KEY);
216	      return cached || [];
217	    } catch (err) {
218	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 读取缓存失败:', err);
219	      return [];
220	    }
221	  }
222	  
223	  /**
224	   * 缓存收藏列表
225	   */
226	  private async cacheFavorites(favorites: FavoritePlace[]): Promise<void> {
227	    try {
228	      await this.cacheService.set(
229	        this.CACHE_KEY,
230	        favorites,
231	        ApiConfig.CACHE_EXPIRE_TIME.FAVORITES
232	      );
233	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 收藏列表已缓存');
234	    } catch (err) {
235	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 缓存收藏列表失败:', err);
236	    }
237	  }
238	}
239
```

```text
0	/**
1	 * 个人中心页面
2	 */
3	import router from '@ohos.router'
4	import { AuthService } from '../services/AuthService'
5	import { UserInfo } from '../models/BackendModels'
6	
7	@Entry
8	@Component
9	struct UserCenterPage {
10	  private authService: AuthService = AuthService.getInstance()
11	  @State isLoggedIn: boolean = false
12	  @State currentUser: UserInfo | null = null
13	  
14	  async aboutToAppear() {
15	    this.isLoggedIn = await this.authService.isLoggedIn()
16	    if (this.isLoggedIn) {
17	      this.currentUser = await this.authService.getCurrentUser()
18	    }
19	  }
20	  
21	  async handleLogout() {
22	    await this.authService.logout()
23	    this.isLoggedIn = false
24	    this.currentUser = null
25	  }
26	  
27	  build() {
28	    Column() {
29	      // 顶部导航栏
30	      Row() {
31	        Button('返回')
32	          .fontSize(16)
33	          .backgroundColor(Color.Transparent)
34	          .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
35	          .onClick(() => {
36	            router.back()
37	          })
38	        
39	        Text('我的')
40	          .fontSize(20)
41	          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Bold)
42	          .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
43	          .layoutWeight(1)
44	          .textAlign(TextAlign.Center)
45	        
46	        // 占位，保持标题居中
47	        Text('')
48	          .width(60)
49	      }
50	      .width('100%')
51	      .height(56)
52	      .padding({ left: 16, right: 16 })
53	      .backgroundColor('#1A1A1A')
54	      
55	      // 用户信息区域
56	      Column() {
57	        if (this.isLoggedIn && this.currentUser) {
58	          // 已登录
59	          Column({ space: 12 }) {
60	            // 头像
61	            Text(this.currentUser.nickname?.charAt(0) || '用')
62	              .fontSize(40)
63	              .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
64	              .width(80)
65	              .height(80)
66	              .borderRadius(40)
67	              .backgroundColor('#4A90E2')
68	              .textAlign(TextAlign.Center)
69	              .lineHeight(80)
70	            
71	            // 昵称
72	            Text(this.currentUser.nickname || '用户')
73	              .fontSize(20)
74	              .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
75	              .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
76	            
77	            // 手机号
78	            Text(this.currentUser.phone)
79	              .fontSize(14)
80	              .fontColor('#999999')
81	          }
82	          .padding({ top: 40, bottom: 40 })
83	        } else {
84	          // 未登录
85	          Column({ space: 16 }) {
86	            Text('👤')
87	              .fontSize(60)
88	            
89	            Text('未登录')
90	              .fontSize(18)
91	              .fontColor('#999999')
92	            
93	            Row({ space: 12 }) {
94	              Button('登录')
95	                .fontSize(16)
96	                .width(100)
97	                .height(40)
98	                .backgroundColor('#4A90E2')
99	                .onClick(() => {
100	                  router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/LoginPage' })
101	                })
102	              
103	              Button('注册')
104	                .fontSize(16)
105	                .width(100)
106	                .height(40)
107	                .backgroundColor('#666666')
108	                .onClick(() => {

110	                })
111	            }
112	          }
113	          .padding({ top: 40, bottom: 40 })
114	        }
115	      }
116	      .width('100%')
117	      .backgroundColor('#2A2A2A')
118	      
119	      // 功能列表
120	      Column() {
121	        // 我的收藏
122	        this.MenuItem('⭐', '我的收藏', async () => {
123	          if (!await this.authService.isLoggedIn()) {
124	            router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/LoginPage' })
125	            return
126	          }
127	          router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/FavoritesPage' })
128	        })
129

131	        
132	        // 导航历史

134	          if (!await this.authService.isLoggedIn()) {
135	            router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/LoginPage' })
136	            return
137	          }
138	          router.pushUrl({ url: 'pages/HistoryPage' })
139	        })
140

142	          Divider().color('#333333')
143	          
144	          // 退出登录
145	          this.MenuItem('🚪', '退出登录', () => {
146	            this.handleLogout()
147	          })
148	        }
149	      }
150	      .width('100%')
151	      .backgroundColor('#1A1A1A')
152	      .margin({ top: 12 })
153	      .borderRadius(12)
154	      .padding({ left: 16, right: 16 })
155	    }
156	    .width('100%')
157	    .height('100%')
158	    .backgroundColor('#000000')
159	  }
160	  
161	  @Builder
162	  MenuItem(icon: string, title: string, onClick: () => void) {
163	    Row() {
164	      Text(icon)
165	        .fontSize(24)
166	        .margin({ right: 16 })
167	      
168	      Text(title)
169	        .fontSize(16)
170	        .fontColor('#FFFFFF')
171	        .layoutWeight(1)
172	      
173	      Text('›')
174	        .fontSize(24)
175	        .fontColor('#666666')
176	    }
177	    .width('100%')
178	    .height(56)
179	    .onClick(onClick)
180	  }
181	}
```

```text
120	      }
121	    } catch (err) {
122	      console.error('[HttpService] 加载Token失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
123	    }
124	  }
125	  
126	  /**
127	   * 发送HTTP请求
128	   */
129	  private async request<T>(
130	    method: http.RequestMethod,
131	    url: string,
132	    data?: Object,
133	    needAuth: boolean = true
134	  ): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
135	    await this.ensureInitialized();
136	
137	    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
138	      const httpRequest = http.createHttp();
139	      
140	      const fullUrl = `${ApiConfig.BASE_URL}${url}`;
141	      console.log(`[HttpService] ========== 请求详情 ==========`);
142	      console.log(`[HttpService] 方法: ${method}`);
143	      console.log(`[HttpService] BASE_URL: ${ApiConfig.BASE_URL}`);
144	      console.log(`[HttpService] 路径: ${url}`);
145	      console.log(`[HttpService] 完整URL: ${fullUrl}`);
146	      console.log(`[HttpService] ================================`);
147	      
148	      const headers: Record<string, string> = {
149	        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
150	      };
151	      
152	      // 添加认证头
153	      if (needAuth && this.token) {
154	        headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${this.token}`;
155	      }
156	      
157	      const options: http.HttpRequestOptions = {
158	        method,
159	        header: headers,
160	        readTimeout: ApiConfig.TIMEOUT,
161	        connectTimeout: ApiConfig.TIMEOUT
162	      };
163	      
164	      // 添加请求体
165	      if (data && (method === http.RequestMethod.POST || method === http.RequestMethod.PUT)) {
166	        options.extraData = JSON.stringify(data);
167	        console.log('[HttpService] 请求数据:', JSON.stringify(data));
168	      }
169	      
170	      console.log('[HttpService] 开始发送请求...');
171	      
172	      httpRequest.request(fullUrl, options, (err: Error, data: http.HttpResponse) => {
173	        console.log('[HttpService] 收到响应回调');
174	        
175	        if (err) {
176	          console.error('[HttpService] ========== 错误详情 ==========');
177	          console.error('[HttpService] 请求失败:', JSON.stringify(err));
178	          console.error('[HttpService] ================================');
179	          const errorMessage = this.getErrorMessage(err);
180	          reject({
181	            code: -1,
182	            message: errorMessage
183	          });
184	          httpRequest.destroy();
185	          return;
186	        }
187	        
188	        try {
189	          const responseCode = data.responseCode;
190	          const resultString = data.result as string;
191	          
192	          console.log(`[HttpService] ========== 响应详情 ==========`);
193	          console.log(`[HttpService] HTTP状态码: ${responseCode}`);
194	          console.log(`[HttpService] 响应内容: ${resultString}`);
195	          console.log(`[HttpService] 响应头: ${JSON.stringify(data.header)}`);
196	          console.log(`[HttpService] ================================`);
197	          
198	          // 尝试解析响应体
199	          let response: ApiResponse<T>;
200	          try {
201	            response = JSON.parse(resultString) as ApiResponse<T>;
202	          } catch (parseErr) {
203	            console.error('[HttpService] 响应解析失败:', JSON.stringify(parseErr));
204	            // 如果解析失败，使用HTTP状态码生成错误信息
205	            reject({
206	              code: responseCode,
207	              message: this.getHttpStatusMessage(responseCode)
208	            });
209	            httpRequest.destroy();
210	            return;
211	          }
212	          
213	          // 处理HTTP状态码
214	          if (responseCode !== 200 && responseCode !== 201) {
215	            // 返回后端的实际错误信息
216	            reject(response);
217	            httpRequest.destroy();
218	            return;
219	          }
220	          
221	          // 处理401未授权
222	          if (response.code === 401) {
223	            console.log('[HttpService] Token无效，清除本地token');
224	            this.clearToken();
225	          }
226	          
227	          console.log(`[HttpService] 请求成功: ${response.code} ${response.message}`);
228	          resolve(response);
229	        } catch (parseErr) {
230	          console.error('[HttpService] 响应解析失败:', JSON.stringify(parseErr));
231	          reject({
232	            code: -1,
233	            message: '响应解析失败'
234	          });
235	        } finally {
236	          httpRequest.destroy();
237	        }
238	      });
239	    });
240	  }
241	  
242	  /**
243	   * 获取错误信息
244	   */
245	  private getErrorMessage(err: Error): string {
246	    const errorStr = JSON.stringify(err);
247	    const errorObj = JSON.parse(errorStr) as Record<string, Object>;
248	    const errorCode = errorObj['code'] as number;
249	    
250	    // 网络错误映射
251	    const errorMap: Record<number, string> = {
252	      2300001: '协议不支持',
253	      2300003: 'URL格式错误',
254	      2300005: '无法解析远程主机名',
255	      2300006: '无法连接到服务器',
256	      2300007: '无法连接到代理服务器',
257	      2300008: '无效的服务器响应',
258	      2300009: '远程服务器拒绝访问',
259	      2300023: '写入数据失败',
260	      2300025: '上传失败',
261	      2300026: '读取数据失败',
262	      2300027: '内存不足',
263	      2300028: '操作超时',
264	      2300047: '请求数量过多',
265	      2300052: '服务器返回空数据',
266	      2300055: '发送网络数据失败',
267	      2300056: '接收网络数据失败',
268	      2300058: '本地SSL证书问题',
269	      2300059: '无法使用指定的SSL加密',
270	      2300060: '远程SSL证书无效',
271	      2300077: 'SSL CA证书无效',
272	      2300078: '远程服务器无法访问'
273	    };
274	    
275	    return errorMap[errorCode] || '网络请求失败';
276	  }
277	  
278	  /**
279	   * 获取HTTP状态码对应的错误信息
280	   */
281	  private getHttpStatusMessage(statusCode: number): string {
282	    const statusMap: Record<number, string> = {
283	      400: '请求参数错误',
284	      401: '登录已过期，请重新登录',
285	      403: '无权限访问',
286	      404: '请求的资源不存在',
287	      500: '服务器错误，请稍后重试',
288	      502: '网关错误',
289	      503: '服务暂时不可用，请稍后重试',
290	      504: '网关超时'
291	    };
292	    
293	    return statusMap[statusCode] || `请求失败 (${statusCode})`;
294	  }
295	  
296	  /**
297	   * GET请求
298	   */
299	  async get<T>(url: string, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
300	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.GET, url, undefined, needAuth);
301	  }
302	  
303	  /**
304	   * POST请求
305	   */
306	  async post<T>(url: string, data: Object, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
307	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.POST, url, data, needAuth);
308	  }
309	  
310	  /**
311	   * PUT请求
312	   */
313	  async put<T>(url: string, data: Object, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
314	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.PUT, url, data, needAuth);
315	  }
316	  
317	  /**
318	   * DELETE请求
319	   */
320	  async delete<T>(url: string, needAuth: boolean = true): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
321	    return this.request<T>(http.RequestMethod.DELETE, url, undefined, needAuth);
322	  }
323	}
```

```text
34	    try {
35	      console.log('[FavoriteService] 获取收藏列表, category:', category);
36

190	    try {

200	          place.name.toLowerCase().includes(lowerKeyword)
201	        );
202	      }
203	      
204	      return [];
205	    } catch (err) {
206	      console.error('[FavoriteService] 搜索收藏失败:', err);
207	      return [];
208	    }
209	  }

235	    } catch (err) {

237	    }
238	  }
```

```text
202	  /**
203	   * 检查登录状态
204	   */
205	  async isLoggedIn(): Promise<boolean> {
206	    const token = await this.httpService.getToken();
207	    return token !== '' && token !== null && token !== undefined;

209	  
210	  /**
211	   * 获取当前用户
212	   */
213	  async getCurrentUser(): Promise<UserInfo | null> {
214	    if (this.currentUser) {
215	      return this.currentUser;
216	    }
217	    
218	    // 尝试从本地存储加载
219	    await this.loadUserInfo();
220	    return this.currentUser;
221	  }
222	  
223	  /**
224	   * 保存用户信息到Preferences
225	   */
226	  private async saveUserInfo(userInfo: UserInfo): Promise<void> {
227	    try {
228	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
229	        await this.preferencesInstance.put(ApiConfig.USER_KEY, JSON.stringify(userInfo));
230	        await this.preferencesInstance.flush();
231	        console.log('[AuthService] 用户信息已保存');
232	      }
233	    } catch (err) {
234	      console.error('[AuthService] 保存用户信息失败:', err);
235	    }
236	  }
237	  
238	  /**
239	   * 从Preferences加载用户信息
240	   */
241	  private async loadUserInfo(): Promise<void> {
242	    try {
243	      if (this.preferencesInstance) {
244	        const userInfoStr = await this.preferencesInstance.get(ApiConfig.USER_KEY, '');
245	        if (userInfoStr && userInfoStr !== '') {
246	          this.currentUser = JSON.parse(userInfoStr as string) as UserInfo;
247	          console.log('[AuthService] 用户信息已加载');
248	        }
249	      }
250	    } catch (err) {
251	      console.error('[AuthService] 加载用户信息失败:', err);
252	    }
253	  }
254	}
```

```text
200	  backToCurrentLocation(): void {

204	        longitude: this.longitude
205	      };

211	   * 开始导航
212	   */
213	  async startNavigation(destination: Location) {
214	    try {
215	      await this.navigationService.startNavigation(destination);
216	      this.isNavigating = true;
217	      this.showSearchPanel = false;
218	    } catch (err) {

220	    }
221	  }

224	   * 停止导航
225	   */
226	  stopNavigation() {

228	    this.isNavigating = false;
229	    this.navigationInfo = null;
230	    this.addressText = "实时定位";
231	  }
232	  
233	  /**
234	   * 导航状态更新
235	   */
236	  onNavigationUpdate(info: NavigationInfo) {
237	    this.navigationInfo = info;
238	    
239	    // 更新显示信息
240	    if (info.remainingDistance > 1000) {
241	      this.remainingDistance = `${(info.remainingDistance / 1000).toFixed(1)} 公里`;
242	    } else {
243	      this.remainingDistance = `${Math.round(info.remainingDistance)} 米`;
244	    }
245	    
246	    const hours = Math.floor(info.remainingTime / 3600);
247	    const minutes = Math.floor((info.remainingTime % 3600) / 60);
248	    if (hours > 0) {
249	      this.remainingTime = `${hours}小时${minutes}分钟`;
250	    } else {
251	      this.remainingTime = `${minutes}分钟`;
252	    }
253	    
254	    this.nextInstruction = info.nextInstruction;
255	    this.addressText = info.nextInstruction;
256	    
257	    // 到达目的地
258	    if (info.state === NavigationState.ARRIVED) {
259	      this.voiceService.speakArrival();
260	      setTimeout(() => {
261	        this.stopNavigation();
262	      }, 3000);
263	    }
264	  }
265	  
266	  /**
267	   * 搜索POI
268	   */
269	  async searchPOI() {
270	    if (!this.searchKeyword.trim()) return;
271	    
272	    this.isSearching = true;
273	    try {
274	      const currentLocation: Location = { latitude: this.latitude, longitude: this.longitude };
275	      const results = await this.mapService.searchPOI(
276	        this.searchKeyword,
277	        currentLocation,
278	        5000
279	      );
280	      this.searchResults = results;
281	    } catch (err) {
282	      console.error('Search error:', err);
283	    } finally {
284	      this.isSearching = false;
285	    }
286	  }
287	  
288	  /**
289	   * 选择POI并导航
290	   */
291	  selectPOI(poi: POIResult) {
292	    this.startNavigation(poi.location);
293	  }
294	  
295	  /**
296	   * 收藏当前位置或POI
297	   */
298	  async addToFavorites(name: string, address: string, location: Location) {
299	    try {
300	      console.log('[Navigation] 开始收藏:', name);
301	      console.log('[Navigation] 地址:', address);
302	      console.log('[Navigation] 坐标:', location.latitude, location.longitude);
303	      
304	      const isLoggedIn = await this.authService.isLoggedIn();
305	      console.log('[Navigation] 登录状态:', isLoggedIn);
306	      
307	      if (!isLoggedIn) {
308	        console.log('[Navigation] 未登录，提示用户登录');
309	        promptAction.showToast({
310	          message: '请先登录',
311	          duration: 2000
312	        });
313	        return;
314	      }
315	      
316	      const response = await this.favoriteService.addFavorite({
317	        name: name,
318	        address: address,
319	        latitude: location.latitude,
320	        longitude: location.longitude
321	      });
322	      
323	      console.log('[Navigation] 收藏响应代码:', response.code);
324	      console.log('[Navigation] 收藏响应消息:', response.message);
325	      console.log('[Navigation] 完整响应:', JSON.stringify(response));
326	      
327	      if (response.code === 200) {
328	        console.log('[Navigation] 收藏成功');
329	        promptAction.showToast({
330	          message: '收藏成功',
331	          duration: 2000
332	        });
333	      } else {
334	        console.error('[Navigation] 收藏失败:', response.message);
335	        promptAction.showToast({
336	          message: response.message || '收藏失败',
337	          duration: 2000
338	        });
339	      }
340	    } catch (err) {
341	      console.error('[Navigation] 收藏异常 - 类型:', typeof err);
342	      console.error('[Navigation] 收藏异常 - 详情:', JSON.stringify(err));
343	      promptAction.showToast({
344	        message: '收藏失败，请稍后重试',
345	        duration: 2000
346	      });
347	    }
348	  }
349	  
350	  /**
351	   * 加载搜索历史
352	   */
353	  async loadSearchHistory() {
354	    try {
355	      const response = await this.historyService.getHistory();
356	      // 提取最近5条搜索记录的目的地名称
357	      if (response.data && response.data.list) {
358	        this.searchHistory = response.data.list.slice(0, 5).map(item => item.endName);
359	      } else {
360	        this.searchHistory = [];
361	      }
362	    } catch (err) {
363	      console.error('[Navigation] 加载搜索历史失败:', err);
364	      this.searchHistory = [];
365	    }
366	  }
367	  
368	  /**
369	   * 保存导航历史
370	   */
371	  async saveNavigationHistory(destination: Location, destinationName: string) {
372	    try {
373	      const isLoggedIn = await this.authService.isLoggedIn();
374	      if (!isLoggedIn) {
375	        return;
376	      }
377	      
378	      await this.historyService.saveHistory({
379	        startLat: this.latitude,
380	        startLng: this.longitude,
381	        startName: '当前位置',
382	        startAddress: this.addressText,
383	        endLat: destination.latitude,
384	        endLng: destination.longitude,
385	        endName: destinationName,
386	        endAddress: destinationName,
387	        distance: 0, // 实际距离由后端计算
388	        duration: 0  // 实际时长由后端计算
389	      });
390	      
391	      console.log('[Navigation] 导航历史已保存');
392	    } catch (err) {
393	      console.error('[Navigation] 保存导航历史失败:', err);
394	    }
395	  }
396	  
397	  build() {
398	    Stack({ alignContent: Alignment.Bottom }) {
399	      // 1. 地图层 - 使用WebView加载高德地图
400	      Stack() {
401	        Web({ src: $rawfile('amap.html'), controller: this.webController })
402	          .width('100%')
403	          .height('100%')
404	          .onPageEnd(() => {
405	            console.log('地图页面加载完成');
406	            this.onMapLoad();
407	          })
408	          .onErrorReceive((event) => {
409	            console.error('地图加载错误:', event?.error);
410	          })
411	          .onConsole((event) => {
412	            // 转发WebView的console日志到ArkTS
413	            if (event && event.message) {
414	              const msg = event.message;
415	              const message = msg.getMessage();
416	              const sourceId = msg.getSourceId();
417	              const lineNumber = msg.getLineNumber();
418	              
419	              // 输出WebView日志，包含来源信息
```
</details></tool-use>
