```text
26	/**
27	 * 更新用户位置
28	 */
29	export async function updateLocation(req: Request, res: Response) {
30	  try {
31	    const userId = req.userId;
32	    const {
33	      latitude,
34	      longitude,
35	      accuracy,
36	      speed,
37	      heading,
38	      locationType = 'ip',
39	      isSharing = false
40	    } = req.body;
41	    
42	    // 验证参数
43	    if (latitude === undefined || latitude === null || longitude === undefined || longitude === null) {
44	      return res.status(400).json({
45	        code: 400,
46	        message: '缺少必要参数'
47	      });
48	    }
49	    
50	    // 检查是否已存在
51	    const existing = await query<UserLocation[]>(
52	      'SELECT id FROM user_locations WHERE user_id = ?',
53	      [userId]
54	    );
55	    
56	    if (existing.length > 0) {
57	      // 更新
58	      await query(
59	        `UPDATE user_locations 
60	         SET latitude = ?, longitude = ?, accuracy = ?, speed = ?, heading = ?, 
61	             location_type = ?, is_sharing = ?, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP 
62	         WHERE user_id = ?`,
63	        [latitude, longitude, accuracy, speed, heading, locationType, isSharing, userId]
64	      );
65	    } else {
66	      // 插入
67	      await query(
68	        `INSERT INTO user_locations 
69	         (user_id, latitude, longitude, accuracy, speed, heading, location_type, is_sharing) 
70	         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
71	        [userId, latitude, longitude, accuracy, speed, heading, locationType, isSharing]
72	      );
73	    }
74	    
75	    res.json({
76	      code: 200,
77	      message: '位置更新成功'
78	    });
79	  } catch (error) {
80	    console.error('Update location error:', error);
81	    res.status(500).json({
82	      code: 500,
83	      message: '服务器错误'
84	    });
85	  }
86	}
87	
88	/**
89	 * 获取用户位置
90	 */
91	export async function getLocation(req: Request, res: Response) {
92	  try {
93	    const userId = req.userId;
94	    const { targetUserId } = req.params;
95	    
96	    const targetId = targetUserId || userId;
97	    
98	    // 如果查询其他用户位置，需要检查共享权限
99	    if (targetId !== userId) {
100	      const shares = await query<LocationShare[]>(
101	        'SELECT * FROM location_shares WHERE sharer_id = ? AND viewer_id = ? AND is_active = TRUE',
102	        [targetId, userId]
103	      );
104	      
105	      if (shares.length === 0) {
106	        return res.status(403).json({
107	          code: 403,
108	          message: '无权查看该用户位置'
109	        });
110	      }
111	      
112	      // 检查是否过期
113	      const share = shares[0];
114	      if (share.expire_time && new Date(share.expire_time) < new Date()) {
115	        return res.status(403).json({
116	          code: 403,
117	          message: '位置共享已过期'
118	        });
119	      }
120	    }
121	    
122	    const locations = await query<UserLocation[]>(
123	      'SELECT * FROM user_locations WHERE user_id = ?',
124	      [targetId]
125	    );
126	    
127	    if (locations.length === 0) {
128	      return res.status(404).json({
129	        code: 404,
130	        message: '位置信息不存在'
131	      });
132	    }
133	    
134	    res.json({
135	      code: 200,
136	      message: '获取成功',
137	      data: locations[0]
138	    });
139	  } catch (error) {
140	    console.error('Get location error:', error);
141	    res.status(500).json({
142	      code: 500,
143	      message: '服务器错误'
144	    });
145	  }
146	}
147	
148	/**
149	 * 开启/关闭位置共享
150	 */
151	export async function toggleLocationSharing(req: Request, res: Response) {
152	  try {
153	    const userId = req.userId;
154	    const { isSharing } = req.body;
155	    
156	    if (isSharing === undefined) {
157	      return res.status(400).json({
158	        code: 400,
159	        message: '缺少必要参数'
160	      });
161	    }
162	    
163	    await query(
164	      'UPDATE user_locations SET is_sharing = ? WHERE user_id = ?',
165	      [isSharing, userId]
166	    );
167	    
168	    res.json({
169	      code: 200,
170	      message: isSharing ? '位置共享已开启' : '位置共享已关闭'
171	    });
172	  } catch (error) {
173	    console.error('Toggle location sharing error:', error);
174	    res.status(500).json({
175	      code: 500,
176	      message: '服务器错误'
177	    });
178	  }
179	}
180	
181	/**
182	 * 创建位置共享
183	 */
184	export async function createLocationShare(req: Request, res: Response) {
185	  try {
186	    const userId = req.userId;
187	    const { viewerId, expireHours } = req.body;
188	    
189	    if (!viewerId) {
190	      return res.status(400).json({
191	        code: 400,
192	        message: '缺少必要参数'
193	      });
194	    }
195	    
196	    // 检查是否已存在
197	    const existing = await query<LocationShare[]>(
198	      'SELECT id FROM location_shares WHERE sharer_id = ? AND viewer_id = ?',
199	      [userId, viewerId]
200	    );
201	    
202	    let expireTime = null;
203	    if (expireHours) {
204	      const expire = new Date();
205	      expire.setHours(expire.getHours() + expireHours);
206	      expireTime = expire.toISOString().slice(0, 19).replace('T', ' ');
207	    }
208	    
209	    if (existing.length > 0) {
210	      // 更新
211	      await query(
212	        'UPDATE location_shares SET expire_time = ?, is_active = TRUE WHERE sharer_id = ? AND viewer_id = ?',
213	        [expireTime, userId, viewerId]
214	      );
215	    } else {
216	      // 插入
217	      await query(
218	        'INSERT INTO location_shares (sharer_id, viewer_id, expire_time, is_active) VALUES (?, ?, ?, TRUE)',
219	        [userId, viewerId, expireTime]
220	      );
221	    }
222	    
223	    res.status(201).json({
224	      code: 200,
225	      message: '位置共享创建成功'
226	    });
227	  } catch (error) {
228	    console.error('Create location share error:', error);
229	    res.status(500).json({
230	      code: 500,
231	      message: '服务器错误'
232	    });
233	  }
234	}
235	
236	/**
237	 * 获取位置共享列表
238	 */
239	export async function getLocationShares(req: Request, res: Response) {
240	  try {
241	    const userId = req.userId;
242	    const { type = 'sharing' } = req.query; // sharing: 我分享的, viewing: 我查看的
243	    
244	    let sql = '';
245	    if (type === 'sharing') {
246	      sql = `SELECT ls.*, u.nickname, u.phone 
247	             FROM location_shares ls 
248	             LEFT JOIN users u ON ls.viewer_id = u.id 
249	             WHERE ls.sharer_id = ? AND ls.is_active = TRUE 
250	             ORDER BY ls.created_at DESC`;
251	    } else {
252	      sql = `SELECT ls.*, u.nickname, u.phone 
253	             FROM location_shares ls 
254	             LEFT JOIN users u ON ls.sharer_id = u.id 
255	             WHERE ls.viewer_id = ? AND ls.is_active = TRUE 
256	             ORDER BY ls.created_at DESC`;
257	    }
258	    
259	    const shares = await query<any[]>(sql, [userId]);
260	    
261	    res.json({
262	      code: 200,
263	      message: '获取成功',
264	      data: shares
265	    });
266	  } catch (error) {
267	    console.error('Get location shares error:', error);
268	    res.status(500).json({
269	      code: 500,
270	      message: '服务器错误'
271	    });
272	  }
273	}
274	
275	/**
276	 * 取消位置共享
277	 */
278	export async function cancelLocationShare(req: Request, res: Response) {
279	  try {
280	    const userId = req.userId;
281	    const { id } = req.params;
282	    
283	    const result: any = await query(
284	      'UPDATE location_shares SET is_active = FALSE WHERE id = ? AND sharer_id = ?',
285	      [id, userId]
286	    );
287	    
288	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
289	      return res.status(404).json({
290	        code: 404,
291	        message: '共享记录不存在'
292	      });
293	    }
294	    
295	    res.json({
296	      code: 200,
297	      message: '取消成功'
298	    });
299	  } catch (error) {
300	    console.error('Cancel location share error:', error);
301	    res.status(500).json({
302	      code: 500,
303	      message: '服务器错误'
304	    });
305	  }
306	}
307	
308	/**
309	 * 获取附近共享位置的用户
310	 */
311	export async function getNearbySharedUsers(req: Request, res: Response) {
312	  try {
313	    const userId = req.userId;
314	    const { latitude, longitude, radius = 5000 } = req.query; // radius单位：米
315	    
316	    if (latitude === undefined || latitude === null || longitude === undefined || longitude === null) {
317	      return res.status(400).json({
318	        code: 400,
319	        message: '缺少必要参数'
320	      });
321	    }
322	    
323	    // 获取我可以查看的用户列表
324	    const shares = await query<LocationShare[]>(
325	      'SELECT sharer_id FROM location_shares WHERE viewer_id = ? AND is_active = TRUE',
326	      [userId]
327	    );
328	    
329	    if (shares.length === 0) {
330	      return res.json({
331	        code: 200,
332	        message: '获取成功',
333	        data: []
334	      });
335	    }
336	    
337	    const sharerIds = shares.map(s => s.sharer_id);
338	    
339	    // 计算距离并筛选
340	    const sql = `
341	      SELECT ul.*, u.nickname, u.avatar,
342	             (6371000 * acos(cos(radians(?)) * cos(radians(ul.latitude)) * 
343	              cos(radians(ul.longitude) - radians(?)) + 
344	              sin(radians(?)) * sin(radians(ul.latitude)))) AS distance
345	      FROM user_locations ul
346	      LEFT JOIN users u ON ul.user_id = u.id
347	      WHERE ul.user_id IN (${sharerIds.join(',')}) AND ul.is_sharing = TRUE
348	      HAVING distance <= ?
349	      ORDER BY distance ASC
350	    `;
351	    
352	    const nearbyUsers = await query<any[]>(sql, [latitude, longitude, latitude, radius]);
353	    
354	    res.json({
355	      code: 200,
356	      message: '获取成功',
357	      data: nearbyUsers
358	    });
359	  } catch (error) {
360	    console.error('Get nearby shared users error:', error);
361	    res.status(500).json({
362	      code: 500,
363	      message: '服务器错误'
364	    });
365	  }
366	}
367
```

```text
18	 */
19	export async function recordVisit(req: Request, res: Response) {
20	  try {
21	    const userId = req.userId;
22	    const { name, address, latitude, longitude, timePattern } = req.body;
23	    
24	    // 验证参数
25	    if (!name || latitude === undefined || latitude === null || longitude === undefined || longitude === null) {
26	      return res.status(400).json({
27	        code: 400,
28	        message: '缺少必要参数'
29	      });
30	    }
31	    
32	    // 检查是否已存在（使用坐标判断，允许小范围误差）
33	    const existing = await query<FrequentLocation[]>(
34	      `SELECT * FROM frequent_locations 
35	       WHERE user_id = ? 
36	       AND ABS(latitude - ?) < 0.001 
37	       AND ABS(longitude - ?) < 0.001`,
38	      [userId, latitude, longitude]
39	    );
40	    
41	    if (existing.length > 0) {
42	      // 更新访问次数和时间
43	      await query(
44	        `UPDATE frequent_locations 
45	         SET visit_count = visit_count + 1, 
46	             last_visit = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
47	             time_pattern = ?
48	         WHERE id = ?`,
49	        [timePattern, existing[0].id]
50	      );
51	      
52	      res.json({
53	        code: 200,
54	        message: '访问记录更新成功',
55	        data: {
56	          id: existing[0].id,
57	          visitCount: existing[0].visit_count + 1
58	        }
59	      });
60	    } else {
61	      // 新增记录
62	      const result: any = await query(
63	        `INSERT INTO frequent_locations 
64	         (user_id, name, address, latitude, longitude, visit_count, time_pattern) 
65	         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1, ?)`,
66	        [userId, name, address, latitude, longitude, timePattern]
67	      );
68	      
69	      res.status(201).json({
70	        code: 200,
71	        message: '访问记录创建成功',
72	        data: {
73	          id: result.insertId,
74	          visitCount: 1
75	        }
76	      });
77	    }
78	  } catch (error) {
79	    console.error('Record visit error:', error);
80	    res.status(500).json({
81	      code: 500,
82	      message: '服务器错误'
83	    });
84	  }
85	}
86	
87	/**
88	 * 获取常去地点列表
89	 */
90	export async function getFrequentLocations(req: Request, res: Response) {
91	  try {
92	    const userId = req.userId;
93	    const { limit = 10, minVisits = 2 } = req.query;
94	    
95	    const locations = await query<FrequentLocation[]>(
96	      `SELECT * FROM frequent_locations 
97	       WHERE user_id = ? AND visit_count >= ? 
98	       ORDER BY visit_count DESC, last_visit DESC 
99	       LIMIT ?`,
100	      [userId, Number(minVisits), Number(limit)]
101	    );
102	    
103	    res.json({
104	      code: 200,
105	      message: '获取成功',
106	      data: locations
107	    });
108	  } catch (error) {
109	    console.error('Get frequent locations error:', error);
110	    res.status(500).json({
111	      code: 500,
112	      message: '服务器错误'
113	    });
114	  }
115	}
116	
117	/**
118	 * 获取智能推荐地点
119	 */
120	export async function getRecommendedLocations(req: Request, res: Response) {
121	  try {
122	    const userId = req.userId;
123	    const { timePattern, limit = 5 } = req.query;
124	    
125	    let sql = `SELECT * FROM frequent_locations WHERE user_id = ?`;
126	    const params: any[] = [userId];
127	    
128	    if (timePattern) {
129	      sql += ' AND time_pattern = ?';
130	      params.push(timePattern);
131	    }
132	    
133	    sql += ' ORDER BY visit_count DESC, last_visit DESC LIMIT ?';
134	    params.push(Number(limit));
135	    
136	    const locations = await query<FrequentLocation[]>(sql, params);
137
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
65	export async function addFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
66	  try {
67	    console.log('=== 收藏请求开始 ===');

73	    
74	    // 验证userId
75	    if (!userId) {
76	      console.error('❌ userId未定义');

79	        message: '用户未认证'
80	      });
81	    }
82	    
83	    // 验证参数
84	    if (!name || !address || latitude === undefined || latitude === null || longitude === undefined || longitude === null) {
85	      console.error('❌ 缺少必要参数:', { name, address, latitude, longitude });
86	      return res.status(400).json({
87	        code: 400,
88	        message: '缺少必要参数'
89	      });
90	    }
91

99	    );
100	    
101	    if (existing.length > 0) {
102	      console.log('⚠️ 该地点已收藏');
103	      return res.status(400).json({
104	        code: 400,
105	        message: '该地点已收藏'
106	      });
107	    }
108

110	    const result: any = await query(

113	    );

137	export async function updateFavorite(req: Request, res: Response) {
138	  try {
139	    const userId = req.userId;

142

145	      'SELECT id FROM favorites WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',

147	    );

150	      return res.status(404).json({
151	        code: 404,
152	        message: '收藏不存在'
153	      });
154	    }
155	    
156	    const updates: string[] = [];
157	    const params: any[] = [];
158	    
159	    if (name) {
160	      updates.push('name = ?');
161	      params.push(name);
162	    }
163	    if (address) {
164	      updates.push('address = ?');
165	      params.push(address);
166	    }
167	    if (category) {
168	      updates.push('category = ?');
169	      params.push(category);
170	    }
171	    if (icon) {
172	      updates.push('icon = ?');
173	      params.push(icon);
174	    }
175	    
176	    if (updates.length === 0) {
177	      return res.status(400).json({
178	        code: 400,
179	        message: '没有要更新的内容'
180	      });
181	    }
182	    
183	    params.push(id, userId);
184	    
185	    await query(
186	      `UPDATE favorites SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`,
187	      params
```

```text
110	/**
111	 * 保存路线方案
112	 */
113	export async function saveRoutePlan(req: Request, res: Response) {
114	  try {
115	    const userId = req.userId;
116	    const {
117	      name,
118	      startName,
119	      startLat,
120	      startLng,
121	      endName,
122	      endLat,
123	      endLng,
124	      waypoints,
125	      distance,
126	      duration,
127	      strategy = 0,
128	      polyline,
129	      steps,
130	      isFavorite = false
131	    } = req.body;
132	    
133	    // 验证参数
134	    if (!startName || !startLat || !startLng || !endName || !endLat || !endLng) {
135	      return res.status(400).json({
136	        code: 400,
137	        message: '缺少必要参数'
138	      });
139	    }
140	    
141	    const result: any = await query(
142	      `INSERT INTO route_plans 
143	       (user_id, name, start_name, start_lat, start_lng, end_name, end_lat, end_lng, 
144	        waypoints, distance, duration, strategy, polyline, steps, is_favorite) 
145	       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
146	      [userId, name, startName, startLat, startLng, endName, endLat, endLng,
147	       waypoints ? JSON.stringify(waypoints) : null,
148	       distance, duration, strategy, polyline,
149	       steps ? JSON.stringify(steps) : null,
150	       isFavorite]
151	    );
152	    
153	    res.status(201).json({
154	      code: 200,
155	      message: '保存成功',
156	      data: {
157	        id: result.insertId
158	      }
159	    });
160	  } catch (error) {
161	    console.error('Save route plan error:', error);
162	    res.status(500).json({
163	      code: 500,
164	      message: '服务器错误'
165	    });
166	  }
167	}
168	
169	/**
170	 * 更新路线方案
171	 */
172	export async function updateRoutePlan(req: Request, res: Response) {
173	  try {
174	    const userId = req.userId;
175	    const { id } = req.params;
176	    const { name, isFavorite } = req.body;
177	    
178	    // 验证权限
179	    const plans = await query<RoutePlan[]>(
180	      'SELECT id FROM route_plans WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
181	      [id, userId]
182	    );
183	    
184	    if (plans.length === 0) {
185	      return res.status(404).json({
186	        code: 404,
187	        message: '路线方案不存在'
188	      });
189	    }
190	    
191	    const updates: string[] = [];
192	    const params: any[] = [];
193	    
194	    if (name !== undefined) {
195	      updates.push('name = ?');
196	      params.push(name);
197	    }
198	    if (isFavorite !== undefined) {
199	      updates.push('is_favorite = ?');
200	      params.push(isFavorite);
201	    }
202	    
203	    if (updates.length === 0) {
204	      return res.status(400).json({
205	        code: 400,
206	        message: '没有要更新的内容'
207	      });
208	    }
209	    
210	    params.push(id, userId);
211	    
212	    await query(
213	      `UPDATE route_plans SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?`,
214	      params
215	    );
216	    
217	    res.json({
218	      code: 200,
219	      message: '更新成功'
220	    });
221	  } catch (error) {
222	    console.error('Update route plan error:', error);
223	    res.status(500).json({
224	      code: 500,
225	      message: '服务器错误'
226	    });
227	  }
228	}
229	
230	/**
231	 * 使用路线方案（增加使用次数）
232	 */
233	export async function useRoutePlan(req: Request, res: Response) {
234	  try {
235	    const userId = req.userId;
236	    const { id } = req.params;
237	    
238	    // 验证权限
239	    const plans = await query<RoutePlan[]>(
240	      'SELECT * FROM route_plans WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
241	      [id, userId]
242	    );
243	    
244	    if (plans.length === 0) {
245	      return res.status(404).json({
246	        code: 404,
247	        message: '路线方案不存在'
248	      });
249	    }
250	    
251	    // 增加使用次数
252	    await query(
253	      'UPDATE route_plans SET use_count = use_count + 1 WHERE id = ?',
254	      [id]
255	    );
256	    
257	    res.json({
258	      code: 200,
259	      message: '使用成功',
260	      data: plans[0]
261	    });
262	  } catch (error) {
263	    console.error('Use route plan error:', error);
264	    res.status(500).json({
265	      code: 500,
266	      message: '服务器错误'
267	    });
268	  }
269	}
270	
271	/**
272	 * 删除路线方案
273	 */
274	export async function deleteRoutePlan(req: Request, res: Response) {
275	  try {
276	    const userId = req.userId;
277	    const { id } = req.params;
278	    
279	    const result: any = await query(
280	      'DELETE FROM route_plans WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?',
281	      [id, userId]
282	    );
283	    
284	    if (result.affectedRows === 0) {
285	      return res.status(404).json({
286	        code: 404,
287	        message: '路线方案不存在'
288	      });
289	    }
290	    
291	    res.json({
292	      code: 200,
293	      message: '删除成功'
294	    });
295	  } catch (error) {
296	    console.error('Delete route plan error:', error);
297	    res.status(500).json({
298	      code: 500,
299	      message: '服务器错误'
300	    });
301	  }
302	}
303
```
